◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
空间站的角落里，属于造物们的定向越野大赛正在悄然举行。去看看都有些什么好玩的，并为你支持的小家伙呐喊助威吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「点心糕饼向前冲」活动中，每场比赛共有8名玩家参与观赛并为选手应援。每个赛段结束时，会根据自己应援的选手获得的名次返还应援消耗的「蹦蹦点心」。
● 在比赛过程中，玩家可以使用赛场道具来影响比赛，更高级的赛场还会开放新的功能。
● 从高级赛场开始将会开放联机，开拓者可以与来自其他世界的开拓者进行一同观看比赛。
● 首次观看高级赛场的比赛后将解锁点心兑现，可将多余的「蹦蹦点心」兑换为奇巧零食、灵之珠泪等奖励。

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 累积观看比赛获取观赛积分达到一定数量，即可领取观赛奖励。

◆ 限时奖励 ◆
● 限时活动期间，通过完成指定任务目标，可获取对应奖励。

◆ 活动提示 ◆
● 「点心糕饼向前冲」限时活动结束后，开拓者将无法获取活动期间的限时奖励，但仍可前往场景禁闭舱段与「盹盹咪」对话体验活动并获取常驻奖励。
E:
◆ Overview ◆
In a corner of the space station, a special obstacle race for the creations is secretly underway. Come check out what fun awaits and cheer on your favorite little ones!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In the Snack Dash event, 8 players will participate as observers and support contestants in each match. At the end of each segment, you will obtain a refund of the amount of Bounce-Bounce Snacks you consumed based on the ranking of the contestant you supported.
● During the match, players can deploy arena items to influence the game, and more advanced arenas will unlock new functions.
● Co-op will be made available from the Advanced Arena. The Trailblazer will be able to watch the match together with trailblazers from other worlds.
● Snack Exchange will be unlocked after watching a match in the Advanced Arena for the first time. You can exchange Bounce-Bounce Snacks for rewards such as Trick Snacks and Tears of Souls.

◆ Permanent Rewards ◆
● Watch matches and accumulate a certain number of total Spectator Points to claim Spectator Rewards.

◆ Limited-time Rewards ◆
● During the limited-time event, completing specified missions will earn you corresponding rewards.

◆ Event Reminders ◆
● After the Snack Dash limited-time event ends, Trailblazers will no longer be able to obtain the limited-time rewards, but they can still visit the seclusion zone map to speak with Dozing Meow, experience the event, and obtain permanent rewards.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
在「初花习剑录」中，你将作为剑术助教，安排三月七的练剑日程，并帮助她领悟剑招，在<unbreak>15</unbreak>日后击败斯科特。

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 每天可以安排4次三月七的日程，通过基础训练增加属性，为学习剑招打下坚实的基础。
● 通过学习更强的剑招，不断让三月七突破境界，直指剑心初成。
● 活动中有多个习剑奇遇故事，可通过经历不同的仙舟奇遇、协助同伴、练剑轶事等来完成故事。在不同的习剑奇遇中，甚至最终完成故事的方式也会有所不同。

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 每完成一个不同的故事结局，都可以领取收集奖励。另外累积完成一定结局后，还可以获得三月七•巡猎命途的星魂解锁道具。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
In Saga of Primaveral Blade, as the swordplay assistant, you will be arranging March 7th's Swordplay Sessions and helping her with comprehending Sword Moves to prepare her to defeat Skott in <unbreak>15</unbreak> days.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● You can schedule up to 4 sessions for March 7th each day, increasing stats through basic training to build a solid foundation for learning Sword Moves.
● By mastering stronger Sword Moves, continuously push March 7th to breakthroughs, aiming directly for Bladecore Genesis.
● There are multiple Swordart Escapade stories in the event, which can be completed through experiencing different Xianzhou Escapades, Companion Assists, and Swordart Anecdotes. In different Swordart Escapades, there are even different ways to complete the story.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● Upon completing each different story ending, you can claim collection rewards. Additionally, after accumulating a certain number of story endings, you can also obtain the Eidolon-unlocking items meant for March 7's Path of The Hunt.

C:
●最终试炼战斗形式为多层连续战斗。
●最终试炼设置6轮次倒计时。
●每1波次战斗记作1层，随层数提升，敌方不断增强，首领敌人拥有特殊战斗机制。
●造成伤害与击败敌人均可以获得试炼点数。
●通关时如有剩余轮次可获得额外试炼点数。
E:
The final trial's combat format consists of multi-tiered consecutive battles.
● Combat for the final trial have a 6-Cycle countdown.
● Each wave of battle counts as 1 tier. As the tier increases, the enemies will become stronger, and the Boss Enemy will have a special battle mechanic.
● Dealing damage and defeating enemies will earn you trial points.
● Additional trial points can be earned if there are Cycles remaining when passing the stage.

C: 使账账对<color=#f29e38ff>敌方全体</color>造成等同于托帕<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的火属性伤害。施放此战技造成伤害时，被视为发动了追加攻击。每击中1个目标，都有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>概率获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>枚<color=#f29e38ff>金币</color>。每场战斗中最多通过此方式获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>枚<color=#f29e38ff>金币</color>。
E: Numby deals Fire DMG equal to Topaz's <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> ATK to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>. When Numby deals DMG with this Skill, it is considered as a Follow-Up ATK. For each target hit, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> chance to obtain <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#f29e38ff>Gold Coins</color>. You can obtain up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#f29e38ff>Gold Coins</color> in this way per battle.

C: 在漫漫长夜的尽头，米沙最终拾回自我：「钟表匠」拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔童年美梦中懵懂无知的主角——「钟表小子」的好朋友，一名年轻的学徒，一位未来的列车机修工…同时，也是一位老无名客「开拓」之旅的起点。他已完成自己的使命，「钟表匠」已了却最后一桩夙愿。现在，匹诺康尼的未来就掌握在你们的手中。
E: With the passing of an extremely long night, Misha finally regains his identity: The oblivious main character in the childhood dream of the Watchmaker, Mikhail Char Legwork — Clockie's friend, a young apprentice, and a future Express maintenance engineer... Simultaneously, he is the origin of an aged Nameless' Trailblazing journey. Misha has completed his mission and the Watchmaker has fulfilled his final, long-awaited wish. Now, the future of Penacony is in your hands.

C: 你在创世涡心回忆着来到翁法罗斯后发生的种种——直到被赛飞儿的短信轰炸打断了思绪。她邀请你前往斯缇科西亚寻宝，或许是为了转换心情，你欣然应允，却没想她扮作盗火行者进行恶作剧，吓了你跟迷迷一大跳。
E: As you reminisce about your time in Amphoreus at the Vortex of Genesis, Cipher's barrage of messages shatters your reverie. She invites you on a treasure hunt through Styxia—a welcome distraction. You agree to this, only to be startled when she ambushes you and Mem as a practical joke, disguised as the Flame Reaver.

C: 雅利洛债务危机告一段落后，一款名叫《以太战线》的游戏席卷了贝洛伯格的手机市场。\n在公司员工维尔德的强烈推荐下，你和三月七完成了以太灵决斗的初体验，并决心向冠军之路发起挑战。
E: Following the resolution of the Jarilo debt crisis, a game called Aetherium Wars has become a sensation in the Belobog game market.\nUpon Wilder's recommendation, you and March 7th experienced your first Aether Spirit duel, determined to achieve the championship.

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>惊险</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Thriller</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 循着怀表的滴答声，船员们很快在雪原中找到了迷路的钟表小子——也拿回了他紧握的帽子。
E: Following the tick-tick-tick of the pocket watch, the crew quickly finds the lost Clockie amidst the snow drifts — and the missing hat he is tightly clutching.

C: 船员们在这里得到了休息，但依然有些紧张。\n「滴答，陌生的天花板……」
E: The crew gets some rest here, but cannot shake a feeling of anxiety.\n"Tick-tock, this ceiling is so unfamiliar to me..."

C: 趁防守不备，石头老板发动了突袭，许多镇民在这场袭击中受伤了。\n「滴答，不讲武德！」
E: Striking while they're unprepared, Boss Stone launches an ambush. Many townsfolk are injured in the attack.\n"Tick-tock, they don't have any respect!"

C: 镇民们全都选择开战，他们相信慈悲的石头老板会在胜利之后更加慈悲。\n「石头老板可能会要我们的剩余价值，但哈努兄弟可能要我们的命。」
E: The townsfolk all choose to go to war, and they believe that the merciful Boss Stone will grant them clemency after victory.\n"Boss Stone may want our surplus value, but Brother Hanu wants our lives."

C: 石头老板决定从钟表小子的同伴下手。他假装成镜子国王，呼唤钟表小子将镜子公主带回国。但聪明的镜子公主发现了破绽，她用镜子照出了这位国王的真身——正是戴着面具的石头老板！
E: Boss Stone decides to start with Clockie's friends. He pretends to be the Mirror King and summons Clockie to bring Mirror Princess back to the nation. But the clever Mirror Princess discovers a flaw in the plan, and uses a mirror to reveal the true identity of the "King" — it was Boss Stone wearing a mask!

C: 钟表小子提议在美梦小镇建设十二条不同的街道，让不同喜好的宾客都能有喜欢的景点。\n「滴答，猫头鹰老师，木头老爷会给批预算的…应该会！」
E: Clockie thus proposed the construction of twelve different streets in Dreamville to cater to guests with different preferences.\n"Tick-tock, Professor Owl and Old Man Wood will approve the budget for this... I'm sure they will!"

C: 钟表小子写了许多罗盘号上的冒险故事，至于美梦小镇，他更希望未来的镇民亲自见证这里的故事。\n「滴答，我眼中的世界是透过我的表盘看到的，你眼中的世界一定不一样！」
E: Clockie wrote many stories about his adventures on The Compass. As for Dreamville, he hoped that the future townsfolk would witness the stories themselves.\n"Tick-tock, I see the world through my clock face. I believe it must be different from yours through your eyes!"

C: 坏镇民引来了小镇外的怪物，街道上一片混乱，哈努兄弟留下的小弟们都跑到了街上维持秩序……\n「等等，那谁去保护宾馆呢？」
E: The rebels brought monsters from outside into the town, leaving the streets in pandemonium. Hanu's underlings who stayed in Dreamville all rushed out to the streets to maintain order...\n"Wait, who's guarding the hotel now?"

C: 为了避免好奇的镇民妨碍自己行事，钟表小子让赤红大哥为自己建造了一个隐蔽的家宅……\n「滴答，私生饭真讨厌！」
E: To avoid being disturbed by the curious townsfolk, Clockie had Boss Red build a house for him in a secluded area...\n"Tick-tock, those obsessive fans are so annoying!"

C: 木头老爷把他治好，美梦小镇不能有痛苦。\n「滴答，治不好的话…不会的，木头老爷什么病都能治好！」
E: Old Man Wood cured the person. No pain was allowed in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, if the sickness can't be cured... It won't happen because Old Man Wood can cure everything!"

C: 不，美梦小镇的所有梦想都能实现。\n「因为你的梦想就是他的梦想。」
E: No. All dreams in Dreamville could become true.\n"Because your dream is his dream."

C: 哈努兄弟和钟表小子遇到了野花姐姐，她正在被吃吃经理追杀。\n「哎呀，想要让我帮你们，就快来救救我！」
E: Brother Hanu and Clockie come across Sister Wildflower, who is currently being hunted by Lieutenant Chitters.\n"*tut* If you want my help, hurry up and save me!"

C: 哈努兄弟手下的面具小丑为敌人准备了许多礼花，想要把他们全都炸上天。但在运输礼花时，一颗流弹击中了礼花……
E: Brother Hanu's Masked Clowns are preparing many fireworks for their enemies, and want to blow them all to smithereens. But while transporting the fireworks, a stray bullet lands in the middle of them...

C: 在重建小镇的这段期间，某些小镇居民消失了，有人怀疑是流星带来的厄运，是木头老爷的阴谋……
E: During the period of rebuilding the town, some residents disappeared. Many suspect it is the doom brought by the shooting star, perhaps orchestrated by Old Man Wood...

C: 在讲座过后，钟表小子遇到了一只小泰迪，那是哈努兄弟以前的追随者，他似乎很落魄……
E: After the banquet, Clockie encounters Little Teddy, a former follower of Brother Hanu. He seems despondent...

C: 钟表小子发现，过去那些与自己冒险的牛仔同伴都变了。他们为了保住手中的土地，居然能对无辜的镇民刀枪相向，就像当时的石头老板一样贪婪……
E: Clockie realizes that the cowboys he once journeyed with have changed. Driven by a desire to protect the lands they hold, they can now confront the innocent townsfolk with swords and guns, reminiscent of the avaricious Boss Stone from the past...

C: 美梦小镇开始容纳越来越多的游客，有些大海上的海盗也混进了游客的队伍，给美梦小镇带来了一些混乱……
E: More and more tourists swarmed to Dreamville. Some pirates had infiltrated the throng and disrupted the peace in Dreamville...

C: 钟表小子伤心地登上了罗盘号，离开了石头老板的小镇。
E: Clockie sorrowfully boards The Compass and leaves Boss Stone's town.

C: 钟表小子的眼睛中闪动着不屈的斗志，也许无论多么远大的梦想，只要努力，都有成真的可能。
E: Clockie's eyes glint with resolute will. No matter how distant the dream is, it can come true if one puts in enough work.

C: 滴答，好伙伴，你也是这么觉得的吧？美梦小镇不能变回死气沉沉的牢笼！
E: Tick-tock. Surely you think so too? Dreamville must not go back to that gloomy prison of the past!

C: 走吧，朋友，我们不能再放任木头老爷继续肆意妄为了！
E: Let's go friend, we cannot allow Old Man Wood's wanton ways to continue!

C: <color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>坐标迴星港！坐标迴星港！来自过去的幽灵船突然出现！楼主我是在天舶司工作的，奇形怪状的星槎见过不少了，但是幽灵星槎真是第一次见，我之前就听说过，幽灵星槎会把活人从现世带走。我是和接渡使同事一起看到的，千真万确，幽灵星槎突然就闪现在那了！
E: At Stargazer Navalia! At Stargazer Navalia! A ghostly ship from the past has suddenly appeared! I work at the Sky-Faring Commission, and I've seen my fair share of peculiar starskiffs, but this ghostly one is truly a first for me. I've heard stories before that phantom starskiffs can take the living away from the mortal realm. Having witnessed it with an Amicassador colleague, it's absolutely true! The phantom starskiff just manifested right there! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#祖宗智慧##鬼话连篇#</color>我昨晚在闲云天看风景，突然发现很久不去的绥园挪了位置，上面还竖起了几根桩子。我自学了一点老祖宗的堪舆风水之术，发现这其中大有文章！先说这绥园偏移的方位正在罗浮船艏的方向，以狐人园林镇之，啧啧，你品，你细品。再说打下这几根桩子（叠个甲先，看不太真这几个柱子的方位），有个名目叫「凿龙眼」，是借运冲煞、绝户刨根的禁术！我算是明白了，总有些人见不得罗浮繁荣，要让咱们仙舟人过不好日子！
E: I was just passing the time in Drifters Sanctum last night, and I suddenly noticed Fyxestroll Garden has somehow shifted positions. It's been a while since I was there, but now there are pillars that come out of the garden. I know a few things about our ancestors' geomancy craft and realized there is serious business going on here! Firstly, Fyxestroll Garden has shifted in the direction of the Luofu's bow. Clearly, someone is trying to use a foxian garden to suppress our ship's positioning. Tsk tsk, let that sink in! Seriously, just think about the implications! Secondly, with these pillars (whose orientations I admittedly didn't manage to pinpoint), there's a thing called "Chisel the Dragon's Eyes," a forbidden craft that harms one's fortune and kills off one's heirs! I get it now. Someone just can't bear to see Luofu being prosperous, so they want us Xianzhou folks to suffer! <color=#42a8b9>#OldWisdom #GhostTales</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#当红流量##捉鬼小队#</color>有幻戏圈的家人私信爆料，近期某幻戏社正在拍摄一部关于云骑的幻戏。但疑似主演因为档期冲突，未到现场进行拍摄。剧组赶在夜晚进行临时补拍。发帖的家人看到的便是补拍的现场。因为还没到定档期，所以宣发上比较保守。
E: A member of the immersia community shared with us insider information via a private message. It appears that a certain studio has been shooting an immersia play about the Cloud Knights. However, the lead actor was allegedly unable to make it to the set due to scheduling conflicts, leading the production team to rush for impromptu nighttime reshoots. The person who posted this message saw the behind-the-scenes of these reshoots. Since the release date is not set yet, the promotional efforts have been relatively conservative thus far. <color=#42a8b9>#CelebrityNews #GhostHuntingSquad</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#惊险刺激##捉鬼小队#</color>家人们！最近仙舟上出现如此之多的灵异现象，究其原因乃是被封印数千年名为岁阳的妖物现世。我们捉鬼小队在和岁阳妖物斗智斗勇的过程中难免受其侵害。上次发帖求助寻找我们走失的捉鬼队员正是被这妖物掳走！幸好经过一番抢救，咱们终于将她平安救回，一切无事。
E: Folks! Recently, there has been a surge in paranormal phenomena on Xianzhou, and the root cause is the awakening of a heliobus sealed for millennia. Our ghost-hunting squad has suffered inevitable effects from facing these creatures in our battles of wits and courage. The last post seeking help to find our missing squad member was due to her abduction by one of these creatures! Fortunately, after a rescue operation, we managed to finally bring her back safely, and all is well. <color=#42a8b9>#ThrillsAndChills #GhostHuntingSquad</color>

C: ◆额外掉落说明◆\n● 在「模拟宇宙」的「区域-精英」或「区域-首领」击败敌人可获得额外掉落。

C:
◆模拟宇宙积分说明◆
●「模拟宇宙」探索结算时，会根据本次探索的进度获得积分，累计至一定值可获得星琼、星轨通票等奖励。
●当「均衡等级」提升时，积分等级也将提升。积分等级越高，奖励越丰厚。
● 积分奖励每两周刷新，刷新时间为当周周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）。
E:
◆ Simulated Universe Points ◆
● Points are awarded based on Simulated Universe Exploration Progress when Exploration is finalized. Accumulate points to get rewards such as Stellar Jades and Star Rail Passes.
● Points tier increases when Equilibrium Level increases. Earn better rewards with a higher Points tier.
● The Point Rewards will be reset every two weeks on Mondays at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> (server time).

C: 那沉入迷雾的悬锋，纷乱与战争之城！它的王室流着弑亲的血脉，它的神明以灾厄为名。\n不死的迈德漠斯，离群的狮子，逐猎「纷争」火种的黄金裔。忍受万死，浴血还乡，孤身背负疯狂的宿命\n——弑王成王，弑神登神。征战的铁蹄踏遍荒野，终归要沾上故乡的血。
E: Kremnos, the mist-shrouded city of chaos and war! Its royal lineage is tainted with patricide, and its god bears the name of calamity.\nThe undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. Chrysos Heir who seeks the Coreflame of Strife, must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone.\n— Kingslayer be king, godslayer be god. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the blood of their homeland.

C: 「倘若所有的钟表都在指示错误的时刻……」 「倘若许下承诺的人以背誓完成诺言……」 「倘若沉入幻梦之人从未真正睡着……」 「倘若死者活着归来，发现姓名已被剥夺……」 「倘若…倘若……」 他吹灭火焰，黑暗中只余时钟永不停歇地滴答作响。
E: "If all the clocks are displaying the wrong time..." "If those bound to promises fulfilled their vows through betrayal..." "If those who sink into the realm of dreams never truly fell asleep..." "If the dead return to life, only to discover their names have been stripped..." "If... if..." He blows out the flame, and in darkness, there is but the eternal ticking of the timepiece.

C: 「可悲可笑的奴隶们……」 浩荡的丰饶民军队压境而来，狼毒如洪水般涌向青丘军，试图唤起军士深埋于心中的恐惧，化作种种可怖的幻象，使他们垂下武器，犹豫不前。 但阵线犹如铜墙铁壁，不为步离人轻蔑的话音所动，一个身影缓步走出。 她缓缓活动着身体，无形的煞气冲击下，旗帜猎猎作响。 「将军，是将军出现了……」 「飞霄将军……」 「『天击』将军！」 细微的呼唤汇聚起来，化作震天的战吼。 「翾翔不坠，万载常胜！」 她站在那里，一个人，就像一支军队。
E: "Pitiful, laughable slaves..." The Denizens of Abundance's legions come crashing upon the border like an avalanche, with Lupitoxin rushing toward the Verdant Knights like a tide, trying to arouse the deep-set fear hidden in the soldiers' hearts. Illusions of dread came forth, striking the wills of the warriors, compelling them to drop their blades and be seized by hesitation. But the front remains stalwart like a bronze wall, unstirred by the borisins' disdainful words. From among the soldiers, a single figure saunters forth. She moves her body at a slow pace, and the flags behind her rustle under the unseen killing intent. "The general... it's the general..." "General Feixiao..." "The Merlin's Claw!" These small cheers and calls then come together into a thunderous battle cry. "Always soaring! Forever triumphant!" She stands there, alone. A single figure, but imbued with the might of an entire army.

C: \n美好时光就像冬日的暖阳，脆弱短暂，却以刹那的温暖抚平了岁月的艰难漫长。
E: \nEnjoyable moments are like the warm winter sun. They are fragile and brief, but their momentary warmth soothes the difficulty of the long years.

C: \n长风至而波起兮，草木震动，山鸣谷应。
E: \nThe wind blows and the waves roar, the leaves quake, and valleys echo.

C: \n多莉，以后再也别离开啦！
E: \nDon't you ever leave again, Dolly!

C: \n「快快快快快！」
E: \n"Go, go, go, go!"

C: \n那城将下沉，再下沉，从此再听不见人世的呻吟。
E: \nThat city will sink, and sink again, never again to hear the moans of the world.

C: \n数据洪流构筑无形囚笼，困于此间的灵魂，能否将这终局变为新生？
E: \nData flows into a formless cage. Can the souls trapped within turn this finale into rebirth?

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《俯仰穷观》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Upon the Firmament."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《若我不曾见过太阳》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Had I Not Seen the Sun."

E: "Against The Day"

C: 《魔剑神机•阿拉哈托》的海报。瓦尔特偶尔会想起自己做动画的时光，那时候真快乐。\n\n「我当然还有做动画的本事…但怎么说呢，心境已经不同了。很多内容，过了那个境遇、过了那个年纪，就再也写不出来了——就算写出来，味道也不对。所以，如果有想创作的事物，你应该立刻动手。」
E: Poster for Blade of Chaos: Arahato. Welt occasionally remembers the days when he made animations. Those were happy days.\n\n"Of course I can still make animations... But my heart is no longer the same. With a lot of content, you can never create the same thing again after that age and after certain experiences — Even if I made it, it wouldn't have felt right. So, if there is something you want to create, you need to make it right now."

E: Recording Conch

C: 按仙舟古籍记载，修道有成者能呼来雷霆，驭使巽风。「药王秘传」自诩仙道传人，以展现旧日仙迹为凭，暗中招募信众。这截木枝上雷电萦绕，似乎证明其所言非虚。\n\n「凡胎皮相乃幻化，勘破我执方显真。」
E: According to ancient Xianzhou records, those who have ascended can summon lightning and command the wind. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus claimed to have inherited the way of the gods. By demonstrating godly power, the disciples gathered large numbers of worshipers in secret. Branches of lightning coil around this wooden staff — could it be that the disciples were indeed no mere mortals?\n\n"The mortal body is but an illusion. Truth is only revealed to those who choose to ascend."

C: 「灵兽」与「孽物」仅是名目之辨，驯驭从命便是灵兽，为祸失控便成了孽物。这枚镶固在长右身躯上的钉子便是其永为灵兽的保证。\n\n「莳者奉命行事是义务，若是魁首大人将这夺魂钉贯进你的身体，届时你还不是得乖乖听话？」
E: The distinction between "sprite" and "abomination" is merely a matter of name. A sprite is tamed and obedient, while an abomination is an uncontrolled misfortune. This nail embedded in the body of the Malefic Ape serves as an eternal guarantee of its status as a sprite.\n\n"As a disciple, it is your duty to obey. If the Master Primus drives this Possession Nail into your body, then you will have no choice but to obey, won't you?"

C: 最初，人们为生而战。如今，有人为死而战，与那些纷争的眷属一样无畏。悬锋人说，或许肉与石的勇士都有着同一颗心脏——\n\n「勇气在里面流淌，此心名为荣耀。」
E: In the beginning, humanity fought wars to stay alive, but now some fight as fearlessly as the Titankins of Strife to achieve death. The Kremnoans say that perhaps warriors of flesh and stone share the same heart —\n\n"And this heart is called glory, with courage flowing within."

C: 丹鼎司编纂的仙舟医典，包含众多方剂，已被列入「丹鼎司新进人员必读书目」清单。\n\n「记下来，这些都是以后要考的。」
E: A Xianzhou medical compendium compiled by the Alchemy Commission. It includes prescriptions to many decoctions and have been listed in the Required Reading for New Recruits to the Alchemy Commission list.\n\n"Memorize these, you will be tested on them."

C: 码头工人阿丰的证言，他承认自己接受公司的好处，并破坏了码头物流的正常运作。
E: The testimony of dock worker A-Feng, who has admitted to disrupting the normal operations of the dock in exchange for payment from the IPC.

C: 一位陷入存在主义危机缺失的内心。这是其中的一部分。\n\n「我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！」
E: A single part of a lost heart that has fallen into an existential crisis.\n\n"I... I'll never be qualified to be the real you. Just give up, Clockie!"

C: 象征尼卡多利赐福的徽记，拥有赐福徽记的泰坦眷属往往高呼荣耀、百战不倒。\n\n「掉率好高！慷慨哉，尼卡多利！」
E: A crest representing the benediction of Nikador — Titankins bearing this crest often proclaim their glory and invincibility in battle. \n\n"What a high drop rate! Thank you for your generosity, Nikador!"

C: 花火赠予的相机镜头。你至今没有弄明白它的确凿功用。\n\n「转瞬即逝，永不重复。要捕捉万花筒中的缤纷景象，是否仅仅是一厢情愿的徒劳？」
E: A camera lens gifted by Sparkle. To this day, you still are unsure of its exact use.\n\n"Transient and never repeating. Is capturing the vibrant scenes within the kaleidoscope merely a futile wishful thinking?"

C: 据传法吉娜曾于海床中埋下十二瓶佳酿，以待千年后品尝。然而直到黑潮吞噬了「满溢之杯」的歌声，这些陈酿也未被启封分毫。\n\n此为十二宝瓶中最为甜美的一樽，经由最后一位海妖之手来到陆地。其中蕴含的神力足以驱散一切迷雾。
E: Phagousa was said to have buried twelve bottles of fine vintage beneath the seabed, hoping to savor them a thousand years later. But even as the black tide silenced the song of Chalice of Plenty, not a single drop had been uncorked.\n\nThis bottle, sweetest of the twelve vintages, was brought ashore by the last surviving sea siren. The divine power it holds can pierce through any fog.

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『谋杀与创造之时』向你致意，变革者—— 「——敬伟大的复仇。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'Time to Murder and Create' in your honor, innovator —" "To great vengeance."

C: 作为开拓者，不仅要在行动上践行阿基维利的意志，更要在言语中贯彻「开拓」的风格！
E: As a Trailblazer, not only should you carry out Akivili's will in your actions, you should also embody the style of the Trailblaze with your words!

C: 「次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神会梦到开拓者吗？」\n「——我不知道。」\n「但我知道就算在梦里，我们也会是最棒的旅伴。」
E: "Will Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord dream of the Trailblazer?"\n"...I don't know."\n"But I know we will be the best travel buddies even in dreams."

C: 回答上个问题：大概是因为无人机太无趣了。
E: To answer the previous question: Probably because drones look too ordinary.

C: 踩一脚鞋子也不会湿。
E: Even if you step on it, your shoes won't get wet.

C: 证据全都留着，等待日后清算。
E: The evidence is retained for future settling of scores.

C: 「忘记属于你自己的舒适音域，与你身边的每位歌者融为一体。万人齐颂，应如一灵独唱。」
E: "Forget the vocal range you're comfortable with and blend with the singers around you. All sing in shared praise. All sing as one soul."

C: 独属于对弈胜者的装饰框，此为其中的「帝王」，象征着唯我独尊的权柄。
E: A decorative frame exclusively granted to the winner of the match. This is the "Emperor," symbolizing a supreme and unrivaled authority.

C: 密钥内部的集成电路正在进行满负载运算，施放出的干涉因子拦截住无数光线并修正它们的轨迹。在占据整片天穹的信息光幕中，出现了一方小小的黑域，那里是连命运都要避开的地方。\n\n「概率学的激流中出现了一枚不和谐的音符，它不愿随波逐流，像一枚钉子般扎进命运的骨髓里。」
E: The integrated circuits within the encryption key are operating at full capacity, emitting interference factors that intercept countless light rays and correct their trajectories. In the information light screen occupying the entire sky dome, a small dark zone appears: a place even destiny must avoid.\n\n"A discordant note emerges in the rapids of probability, refusing to go with the flow, driving itself like a nail into the marrow of destiny."

C: 不知是怀表还是罗盘的工具，某位无名客的遗物。 据说最先坏掉的是挂链，它在一次跃迁中突然断裂，洒落遍地。 接着是背壳，它被一颗铅弹击中，变得支离破碎。 最后是盘面上的刻度，它们在漫长的时光中被逐渐磨平，几不可视。 一次次折损，一次次修补，它曾经的样子已无从辨认，只有不再转动的尖针，依旧指向不变的前方。 「拿着它，拉格沃克，它是你的了…然后，继续走下去……」
E: The Relic of a Nameless. An item that might have been a pocket watch or a compass. It is said that the first part to break was the chain. It suddenly snapped during a warp jump, the links scattering everywhere. Then, it was the back. Hit by a lead bullet, it was on the verge of falling apart. Lastly, it was the markings on the face. They were gradually worn flat over the long years, becoming no longer visible. It broke countless times and underwent endless repairs. Its former shape was no longer discernible, and only the stilled sharp hands were pointing ever forward. Take it, Legwork. It's yours now... Then, continue onward...

C: 家族为了演武仪典推出的定制款苏乐达。\n\n「喝下这瓶苏乐达，比赛冠军轻松拿」
E: The Family has released a customized SoulGlad for the Wardance Ceremony.\n\n"Have a SoulGlad, be so glad and win."

C: 钟表小子的角色草稿，寥寥数笔赋予梦想以形状。可小幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>智识</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: The character design draft for Clockie, where a few pen strokes already gave the dream a shape. Used to level up Traces slightly for <color=#f29e38ff>Erudition</color> characters.

E: The heart of a Strife Titankin, full of divine power. Advanced material used for enhancement.

C: 由古恩•科诺列夫撰写 在我科员生涯的早期，我不可遏制的研究动力有几个重要来源，它们分别是与生俱来的好奇心、未受现实玷染的朴素正义观、面对童年和故土的消逝却无能为力的痛苦。 这些复杂的情绪，促使我写下了一本又一本关于银河正义、星球历史和邪恶派系的书籍。我在其中探讨混沌的秩序和宇宙的明天，一度以为银河的过去、现在和未来都已经在我的胸中，直到……那件事的发生，让我知道我终究只是一介研究者。当现实发生时，我无法阻止视人命如草芥的强者，也无法挽救在风中消陨的弱者。 于是在科员生涯的后期，我不再探讨正义。正义，对不拥有力量的人来说，是一个过分奢侈的词汇。在生命的尾声，我计划在空间站内进行一个神秘的实验。艾丝妲站长已经同意了我的请求。 这个实验将尽量避免给任何人带来麻烦——自知不合情理，故而在此告罪——它只是我不再苦苦思索正义的这一思想转折的微末附属品，只是为了实现我一个小小的，小小的祈愿。
E: Written by Gunn Konolev Several significant things contributed to my unwavering motivation as a researcher in the early years of my career: My inherent curiosity, my view of justice untainted by reality, and the agony of being powerless in the face of the loss of my youth and my motherland. Because of these conflicting emotions, I've written lots of books about cosmic justice, planetary history, and malevolent factions. In my works, I investigated the order of chaos and the future of the universe, and I once thought the past, present, and future of the cosmos were already within my grasp, until... that incident happened and revealed that I was only a researcher after all. When reality hit, I couldn't stop the powerful from destroying people's lives, nor could I save the helpless people who were dying. As a result, in the final years of my career, I ceased investigating justice. For people without power, justice is an overly lofty concept. I intend to undertake a secret experiment inside the space station at the end of my life. Lead Researcher Asta has agreed to my request. I'll try not to bother anyone with this experiment — I realize it's an unreasonable request, so here's my confession—this experiment is only a minor substitute for my abandonment of justice, just to fulfill a small wish of mine.

C: 开幕时间：4月8日  黄金歌剧院 行政区阿丽萨大道 西22号 改编自贝洛伯格近三十年来最受欢迎的童话故事 蕾莎与特鲁太太 美丽少女蕾莎向高高在上的巫婆特鲁太太借火种，来温暖自己穷苦的家人。 在去往老巫婆的家的路上，蕾莎遇见了三位骑士。 巫婆将骑士们唤作「我的黎明」、「我的太阳」与「我的黑夜」。 特鲁太太要求蕾莎完成普通人无法办到的三桩冒险， 在三位骑士的帮助下，蕾莎会如何完成巫婆的艰难任务？ 戈利尔奖年度最佳音乐剧提名 《贝洛伯格周刊》年度 青少年选择奖 贝洛伯格大学儿童心理学家 萨拉 权威推荐 老少皆宜的合家欢佳作 【制作人】杰西卡；【导演】凯尔；【技术总监】贝拉 【音乐总监】克莱德；【造型总监】迪克；【舞美指导】泽维尔；【管弦协奏】莎拉 【音效设计】班瑞德；【布景设计】皮特；【灯光设计】费恩；【剧院经理】查理 演员阵容 蕾莎——温妮 特鲁太太——碧翠丝 黎明骑士——高登 太阳骑士——艾萨克 黑夜骑士——杰森 农妇，蕾莎的婶婶——康斯坦丝 农夫，蕾莎的叔叔——马修 戴娜，被诅咒的松鼠——克里斯汀 道恩，贪婪的猎人——雷蒙德 桃乐丝，快乐的狐狸——艾尔莎 演出曲目 《农场之声》——蕾莎，农妇，农夫 《第一点火光》——蕾莎，特鲁太太 《黎明无声》——蕾莎，黎明骑士 《我的太阳》——蕾莎，太阳骑士 《危险的夜》——特鲁太太，黑夜骑士 《危险的怪物们》——特鲁太太，戴娜，桃乐丝 《告诉我，谁才是猎物》——特鲁太太，道恩 《三个谜题》——蕾莎，特鲁太太 《关于爱，你所不知道的事》——蕾莎，太阳骑士 《唤醒黑夜》——蕾莎，黑夜骑士，黎明骑士 《我希望你能幸福》——蕾莎，戴娜，桃乐丝 《故事的最后》——蕾莎，农妇，农夫 《让过去成为风》——蕾莎，特鲁太太
E: Opens: April 8 Golden Theater 22 West, Alisa Avenue, Administrative District Adopted from the most popular fairytale in Belobog for 30 years Leisha and Mrs. Trude The beautiful girl Leisha asked for a fire from the aloof witch Mrs. Trude to warm her poor family. On the way to the old witch's place, Leisha met three knights. The witch referred to the knights as "My Dawn," "My Sun," and "My Evening." Mrs. Trude wanted Leisha to complete three adventures impossible for normal people. With the help of the three knights, how would Leisha complete the witch's difficult quest? Goliards Awards nominee for Best Musical of the Year The Annual Belobog Weekly's Young Adults' Choice University of Belobog Child Psychologist Sara Professionally Recommends A happy piece of work that can be enjoyed by the whole family Producer: Jessica. Director: Kyle. Technical Director: Bella Music Director: Claude. Artistic Director: Dieke. Choreographer: Xavier. Orchestral Soloist: Sara Sound Design: Barnaud. Set Design: Peter. Lighting: Fayne. C: 03.《海岸线》：蜕变与新生    作者：路易斯·赖斯 本期我们来简单评论一下画家的成名之作：《海岸线》。 作为引领画家进入大众视野的重要信使，在这幅画中，画家的笔触技法更为成熟，其独特梦幻的个人风格也已基本成型。对于本作的解读，早有无数评论家和学者珠玉在前。其中诸多名篇佳作已为众人所耳熟能详，故不再于此赘述。而笔者此次依旧沿袭以往的思路：从作品出发，对作者本身进行剖析。 相信熟悉笔者的老朋友们已经对笔者的分析方式有所了解，但受画家本身热度的影响，近期本人又因此随笔系列获得了一些关注。为此，在本篇开头，笔者将首先展示自己的思考逻辑，与新晋的读者稍加分享。 学界普遍认为：作品不可与作者等同。此等观念经过无数历史与文化的验证，似乎早已成为颠扑不破的真理。但笔者以为，所谓作品，究根结底不过是创作者潜意识碎片拼接的产物——它们就如梦与幻觉那般，往往会于细枝末节之间，映射出创作者本人也未曾意识到的、源于其心底最深处的欲望。 而越是了解作者本身，了解他们的成长环境、人生经历，这个反推的过程便越是精准。于是在此基础之上，我们且对前两期的选材稍加回顾：在《银河璀璨之夜》中，我们不难看出画家对艺术与美的热爱、对自由的强烈渴望与对人类的反思与关怀； 而在第二幅《罗宾之死》中，画家则通过刻画一场形式化严重的、庄重却潦草的葬礼，来倾诉对乏味现实生活的厌倦与不满。 在有了以上认知的前提下，我们再将目光转向这幅著名的《海岸线》——整幅画的背景由沙滩、海洋与天空三部分构成，各自的边界通过黄金分割比例自左上至右下斜切呼应；而从左下至右上，也就是自沙滩至天空之间，则由四种鲜明意象所构成的弧度所串起：黑色的蛇蜕、白色的飞鸟、金黄的云霞与赤红的太阳。 根据笔者的解读，沙滩、海洋与天空分别代表：现实的物质世界、人们的精神世界、艺术与美本身；而蛇蜕、飞鸟、云霞与太阳则代表着画家的个人理想：沉重的现实生活已经如同老旧蛇蜕那样被抛弃，而获得新生的画家则如同脱离了大地束缚的飞鸟一般，正朝象征自由与灵性的灿烂云霞奔赴而去；至于那高高悬在天顶的太阳，则是真善美的具象与化身，是画家永恒追逐的目标与朝向。 画家对于色彩和线条取用也别具匠心，画中的沙滩笔触凝重、黯淡灰败，海洋起伏绵延、浓墨重彩，天空则线条轻盈、透亮明快；而四种意象的颜色为黑、白、黄、红，则分别对应炼金术中黑化、白化、黄化与赤化的四个过程，在三重维度上象征着画家本身的蜕变与新生。 众所周知，《海岸线》是画家人生的巨大转折点。这个浓墨重彩的点，或许可以理解为画家倾其所有只身来到匹诺康尼、可以理解为其仅凭一幅作品便成为一匹脱颖而出的黑马，然而对于笔者而言，在那之前——这个点——早已尽在画作本身之中。
E: 03. Coastline: Metamorphosis & Rebirth Author: Louis Rice In this edition, we will briefly critique the painter's breakout masterpiece: Coastline. As an important messenger leading the painter into the public eye, the brushstroke techniques in this painting are more mature, and the painter's unique dreamy style has basically taken shape. Numerous interpretations of this piece have been offered up by art critics and academics. Those famed works are familiar to all, so I won't repeat them here. Rather, this author shall continue on the same train of thought as before: An analysis of the artist starting with the work. I trust that old friends already familiar with me also understand my methods of analysis, but due to the artist's popularity, these essays have recently attracted some attention and following. Because of this, I will share with new readers an outline of my line of thinking at the start of each chapter. There is a general consensus in academic circles that artworks cannot be equated with their creators. This is a concept verified by countless cultures over the centuries and seems to be an immutable truth. But this author believes that so-called works are ultimately no more than the product of splicing fragments from the creator's subconscious mind — just like dreams and hallucinations which often reflect in detail the deepest desires of the heart, which even the creator remains unaware. And the more you understand the creator themselves — the environment in which they grew up and their life experiences — the more accurate this process of inference will be. Therefore, on this basis, we will briefly review the topic of the first two notes: In Night of the Majestic Cosmos, we can clearly see the artist's love for art and beauty, the strong desire for freedom, and their reflection and love for humanity. And in the second painting, the Death of Robin, the artist instead portrays a severely formulaic and solemn yet disheveled funeral to express their weariness and displeasure at the tediousness of boring reality. Bearing this premise in mind, we may then turn our focus to this famous Coastline. The background of the entire painting is composed of a triad of beach, ocean, and sky. Their borders echo each other diagonally across the canvas between top-left and bottom-right in the shape of the golden ratio. At the same time, from the beach in the bottom-left to the sky in the top-right, spans an arc comprising four clear themes strung together: A molted black snake skin, a white soaring bird, a golden cloud, and a crimson sun. Based on this author's interpretation, the beach, ocean, and sky respectively represent the material world, the mental world, and aesthetics itself. While the molted snake skin, the soaring bird, cloud, and sun represent the inner ideals of the artist. Burdens of life lie abandoned like a molted old snake skin, while the artist reborn is like a bird freed from the shackles of earth, rushing toward those brilliant clouds symbolizing freedom and spirituality. And the sun, high in its zenith, is the manifestation and embodiment of truth, goodness, and beauty — the goal and desire which the artist eternally longs for. The artist also makes creative use of color and line. The brushwork for the beach in the painting is solemn and forlorn, while the undulating ocean uses thick and heavy brushes, and the sky uses graceful and light lines. The colors of the four themes are black, white, yellow, and red which correspond to the nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, and rubedo processes in alchemy. Thus, three dimensions are used to symbolize the metamorphosis and rebirth of the artist. Everyone knows that Coastline was a huge turning point in the artist's life. This thick and heavy work could perhaps be understood as the painter putting everything on the line in coming to Penacony, or it could be understood as the painter being a precocious dark horse that rose up through a single masterpiece. However, in this author's estimation, this point had already been revealed in the artist's work itself — even before this painting was made.

C: 推荐语 艾弗法出版集团《梦境旅游指南》续作，匹诺康尼购物大全！ 盼您能在梦中抛却一切烦恼，尽享此刻！ 购物天堂：奥帝购物中心 关键词：商业街、大型商场、品牌集合、一站购物 若您是第一次踏入匹诺康尼，不知该从何处开始自己的梦境之旅，那么欢迎您前往全匹诺康尼最大的集合式商场——奥帝购物中心！ 这里汇集了您能想到的所有商品：上至新款球笼「飞轮2001」，下至某边缘星球推出的冒险小说——奥帝购物中心一定能满足您的所有需求。 除去购物外，您也可以在奥帝购物中心享受多项配套服务：所有店面均提供免费寄送服务，实体商品将被送至您在现实中入住的房间，甚至可以通过银河快递网络寄往宇宙的各个角落！ 创意餐厅：德尔默食坊 关键词：预约制、无菜单、创意主厨、私人订制 德尔默食坊是一家较为小众的私人餐厅，其中料理多为仅可在匹诺康尼享用的梦中特典。与商业街中过于泛滥的快餐不同，食坊主打定制服务——提供一段回忆，主厨将以此为材料制作出只属于您的盛宴。 食坊的第三代主厨莱克特表示：「餐品并不仅是充饥的消遣。回忆塑造口味与偏好，一份菜单就能读出一份人生。」 传闻，银河巨星莱斯利•迪恩也曾于此用餐。 狂欢庆典：「克劳克影视乐园」周边店 关键词：卡通、钟表小子、影视乐园、周边商店 「克劳克影视乐园」唯一指定周边商店，整座店铺基本还原了卡通中梦幻的美梦小镇——店员们则化身为梦境小镇中的居民，您可以用苜蓿币换取钟表小子的各类周边商品。 钟表小子玩偶、哈努兄弟帽子、仓鼠骑士款球笼贴纸、折纸小鸟盲盒等都是深受民众喜爱的热销产品。 有趣的是，随着近年观众风评与审美趣味变化，反派石头老板人气飙升，隐要成为新的畅销冠军。 酣眠体验：商业街地下酒吧 关键词：会员制、不定期开业、位置隐蔽、特调梦饮 在广场侧方的商业街中开有许多隐蔽的小店，这些店面常伪装成难以发现的样式，只有熟客才能推开正确的那扇门。 这家酒吧没有名字，老板也没有名字，甚至菜单上也只有一款调饮：特调苏乐达。据说，老板会根据当日心情调制饮料，因此客人每次喝到的味道皆不相同。 当然，您也可以在这里点一款经典款苏乐达——但那口味就远不如外面的预制品了。
E: Testimonials Alfalfa Publishing House proudly presents the Dreamscape Shopping Guide, the sequel to Dreamscape Tourist Compendium! We hope you can leave all your worries behind and live in the present! A Shopping Paradise: Oti Mall Keywords: Commercial Street, Large Shopping Mall, Multi-Brand Store, One-Stop Shopping If this is your first visit to Penacony and you are unsure where to kick-start your dream trip, we welcome you to the largest integrated shopping center in Penacony — Oti Mall! You can find everything you can imagine here, from the latest Spheroid model "Flywheel 2001" to an adventure novel released on a distant planet. Oti Mall can surely fulfill all your needs. There are a variety of complementary services you can enjoy besides shopping. All stores offer free shipping, which means the physical goods you purchase will be delivered to your room in the real world. You can even courier the goods to anywhere in the universe via the Cosmic Express network! An Innovative Dining Experience: Delmore's Eatery Keywords: Reservation-Based, Menu-less, Creative Chef, Personalized Customization Delmore's Eatery is a relatively niche private restaurant, offering dishes that are only available in the dream in Penacony. Unlike the fast food restaurants that are ubiquitous on the commercial streets, Delmore's Eatery specializes in customizable services. Tell the head chef a memory, and he will prepare a sumptuous spread that is specially made for you. Chef Lecter, the third-generation head chef of the eatery, opines, "Food is not just something that fills your tummy. As your tastes and preferences are shaped by your memories, I can tell the story of your life through the menu." Rumor has it that the galactic superstar Lesley Dean once dined here. Festive Carnival: Clock Studios Theme Park Merchandise Store Keywords: Animation, Clockie, Theme Park, Merchandise Store The only official merchandise store of Clock Studios Theme Park. The magical Dreamville from the animations stands recreated within the store — the staff are dressed as Dreamville residents, and you can exchange Alfalfa credits for various types of Clockie merchandise. The hot-selling items include the Clockie soft toy, Hanu's hat, Hamster Rider Spheroid stickers, and Origami Bird mystery boxes. Interestingly, with the changing tastes and aesthetic preferences of audiences in recent years, the popularity of the villainous character, Boss Stone, has soared and is poised to become the new best-selling item. Late Night Experience: Speakeasies on the commercial street Keyword: Members-Only, Irregular Operating Times, Secluded Location, Special Blend There are many small, hidden stores on the commercial street next to the plaza. These stores are often disguised and have inconspicuous storefronts, thus only regulars can find the right door to them. This speakeasy has no name, and the same goes for its owner. Only one signature drink is featured on the menu: House-Blended SoulGlad. It is said that the owner crafts the drink based on their mood of the day, so it tastes different each time. Of course, you can order the Classic SoulGlad here, but it won't taste as good as those pre-made ones you can get outside.

C:
真让人难以置信，我居然能获得和舒翁女士面对面交流的机会……

她可是鸢尾花家系的名人，地位大概仅次于家主。我听人说过，那位女士平时喜欢独处，很少抛头露面——没想到她居然会在这种场合出现，而且还是为了跟我这种无名小辈交流……

我起初十分紧张，嘴里一个字都蹦不出来。但舒翁女士的话语似乎带有一种魔力，很快就让我平静了下来。她和我解释了很多重要的事：梦境酒店近期经历的异变、家族为了对抗那些异常现象做出的努力、我们作为服务人员需要注意些什么，等等等等…她讲得事无巨细，我也奇迹般地没有走神，把她说的每个字都听进去了。

最后，舒翁女士告诉我，在未知的灾难面前，每一位鸢尾花——不对，是所有家系的成员都要有掏出武器的觉悟。为了保护贵宾们的权益，我们必须挡在他们和所有可能威胁到他们的恐怖事物之间……

老实说，我真不知道自己有没有准备好。
E:
This was still so surreal to me — I finally had a chance to meet face-to-face with THE Lady Siobhan...

She is a prominent figure among the Iris Family, her position only second to the Head. I heard from others that she preferred solitude, and seldom showed herself. To think she was going to be appearing under such circumstances, and to interact with a lowly lackey like me...

I was extremely nervous initially with all my words stuck in my mouth. But Lady Siobhan's words had a certain charm to them, which quickly settled my nerves. She explained plenty of important matters to me: That the hotel in the Dreamscape was recently experiencing anomalies, the efforts that The Family made to combat this phenomenon, what us attendants should be watching out for, etc. etc... She was extremely fastidious in her elaborations, and even I was miraculously alert, absorbing every single word that she uttered.

Finally, Lady Siobhan told me that, in the face of unprecedented disaster, every Iris — nay, all Family members had to be prepared to draw their weapons. To protect our guests' interests, we had to stand between them and every horrific event that could present the slightest threat...

To be honest, I really didn't know if I was ready.

C: ——基于寰宇调查的偷渡客「日常」生活研究 本书旨在令普罗大众以一个全新的视角看待「偷渡客」，从单纯的谴责违法者，到短暂地关注他们的生活，以更好地实现跨群体对话，为解决持续了数个琥珀纪的偷渡问题寻找全新的出路。 事先申明：本报告调查对象仅包括以未申请「白日梦」酒店入梦资格，通过周边星舰进入「联觉梦境」范围的有机生命及智械。 第一章 偷渡客也要工作 出身贫穷星系的偷渡客往往要花光所有存款才能登上能够进行星际跃迁的舰船，他们在简陋的船仓中休眠，绕过家族监管潜入梦境。 与大众的认知相悖，无业的偷渡客在星船里只占了较小的部分——面对生存压力，大部分偷渡客都会尝试在匹诺康尼寻找工作。虽然这些边缘人的求职过程往往并不顺利，但在高度繁荣的梦境中，只要参与简单的劳动就能维持日常生活。 而其他无业者也有自己谋生的手段：他们会在小群体间传授一种类似乞讨的手段，在匹诺康尼的梦境中以各种方式讨要苜蓿币，再反哺于现实。 据传，曾有个被尊称为「大贤者」的偷渡客，依靠乞讨和传说中的「钟表匠」成了朋友，从此一步登天，但笔者认为那只是偷渡业务招揽生意时的说辞。 还有一部分偷渡客难以适应梦境社会，仍在进行着各种现实中的工作，例如进行星际快递或为过路星舰提供维修。可现实中的底层收入往往无法支持匹诺康尼的享受和消费，这导致这些偷渡客时常走上犯罪的道路，对过路宾客进行勒索或敲诈。 根据橡木家系颁布的律法，偷渡行为在匹诺康尼是绝对禁止的，他们被猎犬找到后的下场通常不太乐观。 但比起家族的追捕，仿造入梦池对大脑和精神的损伤更为可怕。长期身处未处理的高浓度忆质，很有可能会使身心受到严重损害，不少偷渡客都在晚年陷入了严重的精神错乱。 笔者曾潜入偷渡客的泊船进行考察，可惜在登船前，一位大名鼎鼎的特殊客人已离开了舰船。据说这些神秘的偷渡客有着非常丰厚的资金，使用的入梦池不比白金客房的差劲。他选择偷渡或许只是为了向家族隐藏身份——毕竟在匹诺康尼之梦中，哪怕是全宇宙最凶恶的罪犯也能改头换面，找到容身之处。 还有些客人，费心偷渡只为在匹诺康尼的梦里瞥上一眼，事后便乘着小型飞船离开。一艘偷渡星舰的船长在私下里告诉我，这样的人才是最多的顾客——比起「白日梦」酒店的天价房费，用这样的方式进行梦境旅行要划算得多。 写到这里，笔者不得不感叹匹诺康尼的魅力。在数个琥珀纪以来，让这片「同谐」的梦境人甘愿放弃一切造访。 ……
E: A Study on the "Everyday" Lives of Stowaways This book aims to shift the public perception of stowaways from mere condemnation to a brief and focused look at their daily lives. The author seeks to foster cross-group communication in order to find new solutions to the enduring issue of stowaways spanning several Amber Eras. Note: This report solely investigates organic beings and Intellitrons who entered the Synesthesia Dreamscape through neighboring starships without applying for proper authorization from the Reverie Hotel. Chapter I: Even Stowaways Have to Work Stowaways from impoverished galaxies often exhaust their savings to board ships that can conduct interstellar warps. They rest in bare-bone rudimentary cabins, evading The Family's oversight to sneak into the Dreamscape. Contrary to popular perception, unemployed stowaways represent only a tiny proportion in the starships. Faced with the pressures of survival, most stowaways strive to find employment in Penacony. While the job-seeking process is typically difficult for these marginalized individuals, sustaining a daily existence in the thriving Dreamscape can be achieved through simple labor. Meanwhile, unemployed stowaways have their own alternative means of survival, often teaching others in their smaller group something akin to begging. They employ a variety of techniques to beg for Alfalfa credits from visitors in the Penacony Dreamscapes and use the money earned to cover their expenses in reality. Rumors suggest that a revered stowaway, known as the "Great Sage," befriended the legendary Watchmaker through the simple means of begging, thus ascending the social ladder. However, this is likely a sales pitch used by human smugglers to attract potential stowaways. Some stowaways struggle to adapt to the Dreamscape society and continue working in reality, such as in interstellar deliveries or repair services for passing starships. However, the meager income from low-paying reality often falls short of supporting their indulgence in Penacony. Consequently, these stowaways occasionally resort to criminal activities, such as extortion or blackmailing guests. According to the laws established by the Oak Family, stowaways are strictly prohibited in Penacony, as they often face dire consequences when apprehended by the Hounds. However, compared to The Family's pursuit, the damage caused to their brain and psyche by counterfeit Dreampools is even more alarming. Prolonged exposure to high concentrations of unprocessed memoria can result in severe physical and mental degradation, with many stowaways succumbing to debilitating psychological disorders in their later years. I have covertly inspected the stowaway ships, but unfortunately, by the time I arrived, a prominent special guest had already left the ship. Rumors suggest that these enigmatic stowaways possess substantial financial resources, using Dreampools no less opulent than those in the Platinum Suite. Some may choose to stow away to conceal their identities from The Family, as even the most notorious criminals in the cosmos can easily alter their appearances and find refuge within the Dreamscape in Penacony. Some stowaways go to great lengths just to catch a glimpse of the Dreamscape in Penacony and then depart on a small vessel afterward. During a private conversation, the captain of a stowaway starship informed me that these stowaways comprise the majority of their clients, as diving into the Dreamscape in this manner proves much more cost-effective than covering the exorbitant rates charged by the Reverie Hotel. As I pen down these words, I find myself marveling at the allure of Penacony. For several Amber Eras, people have been willing to give up everything, just to visit this splendorous dream of Harmony. ...

C: 去往「海选广场」的海选特快，做出第三种选择。在道路的尽头，与您的子民重逢。
E: Go to the Audition Shuttle in the Audition Plaza. Make a third choice. Reunite with your people at the end of the road.

C: 呦吼——各位读者老爷们！许久不见，甚是想念！上期杂志中，本知名记者——酒馆的迈尔斯——为老爷们揭示了埋藏在苏乐达背后的黑暗真相，而这一回，就让我们深入到群众中去，挖掘那些大家困惑已久的小~秘~密~吧！ 众所周知，群星盛会匹诺康尼的街头向来鱼龙混杂，高的矮的胖的瘦的穷的富的是人的不是人的什么都有，尤其是那些大明星似的天环族，相信很多人都好奇得不得了吧！既然如此，乐子神在上，本记者将冒着被猎犬追杀的风险，来一次说走就走的路边专访—— 那么废话不多说，这就随机在街头抓几个倒霉蛋…啊不是，幸运路人吧！ Q1：天环族小脑袋瓜上的圈圈是实体的吗？ 暴躁的天环族：我可去你**的圈圈，这叫「天环」！「天环」懂吗，**！ 充满求知欲的狐人：嗯，是实体，我之前趁他不注意偷偷摸过，冰冰凉凉的，还特别光滑，手感好极了！当然要是那之后没被暴打就更好了。 精神稳定的智械：众所周知，有三样东西摸不得：狐人的尾巴、皮皮西的毛球、天环的天环…所以你这不是活该找揍吗。 Q2：天环族要是走路的时候光环被卡住怎么办？ 「天环研究专家」：首先，据我调查，现实世界中天环族的光环并非实体，而是一种能量聚合成的投影，甚至会在情绪波动和使用心灵感应时闪烁发光，而这种光环并不存在被卡住的风险； 「天环研究专家」：其次，在进入梦境后，虽然由于忆质的影响，能量光环被压缩为实体，但梦中的光环可以任意调节位置，就像戴帽子一样，所以也不用担心…… 「天环研究专家」：另外，据说天环族出生时都只有最简单的圆环，随着成长他们的环会根据其经历与性格变成不同的形状，而少数特殊的天环族甚至可以随意改变自己环的形状！ 「天环研究专家」：最后，以上内容均出自《逐梦客时讯：都市怪谈版面》，如有雷同纯属巧合，本人概不负责。 Q3：天环族的心灵感应是怎么回事？ 小报记者：哎呦，这你可就问对人咯！我给你说，论起天环族，这偌大的匹诺康尼中可没几个人比我更了解！ 小报记者：我跟你说，天环都会读心术，所以跟他们沟通的时候一定要小心。不过好在他们感应的范围并不太大，一般不超过两三米，所以只要站远点就好啦。 小报记者：天环之间也可以通过这种心灵感应交流，不用出声就能跟人讲话，比市面上那些通讯器好用多了。 小报记者：还有啊，一些同谐力量很强的天环族，可以通过歌声和语言影响甚至操控他人！据说一些天环族的命途行者可以释放心灵冲击，让人瞬间眩晕或者变成傻子呢！ 小报记者：怎么样，是不是非常有意思啊…我这还有更有趣的呢，如果想知道，只要转我9998苜蓿币…… 本期放送就到这里，敬请期待更多新鲜爆料！
E: What's up, readers! It's been too long! In the last issue, I, famed tavern reporter Miles, uncovered the dark secrets of SoulGlad. This time, let's dive into the masses, and sniff out all the dirty little secrets everyone has been dying to know! It's a well-known fact that the bustling streets of Penacony, a celebrity hotspot, are a true melting pot. From the tall and short to the plump and slender, and from the rich and poor to humans and non-humans, you can literally find all kinds of folks here. Among them, I bet those Halovians who shine like superstars pique the curiosity of many of you! Well, for The Laughter, I'm ready to snag you some exclusive street interviews at the risk of being chased by the Bloodhounds! Well then, let's cut to the chase and grab a few unsuspecting passersby... Ahem, lucky interviewees, I mean. Q1: Are those circular thingies above the Halovians' small heads tangible? Grumpy Halovian: It's not some "circular thingy"! Sheesh, it's a halo! A halo, capeesh!? Curious Foxian: Yep, it's tangible. I managed to touch it when he wasn't looking. Cool and smooth to the touch, the texture is amazing! Though, the beating I got afterward wasn't so great. Mentally Stable Intellitron: It's a universally acknowledged fact that there are three things one should never touch: A Foxian's tail, a Pepeshi's fluff ball, and a Halovian's halo. So, basically, you were asking for a beating. Q2: What happens if a Halovian's halo were to get stuck in something while they are walking? "Halo Researcher": To begin with, according to my observations, the Halovians' halos in the physical realm do not have a tangible form. They are condensed energy projections that can even flicker during emotional disturbances or when telepathy is used. There is no concern about a halo becoming stuck. "Halo Researcher": Furthermore, upon entering the Dreamscape, while it's true that the energy halo transforms into a physical entity under the influence of memoria, its position can be adjusted at will while within the dream, much like adjusting a hat. So, there's really no need for concern. "Halo Researcher": Additionally, it is believed that all Halovians only have a basic circle when they are born. As they age, the halo evolves into various shapes reflecting their experiences and personality traits. Some special Halovians can even transform their halo into any shape they desire! "Halo Researcher": Finally, all information mentioned is sourced from Dreamchaser Bulletin: Urban Myth Edition. Any similarities are purely coincidental, and I hold no responsibility for such occurrences. Q3: What's the story behind the Halovians' telepathy? Tabloid Reporter: Ah, you've asked the right person! Let me tell you, I'm one of the few people in Penacony who know a lot about the Halovians. Tabloid Reporter: Here's the scoop. All Halovians can read minds, so you should take care when speaking with one. Thankfully, the range of their ability isn't that big and usually won't work more than 6–10 feet away, so just stand at a distance, and you'll be fine. Tabloid Reporter: Halovians can also use their telepathy to communicate with one another without speaking. That's so much better than the communicators we have in the market now. Tabloid Reporter: Also, Halovians with strong powers of Harmony can use their singing and language to manipulate others! It's said some Halovian Pathstriders can even unleash psychic attacks to stun a person or reduce their intelligence to zero! Tabloid Reporter: What do you think? Interesting, right? I have more where that came from. If you'd like to know more, just transfer me 9,998 Alfalfa credits and... That's a wrap for this issue! Stay tuned for more fresh scoops coming your way!

C: 时刻谨记赐我们历法的刻法勒，它如今仍在背负黎明。 命运季 一月•门关月 代表泰坦：万径之门，雅努斯 作为除旧迎新的第一月，雅努斯将关上代表过去的旧门，打开代表未来的新门。它既是门，亦是把守门关的锁链，如一柄利斧劈开了前与后。 在这一月，人们会抛弃带来羁绊之物（如旧恋人或已逝亲人的信物），宣告斩断过去、直面未来——这一行为是完全自愿的。   二月•平衡月 代表泰坦：公正之秤，塔兰顿 最具规律的一月，刻法勒正是以此为尺度测定了月份。在这一月，人们的作息会变得规律，性情平和，因而也更乐于在这一月发起裁决、签订契约。   据说在过去还有日夜之分时，平衡月是唯一一个昼夜等长的月份，因为塔兰顿调停了欧洛尼斯和艾格勒的争端。   三月•长夜月 代表泰坦：永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯 太阳光照比平常稍显暗淡的月份。人们更频繁地感到瞌睡，直觉与感性替代了思考与理性，因而难以完成过于精细的工作。 据说在过去，这一月的夜比昼长，因为欧洛尼斯在关于天空所有权的争斗中胜过了艾格勒。    支柱季 四月•耕耘月 代表泰坦：磐岩之脊，吉奥里亚 春耕开始的月份，也是最为忙碌的月份。在这一月，大地恢复到最适合耕种的状态，人们翻动土地、播下种子，将劳动作为祭品献给大地。大地兽们也会加倍感到活力。   五月•欢喜月 代表泰坦：满溢之杯，法吉娜 春耕结束的月份。在这一月，泉水流淌、渔业兴盛。一年中最繁重的工作已经于上一月完成，人们沉浸在喜庆的氛围中。这是酿造和举办庆典最好的月份，人们经常揉着发懵的脑袋醒来，又摇摇头重新睡去。   六月•长昼月 代表泰坦：晨昏之眼，艾格勒 热力最旺盛的月份，黎明机器比平常更加闪耀，大地上的植物也卖力吸纳它的能量，让人们得以在之后收获。沐浴这光的人们会感到精神饱满，活力充沛。 据说在过去，这一月的昼比夜长，因为艾格勒在关于天空所有权的争斗中胜过了欧洛尼斯。   创生季 七月•自由月 代表泰坦：全世之座，刻法勒 平淡祥和的月份。没有什么大的节日要参与，也没有什么大的任务要去完成。人们可以在这一月发展爱好、追求理想，做自己想做的任何事。正如刻法勒创造了世界，又任由人们在它的庭院中玩耍。   八月•收获月 代表泰坦：裂分之枝，瑟希斯 秋收开始的月份。作物们吸收了长昼月的光照，成长到最为饱满的状态。同耕耘月一样，人们在这一月格外忙碌。   九月•拾线月 代表泰坦：黄金之茧，墨涅塔 秋收完成的月份。在这个月，人们会回顾自己一年来的经历。墨涅塔将一切在此收拢，编织成记忆的金线。这是陪伴家人、享受爱与美好的一月。得闲的人们会在家中织布，有关纺织的节日也会在此举办。   灾厄季 十月•纷争月 代表泰坦：天谴之矛，尼卡多利 生产活动完成后的第一个月份。人们从每年最为重要的工作中解放，社会因而多出了额外的劳力。在过去，各城邦经常于这一月约定战争。这一月也是处决囚犯、烧毁祭品以祀神明的时期。   十一月•哀悼月 代表泰坦：灰黯之手，塞纳托斯 城邦逐渐归于沉寂的月份，战争一般在这个月接近尾声。人们从战场上拖回尸体，埋葬死者、安抚生者。祭司们在这个月最为忙碌，因为他们需要为死者祈福。哀悼月给人以肃杀的气氛，人们在这个月开始会逐渐减少活动，仿佛沉眠。   十二月•机缘月 代表泰坦：翻飞之币，扎格列斯 一年最末尾的月份，于上月沉寂的众生再次活跃，好事和坏事都会更加频繁地发生。赌徒们相信这一月会为他们带去好手气，投机商人期待着暴富；窃贼往往也用光了积蓄，开始摩拳擦掌。机缘月是治安最动荡的月份。 由于扎格列斯难以捉摸的性情，这一月究竟有多少天是不能确定的——有时，本应翻页的日历末尾会多出幽灵般的一日，闰日。人们将有这一日的机缘月称为「红月」，没有这一日的称为「金月」。赌徒与窃贼们把这天当作自己的幸运日，加倍疯狂地行动，许多暗杀和阴谋也往往随之而来。
E: Always remember Kephale, who gave us the calendar: They bear the dawn to this day. Fate Season First Month — Month of Gate Patron Titan: Gate of Infinity, Janus As the first month of ridding the old for the new, Janus closes the old door representing the past, and opens the new door representing the future. They are both the door and the lock that guards it, cleaving the past from the future like a sharp ax. During this month, people will discard objects that bear bonds (such as keepsakes from past lovers or deceased family members), declare that they are severing the past, and step forth into the future — this act is completely voluntary. Second month — Month of Balance Patron Titan: Scale of Justice, Talanton The most disciplined of all months, Kephale uses its measurements to dictate the months. During this month, people's daily routines will become more consistent, their moods even, and they are more willing to pass judgment and sign contracts as a result. It is said that when there was day and night in the past, the Month of Balance was the only month when the days were as long as nights, because Talanton managed to mediate a truce between Oronyx and Aquila. Third Month — Month of Evernight Patron Titan: Veil of Evernight, Oronyx A month when the sun's shine is dimmer than usual. People doze off more frequently, and their instincts and emotions replace their thought and reason, making it hard to accomplish intricate tasks. It is said that in the past, this month's nights were longer than its days, for Oronyx triumphed over Aquila for undisputed authority over the sky. Pillar Season Fourth Month — Month of Cultivation Patron Titan: Pillar of Stone, Georios The month of spring cultivation, also the busiest month. During this month, the earth is restored into a state most suited for farming. People till the soil, sow the seeds, and offer labor as tribute to the land. Dromases will also be doubly vigorous. Fifth Month — Month of Joy Patron Titan: Chalice of Plenty, Phagousa The month when spring cultivation ends. During this month, spring waters flow, and fishermen flourish. The heaviest workload for the year ended last month, and everyone is reveling in the atmosphere of festivity. This is the best month for brewing and holding celebrations, when people wake up, massage their temples in a daze, then shake their heads and go back to sleep. Sixth Month — Month of Everday Patron Titan: Eye of Twilight, Aquila The hottest month, when the Dawn Device shines even more brightly than usual. The land's flora also works hard to absorb its shine so that people can have a good harvest. Bathed in this radiance, people will feel refreshed and vitalized. It is said that in the past, this month's days were longer than its nights, for Aquila triumphed over Oronyx for undisputed authority over the sky. Creation Season Seventh Month — Month of Freedom Patron Titan: Throne of Worlds, Kephale The month of tranquil peace. There are no major events to attend, nor significant tasks to complete. During this month, people can work on their hobbies, pursue their dreams, and do whatever they wish to do. Just as Kephale created the world, they also allowed its inhabitants to play in their courtyard. Eighth Month — Month of Reaping Patron Titan: Bough of Rift, Cerces The month of the fall harvest. Crops absorbed the light during the Month of Everday, and have grown into their ripest. Similar to the Month of Cultivation, people are busier than usual this month. Ninth Month — Month of Weaving Patron Titan: Chrysalis of Gold, Mnestia The month when the fall harvest is completed. During this month, people will reminisce on their experiences over the year. Mnestia collects everything and weaves them into golden threads of memory. This is a month of family gatherings to enjoy the good times. Leisurely individuals will be weaving at home, and weaving-related festivals will be held this month. Calamity Season Tenth Month — Month of Strife Patron Titan: Lance of Fury, Nikador The first month after production activities are completed. People are liberated from the most important tasks of the year, resulting in surplus labor in society. In the past, the cities typically waged war at this time. This month is also the period when criminal executions and burning offerings in prayer to the gods occur. Eleventh Month — Month of Mourning Patron Titan: Hand of Shadow, Thanatos The month when the cities would gradually fall silent. Wars usually approach their end during this month. People would drag bodies back from the battlefields, bury the dead, and comfort the living. Priests are the busiest this month, for they need to pray for the dead. The mood of this month is one of grave somberness. People would gradually lessen their activities during this time, as if in slumber as well. Twelfth Month — Month of Fortune Patron Titan: Coin of Whimsy, Zagreus The last month of the year. The previously silent masses would start up their liveliness once more, and good and bad things would start to happen more frequently. Gamblers believe that this month brings them good fortune, and opportunistic merchants look forward to sudden spikes in wealth. Thieves would typically have exhausted their savings, and rub their hands together for the next job. The Month of Fortune is the most tumultuous month for law enforcement. Due to Zagreus' unpredictable nature, the number of days in this month can never be confirmed. Sometimes, when you should turn the page at the end of the calendar, a leap day appears at the end of it like a ghost. People call this Month of Fortune with this additional day the "Scarlet Month," and the "Golden Month" without. Gamblers and thieves treat this day as their lucky day, becoming fervent with their antics, which is unfortunately followed by plenty of assassinations and conspiracies.

C:
…黑潮虽为莫名之敌，若善加利用，却也能成为我等对付宿敌之利器。

可命渗透者运送污染眷属若干，以特质的土层将其裹装，混在大地兽商队所负货件中，借机潜入奥赫玛。进城后，趁幕匿时遣人将眷属藏于城中各处。数日后土层风化剥落，眷属的污浊气息便会萦绕奥赫玛大街小巷。

待到此时，奥赫玛人必疲于奔寻污染源头。我等只需待他们手忙脚乱，便可操行决胜的一步：汇聚城中英灵魂气，令天谴锋刃直指奥赫玛，以纷争之剑辉将整座城邦刺穿。而后大军压境、摧枯拉朽，千古一胜，终将落入我等手中。
E:
...The black tide may be an indescribable enemy, but if exploited carefully, it can also become a sharp weapon pointed at our archenemy.

Infiltrators can be instructed to transport a load of tainted Titankin covered in special earth, so that they may be smuggled among dromas caravan goods into Okhema. Upon entry, under the cover of the Curtain-Fall Hour, the personnel will stash the kin in various sections of the city. After a few days, the earth will weather and peel, suffocating the streets of Okhema with Titankin's tainted air.

When this moment arrives, the Okhemans will be frantically searching for the source of the pollution. We just have to wait for the chaos to unfurl to take the final step to victory: Gather the heroic souls within the city, let the divine blade of wrath point at Okhema, and run Strife's blade through the entire city — after which, our forces will overwhelm them like an ocean wave crashing into them, and the long-awaited victory will finally fall into our grasp.

C: 昏光庭院创造的巧构机关，将罗盘解出，便能架起可供旅者通行的虹彩道路。
E: The ingenious mechanisms crafted by the Twilight Courtyard will form a rainbow path for travelers once the compass is unlocked.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 最强悍的野兽吞噬众生，最高明的猎手猎杀自我。
E: The mightiest beast devours all living things, while the most skillful hunter hunts oneself.

C: 苏乐达能够为美梦小镇带来快乐与欢笑，但邪恶的石头老板讨厌所有美好的东西，于是囚禁了汽水先生，也藏起了小镇中所有的苏乐达…美梦小镇的英雄——钟表小子！将会潜入石头老板的办公楼，为居民们重新带回笑容！
E: SoulGlad brings joy and laughter to Dreamville, but the evil Boss Stone hates all things good. Consequently, he has imprisoned Mr. Soda and hidden all the SoulGlad in the town... The hero of Dreamville — Clockie — will infiltrate Boss Stone's office building to bring back smiles to the townspeople!

C: 历史悠久的仙舟监狱系统，由仙舟人与持明共建，专司镇压触犯律条，造作诸恶的重犯与孽物。
E: A longstanding Xianzhou prison system jointly established by the Xianzhou people and the Vidyadhara. Devoted to suppressing evildoers and those who violate the law, namely repeat offenders and abominations.

C: 恢弘的公馆主厅，五大家系的家主定期在此商讨梦境世界的局势和规划。大厅中央设有精细的城市沙盘。
E: The spacious main hall of the residence. The leaders of the five major lineages regularly gather to discuss the situation and plan for the Dreamscape. A finely crafted city sandpit is placed at the center of the hall.

C: 尊崇「理性之泰坦」的城邦，供奉司掌智慧的瑟希斯。学识的星火终遭吞没，仅余空虚躯壳在枝叶间游荡。
E: A city-state that venerates the Reason Titan, they who rule over wisdom and sagacity, Cerces. The sparkles of knowledge were eventually consumed, leaving only hollow trunks wandering among the leaves.

C: 于此门之前，是神话与悲喜交织的千古世界；于此门之后，是数据与电信号明灭的寂静大墓。
E: Before this gate lies a timeless world intertwined with myths, joys, and sorrows. Beyond this gate is a muted grand tomb where data and electrical signals flicker.

C: 众多银鬃铁卫把守着这片军事禁区，任何企图窥探其秘密的渗透者都将受到严厉惩罚。
E: Hordes of Silvermane Guards guard this restricted area. Any infiltrators who attempt to pry into its secrets will be severely punished.

钟表披萨
经典苏乐达

E:

C: 跟随「辅助指引」并完成相应的操作，即可抵达当前任务目标点。
E: Follow Support Guide and finish the corresponding operations to arrive at the destination for the current mission.

C: 和垃圾桶组合共同进行说唱表演！
E: Put on a rap show with the trashcan group!

C: 《曜青体育》的记者馥林女士似乎会利用媒体资源做一些「灰色」的工作。如果肯消耗一些道德，她的人脉同样能为你所用。
E: Ms. Fulin, a journalist from Yaoqing Sports, seems to use media resources for some "gray" activities. If you're willing to compromise some morals, her connections can also be of use to you.

C: 在贝洛伯格除行政区以外的区域随处可见的机器人们，无论是哪种型号，其生产管线都可以追溯到近千年前的几张设计蓝图。有些机兵扮演着协调治安、帮助生产的角色；也有些年久失修的个体在漫无目的地流浪。
E: Robots found everywhere in Belobog except in the Administrative District. No matter which model such a robot belongs to, its origins can be traced back to one of the few design blueprints from millennia ago. Some of these automatons help with security and production, while other faulty units wander aimlessly.

C: 禀受「丰饶」之赐的生命，寿元超出自然界限，身躯产生众多神异变化。此所谓丰饶灵物，抑或是丰饶孽物——端看你如何看待这一切。
E: A lifeform that received the blessing of Abundance. Their lifespans far surpass their natural limit, and their bodies have been altered in many abnormal ways. They are known as the Blessed of Abundance, or the Abominations of Abundance — It all depends on how you view this affair.

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形。其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的燃烬所取代。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. It mimics the form of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armors of the Belobog warriors, its head, however, is replaced by burned ashes.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。坚不可摧的障壁包裹起生命，阻拦异己。但在那坚硬的躯壳下，却是脆弱不堪的无名地带。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone. While it forms an impenetrable barrier to deter outside intrusion, beneath its hardened shell lies a fragile, nameless core.

C: 每个轮开始时，为我方当前生命值最低的目标回复等同于其生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值。
E: At the beginning of each Cycle, restores HP for the ally with the lowest HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP.

C: 我方攻击敌方目标后，会使目标陷入风化状态，每回合开始时受到固定数值的风属性持续伤害。
E: After allies attack enemies, inflicts Wind Shear on the target, causing the target to take a set amount of Wind DoT at the start of every turn.

C: 施放终结技对敌方目标造成伤害时，被视为发动了追加攻击。
E: When Ultimate deals DMG to the enemy target, it will be considered as a Follow-Up ATK.

C: 敌方目标进入战斗时，陷入风化状态，每回合开始时受到固定数值的风属性持续伤害，并使自身与相邻敌方目标陷入风化状态。
E: After enemy targets enter battle, they become afflicted by Wind Shear. At the start of every turn, they receive a set amount of Wind DoT and inflict Wind Shear on themselves and adjacent enemy targets.

C: 「战意汹涌」期间，敌方目标被任意单位消灭后，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>概率为我方全体附上1层【回音】。
E: During Surging Grit, after an enemy target is defeated by any unit, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> chance for all allies to gain 1 stack of "Resound."

C: 当敌方目标被<color=#f29e38ff>消灭</color>时，为我方能量值最高且未达到能量上限的角色恢复<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点能量。该恢复效果触发的次数等同于被消灭的目标所陷入的【<u>连续鞭腿</u>】层数。
E: When an enemy is <color=#f29e38ff>defeated</color>, regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Energy to the ally with the highest Energy that is not at Max Energy yet. This regeneration effect will trigger the same number of times as the number of <u>Continuous Hook Kick</u> stacks the defeated enemy had.

C: 当敌方目标被消灭时，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的固定概率使敌方其他目标陷入该目标承受的持续伤害状态。
E: When an enemy target is defeated, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> fixed chance to inflict the same DoT as the defeated target on other enemy targets.

C: 在自身回合外，造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG dealt by characters outside their own turn is increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方目标拥有【绩效点】时，造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: When allies possess Performance Points, increases DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 角色的弱点击破效率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，攻击处于弱点击破状态下的敌方目标时，会以<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>的击破伤害触发所有已有弱点的击破效果。
E: Increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> and Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. When attacking Weakness Broken enemy targets, deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Break DMG to trigger the Weakness Break effect for all existing Weaknesses.

C: 我方目标攻击敌方目标后，【晨星球棒】对受到攻击的随机敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>次等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的随机属性伤害，该伤害对精英、首领目标额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: After ally targets attack enemy targets, "Morningstar Bat" deals DMG of a random Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of base DMG <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) to a random enemy target was attacked. This DMG additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> against Elite and Boss enemies.

C: 失去生命值时<color=#f29e38ff>回复</color>已损失生命值的<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color></color>，我方全体速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color></color>。
E: Whenever HP is lost, <color=#f29e38ff>restores</color> HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the HP difference between the character's Max HP and current HP, and increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>.

E: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

E: When any ally target Breaks an enemy target's Weakness, increases all ally targets' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

E: Explore, understand, establish, and connect — This is the way of trailblazing that the Nameless have always lived by. As the latest member of the Express Crew, your first stop is Jarilo-VI, a planet covered in blizzard and ice...

C: 明月照桂林，初花锦绣色。三月七拾起桃色对剑，钻研剑艺。在云璃、彦卿的指导下，三月七或勤学苦练，或邂逅奇遇…成就一段剑侠逸话。
E: The moon shines bright on gilded trees, and the flowers offer forth colors of first blooming. March 7th takes up a pair of peach-colored blades and devotes herself to the way of the sword. Under Yunli and Yanqing's guidance, March 7th will experience arduous training, or unexpected escapades... And create a tale of developing swordmaster.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ
E: Jarilo-VI

C: 匹诺康尼•家族建设局
E: Penacony: The Family's Construction Authority

C: 空间站「黑塔」•月台
E: Herta Space Station: Railway Platform

C: 土地格
E: Land Tile

C: 即便阔气如「奥帝购物中心」，似乎也会有裁员情况…你看到一份裁员名单，显然这里工作人员还不知道被裁的命运，而你——
E: Even an establishment as lavish as the Oti Mall seems to still have layoffs... You see an employee termination list — it's fairly obvious that the staff here don't know their grim fate yet, and you...

C: 获得增益效果「<color=#f29e38ff>小确幸•<unbreak>30%</unbreak></color>」
E: Receive the buff "<color=#f29e38ff>Petite Delight: <unbreak>30%</unbreak></color>"

C: 你假装晕倒在地，这说明伤势*非常严重*。
E: You pretend to fall unconscious on the ground, indicating that the accident is "very serious".

C: 捕风捉影、颠倒是非是不对的！
E: It's wrong to chase shadows and twist truths!

C: 这都什么年代了，怎么还在用传统方法抓龙女？
E: What era is this? Why are they still using outdated ways to catch the dragon lady?

C: 为无穷远方捎去思念。
E: Send your thoughts toward the distant infinity.

C: *没有人*想起了经典的出云幻戏。
E: *No one* recalls the classic Izumo immersia.

C: 驭空大人狂气的靓照看了个够！
E: Get a feast of Madam Yukong's beautiful photos!

C: 那是鸟…那是流星…那是——驭空！
E: It's a bird... It's a meteor... It's... Yukong!

C: 黑粉们怎么只捡软柿子捏。
E: Why are the haters only picking on the easy targets?

C: 网上回复一千句，不如新稿件里写一句。
E: Rather than a thousand replies on the net, why not put a line into your script?

C: 害羞的男孩能找到路，可惜三人走了一路都没凑出一句完整的话。
E: The shy boy manages to find a way out, but the trio walks the whole way in awkward silence.

C: 米沙做出了常人该有的反应。
E: Misha reacts in the way that any proper human being would.

C: 「喵喵，喵喵喵喵。」
E: Meow meow, meow meow meow meow.

C: 这就是面子果实能力者的自信吗？
E: So this is the brimming confidence of a Face-Face Fruit user?

C: 华劳斯表示赞同。
E: Wallace expresses agreement.

C: 我没什么经验！阿兰你来吧！
E: Huh!? Hehe... I—I've never done it before! Arlan, you do it!

C: 迫不及待地观察星空…
E: Eagerly observe the starry sky...

C: 流星到来时，你睡得很死。
E: When the meteor shower arrives, you're sleeping like a log.

C: 偷看一眼她正在做的题。
E: Peek at the questions that she's on right now.

C: 青雀狠不下心。
E: Qingque can't bear to do it.

C: 请一定要让我来领。
E: Please let me accept it.

C: 你意外拍得了车厢残片。
E: You accidentally win the carriage debris piece.

C: 你代替知更鸟登台演出成功。
E: You successfully replace Robin for the stage performance.

C: 用于在地图上前进的基本道具。
E: A basic item for moving forward on the Cosmodyssey map.

C: 重抛硬币×2
E: Reroll Coin ×2

C: 可口的烧麦
E: Delicious Shumai

C: 最适合收集并分析数据的人是谁？
E: Who is the best person to collect and analyze data?

C: 应对策略：在【蚀心厉咒】施放时，优先选择我方非输出角色作为技能的目标。
E: Strategy: When "Soul-Shattering Malediction" is used, prioritize selecting non-DMG dealing ally characters as the target of the ability.

C: 首领幻影失去第一层韧性或行动一定次数后，进入【镣铐崩解】状态，改变攻击方式，并召唤可以不断重复召唤的【残破容器】。
E: After losing the first layer of Toughness or after taking a certain number of actions, Boss Mirage enters the "Shackle Shatter" state, changes their attack patterns, and summons "Long-Shattered Vessel" that can continually be resummoned.

C: 【蚀蛰虫】被强化后攻击力会提高，强化达到3层时其攻击有概率对我方角色施加纠缠效果。
E: After "Gnaw Stings" are enhanced, their ATK increases. When the enhancement level reaches 3, their attacks have a chance to inflict the Entanglement effect on the targets.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为贝洛伯格的戍卫部队「银鬃铁卫」分队的领导者。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is the leader of a squad of Belobog's Silvermane Guards.

C: 工造司匠人随手造就的机巧发明。原本是不具灵智，用以净化空气的香炉，如今却因为某些异变被赋予了短暂的「生命」。
E: An ingenium casually made by craftsmasters of the Artisanship Commission. It was originally an inanimate burner used for purifying the air, but now it has been given a short-lived "life" due to certain mutations.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n神秘危险的忆域迷因，被视作梦中不应存在的「死亡」。它的邪影游荡于十二时分，所及之处必有不测之祸，以利刃散布噩耗，以死荫笼罩美梦。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nA mysterious and dangerous Memory Zone Meme, seen as the "death" that shouldn't exist in dreams. Its sinister shadow wanders within the Twelve Hours, bringing unforeseen calamity wherever it goes. It spreads misfortune like a sharp blade, casting a shadow of death over beautiful dreams.

C: 「齐响诗班」众愿之多米尼克斯，是为「同谐」希佩的众相化身之一，因「秩序」的干扰展现出不同以往的面貌。作为集群意识对愿望的回应，他指挥的颂歌能依照万千愿望重塑世界，建立新的法则，而所有许愿者都会成为其力量的来源。
E: Dominicus, the wisher of the Harmonious Choir, is one of the many embodiments of Xipe the Harmony. Due to the interferences from the Order, his appearance is different from before. Materialized as the Hive Mind's response to wishes, the hymns he conducts can reshape the world and create new laws per the wishes, and all who made this wish will become the source of his power.

C: 黑斗篷魔王忠实的扈从，继承了魔王的部分力量和残暴性格，各个星球都有他们为非作歹的事迹。
E: The Black Cloak Demon King's devoted retainers. Inherited part of the Demon King's power and violent personality. There's evidence of their crimes on every planet.

C: 流光忆庭的模因生命遭遇「毁灭」金血糅合而成的扭曲怪物。略有翼蛇雏形，足以装神弄鬼。\n它那扭曲的理智在黑潮中彻底疯狂，那强烈的自我防御冲动，无形中染上了一层幻想色彩。
E: A distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. It is in the rudimentary form of a flying snake, enough to intimidate its assailants.\nIts twisted rationality went completely mad in the black tide, and its intense self-protecting impulse imperceptibly took on a fantastical flavor.

C: 银鬃铁卫中的炮手，使用便携的手炮进行战斗。\n 在战斗中，银鬃炮手会和其它目标发动猛烈的连携攻击。
E: A cannoneer of the Silvermane Guards who wields a portable hand cannon into battle.\nDuring combat, a Silvermane Cannoneer will launch brutal chain attacks along with other allies of theirs.

C: 「反物质军团」利用「战争熔炉」将战士与古兽的残片融合重铸后的产物。\n虽数量相对稀少，但兼具战士的智能与古兽的力量与机动性。在战斗中，消灭敌人后会立即再次行动。
E: A product of the Antimatter Legion utilizing the Warforge to recast and fuse remnants of fallen warriors and Leviathans.\nThough relatively rare, they possess both the intelligence of a warrior and the power and mobility of a Leviathan. In combat, it can immediately take another action after destroying an enemy.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: dev_走地虚卒换皮描述
在繁衍中发生变异的蛰虫亚种，善用蕴含量子毒素的锹角侵蚀猎物的身躯。
E: A subspecies of Stings that underwent mutations during reproduction, adept at using quantum toxins in their mandibles to corrode away the bodies of their prey.

E: Flying Sword

E: Flying Sword

E: Guide of Withering and Decay

E: Manipulated Logos

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

E: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成冰属性伤害并使自身造成的伤害小幅提高，伤害提高效果可叠加。
E: Deals Ice DMG to all targets and slightly increases the DMG dealt. This DMG boosting effect is stackable.
