C: 如何评价阿兰在防卫科的工作？ ——大哥，是指引防卫科前进的明灯，是支撑大家战斗的核心！若无大哥一日，则空间站哀鸿遍野；若无大哥十日，则空间站民不聊生；若无大哥百日，则空间站宛如炼狱！ ——但他在工作时间和佩佩玩电子飞盘诶。 ——因为大哥提前完成了防卫科的日常训练！目睹大哥的身姿，也是对我们的激励！ ——但他在工作时间和佩佩玩电子飞盘诶。 ——你怎么知道和佩佩玩电子飞盘不是大哥的工作之…… 「巡逻的时候玩手机，没收。」 「不是，阿兰大哥，有人在群里说你坏话，你不管管？」 「没空。」 「啊？有紧急任务吗？我跟你一起去，发生啥了？」 「带佩佩去做复健训练，玩电子飞盘。」
E: How is Arlan's work in the Security Department? — Brother Arlan is the beacon that guides the Security Department, the core support for everyone's battles! Without him, the space station would fall to pieces in a day. Without him, people's lives would be ruined in ten days. Without him, the station would be hellish in just one hundred days! — But he plays holodisc with Peppy during work hours. — Because he's finished all daily security tasks ahead of schedule! His mere presence is an inspiration to us all. — But he plays holodisc with Peppy during work hours. — How do you know that playing holodisc with Peppy isn't actually part of his job description... "You're not allowed to play with your phone while out on patrol. Give it to me." "No, brother Arlan! People are talking smack about you in the group chat! Don't you care?" "Nope. Too busy." "Huh, have you got an urgent mission? Let me go with you. What happened?" "I'm getting Peppy to do rehab through playing holodisc."

C: 自由叛逆的朗道家长女，曾是可可利亚的挚友，如今是兴趣使然的机械师。\n在永冬的贝洛伯格经营着名为「永动」的机械屋，时不时停业举办摇滚露天演出。\n如果有人过问机械屋怎么赚钱…「这是兴趣，亲爱的，我不缺钱。」
E: The free and rebellious eldest daughter of the Landau family. Once a close friend of Cocolia's, she is now a mechanic purely because she likes this job.\nIn the Everwinter-stricken Belobog, she opened a workshop called "Neverwinter" that puts business on hold from time to time for outdoor rock 'n' roll performances.\nAnd should anyone ask her about the workshop's profits... "This is just a hobby, dear. I'm not short on money."

C: 朗道家年龄最小的女孩，贝洛伯格首屈一指的极地探险家。\n看似慵懒，实际上执行力极强。散发生人勿近的气场只是为了避免不必要的社交。\n至于如何定义不必要的社交——「呃…所有社交不都是没必要的吗？」
E: The youngest daughter of the Landau family, and one of Belobog's best extreme environments explorers. \nShe is highly capable of action despite her apparent lack of motivation. She only appears introverted and lazy to avoid unnecessary socialization.\nAs for what counts as unnecessary socialization — "Um, aren't all socialization unnecessary?"

C: 玉界朗朗，琼田荡荡。星槎如织入海市，游人络绎塞天门。凡有行旅出入罗浮，抬眼便可瞧见一宽阔界门，其中空间隔膜如涡流扰动，无凭无依，兀自吐纳往来大小舟舸，蔚为壮观。 这天门名为「玉界」，实为仙舟洞天入境门户。门下稍远处，有旅者列队蠕行，欲向罗浮境内去。其中有一少女着杏黄衣衫，单看面庞约莫十一六七，以仙舟尺度却不知真实如何，又不知借着甚么怪力负一重剑。 那剑长二尺一寸，大非寻常。虽有白布缠身，隐约看来模样倒是简古，然两边剑锋如蝉翼般微薄，足以吹毛断发。往来游人见这神兵，无不侧目称奇；可少女却似愁思伴身，只自顾拧紧了眉心，隐隐流出些许懊闷，小声念道： 「真是奇了怪了！娘先前教我念这心诀，道是能定心神，怎不见成效呢？」 不等她再多吐露些佶屈聱牙之词，那边关的持明男子便提腕摆手，招引少女上前：「下一位！」少女一惊，牙关咬得紧颤，却也不得不硬着头皮应声前去。 「金石可铄，盟誓……」少女对持明男子正色道。 「金石可铄，盟誓不破。」持明男子黯然道：「通关便是，赌甚么咒？姓名、来历、入境缘由云云一一落实了罢。」 少女哑然，想来又是自己错用了罗浮掌故。无奈，只得拎起四方览镜，应男人要求如实汇报： 「姓名：素裳；随身物件：『轩辕』一柄；来历……」 「…啧！这『曜青』的『曜』字…是怎个写的来着？」
E: O, Jade Gate so bright. O, jade skies of flight. Starskiffs weave through the Grand Fair, and tourists flock the skygate. Anyone traveling in or out of the Luofu could see a vast gate when looking up, where a spacial membrane twirls like a torrent. The gate stands alone with no walls and admits the ships coming and going. It is a grand sight to see. This skygate is called the Jade Gate, and it's the entrance to the Xianzhou delves. Below the gate, travelers stream inside on their way into the Luofu. Among them is a young girl wearing a peach-colored dress, likely of 16 or 17 years old, but difficult to judge her true age as a Xianzhou native — nor could anyone guess what strange force has helped her hold that enormous greatsword in her hand. At two feet and one inch long, it's very unusual. Despite being wrapped in white cloth, it still looks like an antique. Yet it is a true weapon as the edges on both sides of the blade are as thin as cicada wings, sharp enough to even cut a strand of hair. People come to stare at this soldier girl, raising their eyebrows. But the girl seems to be accompanied by worry, merely frowning in annoyance as she mutters: "How strange! Mother taught me how to chant this mantra so that I could focus. Why isn't it working now?" Without waiting for her to utter any more obscure words, a Vidyadhara man at the custom raised his hand and waves the girl over: "Next, please!" The girl is startled and grits her teeth tightly — but she has to bite the bullet and steps forward. "Gold can be smelted, but an oath..." The girl says sternly to the Vidyadhara man. "Gold can be smelted, but an oath cannot be broken". The Vidyadhara man blankly replies: "This is the customs office. What oath? Name, origin, reason for travel — just give me these." She is dumbfounded, and figures she'd gotten her Luofu anecdote wrong. Helpless, she could only pick up her Foursquare Mirror and respond: "Name: Sushang; personal belongings: One Xuanyuan sword. Origin:..." "Tsk, how do you write 'Yaoqing' again?"

C: 无光的幽暗中，他仿佛回到持明卵中，在波涛与幻梦里辗转来去。 他梦见自己分开海水，来到宫墟深处，埋葬故友残存的碧血，或是创造许久未诞的新生——又或者这两件事本是一体，是久久无法实践的渴望，是压垮巨龙的最后一根稻草。匠人持剑一路护卫，血痕累累。他敦促自己下定决心。 「倏忽死了…我们赢了，可还能再赢几次？我们还要付出多少像这样的代价？」 「看看这建木，它依然还活着。只要建木矗立，怪物们…它们可以一遍遍卷土重来。仙舟人、狐人和持明对抗孽物的战争，永远不会结束。」 「是啊，我们每个人都没什么特别的！我们每个人都只有一次生命，为这个牺牲，为那个去死…这全都是我们自己的选择。就像她选择了救你和镜流…就像她选择了让更多人活下去！」 战争，还有那些在战争中消失的生命，每个都和自己一样，是呼吸着的人。 他想起那些人的脸庞，疲倦地合上了眼，下定决心。 「如果有机会…我们也会选择让她，还有更多人活下去。 ——持明有自己的解救之道。我可以试试。」 梦中之梦，身外化身。他回到了自我即将消逝的前一刻，冷眼旁观看着自己化为龙形，与那团无定变化的血肉之影纠缠角斗。濒死的幻觉中，神使向他展现了诡丽的图景，星辰像血红细胞般翕张着吟唱，宇宙堕入肉与欲望的渊薮。龙心努力搏动，奋起爪牙、吐息和愤怒——可无论如何强大，生命也不能对抗生命之神的使者本尊。 直到一艘星槎如箭矢刺穿了一切，他看到那个女孩从废墟中艰难爬出，手中高举着一轮绝对黑暗的「太阳」。在那快如永恒的瞬息里，他看着她的手消逝，看着她的面容消逝，他看着她消逝——那物什将周遭的一切碎为最细腻的齑粉，卷入力量的风暴里，连同女孩自己。 一缕碎发和几滴血落地。证明她存在过的痕迹，只剩这些了。
E: In the dim abyss devoid of light, he seemed to have returned to the insides of a Vidyadhara egg, being ceaselessly churned in tumultuous waves and elusive dreams. He dreamed that he parted the ocean's waters and came to the palace ruin depths, burying the remnants of his old friend's hallowed blood, or creating a new life that had not been seen for millennia — or, perhaps, those two actions were one and the same, an unattainable desire that could not be carried out for long years in the past, a final straw that broke the gargantuan dragon's back. The craftsman was covered in blood and wounds as he guarded the dragon with a sword in his hand. He urged himself to commit to the decision. "Shuhu is dead... we won, but how many more victories can we manage to achieve? How many more prices like this must we pay?" "Look, the Ambrosial Arbor still stands. So long as it is alive, the monsters... they can come back again and again. The war of the Xianzhou natives, foxians, and Vidyadhara against the abominations will never end." "Yes, none of us are special! Each of us has only one life, sacrificing for this, dying for that... it's all our own choices. Just like how she chose to save you and Jingliu... just like how she chose to let more people live on!" War, and the lives that expired in the war, were living beings just like him. He shut his eyes wearily, remembering their faces, and made up his mind. "If there's a chance... we will also choose to let her and more people live on. We, the Vidyadhara, have our own way of salvation. I can give it a try." Like an out-of-body experience, like a dream within a dream, he returned to the moment before his sense of self disappeared. With a cold and emotionless mind, he observed himself turning into a dragon, entangled and fighting claw-and-fangs against that bulb of shapeshifting shadow of flesh and blood. In an illusion seen on the verge of death, the emissary of the god showed him an unsettling, beautiful scene — the stars pulsated and sang hymns like red blood cells, and the universe descended into an abyss of flesh and desires. The dragon heart beat to its limit, raising its fangs, breath, and fury — however, no matter how mighty it was, a "lifeform" cannot defy the true body of god of life's envoy. ...Until a starskiff ran everything through like an arrow shaft. He saw that girl crawling out of the ruins with great difficulty, lifting a "sun" of absolute darkness in her hand. In that fleeting eternity, he saw her hand disappear, saw her face disappear, and saw her disappear — That item had ground everything around it into the finest dust and dragged them into a vortex of raw power, including that girl. A tuft of hair and a few drops of blood fell to the floor as evidence of her existence. Those were the only traces she left.

C: 彦卿的弱点被击破时，我方全体恢复能量及战技点。
E: When Yanqing's Weakness is broken, all allies will recover Energy and Skill Points.

C: 绝望模式
E: Despair Mode

C: 你踏上星穹列车，结识了一群志不同道不合的同伴，好在他们的态度都还算友善。\n一段不知终点的星间流浪之旅即将开启，或许你真的在不经意间把自己卷进了某部科幻电影的拍摄片场。\n根据列车长帕姆的通报，「跃迁」即将开始——鉴于你还是个星际穿越新手，最好还是找个地方坐稳扶好吧。
E: You board the Astral Express and become acquainted with a group of companions who may not always get along, but are all at least friendly.\nA journey with an unknown destination between the stars is about to begin. Maybe you really did accidentally stumble upon some set of a Sci-Fi movie.\nConductor Pom-Pom announces that the warp jump is about to begin — seeing that you're still new to interstellar travel, best you find a seat and hang on tight.

C: 你们和布洛妮娅被恶徒围攻之际，「地火」骨干希儿及时赶到解围，却又转头与铁卫少女对峙起来。\n最终，希儿终于表明来意：原来是「地火」首领奥列格要求面见这位来自地上的高贵少女。\n而你们自然不能放过这个接触「地火」的机会，现在只要在这矿区找到希儿就可以了…可她在哪里呢？
E: Just as your crew and Bronya are being surrounded by the enemies, Seele, backbone of Wildfire arrives just in time to save her but immediately turns to confront her after.\nIn the end, Seele finally reveals her reason for being there: Oleg, leader of Wildfire is asking for an audience with the noble girl from the surface.\nNaturally, you can't pass up on this opportunity to get in touch with Wildfire. All you have to do is to find Seele in the mines... But where is she?

C: 你在这个神秘的空间醒来，被朦混的星空笼罩，被琥珀色的命运包裹。\n你记得自己的身体被可可利亚的枪尖贯穿——这里是死后的世界吗？但你的意识如此清醒，身体也轻盈如初…脑海中某个浑厚的声音似乎在指引着你，告诉你「我还活着」。\n也许你的同伴们还在与可可利亚厮杀。无论如何，你必须找到办法回到他们的身边。
E: You wake up in a strange place surrounded by nebulous stars, seemingly enveloped by an amber-colored destiny.\nThe last thing you remember is being pierced by Cocolia's lance... Could this be the afterlife? But your mind is still very clear and your body still has strength... These resounding voices in your head seem to be guiding you, telling you that you are still alive.\nYour companions might still be in fierce combat with Cocolia. You have to find a way to get back to their side, no matter what.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n为了让娜塔莎能够放心，你们来到铆钉镇寻找偷偷跑来探险的孩子们。\n你远远地听到了尤利安的声音——这家伙不会是在裂界里玩捉迷藏吧……
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nFor Natasha's peace of mind, you arrive at Rivet Town to look for the children who sneaked here to have an adventure.\nYou can hear Julian's voice from far away — They can't be playing hide-and-seek in the Fragmentum, can they...

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓之旅终于圆满地告一段落了。\n你与新结交的伙伴们道别，重新回到了列车上。\n是时候了，和姬子、瓦尔特确认列车的现况吧。
E: The trailblazing expedition on Jarilo-VI has finally reached a satisfying conclusion.\nYou bid farewell to your new friends and return to the Express.\nIt's time to check in with Himeko and Welt about the situation on the Express.

C: 另一边，你、罗刹、素裳三人随星槎流离，辗转来到一处人迹杳然的洞天。
E: On the other side, Luocha, Sushang, and you drift along on the starskiff and eventually arrive at an abandoned delve.

C: 没想到这空无一人的洞天里竟然还有一位老师傅坚守不去，当真是可歌可泣。\n不打不相识，你们得知这位名唤公输师傅的工匠忧心洪炉的安危，可惜势单力孤，面对疯长的根须束手无策。这岂能难倒急公好义的开拓者们？
E: No one expected an old master to remain at his post in this abandoned delve. His spirits are applaudable.\nYou learn that this man, Master Gongshu, is concerned about the furnace's safety. However, he alone could do little against the rampaging roots. As virtuous and just trailblazers, such a task would be a piece of cake for you!

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 你们从艾丽小姐那里取得了梦境护照，这也意味着漫长的入住流程终于迎来了尾声。\n现在，距离入梦只差一步之遥。乘坐电梯，前往客房区吧。
E: You collect your Dreamscape Pass from Miss Alley, which means that the lengthy check-in process is finally coming to an end.\nNow, you are only one step from entering your dreams. Take the elevator and head to your guest room.

C: 你们从艾丽小姐那里取得了梦境护照，这也意味着漫长的入住流程终于迎来了尾声。\n现在，距离入梦只差一步之遥。穿过走廊，前往公共休息区吧。
E: You collect your Dreamscape Pass from Miss Alley, which means that the lengthy check-in process is finally coming to an end.\nNow, you are only one step from entering your dreams. Pass down the corridor and head to the public rest area.

C: 你在奥帝购物中心四下游荡时，听到车站方向传来骚动。\n去看看吧，毕竟无名客主打一个多管闲…不，乐于助人。
E: As you wander around the Oti Mall, you hear a disturbance coming from the direction of the station.\nGo and check it out. The Nameless love getting involved in other people's business... No, more like you love helping people, after all!

C: 桑博带着你回到了「梦境贩售店」，并让爱德华医生老实交代了面向资深客人的服务（他怎么不早点说？），订制了一枚个性化梦泡让你体验。\n虽然不知道他在打什么主意，但直觉告诉你，接下来的体验恐怕会很…超乎想象。
E: Sampo has led you back to the Dreamscape Sales Store and confessed to Dr. Edward the service reserved for regular customers (why didn't he say this earlier?), then ordered a customized dream bubble for you to experience.\nThough you have no idea what he is up to, your instincts fear that what you're about to experience is going to be... beyond your imagination.

C: 得知了伙伴们失散的消息后，黑天鹅带领你在忆域中继续前进。途中，你们意外遇到了正在此地探寻秘密的巡海游侠（尽管她给出了充分的理由，但你有理由怀疑她大概是又迷路了）。\n有了这位游侠的协助，你们抵达大堂应该不成问题——但黑天鹅似乎有些忌惮她，为什么？
E: Having learned of how your companions have become scattered, Black Swan continues to lead you forward in the Memory Zone. Along the way, you unexpectedly encounter the Galaxy Ranger, who is here searching for secrets (though she gave sufficient reasons for her to be here, you have reasons to suspect that she just got lost again.)\nNow, with the assistance of this Ranger, it should be no trouble for you all to make it to the hotel lobby — However, Black Swan seems a little apprehensive of her... Why could this be?

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n跟随黑天鹅前往忆域的出口，同时调查这场凶杀案吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nFollow Black Swan to the Memory Zone's exit while investigating the murder scene.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n终于，你集齐了所有碎片。是时候离开这座空荡荡的鬼城了。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nFinally, you have collected all the fragments. It's high time to leave this desolate and eerie place.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 平日里静悄悄的列车组小群里突然响起了新消息的提示，虽然应该不是前往新世界的集合通知，但按往常的经验，一定也是一场新旅途的开端。\n姬子口中神秘的消息是什么呢？回车厢找她问个清楚吧！
E: The usually quiet group chat for the Crew suddenly buzzes with the prompt of a new message. While it might not be a call to adventure in a new world, based on your previous experience, it must mark the start of a new journey.\nWhat could be the mysterious "news" Himeko mentioned? Head back to the Express and ask her about it!

C: 很快，这里的所有人都会变成与游侠缠斗的恶猿，这是他们踏入「源究丛林」时就注定的命运。你知道，他的忍道已经终结了，但你到最后也没戳破他对你许下的谎言。而你要带着这个谎言活下去，然后狩猎，狩猎至忍道的尽头。\n你的忍号是真实的，你的忍道是真实的，你脚下的路也是真实的。所以，往前冲吧。
E: Soon, all here will deteriorate into savage monkeys obstructing the Rangers, a fate sealed the moment they entered the AtaviSearch Forest. You know that his way of the ninja has ended, yet you chose not to debunk the false promises he offered you even till his end. Now, you will continue to live with this lie, then conduct your hunt. You will hunt until the way of the ninja's bitter end.\nYour name as a ninja is true, your way of the ninja is true, and the path beneath your feet is true. So, press forward.

C: 这份报告所记录的人，会是自己吗？停云…念起来有些陌生。啊…她说话的声音又传来了，会是某种善意的呼唤吗？
E: The person in these records... could this be you? Tingyun... That name doesn't sound familiar. Ah... You can hear her voice in the distance again. Could this be some kind of friendly call?

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 整理心情，好好休息吧
E: Calm your mood and rest up

C: 经过一路的观察，遐蝶揭穿卡吕普索的真面目，指出其人正是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。瑟希斯承认身份，委托{NICKNAME}等人助它前往那刻夏所在之处，将火种再度熔合，以便缉拿树庭覆灭的元凶——无名的黑袍剑士。
E: After careful observation, Castorice exposes Calypso's true identity as {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Cerces admits to this and asks {NICKNAME}'s group to help them reach Anaxa, so they can fuse the Coreflame again to catch the culprit behind the annihilation of the Grove — the nameless black-robed swordmaster.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n那位树庭惨案的幸存者——阿那克萨戈拉斯令人在意。
E: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect documents for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nAnaxagoras, who survived the tragedy in the Grove, remains a mystery.

C: 一位迷途者重返人间绝非易举。死亡的呢喃甘美而宁静，倘若意志不足，必将被冥府的长臂死死牵制。\n不要回头，向前看。走出冥界，回到人间。
E: It is not easy for a lost soul to return to the mortal realm. The whispers of Death are sweet and alluring. If your determination wavers, you will succumb and be forever ensnared by the netherworld's grasp.\nDo not turn around. Look forward. Leave the nether realm and return to the mortal realm.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C:
你还记得他吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
礼赞迈德漠斯，最伟大的征服者，最伟大的守护者，最强者；垂死的雄狮，目光如炬，无邦之王。
说啊，倘若刻法勒永志不忘：你已为他刻留多少伤疤，击碎多少骨节，自背后贯穿他的胸膛？
歌耳巴尼帕耳图书馆如何在火海中瓦解，最后一名悬锋人，他的毁灭是何颜色？
可悲的伶人，你不仅适合歌舞、把戏和玩笑，也精于刀口舔血的背叛。
大可用全世之重粉饰你的愚蠢，再用它装点自相残杀，惨剧的风味。
E:
Do you still remember him, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
All hail Mydeimos, the greatest conqueror, the mightiest protector, the strongest of all. The dying lion, eyes blazing, the king with no kingdom.
Tell me, if Kephale never forgets — how many scars have you already carved on him? How many vertebrae have you shattered? How many times did you drive your blade through his back?
How did the Library of Garbaniphoro fall to flame? What color was the destruction of the last Kremnoan?
You pitiful jester, fit not only for singing, dancing, and jests, but also for treachery that walks the razor's edge.
Go on, veil your folly with the weight of the world, then adorn your fratricide with it — just to savor the taste of tragedy.

C: 只要仍怀着开拓之心，你就永远是无名客。
E: As long as you carry the heart of a Trailblazer, you'll always be a Nameless.

C: 哈努努…本来还以为能在圣杯战争里见到他的……
E: Hanunue... I thought I'd be able to meet him in the Holy Grail War...

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 小三月到底会怎么样…坐在那里的，究竟是小三月，还是长夜月？
E: What will happen to March... Who's really sitting there? Is it March, or Evernight?

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…为什么自己什么都不记得？难道真的是以「记忆」为代价…？\n这不是匹诺康尼吗？难道说「太一之梦」就一直没醒来？
E: The Era Nova Ceremony was a success, and the journey in Amphoreus had reached its end... So why can't you remember anything? Was it really at the cost of "memories"...?\nIsn't this Penacony? Could it be that you never woke up from Ena's Dream?

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 踏入熟悉的支援舱段，求救声从目力不可及的深处传来。营救受困的神秘科员，也许他会带来意想不到的「猎彗人」讯息。
E: After stepping into the familiar Supply Zone, a cry for help could be heard from somewhere out of sight. Rescue the mysterious researcher who was trapped, and maybe he'll tell you something you don't know about the Comet Hunter.

C: 在查清楚艾丝妲所谓的「中饱私囊」的谣言后，你决定找艾丝妲坦白此事。\n但出乎你意料的，不仅有艾丝妲惊人的财力，还有匿名群背后的真相……
E: After understanding the rumor about Asta's alleged embezzlement, you decide to report everything to Asta.\nWhat was surprising is not only Asta's wealth, but also the truth behind the anonymous chat group...

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有左侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the left

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 真理医生似乎已经从蛛丝马迹中找到了答案，且看他到底发现了什么
E: Dr. Ratio seems to already have discovered the answer from what little evidence you have. Let's see what exactly he had discovered.

C: 埃美丽提供的线索对之后的阿德勒产生了启发，尝试着回忆一下究竟是什么
E: The clues provided by Emily inspired Adler afterward. Try to remember what it might be.

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆——史无前例的天才集会！这场面可不多见！\n阮•梅单独把你叫走，看来你无法再听到更多天才们商议的只言片语了…现在你有更要紧的事情去做。
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum: A gathering of geniuses never seen across the span of history! Scenes like this don't happen every day!\nRuan Mei calls you aside. Looks like you won't be able to hear any more snippets of exchanges and proposals between the geniuses. You have more important things to do right now anyway.

C: 在了解贝洛伯格的往事后，尤利安了却心病，你决定向他们告别——尤利安也该回去上学了！
E: Having learned about Belobog's past, Julian's worries have subsided. You decide to bid him farewell... It's time for Julian to get back to class!

C: 你已经做出了清晰的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你早就怀疑那个厨子对你撒谎了，还想栽赃别人，真是坏心眼啊。
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook, and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou've long suspected that the cook lied to you. It's wicked of him to try to frame others.

C: 你已经做出了清晰的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你早就怀疑那个厨子对你撒谎了，还想栽赃别人，真是坏心眼啊。
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook, and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou've long suspected that the cook lied to you. It's wicked of him to try to frame others.

C: 该做正事啦！虎克大人要找的宝贝就在铆钉镇矿区入口附近，希望不要出什么岔子。\n铆钉镇的居民们为了抵御怪物入侵设置了很多路障，小心谨慎地继续前进吧，争取早点儿忙完早点儿回去。
E: It's time to work! The treasure that Hook is looking for is near the mine entrance in Rivet Town.\nTo defend against the monsters, the residents here have set up many barricades. Advance ahead with caution. As soon as you get this over with, you can go back.

C: 参加竞价的买家越多，「菌菌」的价格才会越高。不知道买家各自心中的计划，多找一些买家准没错。\n万一还有人不知道宇宙无敌可爱的「菌菌」正在拍卖，那不就是亏了吗？
E: The more buyers who participate in the auction, the higher the bidding price of "Junjun." You don't know the plans of the buyers present, but the more, the merrier.\nEverybody here will know that the cute toy bear "Junjun" will be auctioned today!

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n你帮助希莉儿解决了箱子谜题，这已经是第三次了。\n和她聊聊，看看她是否愿意和你分享些什么。
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nThis is the third time that you've helped her solve puzzles.\nTalk to her and see if she'd like to share anything with you.

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》目录上的描述，冒险故事的发生地就在这附近，真的能在这里找到书页吗？\n再仔细想想，故事发生在这里，和冒险书页在这里有什么关系呢？
E: According to the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, this story happened here. Will you find any pages here?\nCome to think of it, is it possible that the pages are hidden in this place where the story took place?

C: 根据瓦尔特的说法，在雅利洛-Ⅵ的风雪减弱后，他与姬子便在此地探测到了不明信号。\n为避免这簇信号引来别有用心之人，威胁这颗尚在重生中的星球，你不妨接受瓦尔特的请求，前往指定位置进行调查。
E: According to Welt, Himeko and he had detected an unknown signal here after Jarilo-VI's blizzard had subsided.\nTo prevent this signal cluster from attracting people with ulterior motives and threatening this regenerating planet, you might as well accept Welt's request and head to the designated location to investigate.

C: 你在下层区遇到了贝洛伯格的老朋友，奥列格和希儿。\n奥列格希望你能去给他的徒弟——磐岩镇的搏击冠军，卢卡——捧个场。\n如果手头没有其它要紧的活计，偶尔去凑个热闹也不算什么坏事。
E: You meet Oleg and Seele in the Underworld, who are your old Belobogian friends.\nOleg hopes you can go and support the match being fought by his student Luka, who is Boulder Town's fight club champion.\nIf you don't have anything urgent at the moment, it wouldn't be bad to go and enjoy the show.

C: 你有寄给黛青小姐的礼物，而青雀有秘密的物流识别码。至少温符瑞心心念念的礼物终于能寄出去了。去附近找找哪里有「鹤运物流」的快递服务吧。
E: You have a gift for Ms. Daiqing, and Qingque has a secret logistics identifier code. At least Wen Furui's precious gift can finally be sent. Go find the nearest place where you can access Heron Express' express service.

C: 半夏似乎已经快到极限了，但是你很清楚，你不应该让她停下。希望她的心上人，这一次就在那里等着她。\n按照你不多的经验，很少有人能像她这样，没有彻底失去理性。
E: Banxia seems to be at her limits, but you understand clearly that she shouldn't stop now. Hopefully her sweetheart is there waiting for her.\nBased on your limited experience, not many can keep their sanity intact like Banxia at this stage.

C: 在流云渡搜索的过程中，我找到几具魔阴身的遗骸。其上的伤痕并不是云骑军的武器所留…若推想无误，人犯所逃亡的码头便在眼前了。
E: In the process of searching in Cloudford, I found several Mara-struck corpses. The wounds left on the bodies were not caused by Cloud Knight weapons... If my deduction is accurate, the wanted man would have escaped from a nearby dock.

C: 星槎迷途，差之毫厘失之千里。感谢素裳的引路与保护，你和罗刹来到了因「建木」重生而陷入灾变的工造司中，救下了受伤的少女判官雪衣。\n雪衣请求你们护送她离开此处，和你的朋友们聊聊，看看他们作何打算吧。
E: With starskiff navigation, an error of mere millidegrees can result in misnavigation by lightyears. Thanks to Sushang's guidance and protection, Luocha and you arrived at the plagued Artisanship Commission due to the rebirth of Ambrosial Arbor and saved the young judge, Xueyi.\nXueyi requested you to escort her away from the place. Talk to your friends and see what they plan to do.

C: 在解决了种种阻碍之后，三月七终于接近了自己记忆的起点。可越是靠近，她就越是不安——这「阻碍」究竟是从何而来呢？\n此时符玄的警告在她的心中不断回响，使她几乎想要停下脚步，回头折返……\n「但开拓者绝不能回头，即使是在回头的时候。」三月七对这个冷笑话颇为得意，决定之后讲给丹恒听。
E: After overcoming various obstacles, March 7th finally approaches the starting point of her memories. However, the closer she gets, the more anxious she feels — Where is this "obstacle" coming from?\nFu Xuan's warning echoes in her mind, making her almost wanting to stop and turn back the way she came...\n"But Trailblazers must never turn back, even when they turn their back." March 7th is pretty satisfied with this dry joke and decides to tell it to Dan Heng when she gets back.

C:
三月七离终点（或云起点）更近了一步，也总算是见到了那位一路上布设阻碍的幕后黑手——「信使」。
「信使」似乎将她和符玄困进了一处循环的记忆之中。那时三月七还是个漂流在宇宙中的无名女孩，直到星穹列车将她救起，使她第一次拥有了自己的「家人」。
如果这不是「信使」的诡计，那三月七还真愿意在这里多待一会儿——几乎人人都眷恋自己的家，并暗自希望自己与家人平凡的日常可以向着过去与未来无限延伸……
但很遗憾，这是不可能的。
E:
March 7th is now one step closer to the end (or the beginning) and finally sees the mastermind who has been placing obstacles along the way — It is the Messenger.
The Messenger seems to have locked March 7th and Fu Xuan into a memory that is an enclosed loop. March 7th was still a nameless girl drifting in space, until the Astral Express saved her, and she gained a "family" for the first time.
March 7th would love to stay in this memory for longer if this weren't a part of the Messenger's plot — Everyone misses their home and secretly wishes the peaceful everyday life they share with their family could last forever into the future and the past...
Unfortunately, that is simply not possible.

C: 三月七不认识这里，她很确定这并不在自己的记忆之中。她分不清这究竟是穷观阵的演算结果，还是「信使」的又一个把戏。\n但「信使」温柔地为她指引着方向，似乎当真愿意为她展现她的「起点」。\n三月七谨慎地跟着「信使」的指引前进，心中竟觉得有些释然——毕竟无论在前往等待着她的是什么，都会成为她崭新的「记忆」。
E: March 7th doesn't recognize this place. She is certain this is not her memory. She can't tell whether this is the Matrix of Prescience's calculation result or yet another trick from the Messenger.\nHowever, the Messenger is gently pointing the way for her, as if they genuinely wish to show March 7th her "beginning."\nMarch 7th cautiously moves forward following the Messenger's guidance, and actually feels rather relieved — No matter what lies ahead in wait, it will surely become a new "memory" for her.

C: 根据忧郁诗人的定位，婉约诗人此时正处在星槎海，去回收它的灵感玉兆吧。\n边塞诗人有着戍边的军旅生涯，那么婉约诗人应该不会随便出手吧？\n这种事情谁也说不清楚。
E: According to the Gloomy Poet's location, the Graceful Poet is currently in Starskiff Haven. Go and recover its Inspo Jade Abacus.\nThe Borderland Poet had a career guarding the frontier, so the Graceful Poets won't just randomly take action, right?\nI don't think anyone can really understand this kind of thing.

C: 一封没有落款的信静静躺在列车的观景车厢里，无人知晓其到来，一如无人知晓何人会收下它。
E: A letter without a sender silently lies in the Express' Parlor Car. No one knows of its arrival, just like how no one knows who will receive it.

C: 你常看到类似的新闻，为了找回走失者，寻找的人也迷了路。很遗憾，今天你注定要成为这样一个故事的主角。渐渐的，你连藿藿都不知去向。在一面奇怪的铜镜前打量了片刻功夫，你居然被拉进了一处幻境中。此处三步一墙，五步一门，直教人原地打转，不知何去何从。\n按你看过的某些仙舟话本故事所说，等你离开此处，世间已过去百余年之久——你可不想在一个迷宫里度过余生，快些找到出口吧！
E: You often see similar news stories about a person getting lost while trying to find another missing person. Unfortunately, today's the day you are destined to be the protagonist of such a story. Gradually, you manage to lose track of even Huohuo. After sizing up a strange bronze mirror for a moment, you are somehow pulled into a realm of illusion. There's walls and doors everywhere, sending you round in circles and disorienting you.\nAccording to some of the Xianzhou folk tales you've heard, the outside world will have passed hundreds of years by the time you leave here — you don't want to spend the rest of your life lost in a maze, so find the exit pronto!

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 纷乱的渡口，被押解运送的犯人逃脱，少年剑士霜锋出鞘，却被人捷足先登。
E: The escorted prisoner attempts to escape amidst the chaos at the harbor. The young swordsman's frosty blade unsheathes, but someone else was a step ahead of him.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 与此同时，神策府中，三位将军齐聚一堂，商谈联盟未来之大略……
E: At this moment, the three generals are gathered in the Seat of Divine Foresight to discuss the future strategy of the Alliance...

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 通过心绪空间，你了解到了查德威克博士神秘且震撼的前半生。\n离开这里，看看他的后半生又经历了哪些是非曲折。
E: In Chadwick's Emoscape, you have learned about the mysterious yet astounding first half of his life.\nLeave this place and discover the twists and turns throughout the second half of his life.

C: 忙碌如大堂经理也需要一些时间调整状态，缓和心情。\n等你准备好了就继续工作吧，客人不知道什么时候就会找上门来。
E: Even a busy lobby manager needs occasional breaks to relax and unwind.\nReturn to your work when you feel ready, as guests may arrive at any moment.

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n看来纷争的舞步没法在海洋的宴会上展示风采，偏见与恐惧像汹涌的大浪，刀枪盾斧是无法抵挡的。你和帕里斯能帮上忙的，也只是让这浪别这么早把她的小船掀翻，仅此而已。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nIt seems that the dance of Strife cannot fully express its grace at a banquet of the ocean. When prejudice and fear rage like giant waves, no blade or shield can hold them back. The only assistance that you and Paris can offer is to prevent her little boat from being overturned so soon.

C: 在雅努萨波利斯的废墟中，散落的泰坦梦呓将过往铭记。
E: In the ruins of Janusopolis, the scattered Titans relive the past in their sleep.

C: 维修工程师初步估计是小机器人零件脱落的问题，帮他收集零件，回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer's initial estimate is that a loose part that fell off the meal-delivery robot. Collect the part for him and return to verify whether his guess is correct.

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 你收到了帕姆的短信，声称列车里出现了奇怪的东西，希望你帮忙抓捕。\n很奇怪，你又能做到什么呢？这又不是《捉*敢死队》，但列车长的请求，你只能听从。
E: Pom-Pom messages you, claiming that something strange has appeared on the Express. They hope you can help them catch it.\nWhat can you possibly do? It's not like you're a member of the Weird-Busters. You've got no choice but to heed the conductor's request, though.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 列车长拜托你向维修工程师或艾丝妲，借用空间站的杂务机器人。
E: The conductor asked you to borrow the space station's manual labor robot from the maintenance engineer or Asta.

C: 帕姆对仙舟上的饮料十分感兴趣，你决定回到罗浮，替帕姆买一份地道的罗浮饮料。
E: Pom-Pom is very interested in beverages on the Xianzhou. You decide to return to the Luofu and get an authentic Luofu beverage for Pom-Pom.

C: 你清除了残响回廊里残余的所有威胁。\n去和奥列格汇报战果吧。
E: You cleared out all threats remaining in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.\nReport the situation to Oleg.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 青年深知，再无任何事阻止他奔向所爱。
E: The youth knows that there's nothing that will stop him from rushing towards his love.

C: 不知不觉中，你和瓦尔特还是被卷进了驭空的家事。晴霓想更了解母亲的过去，所以想找个知情者问问。思来想去，似乎景元将军就是最合适的人选了。
E: Unwittingly, you and Welt still got tied up in Yukong's family affairs. Qingni wants to know more about her mother's past, so she wanted to ask someone who knew. After giving it some thought, it seems that General Jing Yuan is the most suitable candidate.

C: 你找到了遇难的飞行士。此时她正被困在一群孽物之间，情况万分危急。快去救人吧。
E: You find the crashed pilot. She is trapped among a group of abominations, and her situation is extremely dire. Quickly, save her!

C: 温世玲将本次实验需要的材料整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给她吧！
E: Wen Shiling compiled a list of required materials for her current experiment. Collect them and hand them over to her!

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你完成了初代司鼎的试炼，集齐了炼丹所需要的药材。现在，该将这些药材炼制成丹药，助你脱胎换骨了！
E: You completed the trial form the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission in Mr. Xiyan's story and collected all the ingredients needed to create the pills. Now is the time to craft these into the miracle pill and facilitate your transformation!

C: 按道理来说，罗浮夜市不应该如此冷清。眼下似乎只有小吃摊旁边还算有些烟火气。\n白露想让你买些小吃，你可以趁这个机会打听一下什么好吃，不过，也可以直接找高阿姨买小吃。
E: Theoretically, Luofu's night market shouldn't be so deserted. Only the food stalls have some semblance of life around them.\nBailu wants you to buy some snacks. You can take this opportunity to ask around and see what's tasty, or you can directly get some snacks from Tall Auntie.

C: 素裳为码头伸张正义，结果反倒是自己和公司代表订下赌约。不知道善良的姑娘现在已经冷静了没有？\n仔细问问码头上发生了什么事吧，吃瓜就要吃到底。
E: Sushang is trying to uphold justice for the people working at the docks, but instead found herself locked into a wager against the IPC representative. Has this kind girl calmed down yet?\nAsk around about what happened on the docks. If you're going to engage in gossip, might as well see it through to the end.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 霄老大看不惯金人巷一成不变的状态，被迫相信公司会更好，但是他现在有了新的选择——「金人巷复兴计划」。\n霄老大同意与码头建立商业合作，商会也应该拿出诚意将同功坊纳入规划之中。
E: Mr. Xiao is fed up with Aurum Alley's stagnancy and forced himself to believe that the IPC would provide a better future. However, now he has a new choice in the form of the "Aurum Alley Revival Project."\nMr. Xiao has agreed to establish business relations with the docks, and the merchant guild should also offer something back by including Artistry Hardware into their plans.

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，他们甚至安排了白露担任「推广大使」。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." They even arranged for Bailu to serve as the "Promotional Ambassador."\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 你们已经完成了全部试炼，是时候回去挑战希露瓦和佩拉了。
E: You've already completed all trials. It's time to go back and challenge Serval and Pela.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n呜呜伯们似乎对守护宝藏兴致不高。这哪里是「巨龙」，明明就是「青雀」。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe Wubbaboos don't seem to be terribly enthused about guarding the treasure. And what kind of "dragon" is this? That's clearly just Qingque.

C: 观众们的热情已达巅峰。天空为鼓，大地也随之震颤。是时候迎接你的冠军之战了。
E: The fervor of the audience has reached a fever pitch. The sky thunders akin to a drum, and so too does the land tremble in accordance. It is time for you to come forth and battle to become champion.

C: 要让彦卿从这迷障中摆脱出来，没有比请将军来更好的方法了。素裳自告奋勇，会拖住彦卿，直至你们请来将军。要挺住啊，素裳！
E: The best way to awake Yanqing from his hallucination is to involve the general. Sushang volunteers to hold off Yanqing until the general arrives. Hang in there, Sushang!

C: 你们追入屋内，才察觉自己坠入岁阳的迷障中。一如绥园当时的迷离变化，此处成了毫无空间感可言的「鬼打墙」迷宫。你们只能硬着头皮一路追逐。\n一番毫无收获的奔逐后，你们终于想到一个守株待兔的好办法。
E: You only realize that you have fallen into the heliobus' illusions when you chased it into the residence. Now, just like how Fyxestroll Garden became a shifting haze, this place has also been transformed in a never-ending labyrinth with no sense of ordinary three-dimensional space. You have no choice but to press forward.\nAfter some fruitless exertion, you finally come up with the good idea of waiting for your enemy to run into you.

C: 被岁阳迷惑的藿藿，只好在幻障中寻找尾巴的踪迹。她还不知道自己将要遭遇什么——岁阳会找到宿主最为忌惮、最为脆弱的情绪，并将它放大。
E: Huohuo, beguiled by the heliobus, can only searches for traces of Tail in the illusion. She is yet unaware of what she will encounter — heliobi will find the host's most painful and vulnerable emotions, and amplify them to unbearable heights.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 你没有猜错，这次的发帖人是三月七，她发现了照片总是拍到不该有的东西。也许列车上真的有问题，应该好好查一下。\n看看列车组有没有被岁阳附身。
E: You guessed it right. The poster this time is March 7th. She noticed that her photos were always capturing things that shouldn't be there. Maybe there's actually something wrong with the Express, and it should be investigated.\nCheck if any of the Express Crew members are possessed by heliobi.

C: 果然…这种「变异」能通过某种「配方」来达成，你的培育结果证实了这一点，赶紧向保姆机器人汇报一下吧，这对空间站的造物专题研究一定很有帮助。
E: So... this kind of "mutation" can actually be generated by a recipe? Your nurturing results have confirmed it. Go report back to the Helper Robot immediately. This will definitely come in useful with the space station's special research into creations.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n本层要帮助员工们逃离，打败敌人吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou need to help staff members to escape on this floor. Defeat the enemies!

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了鸢尾花家系的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《美梦仙踪》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from the Iris Family and planned a commercial named Dreamjoy Ascension. Go help them!

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 布凯辛与梅透娜正在为测试数据而头疼，在她们的再三请求下你决定帮忙。\n科研什么的你不懂，但这种活动筋骨的事你最会了。
E: Grumpy and Metauna are having quite a headache with testing their data, and you decide to help after their repeated entreaties.\nYou don't know much about scientific research, but you're a pro at physical exercise.

C: 按照椒丘的「卑鄙」计划，你们只需要去和斯科特决斗，斯科特必然会因为泻药的淫威倒下。\n椒丘，你好卑鄙。木已成舟，你们该去金人巷了。
E: According to Jiaoqiu's "despicable" plan, all you need to do is show up to the duel with Skott. With the laxatives, you're sure to serve him a gushing defeat.\nOh boy, Jiaoqiu sure is despicable. Well, the die is cast. Time to go to Aurum Alley.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C:
接下来的竞锋守擂，是属于波提欧的决赛。
卢卡想去看看这位曾给他带来心理阴影的选手，陪他一起去吧。
题外话——也许你还对波提欧在赛场上的行为有些不爽？
别担心，那场比赛结束后，银枝专门跑到波提欧的住处对他进行了长达三个时辰的思想教育。后者最后不得不动用了「江湖智慧」，才成功脱身。
他已经在好好反省了。
E:
The next Ringmaster's Challenge match is Boothill's finale.
Luka wants to watch the fight of this contestant who once gave him great trauma. Go with him to watch it.
By the way — Are you perhaps still upset at what Boothill did in the arena?
Don't worry. Argenti specifically went to Boothill's lodgings after that match and gave him a 6-hour lecture, and Boothill had to use his "street smarts" to get away.
The cowboy is already reflecting on his actions.

C: 在尾巴大爷的帮助下，卢卡终于重振旗鼓了！\n现在藿藿和尾巴要离开了，送送他们吧。
E: Luka finally put himself together with Mr. Tail's help!\nNow Huohuo and Tail need to leave. See them out.

C: 卢卡婉言谢绝了公司的合作请求。分别时，托帕出于善意，向你们做出了预警——那位名叫「铄金」的选手，会使用不少「盘外招」。
E: Luka politely declined the IPC's collaboration request. Out of the kindness of her heart, Topaz warned you as you said your goodbyes to each other — The contestant named Shuojin is bound to use plenty of "dirty tricks."

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n艾尔菲的缺场对演出造成了严重影响，和你的乐队成员们讨论下当前的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nArfey's absence has a serious impact on the performance. Discuss the current situation with your band members.

C: 三月七凭直觉感受到了佩剑的方位，跟上去看看吧。
E: Through intuition, March 7th detected her sword's location. Follow her and check it out.

C: 终于要与泡泡在决赛中相遇了…\n或许只有全力以赴赢得「胜利」，才是你和泡泡间羁绊的最好证明。
E: At last, you finally face Bubbles in the finals...\nPerhaps giving it your all and claiming "victory" is the best way to prove the bond between you and Bubbles.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 如果圣杯仍保有实现愿望的功能，如果再进行一场圣杯战争，你会向它许什么愿呢？
E: If the Holy Grail still possesses the ability to grant wishes, what will you wish for if there is another Holy Grail War?

C: 迷其林美食评审会的举办时间推迟了，现在就安心经营餐馆，优先完成营业目标吧。
E: The Memchelin Food Review has been postponed. For now, let's focus on running the restaurant and prioritize meeting business goals.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

E: Wait for the jump

E: Investigate the strange snow drift

E: "Among the distant cliffs, I see Helektra."

E: Follow Flora's visions and witness her experiences

E: Head back to Dawncloud to update Lygus

C: 驱散聚集在一起的广告牌
E: Disperse the gathered Billboards

C: 与缇娜进行战后复盘
E: Review the battle with Tinah afterwards

C: 查看战术板，为后续比赛做准备
E: Review the Tactics Board and prepare for future matches

C: 去门外看看
E: Go out of the door to have a look

C: 在校园里寻找作曲用的灵感
E: Collect inspiration for composing a song by wandering around the campus

C: 继续深入
E: Continue delving deeper

C: 继续经营餐馆，完成当前营业目标
E: Keep running the restaurant and complete your current business goals

C: 开始今日的营业
E: Open for business for the day

C: 继续经营餐馆，完成当前营业目标
E: Keep running the restaurant and complete your current business goals

C: 灵敏训练
E: Dexterity Training

C: 严格的彦卿师父
E: Strict Master Yanqing

C: 训练额外提高#1点力量与坚韧，进行<color=#f29e38ff>游历后失效</color>
E: Training additionally increases Strength and Tenacity by #1. This effect is <color=#f29e38ff>lost after performing an Excursion</color>

C: 仅安排训练：本日所有属性的增长率提高#1%
E: Only plan for training: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

C: 爆辣串烧松茸
E: Spicy Blast Matsutake Skewer

C: 手打鸡血茶
E: Hand-Whipped Chicken Blood Tea

C: 独辟蹊径
E: Singular Ingenuity

C: 距离第一次试剑
E: Time to First Sword Trial

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 进阶剑法
E: Advanced Swordplay

C: 三月七堂堂正正用学来的功夫迎接剑斗。
E: March 7th is squaring up to a sword fight using the martial arts she learned.

C: 灵砂知晓「赤龙血」下落，三月七却有些退缩。
E: Lingsha has knowledge of where the "Crimson Dragon Blood" might be found, but March 7th has some reservations.

C: 你是怎么被冻起来的？
E: How did you get frozen?

C: 小心别受伤了。
E: Don't hurt yourself.

C: 气死我咧，自顾自地劫持通信，又自顾自地挂了，真没教养！{NICKNAME}，听说你以前和她很熟？这人一直是这个德性吗？
E: I'm so mad! She just hijacks our communications and then hangs up? So rude! {NICKNAME}, you used to know her, right? Was she always like this?

C: 在我记忆里，仙舟还是很壮丽的。祝你们顺利。
E: I remember the Xianzhou was a sight to behold. Good luck.

C: 嗯，这次我就不去了。
E: Yes, I'm staying this time.

C: 目标仙舟——出发喽！
E: Destination Xianzhou, here we come!

C: 请耐心等待接驳…请耐心等待接驳…请耐心等待接驳……
E: Please await transfer... Please await transfer... Please await transfer...

C: 看来小三月已经喜欢上无名客的生活方式了，真好。
E: Looks like March has fallen in love with the way of the Nameless. That's good to hear.

C: 趁着你们不在的时候，我和瓦尔特先生做了些观测，总结出了些结果。如果你需要解惑的话，不妨跟我们聊聊。
E: While you were away, Welt and I did some research and came to some interesting conclusions. Let me know if you want to ask about anything.

C: 这座空间站正是她的财产。
E: This space station is her property.

C: 综上所述，该监控室已遭到外部星系入侵。如果坚持使用该监控室权限访问内网，将会出现巨大风险。
E: In summary, this monitoring room has been hacked by invaders from an external star system. There will be a significant risk if you insist on using the extra permissions granted by the monitoring room to access the intranet.

C: 哇，开团挂机，也太过分了吧！
E: Whoa, going offline during a game. That's unforgivable!

C: …你是…谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 我不要…
E: No... I don't want it...

C: 啊我找到了！
E: Ah! Here it is!

C: 走吧，艾丝妲可担心你们了。
E: Come on, Asta has been worried about all of you.

C: 据说空间站里还藏着黑塔女士的私人密室，里面封印着最珍贵，最稀有和最危险的藏品…就她的性格来说，这很有可能……
E: It is said that the space station also contains Madam Herta's private chamber where her most precious, rare, and dangerous collections are sealed... And for someone like her, it's not out of the realm of possibility.

C: 我喜欢狗。
E: I love dogs.

C: 人总是要死的，但不是现在。
E: Life is but a path to death, but not today.

C: 英雄？你想多了，我不为了别人，我是为了自己。
E: Hero? Don't overthink it. I'm not doing this for others, I'm doing it for myself.

C: 而我，「黑塔•银河法政科」的优秀科员卢卡奇，有必要向所有人强调，在这生死存亡的危机时刻，它们的生命权益也应该得到尊重！
E: And I, Lukacs, outstanding researcher of the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics, must emphasize in this time of crisis that their lives and rights should also be respected!

C: 没错！在下是「黑塔•银河法政科」的优秀科员卢卡奇，在这生死存亡的危机时刻，仍旧为了所有非人生物的生命权益而奔走！疾呼！
E: Exactly! And I, Lukacs, outstanding researcher of the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics, shall continue fighting and speaking up for the rights of all non-human life in these terrible times!

C: 你醒了。我让小三月他们留在列车附近照看一下。
E: You're awake. I had March and Dan Heng stay by the Express to keep an eye on things.

C: 和你现在看见的这具身体差不多，我按小时候的样子造的，也许不是很还原，但总有七八分相像吧。
E: Not much different from what you're seeing now. I modeled it after how I looked, back when I was a kid. It might not be identical, but I'd say maybe <unbreak>70</unbreak>, <unbreak>80</unbreak> percent there?

C: 你想回来帮忙，我当然不会拒绝。丹恒帮我们重新清点了奇物，三月七说她会在力所能及的范围内帮忙，于是在电力室接了五十多根电线…哎，列车的人都这么好心……
E: If you wanted to come back and help, of course, I wouldn't refuse you. Dan Heng helped inventory our rare items, March 7th said that she would help out as much as she can and connected over <unbreak>50</unbreak> wires in the electrical room. Everyone from the Express is so obliging...

C: …不过，回忆起在收容舱段的时候，我还在想这孩子晕过去一定是身体很虚弱啦，所以得好好照顾你，没想到你捡了根棒球棍就生龙活虎起来了。
E: Y'know, when you were passed out, all I thought was I had to look after you. And then you picked up the bat! Just incredible!

C: 你也不想因为自己身体里埋了颗星核，祸害空间站那么多人吧？
E: You wouldn't want the Stellaron in you to hurt all the people in the space station either, right?

C: 星穹列车离去后，空间站如火如荼地启动重建工作，而你与黑塔则开始了对星核的研究。但很快，黑塔就对你和星核都失去了兴趣。在艾丝妲的安排下，你成为空间站的一名科员。
E: After the departure of the Express, the station begins to eagerly rebuild. Meanwhile, Herta and you get busy while researching the Stellaron. However, it doesn't take long before Herta loses interest in you and the Stellaron, and Asta arranges for you to become a researcher at the space station.

C: 瓦尔特很喜欢收集这些黑不溜秋的圆盘，似乎是古董货。你要能带几张回来，他应该会很高兴的。
E: Welt likes collecting these jet-black discs. It seems like they could be antiques. He'd be very happy if you could bring a few back.

C: 没想到你还是个学者
E: I didn't take you to be a scholar.

C: 总感觉在很短的时间里，发生了很多的事。
E: (So much has happened in such a short time...)

C: 星神大多遥不可及，派系却和我们密切相关；阿基维利开拓银河之后，人们开始意识到不同世界的存在，于是越来越多的人们试图利用星神之力进行星际旅行。
E: Many Aeons are unreachable, but the factions are close to us. After Akivili trailblazed across the galaxy, people became aware of the existence of other worlds. Gradually, more people started trying to use the power of the Aeons to travel between worlds.

C: 它们是「毁灭」的星神纳努克所统领的军团。
E: They are an army ruled by the Aeon of Destruction, Nanook.

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
E: How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?

C: 你可以把我们当作进行星际旅行的热心肠人士，专门向被星核困扰的世界伸出援手！
E: You can see us as... kindhearted interstellar public servants, lending a helping hand to any world affected by a Stellaron!

C: 要说值得一瞧的地方，应是黄金歌剧院和历史博物馆。不过博物馆是需要凭证件进入的……
E: Well, I'd say that Golden Theater and the History Museum are both worth a look. However, you'd need a pass to get into the museum.

C: …照你这么说，这群「筑城者」还挺天真的嘛。
E: ...If so, I'm not sure "mighty" is the right word for these Architects.

C: 你以前到底经历了什么啊？
E: Huh, you must've had some miserable jobs.

C: 我们在城外见到了奇怪的生物…它们来自被侵蚀的空间「裂界」，对吗？
E: We saw strange creatures outside the city... They must have come from a tear in corroded space. A Fragmentum, correct?

C: 发生什么了？怎么这么大阵仗……
E: What happened? Seems serious...

C: 你们在外面看见的，是贝洛伯格最常见的地髓供暖器，别看外观不起眼，它可是人们的生命保障。
E: The heater you saw is just a standard Geomarrow radiator. They may not look like much, but they're a real lifeline to the people.

C: 不过，因为多年前的一条命令，上下层区已经很多年没有人员往来了……
E: However, due to an order that was given many years ago, nobody has moved between the Overworld and the Underworld in a long time.

C: 居然是在离城市中心这么近的地方……
E: I can't believe how close it is to the city center...

C: 唉，负责是必须要负责的！上面肯定有他们的用意！我就是想起地下那些乡亲了，他们现在……
E: Duty is duty — we trust in the higher-ups! But I worry about our compatriots below ground. They must be—

C: …请个别大人不要若无其事地模仿小孩子！
E: ...And perhaps the grownups among us could refrain from acting like children?

C: 不，记得此前城里的戒备还没这么森严…如果这不是常态，也许与我们有关。
E: No, I don't remember the security being this tight last time... It might have something to do with us.

C: 入、入侵者！得、得去通知警卫官——
E: Intruders! I must inform the security captain...

C: 有空的话就来。
E: I will... if I have the time.

C: 谜题的谜面是什么？
E: So what does the puzzle say?

C: …你说得对。假如失去了公务身份的保护，我说不定会遭到更可怕的报复。
E: ...You are right. If I were to lose my privilege as a public worker, I might face even more horrific retaliation.

C: 重振文明的决心是真的。
E: The part about preserving the seed of civilization was real.

C: 画面的最后一帧定格在了星核随可可利亚消散前的一秒。那短暂的一瞬，似乎有某个陌生的声音贴近了你的耳边…然后低语……
E: In the midst of this frantic tapestry of events, you see the moment Cocolia perished with the Stellaron. A strange voice speaks to you in a hushed tone...

C: 该回家了！
E: It's time we went home!

C: 还想再看这个世界几眼…
E: I want to have one last look at this world...

C: 有时间的话…请一定要再来看克拉拉和史瓦罗先生呀。
E: If you have time... please come back and visit me and Mr. Svarog.

C: 我的孙子…这是我的小孙子？呜……
E: My grandson... Is this my grandson? *sob*

C: 她会成为一位杰出的领袖。
E: She will be an outstanding leader.

C: 这剪报我好像捡到过…
E: I think I've seen the clippings before...

C: 当初设计者一定花费了巨大的心力，才让供暖设备遍布在这座永屹之城。
E: Extending this heating network across the Towering Citadel must have been a huge effort for the designer.

C: 人来人往的大街上，空荡荡的长椅显得极为落寞。
E: The empty benches look lonely on the busy street.

C: …这个世界的水还真贵啊。
E: ... Water in this world is so expensive.

C: 两个垃圾桶，一边用来回收干垃圾，一边用来回收湿垃圾。
E: Two trashcans. One for recycling dry garbage, one for recycling wet garbage.

C: 你好，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: Nice to meet you, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 得好好向他道谢。
E: We should thank him.

C: 呼…有点本事。史瓦罗手下还有多少这样的大家伙啊？
E: Whew... not bad. How many of these big guys is Svarog hiding?

C: 我第一次看见的时候也理解不了，现在早就见怪不怪了。赶紧去找首领吧。
E: I guess I'm just used to seeing them together now, even if I don't understand it. *sigh* Let's look for the chief.

C: 来都来了，你还想走？{NICKNAME}，陪我一起玩捉迷藏！
E: {NICKNAME}, you just got here and now you're gonna leave? Play hide-and-seek with me!

C: 那只有一个答案了：「史瓦罗大佬」……
E: Then there's only one possibility... Boss Svarog.

C: 哪里都能望见的那根巨大柱子被称为「炉心」，也许那里是什么能源中心吧？
E: There's that huge pillar called the Furnace Core that's always in view — maybe it's some kind of energy hub?

C: 下层区的生活？
E: How about Underworld life?

C: 几百年前，歌德家一位前辈白手起家，一心相信自己能做大做强。后来他也的确做到了。
E: A few hundred years ago, one ancestor of the Goethe family was ambitious, and sought to build something big from nothin'. Eventually, he actually did it.

C: 我觉得她能应付得来。
E: I think she can handle it.

C: 这里好安静啊，我都有点不习惯了…周围越安静，脑海里的杂念就越吵闹。
E: It's so quiet here I'm not used to it... *sigh* The quieter things are around you, the louder they are in your head.

C: …真好啊。
E: ...Very nice.

C: 这次没有。
E: Not this time.

C: 没什么，只是流程上会可能有一点麻烦，不是什么大事。
E: It's nothing. It's just that there may be a little trouble in the process of securing the funds. No biggie.

C: 如果不去铆钉镇一趟的话，我妹妹就要遭罪了…唉。
E: If I don't make a trip to Rivet Town, my sister will suffer... ugh.

C: 对他来说，这件事一定很难消化。好不容易找到这份活计，自己却失去了战斗的理由。
E: It must have been really hard for him to accept this reality. He went through all that trouble to secure a job that could finally provide for his family, only to find himself no longer having a family to provide for.

C: …所以，他才会用寄送包裹的方式，把对妻儿的想念和关怀转移到诊所的孩子们身上。
E: ...So, what probably happened was that he redirected all his care and love to the children in this clinic, showering us with batches after batches of supplies.

C: 下层区跟我们打过交道的人可真不少呢…{NICKNAME}，你觉得该先去找谁呢？
E: We've gotten to know a lot of Underworlders... {NICKNAME}, who do you think we should start with?

C: 那我真是受宠若惊，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm flattered, {NICKNAME}.

C: 她应该早就毕业了吧？希望她能找到份体面工作，行政事务或者法律顾问之类的……
E: She must have graduated by now. I hope she found a good job — government administration or legal consulting, perhaps...

C: 稍等一下。
E: One second.

C: 难道说…
E: You mean...

C: 不好意思，没看过。
E: Sorry, I haven't read it.

C: 「铁卫禁区深处通往雪原的战壕工事」。
E: "...the trenches deep in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, on the way to the Snow Plains..."

C: …你问我，我也不清楚，你自己去找找就知道了。
E: ...Don't even try to ask me more. I wouldn't know. You probably should go there to take a look for yourself, and you'll find out soon enough.

C: 木制的板条箱中装着矿石，这是一种名为「地髓」的优质能源。
E: The wooden crate carries a kind of ore called Geomarrow, an excellent energy source.

C: 根据最新消息，他们上一次出现的地点是仙舟「罗浮」。公司驻联盟特派员已向罗浮将军景元求证，截至目前尚未得到正式回复。
E: Our latest reports suggest that the criminal group has recently been spotted on the Xianzhou Luofu. The IPC's Special Commissioner to the Alliance has contacted General Jing Yuan of the Luofu to verify this information. We have yet to receive a response.

C: 知更鸟小姐身为备受银河瞩目的巨星，曾斩获多项顶级殊荣，其天籁歌喉传扬诸界。
E: Robin is a superstar whose voice is known throughout the cosmos. She has been the recipient of many top awards.

C: 驭空，别这么凶嘛，要是传出去，岂不让银河耻笑仙舟联盟不得待客之道？
E: Don't be too harsh, Yukong. If this gets out, the whole galaxy will think the Alliance has forgotten how to treat our guests.

C: 幸甚至哉！
E: Frightfully delightful!

C: 各位当然有的选。无情人遭拒，抽身离去便是。但你们依然心念帮助仙舟。
E: Of course you do. You can be strangers and simply walk away. But I feel you wish to help the Xianzhou.

C: 你带的这是什么路？！太卜司所在是这里么？！
E: Why did you bring us here!? Does this look like the Divination Commission to you!?

C: 何况这压根就不是医经上所载的疾病，这是…魔阴身发作的前兆。
E: Besides, we have no record of this disease at all. These symptoms are consistent with someone about to be stricken with mara.

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 也许是遇上了什么麻烦？
E: Maybe there's been a problem?

C: 我刚听到的响动是…
E: What I heard just now...

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 几乎一无所知。我本要依照行程登船离开罗浮，突然听说爆发了骚乱。
E: Almost nothing. I was scheduled to leave the Luofu when I heard there was a disturbance.

C: 行商没有所属，四处漂泊，星海为家。但如果你好奇…我在联盟的注册地是仙舟「玉阙」；在公司的登记号隶属于北谷星：星和商城分部。
E: Merchants do not belong anywhere. We wander and make the stars our home. But if you're curious... I am registered at the Xianzhou Yuque within the Alliance. With the IPC, I'm registered at the Star Unity Mall branch at the North Valley Star.

C: 你和这个罗刹之前认识吗？
E: Had you met this Luocha before?

C: 再等等。
E: Let me have a think first...

C: 这位客官，我看您眼生，是打算到茶馆里吃茶的吗？
E: Ah, new patrons I see! Looking for some refreshment at the teahouse?

C: 买！买了！
E: I'll take it!

C: 卡芙卡！
E: Kafka!

C: 这里不好，太卜要走很长的路，对我也没什么好处。去前面再会吧。
E: What a hassle, this place is too far for the diviner. See you up ahead.

C: 这是……？
E: What's this...?

C: 是算得「吉时已到」了吧？
E: She must have divined it was the right time.

C: 兵贵神速。罗浮仙舟眼下最紧要的就是遏制星核灾变。
E: Time is of the essence. The most important task for the Xianzhou Luofu is suppressing the Stellaron.

C: 为何不让狐人与持明去试试？
E: Why not get the foxians and Vidyadhara to try?

C: 太卜大人，我也得跟着吗……
E: Master diviner, do I have to come...

C: 还不行动吗？再迟恐怕情势有变。
E: Why are we still here? Things will change if we tarry too long.

C: 丹鼎司。
E: The Alchemy Commission.

C: 长老的意思我已了解，但我意已决，不容更迭。
E: I understand your misgivings, but my decision is made. That is the course we must take.

C: 虽有长存不灭之身，亦不能逃脱轮回之苦。
E: Though the body be immortal, the pain of reincarnation is inescapable.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 来吧，仙舟的将军。看看岚那微不足道的力量与最不爱争斗的我，孰高孰低？
E: Come, general of Xianzhou. Witness how Lan's power pales in the face of that which they most fear to confront... Witness your weakness.

C: 我明白。
E: Understood.

C: 你可真是个小天才。
E: Pretty smart.

C: 仪式所需的星槎还在准备中，各位完成了手头的事情，就请回到我这边。
E: We're still preparing the starskiff for the ceremony. Please, everyone, come back to me when your work is complete.

C: 我长大了，也想成为丹枢大人那样了不得的丹士，为天缺者们炼药救治！
E: When I grow up, I want to be a great alchemist like Dan Shu — making medicine and helping the incomplete ones!

C: 该不会真的要送咱们房子吧？
E: I'd like some free real estate, please!

C: 最后是第三点，与其说是要求…帕姆想向各位提出一个不情之请。
E: Rome? Anyway... Third and final: Rather than being a request... Pom-Pom has a favor to ask of everyone.

C: 我们还能再见吗？
E: Will we meet again?

C: 为什么不告诉孩子们？
E: Why didn't you tell the others?

C: 您的消息真灵通！那是家族提供的一个机会，也是盛会之星的传统。
E: You are well-informed indeed! It is an opportunity provided by The Family, and a tradition on the Planet of Festivities.

C: 谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: （好热闹啊，这么多人都生活在梦境中……）
E: (This place is bustling. There are so many people living in the dreamscape...)

C: ——给我认真做大扫除帕！
E: ...Give this place a thorough cleaning!

C: （是的——除非您对声音的还原度没有要求。）
E: (Yes, unless you're willing to accept a very unpleasant listening experience.)

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
E: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: …我承认。
E: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

C: 如何？您打算买下它吗？
E: Well, are you going to buy it?

C: 乐意效劳。
E: I'm happy to help.

C: 这台电视机…为什么会被丢在路边？
E: Why was this TV... dumped on the side of the road?

C: 滴答，滴答！快跟上，快跟上，灰色的朋友！
E: Tick-tock, tick-tock! Hurry up and follow me, gray friend!

C: （米沙这个名字好令人在意…总之先看看发生了什么吧。）
E: (The name of Misha rings a bell to me... Anyway, better check out what's going on.)

C: 来吧，灰色的朋友！我有种预感，你一定能够学会<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，毕竟你特殊到能够看见我！
E: My gray friend, I require your assistance! I have a feeling you'll be able to master the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>! After all, you're the special one who can see me!

C: 我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
E: I saw a dial and got it moving.

C: …「失熵症」。你听说过这个词吗？
E: Entropy Loss Syndrome. Have you heard of this term?

C: 通常，游客是不被允许到这来的，所以我们得小心一点，别被其他人发现了。
E: Guests aren't allowed here, so we have to be careful not to get caught.

C: 丹恒会一本正经地讲冷笑话…
E: Dan Heng would tell us dry jokes with a deadpan expression...

C: （…歌声？是从哪里传来的？）
E: (...Someone's singing? Where is the sound coming from?)

C: 感谢你，美丽又陌生的人。我是垃圾桶王子，我的父亲被塔塔洛夫暗害，我也被邪术变成了垃圾桶。是你救了我，将我从囚禁中解放出来。
E: Thank you, beautiful stranger. I am the Trashcan Prince, and my father was assassinated by Tatalov, and I was cursed into becoming a trashcan. You saved me from internment.

C: 你赢得了我，还有其他桶的信任。希望此物可以表达我们对你的承认。
E: You've won me over, along with many others. This item carries our high regard for you.

C: 所以，袭击你的人是一位身穿红衣，擅长幻术，能变化成他人样貌的女性……
E: So, the one who attacked you was a girl dressed in red, adept at illusory arts, and was able to shapeshift...

C: 尽管还不知道这遗产是什么，但这场争夺战波及无辜群众…是早晚的事。
E: While we still don't know what this legacy entails, it's only a matter of time before the power struggle ensnares innocent bystanders.

C: 忆者递出一枚忆泡，示意你们用额头抵住它。你照做了，一道刺骨的寒意直入躯壳，随后聚成清晰的影像。
E: The Memokeeper hands over a Memory Bubble, signaling for you to press it against your forehead. You do as instructed, and a bone-chilling coldness pierces your body, which then consolidates into a clear image.

C: 还是回去找砂金吧…
E: Let's go back and find Aventurine...

C: 看，一根孤零零的链条——和它打个招呼吧。
E: Look, a solitary chain. Go say hello to it.

C: 奇怪，这里似乎还有别人的气息……
E: Strange, there appears to be someone else's presence here...

C: 来，这边——一小段路，别走丢了。
E: Come, this way — it's a short walk. Don't get lost.

C: 黑天鹅轻抚你的耳根，留下一阵冰凉的触感。随后，她将一张卡片交给了你。
E: Black Swan gently touches the root of your ear, leaving a cool sensation. Then, she hands a card over to you.

C: 现实中风平浪静，梦境里却暗流涌动，真是应了那位忆者的话啊……
E: Reality cruises on in serenity, while undercurrents bubble up from the Dreamscape... just like that Memokeeper said...

C: 这人不简单，他在和{NICKNAME}交涉的过程中故意放低姿态，话里话外却一直在围追堵截……
E: He's complex. He deliberately slow-played his hand during negotiations while running circles round us all the while.

C: 果不其然，这就是正确答案。
E: Just as I thought, here's the correct answer.

C: 如果我拒绝回答呢？
E: And if I refuse to answer?

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 看来我们能得出答案了。
E: Looks like we can get an answer.

C: 你误会了，砂金先生。刑罚是为亵慢之人准备的，但我看到了你坚韧不拔的内心，因此要赐你新生的可能。
E: You misunderstand, Mr. Aventurine. Punishment is meant for the irreverent, but I have seen your resilient spirit, and thus I offer you the possibility of a new beginning.

C: 等时候到了，就将你的发现同我核验。如果我们二人的判断一致，或者你能带给我更多…那祂便能将慈爱和诚实真正地施给你了。
E: When the time comes, compare your findings with mine. If both our findings align, or if you can provide me more insights... then THEY will truly be able to grant you mercy and honesty.

C: 「庸众院」真该给你留一席，全宇宙没人比你更配得上这个名字。
E: The Council of Mundanites should consider you as their member, for no one in this universe is more suitable to be there than you.

C: 救、救命…我的年终奖金都在那颗雪球上交代完了…我可不想自己的名字上部门的重大违纪通告啊！
E: Help... Help me... I spent all my year-end bonus on the snowball... I don't want my name on the department's major disciplinary notice!

C: 你们几个，赶紧把他拖下去，送回客房——
E: Take him back to the hotel room!

C: …托帕小姐！没想到会在匹诺康尼遇见你。
E: ...Miss Topaz! I never thought I'd run into you on Penacony.

C: （…原来如此，是当时追捕流萤的那两个人啊。）
E: (...So that's it, they were the pair who were after Firefly at the time.)

C: 这也是我们前来拜访加拉赫先生的理由。列车不能对那孩子的死坐视不理，决定协助家族查清真相，希望能为她讨个公道。
E: This is also the reason why we've come to visit you, Mr. Gallagher. The Express can't just overlook the death of that child, so we've decided to help The Family get to the bottom of it, in the hopes of getting justice for her.

C: 虽然不知道你究竟是什么东西，又在打什么主意……
E: Though I don't know exactly what you are or what you're up to...

C: 嗯…好吧。祝你们工作顺利。
E: All right... Good luck with your work, then.

C: 愚者，你以为我为什么要拎着这么个破袋子，满大街地分发廉价珠宝？
E: Why else do you think I'm handing out cheap trinkets all over the streets, Fool?

C: 这和米哈伊尔又有什么关系？
E: But what does this have to do with Mikhail?

C: 那就来谈谈这第二场豪赌吧。说说看，这回你打算押什么？
E: Then let's talk about the second gamble. Tell me, what are you prepared to wager this time?

C: 怎么了，先生…你看起来不太舒服？
E: What's wrong, Mister... You don't look well.

C: 最后的时光，同{RUBY_B#「过去」}这孩子{RUBY_E#}好好道个别吧。尽量让自己……
E: Say goodbye to {RUBY_B#Past}the kid{RUBY_E#} before you shuffle off. It's...

C: 先是幻听，现在是幻觉——真棒，下一步我是不是该荣升「同谐」令使了？
E: First I'm hearing things, and now I'm seeing them. Great! Am I going to be elevated into the Harmony's Emanator next?

C: 还有好多花——姐姐，这朵紫色的送给你——
E: And there are so many flowers here. Big Sis, this one's for you!

C: 这位就是黄泉小姐吧？你好，我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
E: Is this Miss Acheron? Hello, I'm Himeko, the Astral Express' navigator.

C: 即便身处逆境，人只要还有希望，就一定会跟注……
E: Even on a losing streak, as long as people still have hope, they'll keep throwing money on the table...

C: …是不是啊，*温柔的兄长*？
E: ...Isn't that right, my brother?

C: ——来自五十二位忠诚的*家族成员*。
E: ...from all fifty-two loyal Family members.

C: 我的凡胎早已消散，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六名孩子是我如今的眼、耳、口，在需要时代我将谐乐在这美梦中传扬，在必要时…替我将罪恶从这乐园里流放。
E: My mortal shell has long since dissipated. The Oak Family's one hundred and seven thousand, three hundred and thirty-six offspring are now my eyes, ears and mouths, spreading joy across dreams when required, and in times of essential need... exiling evil from this haven in my stead.

C: 巡海游侠离开聚光灯太久了，没这种道上公认的好东西。但这种场合我见得多了，解决方式也很简单……
E: Been ages since the Galaxy Rangers had the spotlight shone on 'em, and we ain't equipped with such fancy gadgets. But I've been around the block enough to know the way to handle these types of situations is easy as pie...

C: 流梦礁的时间尺度与现实不同，千万不能放松警惕。你对忆质很敏感，稍有不慎…可能会迷失在这片忆域中。
E: The timescale of Dreamflux Reef differs from reality, so we mustn't lower our guard. You're sensitive to memoria — A slight misstep, and you could get lost in this Memory Zone.

C: 不是的。钟表小子是我的好伙伴，我们的家都在这里。
E: Nope. Clockie is a good friend of mine. We all live here.

C: …喏，就成这样咯。
E: ...Well, this is how it turned out.

C: 他非觉得自己是死了…虽然刚掉进来时，我也有这种想法。
E: He thinks he's dead... Although when I first fell in, I also thought the same.

C: 他们的一生都走在迈向未知的进行时上，无愧于「开拓」之名。但…这块没有字的纪念碑又是…？
E: True to the title of Trailblazer, they spent their lives venturing into the unknown. But... what about this tablet? There are no names carved on it.

C: 而且，这可不是简单许个愿就能搞定的事，必须具备相当程度的知识，加上大量时间和人力，才能做得这么滴水不漏。话说到这份上，你们该明白了吧……
E: And that's not something you can achieve with a simple wish. It requires vast quantities of knowledge, time, and manpower. I'm sure you get what I'm hinting at...

C: 这梦泡里…真的什么都没有？！
E: Seriously... there's nothing inside this dream bubble?

C: 哦，哦！哈哈，你瞧我，一定是离家太久，太想念那轮月亮了…嗝。
E: Oh, yeah! Haha, look at me! I've been away from home for too long... I must be missing that moon... *hiccup*

C: 总会有办法的——匹诺康尼已经走在正确的道路上了。
E: There will be a way out. Penacony is already on the right track.

C: 正是。然而讽刺的是，人们不觉得这么做是错的。因为他们始终将那虚无缥缈的「自我价值」奉为圭臬，就连弱者也是这么认为。
E: Exactly, but ironically, people don't think there's anything wrong with it, because they uphold the illusory notion of self-value, and even the weak believe in it.

C: 有人生来弱小无助，有人陷于后天的不幸，有人向卑劣和怯懦屈服。在生存面前，他们同样平等，只能目视自己的{RUBY_B#未来}价值{RUBY_E#}不断被外物掠夺。
E: Some are born weak and vulnerable, some find themselves trapped in unfortunate circumstances, some fall victim to malice and cowardice. When it comes to survival, everyone is equal, and the weak can only watch as their {RUBY_B#future}value{RUBY_E#} gets constantly diminished by external forces.

C: …要不这样，你给个房间号，我俩过去看看。
E: ...How about this? Give me their room number, and we'll go check on them ourselves.

C: 您要来点什么吗？
E: What can I get for you?

C: 请星穹列车立即跃迁，离开阿斯德纳星系。
E: I kindly request an immediate warp jump out of the Asdana star system.
