C: 而波提欧先生，你或许已经猜到了…我在等待你的到来。巡海游侠行踪不定，彼此之间也往来甚少，原谅我只能通过这种方式与你们取得「联系」。
E: As for Boothill, as you may have guessed... I've been waiting for you. Galaxy Rangers are known for their elusive nature and limited contact with each other, so this is the only way I could "reach out" to you.

C: 逐梦年代就是这么神奇。我怀念那个时代，也怀念「钟表匠」，这片热砂会场便是我为纪念那个充满可能性的时代而建立的。
E: The Dreamchasing Era was truly a wondrous time. Ah, I miss those days... and the Watchmaker. Scorchsand Hall is my homage to that time of boundless possibilities.

C: 否则，他又何必在孤独中睡去，对你们这群未来的无名客孤注一掷呢？
E: Why else would he have chosen to sleep in solitude, staking everything on some Nameless in the future?

C: 戏梦大舞台，有梦你就来！欢迎来到「演技派」舞台！
E: The Stage of Dreams, for those who dare to dream! Welcome to the School of Acting stage!

C: 别傻了，朋友。失败不是一种病，而是一种罪过，罪过是治不好的。
E: Don't be naive, buddy. Failure isn't a sickness — it's a sin, and sins can't be cured.

C: 你已经和梦主谈妥了吗？
E: You already worked things out with the Dreammaster?

C: 所以随我来吧，各位。让我们一起重走来时的路，再看看这路将要通向何方。
E: So come with me, everyone. Let us retrace our steps and see once again where this road leads.

C: 他这么对我说，「把家里能卖的全都卖了」——房子，土地，还有两个孩子…他说自己无力抚养他们，做奴隶至少还能混口饭吃。
E: He told me "I sold everything I could at home." — the house, the land, even his two children... He said he could not afford to raise them, and that at least they could eat if they lived as slaves.

C: 令我诧异的是，梦主只为我捎来了一封信。他让我读读信中的内容，而那信件…来自我的妹妹。
E: What surprised me was that the Dreammaster had only come to deliver a letter to me. He let me read its contents. It was a letter... from my sister.

C: 代价微不足道，只是一场属于我个人的…永久殉难。如果要为万众维持这座乐园，总得有一人陷入孤独的清醒中，直到宇宙的尽头。
E: The cost is minute, merely a personal... and eternal sacrifice. If this paradise is to be maintained for everyone, someone must remain trapped in solitary wakening, until the end of the cosmos.

C: 流萤小姐不也这么觉得吗，生命因何而沉睡？是因为人们害怕从梦中醒来。
E: Don't you agree, Miss Firefly? And as for why life slumbers? It is because we are afraid to awaken from our dreams.

C: 这么说来，钟表小子去哪了…是去守护美梦小镇了吗？
E: So, where has Clockie gone...? Did he leave to protect Dreamville?

C: 没错，就你还被蒙在鼓里啦。
E: Yeah, you're the only one still in the dark.

C: 那时我还小。在我的记忆里，有一块特别的怀表。它总是陪伴在爷爷身边，跟着他出海远航，在每一个冒险故事里为他指明方向。
E: I was a kid, and there was always a special pocket watch in my memories. It was with my grandpa, guiding him on his sea voyages and leading the way in his every adventure story.

C: 那就是你的下一站。
E: That's your next stop.

C: 所以现在，我已经理解了第二次「死亡」的含义，并要将它付诸行动。如果一切顺利，这会为你们提供至关重要的支援。
E: So now, I've understood the meaning of my second "death," and I am prepared to face it. If all goes well, my efforts will provide crucial support for you.

C: 无妨。既然你愿意代她牺牲，那我就成全你吧。
E: Alright, since you're willing to sacrifice yourself for her, I'll grant your wish.

C: 「万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」
E: "Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."

C: 「故事该从哪里开始呢，就从『匹诺康尼』还是『边陲监狱』的时候开始吧。」
E: "Where shall we start our narrative? Well, let's start with the time when Penacony was still a frontier prison."

C: 「流放之地的秩序十分混乱，又有内忧外患虎视眈眈。七大家系表面统一，实则各自为政，纷争不断。」
E: "Land of the exiles was in disarray, besieged by both internal and external perils. Though the seven major lineages appeared united on the surface, each harbored their own ambitions, leading to ceaseless conflict."

C: 妈呀——吓我一跳！这售票处怎么有这么多…人偶？
E: Yikes! They scared the life out of me! Why are there so many... puppets at the ticket office?

C: 「历史是面镜子，它映照出宇宙最本真的面貌。我们也可借这个机会，更深入地了解匹诺康尼和星神的历史。」
E: "History is a mirror reflecting the universe's true essence. Let's use this opportunity to delve into the rich history of Penacony and the Aeons."

C: 这是最后一幕了，倒是比先前的故事好懂许多…他要赶走「同谐」，建立一座「秩序」的帝国。
E: This is the final scene — it's much more straightforward... He wants to expel the Harmony and establish an empire based on the Order.

C: 公司指认他为家族在匹诺康尼分家的主要负责人，以威胁银河和平为由要求他代表家族为动乱负责，并将此案交由庇尔波因特审判……
E: The IPC has named him the key figure in The Family's Penacony split, citing a threat to Cosmic peace. He must represent The Family and answer for the unrest caused. His trial is set to take place at Pier Point.

C: 随后，你在梦境里救下流萤小姐，与她一起游览了匹诺康尼。你们中途遭遇<color=#dbc291ff>假扮成桑博的花火</color>，意外坠入了稚子的梦。
E: After that, you saved Firefly and explored Penacony together. During the tour, you ran into <color=#dbc291ff>Sparkle disguised as Sampo</color> and accidentally entered a child's dream.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>此时此刻，仍然身处于梦境中</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Are still trapped in the Dreamscape at this very moment</color>.

C: 看来匹诺康尼的未来已成定局。不知列车组的各位是否还有所牵挂？
E: Looks like Penacony's future is decided. I'm wondering, is there anything else the Crew is concerned about?

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 对。它的主人一定告诉过你，这东西对巡海游侠以外的人一文不值，只有物归原主才能发挥作用。
E: Exactly. Its owner must have told you that it's meaningless to anyone other than a Galaxy Ranger, and that it can only fulfill its purpose when returned to its rightful owner.

C: 听起来是个很周密的计划，但还是有些…理想主义者的浪漫。人性的弱点绝非一朝一夕能够克服，仅凭这些努力，真的能让所有人弃暗投明么？
E: Your plan sounds well-conceived, but still, it appears somewhat... idealistic and romantic. The flaws rooted in human nature can't be eradicated overnight. Do you believe these efforts alone are enough to convince everyone to choose the right path?

C: 谢谢……
E: Thank you...

C: 如此，你们一定能在阳光下相聚。
E: In this way, you will reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.

C: 不过嘛，作为赢得这一切的代价…失去一枚「基石」，还是过于昂贵了。「钻石」刚刚发起了一场会议，有关你的会议。
E: However, this came at a high cost... Losing a Cornerstone is a hefty price to pay. Diamond just called a meeting to discuss what to do with you.

C: 机会难得，为什么不来赌一把呢？
E: Why don't you take a wild guess?

C: 还有一位神明，再度沉睡了。一些人为此欢呼雀跃，一些人引以为憾。还有些人见证了一切，他们相对宇宙的总和简直无足轻重，说祂这次带着尊严死去。
E: And so, an Aeon succumbed to slumber once more. Some celebrated this fall, while others mourned. Among the insignificant witnesses, mere specks in the vast tapestry of the universe, it was said that this time, the Aeon met THEIR demise with dignity.

C: 此人正沉醉于狂热的幻想，完全没有注意到你的存在。
E: They are so immersed in the maniacal fantasy that they completely fail to notice your very existence.

C: 「钟表匠」——拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔——他已然迈向那没有尽头的长梦，再没有任何声音能将他唤醒。
E: The Watchmaker, Mikhail Char Legwork, has passed into that endless, timeless dream, where no sound could ever awaken him.

C: 家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
E: The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.

C: 没事的，他只是出于好心。放心啦，银狼，你懂我的。
E: Got it. He was just worried about me. Relax, Silver Wolf. You know me.

C: 账账，接好！
E: Numby, catch!

C: 听当事人讲，那恶作剧犯嘴上是这么说的：「只要按下这个按钮，整个匹诺康尼就会被炸上天！」。
E: According to those involved, he said something like, "Just press this button, and all of Penacony will explode!"

C: 在苦涩中寻求清醒。
E: In bitterness, we search for clarity.

C: 好，这样就大功告成了……
E: Well, it's done...

C: 知更鸟小姐，你好，没想到能在这船上遇见你。
E: Greetings, Miss Robin. I didn't expect to meet you here.

C: 总得在后辈面前树个好榜样。谈判场上，口无遮拦可不是什么好习惯，不是吗？
E: I need to set a good example for my junior. It's not a good habit to be too loose-lipped during negotiations, right?

C: 可以。公司的诚意我了解了，作为苜蓿草家系的家主，老奥帝似乎没有拒绝的理由——
E: Fine, now I see your sincerity. As the head of the Alfalfa Family, I don't think I have any reason to refuse your offer...

C: 正式会谈的时间放在什么时候合适？我去安排。
E: When should we schedule the formal negotiations? I'll handle the arrangements.

C: 作为交换，我也要帮她完成一件事，但那是后话了。等我们离开匹诺康尼后再办也不迟。
E: In return, I've agreed to help her with something, but that's for later. We can deal with it after we leave Penacony.

C: 这位小姐，该如何称呼？
E: How should I address you, dear lady?

C: 而「钻石」，他给出了承诺——将「存护」令使的大权一分为十，为那空洞添上「基石」。
E: So, Diamond made us a promise. To divide the power of the Emanator of Preservation into ten pieces and give each of us a Cornerstone to fill that void.

C: 去看那位「慈玉女士」。
E: Just to meet Lady Bonajade in person.

C: 就是你本人。我有看到你开宝箱、打气球、玩美梦排排乐，应该不是我看错了…吧？
E: It was you. I saw you opening treasure chests, hitting balloons, and playing the Dreamy Slots. I don't think I'm mistaken... right?

C: （安排妥当了…开始按图索骥吧。）
E: (All set... let's start following the plan)

C: <size=28>四——</size>
E: <size=28>Four...</size>

C: 你看上去和听上去都不太危险。
E: You don't look or sound that dangerous.

C: 嗬，宝贝，你比我狂多了。让我酝酿酝酿……
E: Holy fudge, you're more insane than I am! Let me gather my wits...

C: 前略，中间忘了，总之我最终来到了匹诺康尼。我想要研究与仙舟完全不同的亚文化，结果可真是让我大跌眼镜——如果我有眼睛的话。
E: I forgot what happened, but anyway, I ended up in Penacony. I wanted to study a subculture that is completely different from the Xianzhou's, and boy it's really been an eye-opening experience — that is, if I had eyes.

C: 是「迷因」，对，就是这个。它们还有形体呢。我和其中一个牙尖爪利的迷因生命成了好朋友。它对仙舟持明文化特感兴趣，我就给它起了个仙舟名，它很开心。
E: Yes meme, that's it. They even have forms. I'm good friends with a meme with sharp teeth and claws. It's very interested in the Xianzhou Vidyadhara culture. I gave it a Xianzhou name, and it was delighted.

C: 这只完全无害又爱说废话的毛绒娃娃对你深情地鞠了一躬，还送上飞吻，然后一跳一跳地消失在船舱深处。
E: The harmless chatterbox plush doll bows affectionately to you, blowing you a kiss before bounding away, vanishing into the depths of the cabin with joyful leaps.

C: 但「开拓」的前方本就充满未知，而我的刀又恰好锐利到足以斩落命途…只要你我还保有启程的初心，相信总有一日，我们还能够重逢吧。
E: But the trailblazing expedition ahead is always full of unknowns, and my blade is sharp enough to sever fate... As long as we maintain our original resolve, I believe there will come a day when we will meet again.

C: 是啊，很多时候，比起我是怎样的人，我们一同做过怎样的事才更重要。这段故事…我会铭记在心的。
E: That's right. What matters more is not who I am but what we have done together. This story... will be forever etched in my heart.

C: 好啦好啦…帕姆，打起精神来！别伤心，别哭啦……
E: There there... Chin up, Pom-Pom! Don't be sad. Don't cry...

C: 我就说道别时少了个人…
E: I knew we were missing someone...

C: 忆者…姑且不论你是如何避开耳目登上列车的，你刚才所说的「提议」……
E: Memokeeper... Let's put aside how you managed to sneak past everyone and board the Express for now — you mentioned a suggestion...

C: 即便从神坛跌落，你这副姿态依旧甚好。看到你这么有活力，我很高兴。
E: Despite your fall from grace, you still look well. I'm very glad to see that you're so full of verve.

C: 走吧，你自由了，妄图超越本分的神选者。把自己的羽翼折断，到人间去，走在大地上，看看这人世真正的模样。
E: Go now. You are free — O chosen one, who dared to exceed his bounds. Sever your wings, descend to the mortal realm, and walk their lands. See what this world is truly like.

C: 啊，临别前再附赠你一句话吧——权当是过来人的忠告……
E: Ah, a word of advice for you before we part ways — a word of warning from someone who's been in your shoes before...

C: {NICKNAME}，你可算来啦！都等你好半天了。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're finally here! We've been waiting for so long.

C: 当然啦，现在开始咱们就是同学了。
E: Of course. We're schoolmates now!

C: 蕉蕉蕉…蕉蕉蕉。
E: Bananana... Bananana!

C: 这是*蕉语*！现在同学们都爱睡蕉小猴，咱们这些教职人员也做足了功课，专门换了个造型蕉！
E: It's Bananese. Students are in love with Slumbernana Monkey right now, so our faculty did our homework and changed up our image, bana!

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: …你什么时候给自己起了这名啊？
E: ...When did you start going by that name?

C: 是的，不用怀疑自己的耳朵。年轻人，自由——这才是折纸大学想教会你们的。
E: Yes, do not doubt your ears, young ones. Freedom — This is what Paperfold University yearns to teach you.

C: 各位{RUBY_B#同学}演员{RUBY_E#}，你们好。我是这场测验的{RUBY_B#主考官}导演{RUBY_E#}，请叫我芮克先生，这是我在片尾常用的署名。
E: Hello, {RUBY_B#trainees}cast members{RUBY_E#}. I am your {RUBY_B#chief examiner}director{RUBY_E#} for this exam. You may call me Mr. Reca. It's the name I commonly use in the end credits.

C: …不对，你是考官？怎么回事……
E: Wait, but you're the examiner! What's going on here?

C: 无名客，你的记忆从「智识」的航站开始，登上「开拓」的列车，在旅途中见证「存护」的意志、「巡猎」的决意、「同谐」与「秩序」的争论……
E: Nameless, your memory began onboard a station of Erudition, where you then boarded a train of Trailblaze. In your journey, you witnessed the will of Preservation, the determination of The Hunt, and the dispute between Harmony and Order...

C: 嚯，听说财富学院培养过不少富翁…{NICKNAME}，苟富贵，莫相忘！
E: Woah, I heard lots of rich people come from Fortune Academy. {NICKNAME}, don't forget me once you're rich!

C: 这可是梦境，普通玩偶肯定不能征服消费者。所以「财富蕉师」让我添加了一点忆质，看，它是不是像忆域迷因一样活灵活现？
E: This is the Dreamscape. A regular toy won't draw the eyes of the consumer, so Fortune BananAdvisor allowed me to add a little memoria to it. Look, isn't it as realistic as a Memory Zone Meme?

C: 啊，被你抢先了！
E: Ahh! You called it before me!

C: 大佬，这是底价了。在黄金的时刻，这点钱连一顿饭都不够吃。
E: This is the lowest price, buddy. You can't even buy a meal in the Golden Hour with this amount of credits.

C: 还有二位无名•忍者，初次见面，在下乃是缭乱忍侠•AKA•乱破。
E: It is a pleasure to meet the both of you as well, Nameless Ninjas. I am Rappa, AKA the Dazzling Ninja.

C: 这样是谁入住了酒店就有了答案。可巡海游侠为何要重访梦境？
E: So we now know who checked into the hotel. But why are the Galaxy Rangers revisiting the Dreamscape?

C: 放心姐们，你很快就知道为什么了。我出去干点活，这些先帮我留着。走了啊。
E: No need to worry, lady, you'll know soon enough. I'm headin' out to take care of some business. Keep these safe for me.

C: 不用了，先生，我替二位向你道歉。
E: There's no need for that, sir. Allow me to apologize on their behalf.

C: 到那时候再琢磨也不迟，*他香蕉的*，今天就给你们上上这一课……
E: Act first, think later. You bet your forkin' bananas I'm teaching all of you a lesson today—

C: 「睡蕉社」？应该是这个名字吧，打着社团的旗号，在流梦礁四处搞宣传活动，而且不怎么友好。
E: I think it's called the Slumbernana Association. They run publicity campaigns all across Dreamflux Reef under its banner, and they're not very friendly.

C: 保底，我还有个更利索的法子。<color=#dbc291ff>之前抢地盘的那些小可爱，找他们借张会员证用用</color>，也难不到哪儿去。
E: If all else fails, I got an easier solution to fall back on: <color=#dbc291ff>I can just "borrow" a membership card from those lil' fudgeheads scrappin' over turf earlier</color>. Easy-peasy.

C: 放一百个心吧，现在我是小猴专家，跟使枪一样利索，问你的就行了。
E: Don't worry, I'm a monkey expert now, about as much as I'm a master marksman. Ask away.

C: 没有没有，传说中您的行事作风和名字格格不入，相当硬派——看来确有其事，请进请进。
E: No, no, not at all. I've heard that your name and assertive demeanor are quite the juxtaposition, and it looks like there's truth to these stories indeed. Now, if you'll follow me.

C: 我…你…啊？
E: I... You... What!?

C: …走得倒挺快。
E: ...That was quick.

C: 那一半也就「一半」。
E: Yeah, that's also just "half" of the whole lot.

C: 似乎有人总是领先一步。
E: It appears that someone is already one step ahead.

C: 结果还是没联系上波提欧。
E: We still can't reach Boothill.

C: 好啊，大家都上来吧！表现优秀的同学有学分奖励蕉。
E: Excellent! You can all come up here! Those who excel might even earn some course credits, bana!

C: 一个大冰坨子有蕉皮用，我让你画睡蕉小猴，不是让你做刨冰！就算是专业筑梦猴也得乖乖听甲方的需求！
E: I gave you a theme, and that's Slumbernana Monkey! Not this giant useless block of ice! Even pro Dreamweaver monkeys are expected to follow what is requested of them!

C: 校园社交这么离谱吗…
E: Is campus social life really that messed up?

C: 忍者的苦无沾染邪祟血污，自由的学府斩断一切约束！
E: With fiendling blood the sword of justice will be stained, as the school casts off every shackle every chain!

C: 也没说错吧？姐们，刚才你听得都走不动道了。
E: Ain't wrong, am I? You were so darn mesmerized by their speech back there.

C: 瞧你，我才刚哄好呢。
E: What are you up to? I only just convinced her everything's fine, you know...

C: 原始博士…？
E: Dr. Primitive...?

C: 嘿，没瞎吧？
E: Hey, you can see me, right?

C: 要不，两位的恩怨自行解决，我先走一步？
E: How about the two of you settle your own scores, while I'll be on my way?

C: 怎么会这样…你明明还只是个孩子……
E: How did things take such a turn...? You're just a child...

C: 可惜这里没有答案，只有一个疑问——「您会因此更加不幸吗？」
E: Unfortunately, there are no answers here, only one question: "Will this make you worse off?"

C: 无论何种模因病毒，对忆者的影响都可谓致命。但你不同，身为主角，你一定能揭开这影片重重伏笔背后的真相。
E: Memetic viruses, no matter the type, can be fatal to a Memokeeper. But that's not the case for you. As the protagonist, you will surely be able to unveil the truth behind the numerous layers of foreshadowing in this film.

C: 那…「乱破」。一心不乱、破邪显正，这是大师最初的教导，我想以此为名。
E: In that case... I choose Rappa. To have a dedicated heart that will never be disturbed, and to pacify all evil and demonstrate justice... that was Master's initial teachings to me. I wish to use them in my name.

C: （唔，这种剧痛是乱破当时的感受吗……）
E: (Urk, is this excruciating pain what Rappa endured back then...?)

C: 人尽其才，物尽其用！诸位，我们要让实验中的每一只「猴子」都理解这份幸福，和他们一起在幸福中燃烧吧！
E: People should make use of their talents to the fullest, just as items should be utilized fully! We must ensure that every "monkey" in the experiment fully comprehends this bliss. Let us burn alongside them in happiness!

C: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，多亏了你，我想明白了，道德确实是虚伪而肤浅的事物……
E: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>... thanks to you, I finally understood that morality is indeed a hypocritical and superficial concept...

C: *忍侠俚语*，现在还说这个，不要命了？
E: *Ninja Slang*, you're asking me this now. Do you have a death wish?

C: ——完成了！银河忍法千变万化，此乃「超•忍•卷轴」！
E: Ha— Done! The Cosmic ninjutsu is ever-changing, so I present to you the Super Ninja Scroll!

C: 哟，喜欢装死？看看待会儿在长满铁刺儿的香蕉前你还能不能装死啊？
E: Yo, you enjoy playing dead? Let's see if you can still play dead in the face of a banana covered with thorns!

C: 不愧是琉璃•忍者！
E: As expected of Ninja Ruri!

C: 因为你们有美梦，才能创造多彩。你们有理想，才能拥抱自由。
E: It is because of your sweet dreams that you can create color. It is because of your ideals that you can embrace freedom.

C: 别跑！
E: Stop right there!

C: 「虚无」令使黄泉与公司使节砂金的对决成为整起事件的转折点：后者借一场「盛大的死亡」粉碎了家族的谎言，也揭示了原初梦境「流梦礁」的存在。
E: A confrontation between the Emanator of the Nihility, Acheron, and IPC representative, Aventurine, becomes the turning point of the entire event: The latter, through a "grand death," shatters The Family's lies and reveals the existence of the Primordial Dreamscape, Dreamflux Reef.

C: （孩童，没有父母陪伴么？太危险了。）
E: (Children left unattended by their parents? That's not safe.)

C: 她往那边去了！/ 抓住她！
E: She went that way. / Get her!

C: 涡心的流向，难以捉摸。只有只言片语，和遥远的战吼……
E: It's not possible to tell for sure what goes on within the Vortex. All I can hear are fragments of speech and distant battle cries...

C: 白厄因在「纷争」试炼中落败，心智深受泰坦侵蚀，距恢复如初还需些许时日...就让失意的英雄稍息片刻吧。
E: Phainon was defeated in the Trial of Strife and had his consciousness corroded by the Titan. It will be some time until he recovers... Let the frustrated hero rest a while.

C: 「当你破开我的胸膛，那也正是你登神之时——悬锋的继业者啊，我向你致敬！」
E: "The very moment you rip my chest apart shall be the moment of your ascension. To you, the successor of Kremnos!"

C: 什么都有可能！*我们*也很易碎，但都从那段…悲伤的历史中，坚持下来了！你看它的颜色，在光芒下！亮晶晶的…和*我们*记忆里，一模一样！
E: Nothing is impossible! We are fragile, too! But we still got through those... those sad times. Look at that color... and how it glitters in the light... It's exactly as we remember it!

C: 刚才二位大人路过，缇安大人一眼就瞧见了它，嚷着说是什么家乡的宝贝。
E: When Lady Tribbie and Lady Trianne walked by earlier, Lady Trianne happened to catch sight of it and promptly insisted that it was a precious memento from her hometown.

C: 在风堇的带领下，你们向约定地点出发……
E: You head towards the agreed location under Hyacine's lead...

C: 噫，好羞人…大家不要笑话缇安！
E: Eek, so embarrassing...! Please don't make fun of Trianne!

C: 这是死去仙女木的影子。
E: It is the shadow of a dead White Dryad.

C: 可连这种*新思想*也…看来这位{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}确实宽容。
E: Well, it looks like {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} must really be open-minded if they're accepting of even this kind of novel idea.

C: 我们当然知道啦，毕竟缇安大人可是我们之中最最厉害的「半神」。
E: Of course we know that. After all, Lady Trianne is a demigod, the most powerful among all of us here.
Huh...?

C: 不，怎么说呢…算是泰坦火种的一道保险吧。这只蝴蝶由{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}残存的神识幻化而成，肩负着守卫火种的职责。
E: No, how should I put it... It's considered a safeguard for the Titan's Coreflame. This butterfly is created from {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining divine mind and bears the responsibility of guarding the Coreflame.

C: 太谦虚啦好伙伴！那人家就勉为其难当第二，小蝶当第一吧。
E: Friend, you're too humble! In that case, I'll just have to settle for being second best while Cas can be the best.

C: 啊呀，人子们…终于通过最后一道考验了。
E: Oh my, the children of humanity... have passed the final trial at last.

C: 好啦，这算是路上的小插曲。
E: Alright, back to business after that little detour.

C: 偷袭不成，就难再次得手了…可惜。
E: Since the ambush failed, it'll be difficult to find another opportunity... What a pity.

C: 你觉得…自己有机会战胜它吗？令你害怕的那样东西？
E: Do you think... you stand a chance? Against that thing that terrifies you?

C: 王子…你们，都是悬锋之子？
E: The crown prince...? Are you Kremnoans?

C: 我父母现在在圣城守备队中服役…他们是悬锋的战士，比所有奥赫玛人都勇敢。
E: My parents are serving in the Holy City Garrison now. As warriors of Kremnos, they're braver than any Okheman!

C: 「歌耳戈」…你的母亲与悬锋城的建立者同名，她的作为也配得上这名字的重量。但你——你若要远离她的荣光，做个逃兵…恕我无法再献上自己的忠诚，迈德漠斯。
E: Gorgo... Your mother bore that name, the name of the great founder of Castrum Kremnos, and she upheld that name with honor. If you choose to turn your back on her legacy like a wretched deserter... do not fault me for withholding my loyalty, Mydeimos.

C: 我们…必须拯救悬锋城。
E: We must... save Castrum Kremnos.

C: 呵…也好。
E: Heh... Very well.

C: 「赫菲斯辛，我的挚友…省些力气罢，我去叫医师来……」
E: "Hephaestion, my dear friend... Spare your strength. I'll go get a physician..."

C: 顶着许多人——也包括克拉特鲁斯——的反对之声，我让悬锋孤军留在了奥赫玛。但我明白，他们的荣耀不可能被磨灭。
E: Against the dissent of many — Krateros included — I made the Kremnoan Detachment stay in Okhema, but I know that their glory will never be doused out.

C: 呵…我猜猜，她不但会拒绝让我慰问死者家属，还会封锁树庭的消息，那女人就是这般冷血。
E: Heh... Let me guess. That woman will not only prevent me from visiting the families of the deceased, but will also suppress any information about the Grove. She's always been that cold-hearted.

C: 你要阻止我么，遐蝶？
E: Are you going to stop me, Castorice?

C: 您是库娜涅和阿塔卡玛的父亲么？
E: Are you the father of Cynane and Artakama?

C: 哈…倒也正常。老爷子一把年纪，什么时候掉进冥河里都不稀奇……
E: Heh... That's no shocker. At his age, he was due for the River of Souls any time.

C: 但还在犹豫，你。年轻的王，为何踌躇？
E: Yet hesitate still, you do. Hesitate, why do you, young king?

C: 就算*我们*从今往后，再也不使用「百界门」的力量…她的魂息也在慢慢飘离身体。
E: Even if we refrain from ever using the power of the Century Gate again... her soul continues to slowly drift away from her body.

C: …好像有什么出现了！
E: ...Something's appeared!

C: 难道…这是*我们*丢失的记忆？
E: Could it be... our lost memories?

C: 呵，原来是个盗火者……
E: Heh, so it's plundering the flames...
Hmph...

C: ——那骄傲不值一提，克拉特鲁斯。如今，我已接过「纷争」的神权。而接下来……
E: ...That pride holds little significance, Krateros. Now that I've assumed the divinity of Strife, my next step...

C: 并非一切都在我的计划中。在如今的世道，我也只能步步为营。何况……
E: Not everything unfolds according to my plan. In the current state of the world, I can only proceed one step at a time. Furthermore...
Hehe...

C: 只是，你最好表现得…安分一些。你明白我的意思。
E: Just... try to stay on your best behavior, if you know what I mean.

C: 嗯。眼下纷争还远在翁法罗斯的另一边，但五年后的同一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，这座圣殿将成为又一场战火的源头。
E: Yes. Strife remains distant from this part of Amphoreus right now, but in five years' time, at the same {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, this temple will become the source of another war.

C: …抱歉。
E: ...My apologies.

C: 好，我知道啦。不过，你们专程溜进来，是想……
E: Okay, okay. But what did you sneak in here for?

C: 我不希望你的坚强…只是强颜欢笑的孤独。
E: I hope your toughness is not a mask hiding a lonely heart.

C: 呼唤着朝阳…和它终将带来的明天。
E: Beckoning the morning sun... and the tomorrow it promises to bring.

C: 让它休息吧，这几天累坏了。
E: Let Mem rest. They've had a tiring past few days.

C: 这么煽情，前面跑哪去了？
E: Aww, how sweet! But where were you earlier?

C: 详情可以路上再聊。战机转瞬即逝，必须抓紧时间。
E: I'll tell you the details as we move. Opportunities are fleeting on the battlefield. We should hurry.

C: 当然记得啊！
E: You bet I do!

C: 作为匹诺康尼的上一届盛会巨星，{NICKNAME}曾是万众瞩目的焦点。
E: As Penacony's last Festive Superstar, {NICKNAME} was once the center of everyone's attention.

C: 现在，由苜蓿草家系主办，苏乐达™赞助播出的，以梦想为赌注的残酷战场——
E: Now, brought to you by the Alfalfa Family and proudly sponsored by SoulGlad™, the high-stakes battlefield where dreams are on the line—

C: 和你一比，拥有从者的我都显得不够「孤狼」了！要不这名号借你用两天吧～哼哼哈哈哈！
E: Compared to you, even I seem less of a "lone wolf" now that I have a Servant. Maybe I should let you borrow the title for a couple of days. Bwahaha!

C: 没有从者你也不是我对手…
E: Even without a Servant, you're no match for me.

C: 走吧，我带你去吃本地特色的「天环翅堡」！你们的世界肯定没这道菜～
E: Come on! I'll take you to try the local specialty, Halovian Winged Burgers! No way your world has that!

C: 你们这群混蛋，给我撑住！
E: You idiots! Hold the line!

C: 这可是圣杯战争。请原谅，我会时刻处于迎击姿态，直到我能确信你们对我的御主没有恶意。
E: This is the Holy Grail War. Please forgive me, but I'll stay on guard until I'm sure you don't mean any harm to my Master.

C: 魔术师告诉我，拔出石头上的选定之剑，我就能如愿。所有人都以为，不列颠会因此得救。
E: The mage told me that if I could pull the sword from the stone, then I would achieve my wish. Everyone thought that I would save Britain.

C: 太慢了，像你这样搞，等到琥珀王敲下一锤都弄不完。
E: You're too slow. Keep going like this and you'll still be here when the Amber Lord makes THEIR next hammer swing.

C: 怎么还蹬鼻子上脸了？
E: Don't push your luck.

C: 你看了看他，欲言又止。
E: You glance at him, wanting to say something, but decided not to.

C: 嗯，让我们来说说王的故事吧，一位名为尤瑟的王。
E: Let me tell you a story about a king... a king named Uther.

C: 身为人的勇气。
E: The courage he exhibited as a human.

C: 抱歉，你所预约的时间已无会议室。
E: Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.

C: 真是浪费啊，竟然用圣杯让人学动物叫唤……
E: What a waste. Using the Holy Grail to make people do animal noises.

C: 这句话可不兴说。
E: You shouldn't have said that.

C: 未必，如果我是敌人，就会伪装成御主，藏在门背后偷袭我们。
E: Hold on. If I were the enemy, I'd disguise myself as a Master and wait just behind that door for the perfect ambush.

C: 我知道这个！「不干某事就无法离开的房间」！这可是匹诺康尼古早恐怖片里最经典的元素！
E: I know this one! "The room you can't leave unless you do a particular thing!" It's one of the classic tropes from Penacony's vintage horror flicks!

C: 等等，老朋友，别用这种眼神盯着我，我只是说着玩的。
E: Wait, old pal. Don't give me that look! I was kidding.

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: 我们来的时候看到出口就在那边，趁现在离开这里吧。
E: We saw the exit on the way in. Let's head that way while we still can.

C: 静默三幕剧•其二
E: The Silent Stage: Act II

C: 以王的名义！
E: In the name of the king!

C: 我见过尸体垂吊在绞架上，像森林般望不到尽头；我见过末日大战后的焦土，人与人堕落成饥饿的兽群彼此吞吃……
E: I've seen corpses hanging from gallows that stretch like endless forests. I've witnessed the charred remains after doomsday battles where people became nothing more than ravenous beasts devouring each other...

C: 好了，现在去找人会合吧。
E: Good, now let's regroup with the others.

C: 接受葛瑞迪这样的烂片导演的摆布？你认真吗？
E: Taking orders from a hack like Grady? Seriously?

C: 接受聚光灯的照耀吧，砂金先生，进入我专为你准备的高光情节吧！
E: Step into the spotlight, Mr. Aventurine, and enjoy this special featurette I've crafted just for you!

C: 如果他真的想要实现愿望，完全可以随意雇佣几个御主参战，像综艺节目那样内定结果。
E: If he truly wanted to achieve his wish, he could've easily hired a few Masters to stage a variety show with a rigged outcome.

C: 知道吗？对恶魔来说，操弄人的情绪就像弹琴，只要轻轻拨弄，就会像这样——
E: Did you know? For a demon, manipulating human emotions is like playing an instrument. Just a light touch, and you get something like this—

C: 前面那台机器人，难道就是葛瑞迪说的——最强的仆人？我们还是小心些接近看看吧。
E: That robot up ahead, could it be the "strongest Servant" Grady was talking about? Better keep our guard up and approach carefully.

C: 不必了。既然你如此热衷于揣测我内心的想法，那应该不难明白……
E: That won't be necessary. I'm sure you already know why, considering your vested interest in reading my thoughts.

C: 况且，你我二人曾是水火不容的关系，让你受到牵连，不会有悖我的良心。
E: Besides, we once lived a cat-and-dog existence. Embroiling you in my affairs won't weigh on my conscience.

C: 总有些旧习难以改变。
E: You know how it is — old habits die hard.

C: 请带上这份笔记吧。希望能帮上你们。
E: Please take these notes with you. They may come in handy.

C: 也容易验证，你我二人都谈不上「演职人员」。试试看吧。
E: And an easy one to test. Neither of us is part of the cast or a crew member. Let's try it out.

C: 感觉如何？
E: How do you feel?

C: 开始游玩扭蛋机。
E: Play the capsule machine.

C: 将双手放在背后，用短句回答我的问题。
E: Put your hands behind your back and answer my questions in short sentences.

C: 呃——「除汉堡外的食物均不可食用」？
E: "No consumption of food except for burgers." ...What?

C: 确实有些自说自话。
E: There does appear to be an element of her talking to herself.

C: 一时还难以判断，再和附近的停云女士谈谈吧。
E: I don't have much to go on now. Perhaps we should talk to the other Miss Tingyuns here.

C: 只是，这些停云女士都太我行我素了些，有哪位是能够沟通的吗？
E: The only problem is that these Miss Tingyuns are too caught up in their own world. Is there one we can properly speak with?

C: 不妨就跟着他们走吧。多听些过去的事，对康复也有好处。
E: You should go with them. It can only help with your recovery to hear more about your past.

C: 便是眼下「掰开揉碎」……
E: Take this apart piece by piece...

C: 真心不需要太多修饰，也许你的心意已经传达到了。
E: Sometimes what's in your heart doesn't need to be dressed up in words. Maybe he already knows what you wanted to say.

C: 嗯，只剩最后一站了。
E: Yes, we only have one last stop.

C: 我们直奔主题，为这场告别画上最后的句点。
E: Let's go. We'll head straight for the finale and take our final bow in this farewell performance.

C: 哼，他说出来你可能都不信。
E: Hmph, no, you wouldn't believe the real story even if he told you.

C: 是么？可你脸上明明写着许多心思啊，都说出来吧，你的想法尤为重要。
E: Oh, really? But your face tells me otherwise. Come on, spill it. Your opinion holds the most weight.

C: 没必要担心他。
E: I'm not worrying about him.

C: 没什么想说的吗？
E: No comment from you?

C: 打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而忆庭之镜映照出的翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，闪闪发光，也难以触及。
E: It's my duty to salvage unknown memories, and the Amphoreus that has been revealed by the Garden's mirror is like a treasure inside a display case — dazzling yet out of reach.

C: 记得出发前，她说要鼓捣相机就回了房间。之后一直没见她出来。
E: She said something about her camera before going back to her room. I haven't seen her since the warp.

C: 奇怪。按理说，小三月应该是最兴奋的那个，怎么今天一反常态？去她房间看看吧。
E: That's not like March. She's usually the most excited about expeditions. Let's drop by her room.

C: 遵命，女士！噢，可惜我不会走，只会飘……
E: Aye-aye, ma'am! Oh, but I can't walk. I can only float...

C: 我可是面镜子，黑塔女士！只要镜子里的您准备好了，那我就准备好了。
E: I'm just a mirror, Madam Herta! If you're ready, then your reflection in me will also be ready to go.

C: 怎么办，我们该怎么办？！
E: What now? What should we do!?

C: 哎…你们两个……
E: ...You two...

C: …对不住我什么？
E: ...Sorry for what?

C: 你什么时候醒的？！
E: When did you come to!?

C: 「开拓」就完事了。
E: Who cares? We're only here to trailblaze.

C: 末世是什么意思？
E: What is this "end times" people spoke of?

C: 「它们说：世界太过沉寂。只愿见，生灵欢笑不息。」
E: "They declared the world too unstirring, hence wished endless laughter upon the living."

C: 二位…抱歉，又把你们卷进来了。
E: It's you two... I'm sorry we got you involved again.

C: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
E: Stand with me and become heroes!

C: 女士，你的眼睛……
E: Lady Aglaea, your eyes...

C: 胸前的车票更锃亮了！
E: Our boarding passes are appreciating in value!

C: 感觉童话里有点粉饰的成分。
E: Sounds like they might have glossed over some things.

C: 看来白厄也在帮阿格莱雅保守秘密，这是黄金裔的共识。
E: Looks like Phainon is helping Aglaea keep that secret, too. There must be some kind of understanding among the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 没错，是这个意思。
E: Ahem, yes. I meant to say that.

C: 不是完全搞懂了吗？
E: Didn't you say you knew how to use it?

C: 哈哈，无妨！无论如何，感谢你们出手相助，塔拉萨波利斯的战士。
E: Haha, it doesn't matter! At any rate, thanks for your help, warriors of Thalassopolis.

C: {NICKNAME}，丹恒！回来得比想象中快嘛，还以为阿格莱雅会多留你们一会儿。
E: {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng! You're back much quicker than I imagined. I thought that Aglaea would keep you for a bit longer.

C: …抱歉，如果你不想聊这个话题，我会就此打住。
E: ...My apologies. If you don't wish to talk about this topic, I'll stop myself here.

C: …她认真的语气当场打消了你狂野的点子。
E: ...Her serious tone immediately quashes your wild idea.

C: 将红土饲料喂给大地兽。
E: Offer the redsoil feed to the dromas.

C: 下次再见到这些「若虫」，就把它们收集起来吧…说不定能借助它们进一步了解翁法罗斯。
E: We should catch these nymphs the next time we encounter them... Perhaps they can help us better understand Amphoreus.

C: ——闭嘴！
E: Shut it!

C: 这是…水盆？看着像是某种仪式用具。
E: Is this... a basin? It looks like something used for rituals.

C: 粉霞天女与阿格莱雅大人孰美？
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden and Lady Aglaea, who is more beautiful?

C: 这边，我会亲自为二位说明。
E: Come this way, I'll explain it to you.

C: 这话由遭受审讯的人来说更合适吧。
E: I think it's more appropriate for us to say that last part.

C: 蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
E: Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.

C: 白厄的面子这么大？
E: Phainon's a big deal, huh?

C: 黄金裔是怎么被选中的？
E: How are the Chrysos Heirs chosen?

C: 至于「永恒之地」翁法罗斯的命运，以及它终将为银河带来的剧变…至少在你的有生之年内，这一切都与你无关了。
E: As for the fate of Amphoreus, the Eternal Land, and the dramatic changes it will bring to the Cosmos... It has nothing to do with you, at least in your lifetime.

C: …阿雅，这次出征会顺利的吧？
E: ...Agy, this campaign is going to turn out fine, right?

C: 梦里一直有个声音。
E: There was this voice in my dream...

C: 噢…门，好无聊噢。那好吧，来开门！「百界门」！呼呜——
E: Oh... A gate. How boring. Alright, let's open a gate! Century Gate! Woo!!

C: 好啦！门…门…很快，马上，「百界门」要打开啦！
E: Alright! Century Gate... is opening... soon! Right now!

C: 我们，雅努萨波利斯的缇宝、缇安、缇宁，黄金裔的信使，承载{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们施以祝福！
E: We — Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon from Janusopolis, messengers of the Chrysos Heirs and the demigods who bear {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — give unto you our blessings!

C: 对不住，我应该更早些赶到的。请你们再听我说几句。
E: Sorry, I should've gotten here earlier. Please hear me out before you make up your mind.

C: 不如再探探吧。跟你在一起的时候我运气总是特别好，万一能碰到什么英雄的遗宝呢？
E: Why don't we keep searching? I get especially lucky when I'm with you. Maybe we'll find some hero's lost treasures.

C: 但说起这个…我一直很奇怪，你明明来自天外，为什么能理解翁法罗斯的文字和语言？
E: Though that does remind me: I've been wondering how you can understand the language and writing we use in Amphoreus when you're from beyond the sky.

C: 有副作用吗？
E: Are there any side effects?

C: 「凭着强大的实力和无间的默契，两位角斗士击败了所有的敌手……」
E: "With their exceptional strength and perfect teamwork, these two gladiators have bested every opponent..."

C: …看来确实技不如人。
E: ...Looks like I could work on my skills a bit more.

C: 放尊重些。这是「黄金狮首」，别和那些满口流言野史的东西相提并论。
E: Show some respect. This is Chryseus Leo, not some rumor-spouting gossip-monger.

C: 终于没那么聒噪了。
E: Finally, some peace.

C: 这动静…咱们再不加把劲，肯定要输给他了。
E: From the sound of things, we're about to lose if we don't step it up.

C: 前面又有一幅壁画。凑近些看看？
E: There's another mural up ahead. Want to take a closer look?

C: 「痛…痛…很痛。」
E: "Hurts... it hurts... so much."

C: 我掂拿过{NICKNAME}那柄炎枪，很有分量。看来这个办法行不通……
E: I've held {NICKNAME}'s flaming lance before and it's quite heavy. Seems like this isn't going to work.

C: 白厄……
E: Phainon...

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请仔细思量……
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please consider carefully...

C: 「我诅骂你们，凡人…诅骂你们的傲慢，你们的残酷。」
E: "Curse you mortals... curse your pride and your merciless ways."

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!

C: 女士，您真是找对了人！利波的收藏中有这样一首诗歌，还从未飘入过他人的耳廓。
E: Ma'am, you have come to the right place! There is such a ballad within my collection that has yet to grace the ears of others.

C: 请放心吧！同样的错误，我绝不再犯第二次。退一万步说，假如我敢打破和那位女士的约定，那和自掘坟墓有什么区别？
E: Rest assured, I'm not foolish enough to make the same mistake twice. Breaking a vow with Lady Aglaea would be like... digging my own grave.

C: 你有和悬锋城相关的记忆吗？
E: Do you have any memories related to Castrum Kremnos?

C: …那之后呢？
E: ...And after that?

C: 真是壮观。
E: What a magnificent sight.

C: 战士之城，它的壮观名副其实。
E: The City of Warriors, its magnificence certainly lives up to its name.

C: 愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
E: May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.

C: 它是世间最可怕的幽暗，如果任其生长…一切光亮将被吞噬。
E: It is the darkest force in this world, and if left unchecked... all light will be consumed.

C: 悬锋城最灼热的流星，已经飞离了我们啊…剩下的只是一簇随时可能熄灭的残烛。
E: The blazing star of Castrum Kremnos has drifted far from us... all that remains is a dim candle, on the verge of being extinguished.

C: 有什么事是我们能做的？
E: What can we do then?

C: 它的遗产竟沦为了人的玩物……
E: Their legacy reduced to mere playthings for humans...

C: …好歹跟我辩上几句吧？这么轻描淡写地带过，容易让人以为不是什么命运攸关的大事啊。
E: Meh, a little back and forth wouldn't hurt much. Coming to a decision so easily makes it seem like this is not at all a life-changing undertaking, you know.

C: …{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}大人，你还听得见吗？
E: ...Lord {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, can you hear me?

C: 我知道你现在只想安然睡去。但唯有你能解答我心头的疑惑…请原谅我的叨扰。
E: I know that your only wish right now is to rest in peace. But you are the only one with answers to my deepest doubts... So, forgive me for disturbing you.

C: 叫我们来可是要出场费的！
E: Oh, we charge a fee for appearances!

C: 还是晚来了一步么……
E: Still too late, huh...

C: 怎么了？
E: Is something wrong?

C: 近来冗务颇多，我便尽快读完了。
E: Precisely because of these obligations, I felt compelled to read it swiftly.

C: 逐火是黄金裔的宿命。他现在的样子就像一具行尸，以其凌云的自尊…相信阿那克萨戈拉斯会做出体面的选择。
E: The Flame-Chase Journey is the destined path for the Chrysos Heirs, yet he now seems more like an empty shell. Given his strong sense of self-respect, I trust that Anaxagoras will make the right decision.

C: 啊？这…哪里暖心啦……
E: Huh? How... How was it touching...?

C: 是啊…写作、绘画、留影，想用各种方式记录下什么，仿佛是人的天性。
E: That's right... Writing, drawing, and taking photographs... It seems like human nature to try and leave records of things.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 本人谨代表奥赫玛全体公民向你致意，也为神悟树庭的遭遇表示深切遗憾。
E: I greet you on behalf of all the citizens of Okhema and express my deepest regret about what happened at the Grove of Epiphany.

C: 你不是要去找自己的壁画么？别在我耳旁喋喋不休了。
E: Shouldn't you be searching for murals of yourself? I've had enough of your prattling.

C: 真理已尽在我手…看我如何令这个有悖常理的世界天翻地覆吧。
E: I have grasped the truth with my bare hands... Watch as I turn this farcical world upside down.

C: 不知是否有所遗漏？若有，还望阁下不吝赐教，补阙拾遗。
E: Did I miss anything? If so, please be so kind as to enlighten me.

C: 欢迎回到「半神议院」中心，阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
E: Welcome back to the hub of the Demigod Council, Lord Anaxagoras.

C: 若阿格莱雅需要一位足够智慧的黄金裔，那非我莫属。但显而易见，她不需要一位随时都有可能脱离控制的黄金裔。
E: If Aglaea required a suitably intelligent Chrysos Heir, then I'm the best fit for her needs. However, it's quite evident that she has no need for a Chrysos Heir who could break free of her control at any time.

C: 格奈乌斯？从未听说过。怎地突然想起这样一个古怪的名字？
E: Gnaeus? No, not that I remember. How did you even think up such a strange name?

C: 跌宕起伏的一天终于结束。众人散去，各自整理思绪……
E: The tumultuous day finally comes to an end. Everyone disperses, each lost in their own thoughts...

C: 咦？可看你的表情……
E: Really? But the look on your face says otherwise...

C: 我们赢得了一场酣畅大败…
E: We managed to win ourselves a glorious defeat...

C: （忙了一天，该休息了……）
E: (It's been a long day. Time for a good rest...)

C: 想要留下些什么，也只能任由「死亡」将它们从指缝间带走……
E: Anything I wish to hold on to, "Death" will inevitably wrest from my grasp...

C: 说说看。
E: Go on.

C: 哎呀，知道啦，没想到灰子你这么记仇。
E: Okay, okay! I didn't know you hold grudges, Gray Mystery.
Ahhhh...!!!

C: 这里就是「斯缇科西亚」，巨龙与海浪的城邦…依照老师的猜想，不知去向的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}就隐藏在这片废墟中。
E: This is Styxia, the city of dragons and waves... Anaxa hypothesizes that the missing {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is somewhere in these ruins.

C: 愿你…活在永恒的痛苦中…！
E: I curse you... to live in eternal pain...!

C: 难道说，你们…是未能安息的灵魂？
E: Could it be that... You're all dead souls that never achieved rest?

C: 你在说什么啦！
E: What...?

C: 我不明白您的言外之意……
E: I don't quite understand what you're trying to say...

C: 而那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。
E: I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate. This is but one instance.

C: 这是，刚才的……
E: This is his...

C: 我…不清楚。
E: I... don't know.

C: 这是……
E: This...

C: 不一起见证塞纳托斯的真相吗？
E: Don't you want to know the truth behind Thanatos?

C: 这样呀。
E: I see.

C: 这、这是……
E: This... This is...

C: 自己是什么样，我难道还不清楚么？至少比你这位「房客」清楚吧。
E: I know myself better than you think I do... At the very least, better than a stowaway like you.

C: *观众议论纷纷*
E: *crowd chatter*

C: 只要，循着潮声……
E: We need only to follow the sound of the tides...
Heh...
(What's this...!?)

C: 希望他没听到你刚才的评论。
E: I hope he didn't hear your earlier assessment.

C: 那我现在就告诉你：你错了。
E: Then allow me to tell you right now that you're wrong.

C: 我怎么知道？
E: How should I know?

C: 发生什么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 数据精神体准备完了。
E: Preparation of the data spirit entity, complete.

C: 这一次，我所听到的一切，我所见到的一切，全都令我深感震撼——
E: Everything that I see and hear this time has left me shaken to the core.

C: 当然，我向来如此。
E: Of course. This is how I've always been.

C: （看来已经非常近了…死者的疆域。）
E: (Looks like I'm nearly there now... The land of the dead.)

C: 这样吗？我反倒觉得，你一点也不惊讶。感觉丹宝对「环绕大树的城池」很熟悉？
E: Is that so? You don't look the slightest bit amazed, though. Plus, you seem to be strangely familiar with the city around the Great Tree...?

C: （风堇的先祖是信仰{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的祭司，她对「天空」的禁忌了解最深。另外，阿格莱雅派她做向导，也有为将来的试炼做准备的意思吧。）
E: (Hyacine's forebears were priests who worshiped {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}. Nobody is more familiar with the taboos of the Sky Titan than her. Seeing how Aglaea has sent her here as a guide, it's possible that she plans to have Hyacine take on a trial in the future.)

C: （果然，最难以解释的还是这道「神谕」。但眼下线索太少，思考也得不出结果，先搁置一旁吧。）
E: (As I expected, the prophecy is the hardest to make any sense of. But with barely any information to go on, no matter how much I ruminate on it, it won't yield any results... I should leave this for another time.)

C: 这是怎么回事…奥赫玛的大家，还有我？连我也在老师的研究范围内？
E: What's going on...? Anaxa is conducting research on our friends in Okhema and... me?

C: …不，是已有结论了。就在刚才的死亡之旅中，我亲眼看见了答案。
E: No, I have already drawn a conclusion. In my journey unto death just now, I finally saw the answer with my own eyes.

C: 这是什么怪问题…啊，我知道了！你想套话，问我有没有喜欢的人？
E: What kind of strange question is this...? Ah, I got it! You're just trying to get me to tell you whether I like anyone, right?

C: 还有时间，我不惮让命运多等候片刻。
E: Since there's still time, I'm not worried about letting fate wait a little longer.

C: 了解到她所经历的一切以后……
E: After learning about everything she went through...

C: 触碰火种以后，塞涅俄丝不止理解了泰坦的恐惧，还看到了它的漠然。
E: By touching the Coreflame, Seliose gained insight into the Titan's fear... and glimpsed their cold indifference.

C: 此时此刻，我正在努力帮助这里的人们逃离。*我们*打开了许许多多的百界门，把大家传送到了奥赫玛，*我们*的姐妹缇宝的身边……
E: Right now, I'm doing everything I can to help people escape. We have been guiding them through the Century Gate, sending them to Okhema, where our sister Tribbie is waiting.

C: 真是…奇妙的感觉。很温热，很…强大。
E: It's a strange feeling. It's so warm and... powerful.

C: 用岁月祭司的仪器回溯平台吧，我们得用它逃离这里！
E: Use the Time Priest's instrument to rewind the platform. We have to get out of here!

C: {NICKNAME}，你能搞定吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, can you handle it?

C: 门柱…塌下来了！
E: The door's frame is coming down!

C: *请放心吧，恩师。我会替您完成这个艰巨的任务…我会补救您的怯懦带来的后果。*
E: Rest easy, master. I will shoulder this heavy burden for you... I'll address the fallout of your indecision.

C: 有点实力嘛，救世小子——不过，这功劳也得记在那天外来的灰子身上吧？
E: The Deliverer's impressive, no doubt, but some of the credit should go to that Gray Mystery from beyond the sky.

C: 喂喂？别走神呀，流浪狗！
E: Hey hey? Don't lose focus, stray dog!

C: 没时间追究原因了！失去了黎明机器的光芒，圣城很快会被黑暗压倒，人们会流离失所……
E: There's no time to dwell on the cause! Without the light of the Dawn Device, the holy city will be consumed by darkness, and countless lives will be cast adrift...

C: 我只是…还缺少风堇小姐的那份自信跟笃定。无论面对多么严重的病患或伤痛，她总是能以微笑面对……
E: I just... don't have the same confidence and certainty as Miss Hyacine. No matter how severe the illness or injury, she always faces it with a smile...

C: 缇宝大人…为何笑了？
E: Lady Tribbie... Why are you laughing?

C: 突发奇想——在我出发之前，缇宝大人——你能手把手教我归还火种时的念词吗？
E: I had a sudden thought, Lady Tribbie. Before I depart, can you teach me the words for returning the Coreflame?

C: 这是什么谜语？
E: Is this meant to be a riddle?

C: 说起来，{NICKNAME}，有件事我一直没和你们通气。还记得我们第一次去命运三相殿时的情形吗？当时，欧洛尼斯给我们出的那道谜……
E: Speaking of which, {NICKNAME}, there's something I haven't shared with you all. Remember our first trip to the Temple of the Three Fates? The riddle that Oronyx posed to us...

C: 大家小心点。
E: Eyes peeled, everyone.

C: …克莱门汀？你…别着急，快先喘口气！
E: ...Clementine? Take a breath... What's going on?

C: 那个…有没有小一码的？这双对我来说也太大了……
E: Uh... do you have a smaller size? These are way too big for me...

C: 咦？！这、这是…我的宝贝呢？！
E: Huh!? Where... where is... my treasure!?
Hmph...

C: 你在一边待着，别出声…我来会会她。
E: Stay put and keep quiet... I'll handle her.

C: 不对，我感叹这个干嘛！刚才发生的状况，我还没缓过来呢——那个可怕的女人，她到底是什么时候……
E: Wait, why am I getting all sentimental!? I haven't even processed what just happened — that horrible woman, when did she...

C: 「你在为白厄铸剑，对么？」
E: "You're forging a sword for Phainon, aren't you?"

C: 很遗憾，没人知道当时的详细状况。
E: Regrettably, no one knows the details of that moment.

C: …云石天宫的目击者看到阿格莱雅从黄金裔浴池坠落。
E: ...Eyewitnesses at the Marmoreal Palace saw Aglaea fall from the Chrysos Heir Bath.

C: 你们能这么快赶回来真是太好了…她们现在很需要有人陪伴。
E: It's great that you could come back so quickly... They need someone with them now.

C: 白厄阁下…别勉强自己。现在你的肩膀更沉重了，千万别倒下……
E: Lord Phainon... don't push yourself. You're carrying a heavier burden now. Please don't fall...

C: 「正因人群中满是如你这般卑鄙的奸宄，我才需以金线监管这圣城中的一切。」
E: "With deceitful scoundrels like you in the crowd, I have no choice but to rely on the golden thread to keep watch over everything in this holy city."

C: 备战，于黎明前。挥剑，为了明天。符合你的身份，黄金裔。
E: Before Dawn, prepare for battle. For tomorrow, wield your sword. Befits your stature, it does, Chrysos Heir.
"Dawnmaker"...

C: 寒暄到此为止。说吧，你遇上什么麻烦了，需要我这个大前辈帮忙？
E: Enough small talk. Tell me, what kind of trouble did you run into that you need me, the super-old-timer, to step in?

C: 呜…阿雅……
E: *sniffle* Agy...
Tsk...

C: 特克菈将军揭示了缇里西庇俄斯曾经留下的预言：<color=#dbc291ff>「在彩虹桥的尽头，天空之子将缝补晨昏。」</color>
E: General Ektra revealed the prophecy once-foretold by Tribios: <color=#dbc291ff>"At the end of the rainbow bridge, the Skyfolk will mend dusk and dawn."</color>

C: 不知怎么，我好像能从这简短字句中体会到些微的…悲伤。
E: I can somehow sense a hint of... sadness in those brief words.

C: 看到身负重伤的他倒在地上，血流不止…我很难用语言表达那时的复杂心绪。
E: Seeing him lying there, gravely wounded, bleeding out... I can't put what I felt at that moment into words.

C: 我们来到这里，就是为了给由她亲手开启的征程画上句号。
E: We are here to end the journey she began.

C: 这说的是天象画壁吗？不过，现在什么都看不到……
E: Is this referring to the celestial mural? But we can't see anything right now...

C: 难不倒人家，给我变——
E: No problem at all. Here goes...

C: 从地平线的尽头传来了神谕。它昭告了一个崭新的时代，一个不被泰坦神明支配，而是由凡人英雄开创的时代。
E: A prophecy echoes from the horizon's edge. It heralds the advent of a new age, one not ruled by the Titans, but created by mortal heroes.

C: 艾格勒在神话中最常见的形态，就是一只巨大的天空之眼。
E: Aquila's most common form in the myths looks exactly like a giant eye in the sky.

C: 外面可能有发疯的泰坦眷属，还是不要擅自行动了。
E: There might still be rampaging Titankin outside, so it's best not to act alone.

C: 当病态的信仰溃散，人子将迎来新生，阴晴得到弥合、晨昏不再分割。
E: When a broken faith finally disappears, the children of humanity will be reborn, the skies will mend, and the divide between day and night will fade away.

C: 你是多么单纯啊，黄昏之女…那么强大，却那么天真……
E: You are so naive, Daughter of Dusk... so powerful, yet so innocent...

C: 嘟嘟…嘟？
E: Doot-Doot... Doot?

C: 当然，一切的前提还是你能保证自己的安好！我相信，以你的力量一定可以做到。
E: All of this is only possible if you stay safe! With your ability, we believe you can do it.

C: *我们*一直都以为，折纸是一件特别快乐的事。因为每次折出一件成功的作品以后，妈妈总是会看着我们，露出宠爱的笑容。
E: We always thought there was sheer joy in origami. Every successful fold we made brought a loving smile from Mama.

C: 巨型电路已经接通了，回去检查一遍浑象仪吧。
E: The giant circuit has been powered up. Let's go back and check the celestial globe.

C: 你们以为…我没有能力将它带走？
E: You all think... I wouldn't have the power to take it away?

C: 冷静下来…仔细想想。
E: Calm down... and think carefully.

C: 直到我完成归还仪式前…请尽力营救城中的民众。
E: Until I complete the Coreflame ritual... please do everything you can to rescue the citizens in the city.

C: 行百里者半九十…
E: The final lap is always the hardest...

C: 必须弄清他们是从哪里涌入城市的……
E: We must find out where they breached the city from...

C: 螺丝咕姆先生？！
E: Mr. Screwllum!?

C: 许久未见，星穹列车的无名客。
E: It has been a while, Nameless of the Astral Express.

C: 其二：黑塔██发现了线索██——
E: Two: Herta ██ discovered a clue ██—

C: 救世主，全世的命运由您亲自定夺。
E: Deliverer, the fate of all worlds rests in your hands.

C: 明明是我的！
E: You did not! It's mine!

C: 一同他的故乡，他的过去，他的姓名。
E: His home. His past. His name. All buried beneath the soil.

C: 好像说了很难懂的话呢，其实很简单啦。
E: Maybe that was a bit too cryptic for you, but it's actually really simple!

C: 就让我们共同的伙伴，带着「救世主」一起走上天平吧？
E: Why not have our mutual friend here stand on the scales with the "Deliverer"?

C: 我会押上自己的一切。战友，与我一同，成为英雄吧。
E: I will stake everything I have. Stand with me, comrade, and we shall become heroes.

C: 你们当真觉得，好战的悬锋人会手下留情？
E: Do you honestly think Kremnoans, renowned for our love of battle, would show mercy?

C: 无妨。我明白，命运已抵达尽头了。
E: It matters not. I know, fate has run its course.

C: {RUBY_B#只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」}「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然……」{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova}"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."{RUBY_E#}

C: 还真钻进来了，不容易…都记不得上次来是什么时候了。
E: I made it! That wasn't easy... I can't remember the last time I came here.

C: 原来这才是天空被封闭的原因，翁法罗斯也只是更大的哀丽秘榭……
E: So, this is the reason the sky was sealed. Amphoreus is merely a larger Aedes Elysiae...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那就是诸位体内流淌的金血，它源自与「毁灭」同名的负创神。翁法罗斯的黄金裔，从最初就是星神燃烧宇宙的柴薪啊。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The golden blood flowing in your veins... It comes from The Blemished One, whose name is "Destruction" itself. And Amphoreus's Chrysos Heirs were, from the very beginning, fuel for the Aeon to burn the universe.</color>

C: 你们凭什么觉得自己能做到？
E: What makes you think you're capable of doing that?

C: 我们将要踏上的，可是真正的英雄之旅呀。所以……
E: What we're about to embark on is the true Hero's Journey. So...

C: 听起来，你胸有成竹？
E: Sounds like you have a plan?

C: ——肃静。
E: Silence.

C: …不。我已经找到了让轮回延续的方法。
E: ...No. I've already found a way to keep the cycles going.

C: 第 <unbreak>23570000</unbreak> 次永劫回归
E: The <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

C: 面对被病痛侵扰的患者，我可不能…露出愁容呀。
E: A healer should stay composed in front of those suffering from illness, shouldn't they?

C: 那也…不要，抛弃它。
E: Even so... don't cast it away.

C: 两千三百五十七万次轮回，两亿八千二百八十四万枚火种……
E: <unbreak>23,570,000</unbreak> cycles... <unbreak>282,840,000</unbreak> Coreflames...

C: 你终于等到{F#她}{M#他}了。
E: You finally found {M#him.}{F#her.}

C: 嗯，做个自我介绍吧——我是昔涟，「往昔的涟漪」…很好记的名字，对吧？
E: Yep! Name's Cyrene — it means "ripples of past reverie"... Easy to remember, right?

C: 真难缠，对吧？可千万别听他们的，你要坚定地走下去。
E: They never give up, do they? But don't let them sway you. Stick to your path.

C: 你必须抓住机会，把刻法勒的火种牢牢握在自己手里。智械哥一定会想方设法填上这道漏洞，别让他得逞，能否改变「再创世」的意义，是我们对抗铁墓的关键。
E: That old Intellitron will definitely do all he can to debug this error, so you have to take this chance to claim Kephale's Coreflame. Don't let him have his way. The key to suppressing Irontomb lies in whether we can rewrite the purpose of "Era Nova."

C: 别担心，她身上的谜团多着呢。就算翁法罗斯炸了，她也能裹在冰里、完好无损地飘出来。不如先担心一下你自己吧。
E: Don't worry about her. She's absolutely chock-full of mysteries. Even if Amphoreus explodes, she'll probably float out perfectly protected in a nice thick layer of ice. Worry more about yourself instead.

C: （外面的世界，恐怕再也没有这番悠闲的景象了。）
E: (A relaxed scene like this probably no longer exists in the outside world.)

C: （去阁楼等昔涟吧，或者，我可以再多看哀丽秘榭一眼……）
E: (Should I head to the attic to wait for Cyrene... or should I have one last look at Aedes Elysiae...)

C: 这么说来，{NICKNAME}拯救过那么多世界，应该早就习惯英雄这个身份啦。
E: In other words, since you've already saved so many worlds, {NICKNAME}, you should be used to being called a hero by now.

C: 本该苦苦寻找的半神，竟然在等待我们的到来。而且，她不仅知道「天外」，还提到了…{RUBY_B#创造泰坦的神明}「星神」{RUBY_E#}？
E: The demigod we needed to find was just waiting for us. And she knows of things "beyond the sky"... even {RUBY_B#Gods who created the Titans}"Aeons"{RUBY_E#}?

C: 是吗？你的眼神似乎不是这么说的。
E: First time? That's not what I gather from your eyes.

C: …我已经不是小孩子啦，吾师。
E: ...I outgrew nursery rhymes long ago, Teacher.

C: 我是奥赫玛的骑士统领，逐火军的大将，也是凯撒的近侍——
E: I'm the Knight Commander of Okhema, General of the Flame-Chase Army, and the Imperator's servant...

C: 呵，在我窥见此世…不，天外的秘密以后，翁法罗斯的神权早已无足轻重。
E: Hah, after I glimpsed the secrets of this world... no, the secrets beyond the sky, the divine authority of Amphoreus no longer held any significance.

C: 你的谏言，我收下了。
E: Your advice is acknowledged.

C: 遵命。
E: I shall tell you.

C: 拉冬、拉冬的代表大人遇刺了！快、快来人啊！
E: The... The delegate from Ladon has been assassinated! Quick, quick, someone come quick!

C: 只要不妄图扭转时代的流向…你我就都是自由的。
E: As long as you don't try to reverse the current of the times... you and I will both be free.

C: 两位贵客，留步。进入会场前，请交出随身携带的物品。
E: Honored guests, wait here for a moment. You must surrender any personal belongings you have on you before entering the venue.

C: …就是这个调！我、我突然文思泉涌！
E: ...That's exactly what I'm after! I—I'm so inspired!

C: 对了，作为交换，两位能告诉我们，凯撒在哪儿吗？
E: By the way, in return for that, are you able to tell us where the Imperator is?

C: 敬…必有回响的浪漫。
E: To... romance, which will surely be returned.

C: 呵，真是条机敏的鱼儿。
E: Hah. You're a pretty sharp fish.
...Hmm?

C: 狂饮眼前的蜜露！
E: Gulp down the honeydew in front of you!

C: 宾客们耐心不多，我打算解开幻境，前去赴宴了。
E: The guests' patience is running thin. I plan to remove the fantasia and head into the banquet.

C: 这一切都是伪装？
E: Was all of this just a performance?

C: 长话短说吧，你不在的这段时间——对于翁法罗斯而言的「这几年」里……
E: Let's keep it short. While you were gone... well, in those few years, Amphoreus...

C: （来吧，让我戴上吃灰了好几个章节的礼帽。和钟表小子高唱——普世同谐，群星共熠……）
E: (Come! Let me put on the dear hat that's been set aside for quite a few chapters! Sing with Clockie: The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright...)

C: 呵护好它，把它带向未来…交给我们的「救世主」吧。
E: Take good care of it, guide it to the future, and place it into the hands of our "Deliverer."

C: 简单点，直接告诉我：能不能做到？
E: Just tell me straight: can you do it or not?

C: 但有两个附加条件。这是最后一战，要做就做绝，别留余地。
E: But I've got two conditions. Since this is the final act, if we're doing it, we go all in. No half-measures.

C: 希望你能静静观赏幻境中的故事。于理，「救世主」有义务将此世的全貌尽收眼底；于情，眼前这出回忆正是翁法罗斯所有人命运最好的写照……
E: I hope you'll watch the stories of this fantasia closely. Logically, the Deliverer must see the world for what it truly is. Emotionally, this memory captures the fate of everyone in Amphoreus better than anything else...

C: 我向你们允诺，地上的城邦会为你们举办一场无休的宴会……
E: I promise you: On the surface, the city-states will hold a feast without end in your honor...

C: 无需多虑，在「毁灭」的棋军前，宵小之徒不过是星间尘埃。
E: Fear not. Before the troops of the Destruction, such rabble is no more than cosmic dust.

C: 凯撒已死！
E: The Imperator is dead!

C: 我本是一尾海中的鱼儿。天上的群星…与我无干。
E: I was always a creature of the sea. The stars in the sky... were never meant for me.

C: （前路在水下吗？要用欧洛尼斯宝珠，将过去的「时象仪」带来……）
E: (Is the path ahead underwater? I need the Oronyx Orb to bring back the Chrono Vessel from the past...)

C: 让那崭新的未来，如「我们」所书♪
E: Let that bright future be "As We Have Written" ♪

C: 来谈谈吧，赞达尔，猜猜在指针走过下一秒前，我们能在你的脑袋里挖出多少东西，又能想出多少种解决你的办法？
E: Let's talk, Zandar. Take a guess. How much do you reckon we can dig out of your brain before the next second? And how many ways can we find to deal with you?

C: 所以，跟着无名客好好干吧。没事记得给艾丝妲发个消息。
E: So do your best with the Nameless. Break a leg. And remember to send an update or two to Asta when you've got some downtime.

C: 为了保护你们，她拥抱了「记忆」命途。如同迷雾中的烛火，将自己耗尽。
E: She embraced the Path of Remembrance to save you two and burned away, like a lone candle in the fog.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>让我过滤你的记忆，留下合适的种子，剔除其余所有。如此，我们便能完成一场空前绝后的「再创世」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Let me filter your memories, keep the appropriate seeds, and discard the rest. That way... We'll be able to complete an Era Nova that this world has never before seen.</color>

C: （不知道{F#她}{M#他}平时都在自言自语些什么。）
E: (No idea what {F#s}he was always muttering about.)

C: ——丹恒！
E: ...Dan Heng!

C: 姬子小姐，我回来了。
E: Miss Himeko, I'm back.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>警告：对象无访问权限。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Warning: Object does not have access permission.</color>

C: 显然，那不是你我熟知的历史。也许是三千万世的某一种可能，但……
E: This is obviously not the history we know. It might be one of the possibilities in the thirty million cycles, but...

C: 「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
E: "Amphoreus won't be forgotten."

C: 又一世，遐蝶为「死亡」献上了最后的拥抱。自此，便是另一段孤独的看护。如果有人能真正抱一抱她，该多好呀。
E: Once again, Castorice offered her final embrace to Death, and from then on, she started another lonesome watch. How wonderful would it be for someone to give her a real hug...

C: 它属于第十三位泰坦，无人知晓的、孑然的神明……
E: It belongs to the Thirteenth Titan. The unknown solitary god...

C: 在斯缇科西亚的幻象中，我得知了海瑟音的故事与第一次逐火之旅的过往。在海中守候的海瑟音带我来到了涡心，而来古士也就此现身，揭露了真身——天才俱乐部#1，赞达尔。
E: In the illusions of Styxia, the tales of Hysilens and the first Flame-Chase Journey were unveiled to me. Hysilens, who had been waiting in the ocean's depths, led me to the Vortex. There, Lygus emerged, revealing his true identity — Genius Society #1, Zandar.

C: 看来你也不是全知全能嘛？
E: Looks like you aren't so omnipotent or omniscient after all, huh?

C: 翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
E: Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.

C: 逐火是不断失却的旅途——直到你闪亮登场、扭转大局。
E: Losses were a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, until your radiant arrival turned the tide.

C: 绝灭大君？铁墓？不过是「开拓」的玩具。银河已经安全了，因为——
E: Lord Ravager? Irontomb? Mere playthings in the hands of the Trailblazer. The cosmos is safe once more, because—

C: 嗯，那是？
E: Mmm? What's that?

C: 陌生的面孔，不怀好意的眼神，并非善茬。
E: An unfamiliar face with malicious eyes... definitely bad news.

C: 我转述她的原话：战事当前，贪杯误事，我就先在这儿放一瓮塔拉萨水晶宫的涌泉。
E: I'll relay her exact words: It is a mistake to drink too much before a battle, so I'll leave a jar of spring water from Thalassa's crystal palace.

C: 你的身躯…竟变得如此瘦弱。
E: Your body... has become so frail.

C: 和遗弃他的背叛者。
E: And the traitor who abandoned him.

C: 背叛者？
E: Traitor?

C: 龙裔…你愿意将它们带往新世界么？
E: Long's Scion... Are you willing to bring them all into the new world?

C: 在「永夜之帷」的记忆中，你自始至终…都是个有所保留的人。
E: In the Veil of Evernight's memories, you've always... been someone with reservations.

C: 如此便好。神权交替的刹那，此地定将分崩离析……
E: Good. When I hand over the divine authority, this place will fall to pieces.

C: 我不想听。
E: I don't want to hear it.

C: 丹恒，你…长高了？
E: Dan Heng, did you... get taller?

C: 你指「迷迷」吗？抱歉，这一路上我都没遇见她。恐怕被「长夜月」囚禁的，不止你一人。
E: You mean "Mem"? Sorry, I haven't seen her at all on this journey. Perhaps you were not the only one being held captive by "Evernight."

C: 新世界里，花海一定会绽放。
E: In the new world, the sea of flowers will surely bloom.

C: 唯有前进，才不会辜负所有黄金裔的努力。
E: Only by moving forward can we honor the efforts of all Chrysos Heirs.

C: 他的金血渗入海潮、遍及大地，为世界刻下了「毁灭」的伤痕。
E: His golden blood soaked into the ocean tides and covered the earth, etching the scar of Destruction into this world.

C: 毫无反应的窃忆者。像是被掏空了一切空余皮囊的瘪气球，在不高不低的位置漂浮着。
E: The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a deflated balloon that had been completely hollowed out, floating motionless at an unremarkable height.

C: 看来，会是一场永不落幕的欢宴呢。
E: Looks like this will be a feast that never comes to a close.

C: 不，当然不用！我早就帮大家勾选同意啦——目标：翁法罗斯！
E: Nah, just kidding! I've already checked the agreement box for everyone. And now, destination: Amphoreus!

C: 这里是仙舟联盟，通讯正常。
E: This is the Xianzhou Alliance, communications normal.

C: 「毁灭」与「智识」的交锋，不仅关乎银河存亡，更是各方势力洗牌的时刻啊。
E: The clash between Destruction and Erudition isn't just about the fate of the cosmos. It's a moment for all factions to reshuffle their cards.

C: 当然。该登机了，你先请。
E: Of course. Time to board. After you.

C: 所谓的「亲手扼杀」，原来是这么回事啊。
E: So that's what he meant by "killed that Titan with my own hands."

C: 这座监牢，说是以白厄的怒火铸成也不为过。
E: You could say this prison was forged from Phainon's fury.

C: 所有人一起，成为救世主吧！
E: Together, we'll all become Deliverers!

C: 「好自为之吧你！要是决战时唯唯诺诺，可要让全银河看笑话啦。」
E: "So pull yourself together, will you? If you freeze up during the final battle, the whole cosmos is gonna have a good laugh."

C: 我想，我已经做到了。在逐火的行列里，抬头挺胸地前进……
E: I think I've done it. I've stood tall and walked among the Flame-Chasers...

C: 「旋律，改变了……」
E: "The melody... it's changed..."

C: 可是，你却把自己引入徒劳的陷阱，甚至将自身的意义视作夙敌……
E: And yet, you led yourself into a trap of futility, treating your very purpose as your sworn enemy...

C: 放轻松，{NICKNAME}。记得深呼吸呀。
E: Relax now, {NICKNAME}. Take a deep breath.

C: 很遗憾，孩子。
E: How unfortunate, child.

C: 您误会了。「我」在诞生之初，就注定不会产生「悔恨」的情感。
E: You misunderstand. From the very beginning, "I" was never meant to feel "regret."

C: 可那道光，似曾相识……
E: But that light... it looks familiar...

C: 背负「负世」的愿望。
E: Bear the wish of Worldbearing.

C: 有斯蒂芬•劳艾德和他的骇客朋友们坐镇，权杖的屏蔽协议不会再生效了。
E: With Stephen Lloyd and his hacker friends here, the Scepter's block protocol will no longer take effect.

C: 变量的作用，莫过于此。
E: That is what a variable is for.

C: ▀▄心跳▀█钟声▄█▀响起▀▄
E: ▀▄Heartbeat ▀█Bell▄█▀Rings out▀▄

C: 在「爱」的充盈下，挥洒光吧。
E: With an abundance of "love," let there be light.

C: 毕竟，在真正为这个故事写下结局前，我也必须鼓起勇气，和你一起出发……
E: After all, before we truly compose the end of this story, I must also pluck up the courage to head off with you...

C: 见证一道视线碾碎世界的恐惧，我至今记忆犹新。
E: I still remember the terror of witnessing a single gaze crushing the entire world.

C: （冷淡）好惊讶哦。
E: (coldly) Oh wow. How shocking.

C: 为什么…你们会出现在车上？
E: Why are you folks... on the Express?

C: 也许，正因为生活在这样的环境里，阁下的拥抱才会那般温暖吧。
E: Perhaps living in such an environment made your embrace feel so warm.

C: 我答应你，昔涟。
E: I will, Cyrene.

C: 呵…那倒也合我心意。
E: Heh... That suits me just fine.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「若心灵仍有余裕，请稍许分出些温柔，轻抚身边美好的一切吧。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"If your heart still has room to spare, share a bit of gentleness and softly cherish all the beautiful things around you."</color>

C: 但错误的后果可以想象——因为「因果缺失」，有一定概率，铁墓会卷土重来。
E: But I can guess what might happen if you choose wrong. With "causality incomplete," there is a chance Irontomb could rise again.

C: 不行…得先带你出去…坚持住…！
E: No... I have to get you out of here first... Just hold on...!

C: 可是，你知道吗？当翁法罗斯的「心」诞生时，它最先看见的只是一个名字……
E: But do you know what Amphoreus saw when its "heart" was born? The first thing it saw was a name...

C: 也是我们第一次……
E: And where we first...

C: 在同一片天空下，八次月相盈亏，十三位英雄共同谱写下史诗——
E: Under the same sky, across eight phases of the moon, thirteen heroes composed an epic together...

C: 也很费力气呀。
E: And wears out the body too.

C: 光明…要远离我们了吗？
E: Is the light... leaving us behind?

C: 愿闻其详。
E: Please elaborate.

C: 真巧呢。斑驳的日光，婆娑的树影，也是人家最初的「记忆」。一个再寻常不过的清晨，村里最高大的树下……
E: What a coincidence. Dappled light coming through the leaves is my first "memory" as well. On a very ordinary early morning, beneath the village's biggest tree...

C: >>>小妖精。好朋友。嘻。再见。
E: >>> Little fairies. Good friends. Hehe. Bye bye.

C: 但现在，我不会这么做啦。
E: But I won't do that anymore now.

C: 我很幸运哦，在等待「救世主」的漫长时光中，能有你这样一位从不缺席的听众。
E: I'm actually really lucky, you know? During the long years I've spent waiting for the "Deliverer," I've always had you here as an audience.

C: 钥匙。门。故事。开心。
E: Key. Door. Story. Happy.

C: 简单。学会啦♪
E: Simple. Got it ♪

C: 可是，桃子，从刚才开始，我就不明白你说的话。
E: But Peach, I didn't understand a word you said since just now.

C: 无论如何，你们难以分离。
E: You can't be separated from her, no matter what.
███████ I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze ███████

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: ——但想要找什么乐子，我都不会拦着你。毕竟……
E: But if you wanna go look for some fun yourself, I won't stop you. I mean, after all...

C: 「军团」的入侵让这儿的主控系统瘫痪了几分钟，省了我不少工夫。
E: The Legion's invasion paralyzed the master control system for a few minutes, which was a big help.

C: 那大裤衩是奇物，不是用来穿的，何况也并非我温某人的私产，瞎比对什么！
E: Those boxers are a Curio and are not to be worn! Not to mention that they are not my personal property. What's there to check!

C: （再观察看看）
E: (Wait and see)

C: 咦？他的瞳孔正在异常放大，周身快速分泌汗液，毛发濡湿……
E: Huh? His pupils are dilating abnormally. Sweat is quickly secreting all over his body, and his hair is wet...

C: 你呆着看星星吧。
E: Maybe you can do some stargazing in the meantime.

C: 好蹩脚的演技…
E: Such terrible acting...

C: 听起来是号人物。
E: Sounds like a decent guy.

C: {NICKNAME}，你想插手这件事吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you thinking of getting involved?

C: （好像没有人在偷懒…难道「瓜农」不在这里？）
E: (I can't see anyone slacking off... Maybe Gossipmonger isn't around?)

C: 是这样，防卫科收到了「军团」残党在这附近的目击情报。
E: The Security Department received information about sightings of Legion remnants in the vicinity.

C: 你别乱说啊，我什么时候造谣过站长，莫名其妙。
E: What are you talking about? When did I start rumors about the lead researcher? What nonsense.

C: 在我默念「巴卜昂乓，心想事成」之后，我的实验工位就被炸毁了。
E: My experiment station got blown up after I recited "Babracadabra, make my wish plethora."

C: （该纪录已损坏。）
E: (Record is damaged.)

C: 基座舱段安全区。
E: Base zone safe zone.

C: 那我去告诉洛奇。
E: I'll tell Rocky then.

C: 打个比方，莱斯莉所在星域的时间，曾经和我们一样，是一条直线，那么如今，它已经被重力压成了一道巨大的峡谷。
E: For example, the time in Lesley's segmentum was once a straight line like ours. But now, it has been pressed into a huge canyon by gravity.

C: 现在，既然是你揭开了这层纱，就由你来做决定吧。
E: Now, since you have found out, the decision is up to you.

C: 如同无限时空中、滴答的钟声。我们别无选择
E: Like the ticking chimes in an infinite time and space. We have no choice,

C: …是吗？这说明他受到的打击实在是不小，可惜了那些诗歌……
E: Did he? He must be devastated. I feel sorry for those poems...

C: 好，很好。你是曾在主控舱段帮忙的年轻人？我有一项特殊任务要拜托你。
E: Good, good. Are you the young {M#man}{F#lady} who helped out in the master control zone? I have a special task for you.

C: 哈哈哈哈。
E: Ahahaha.

C: 除非实验是让希拉青春永驻…
E: Unless the experiment is to keep Sheila young forever...

C: 走到今天这个局面，都是因为我最初的实验设计太过理想——以为依靠剧本和技术，就能还原出一个栩栩如生的希拉。
E: This all happened because I was too idealistic with my initial experiment design — I thought I could restore Sheila to her original self relying only on a script and some technology.

C: 不，恰恰我认为这种剥夺是必要的。
E: No, I actually think this deprivation is necessary.

C: 慢慢来，一切都会有的。
E: Take your time. Everything will happen in due course.

C: 可惜浪费了如此精细的实验品！就算是医学诊断也无法察觉她与真人的不同。除了…在她的脖颈侧面，隐隐约约写着<unbreak>157</unbreak>的编号。
E: Alas! Even the most advanced diagnostic equipment couldn't detect the difference between her and a real person. Except... on the side of her neck, there is a vague mark with the number <unbreak>157</unbreak>.

C: …你那里还存着希拉的录像带吧？是时候把它们归还到应去的地方。
E: ...You still have Sheila's videos there? It's time to return them to their rightful place.

C: 录像带我全都带回来了。
E: I brought them all back.

C: 没错，她是一位真正的英雄。
E: Yes, she was a real hero.

C: 没问题，我嘴巴很严的。
E: No problem. My lips are sealed.

C: （从乔安的记录来看，这个模因病毒会干扰人的心智，蛊惑人进行无意义地内卷，这种病毒真是害人不浅！）
E: (From Joanne's record, it is clear that this memetic virus interferes with one's mind and manipulates people into a pointless rat race. This virus is truly vicious!)

C: 再说了，根据我的经验——主要从我自己的人生来看，不是发自内心喜爱自己研究的领域，再怎么苦干也不会有什么出彩结果的。
E: Besides, based on my personal experience, you'll never get great results in any field of research unless you are passionate about it.

C: 你是怎么猜到乔安有问题的？
E: How did you guess correctly that Joanne was the one?

C: 阿兰他没那么文艺啦！
E: ...B—But he's never written poetry before!

C: （夸大其词强调情况的急迫性）
E: (Exaggerate the urgency and importance of the situation)

C: 波少，波少他真的是太好了。此生无悔粉波少——
E: *sigh* Master Capote is so courageous... We're so lucky to be his fans...

C: 也只能从这些线索入手了。
E: Yeah, I guess that's our starting point.

C: 大哥提升自己还需要什么理由？我看你是一点都不懂他喔！
E: Brother Arlan doesn't need a reason to improve himself! You don't understand him at all!

C: 有道理…果然还是要快些找到阿兰。我必须亲自给他好好道歉才行！
E: Yeah... We need to find Arlan quickly. I need to apologize to him in person!

C: 谢谢你的肯定，螺丝咕姆先生，需要我带你四处参观一下吗？上次峰会过后，我们新开展了几个基于硅基矩阵的研究项目。
E: We appreciate your high praise, Mr. Screwllum. Would you like me to show you around? Since the last summit, we've launched several new research projects focused on silicon-based matrices.
Hey...

C: 怪不得她之前一直在翻奇物收藏目录。这段空间连接着星核收藏室，还记得吗？他们就是在那儿把星核放入你体内的。
E: No wonder she kept going through the curio collection index. This space is connected to the Stellaron room. Do you still remember it? That's where they put the Stellaron inside you.

C: 正常的。 这也只是我的主观推断。
E: Well, that's not unusual. Anyway, this is all just an assumption of mine.

C: 卡芙…卡……
E: Kaf... ka...

C: 哦不，他们留下了你…呃，这么说有些奇怪，我的意思是，在一个完全陌生的地方醒来，什么都不知道的感觉一定不好受，对吧？
E: Oh, uh... they did leave you behind. Ahem, sorry, that sounded better in my head... It must've been a terrible feeling waking up in a place that was completely unfamiliar to you...

C: 「这次能让我玩得开心点吗…之前的几次行动都很无聊呢……」
E: Can you let me have some fun this time? Our last few operations turned out to be pretty dull.

C: 螺丝咕姆，我们认识这么久了。我还是第一次……
E: Screwllum, we've known each other for a long time. This is the first time I feel that...

C: 有所耳闻。
E: I've heard of it.

C: 你说得对……
E: You're right...

C: 有种奇怪的感觉…
E: I have a strange feeling about this...

C: 再次与您交手，令人喜悦又荣幸。黑塔说这张卡带可以钓起银河里的大鱼——她的判断总是准确的。
E: It is a joy and an honor to have the opportunity to face off against you once again. Herta said that this cartridge would be able to lure in the biggest fishes in the universe — she was right.

C: 银狼，我知道你的诉求。公司的镣铐关不住你，监牢不过是又一片游戏的舞台。黑塔和我达成共识：不会再迁就你的需要了。
E: Silver Wolf, I know what you're after. The IPC's shackles won't be able to hold you and jail is but another game to you. Herta and I came to an understanding: We will no longer enable you and give you what you need.

C: 这还复杂，你当朋克洛德的骇客都是傻瓜吗？
E: You think this was complicated? Do you think the Punklorde hackers are amateurs?

C: 我需要的只是能量，能量来源的形式与你们并无差异。
E: All I need is energy. The form that energy comes in is the same as it is for you.

C: 你是最合适的人。
E: You were the most fitting person.

C: 她开始奔跑起来，穿过霓虹，越过氖光，恰如她离开故乡，奔向群星的那个晚上。
E: She starts running through the effulgent neon lights, just as she had left her homeworld that night, sprinting toward the stars.

C: 很有道理。
E: Fair enough.

C: 放过马桶圈吧！
E: Not the toilet seat!

C: 哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
E: Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.

C: 毕竟是面向整个空间站的大工程，还是得多考虑考虑，所以我又加了些新内容，想再听听你的意见。
E: After all, this is a huge undertaking for the entire space station. They will have to give it some more thought, so I added new content and want to ask for your opinion.

C: 嗯…{NICKNAME}，我最近在思考一个问题。
E: Hey... {NICKNAME}, I've been thinking about a question.

C: 我写了个脚本，没日没夜地拦截那些垃圾短信。办法原始了点，但还算有用。
E: I wrote a script to block off those spam messages day and night. It's a little primitive, but very effective.

C: 咳，就连杨叔都有些意外，这场面可不多见啊……
E: *sigh* Even Mr. Yang looks surprised — that's not something you see every day.

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 噢…帕姆想想，这么说帕姆想起来了，是有备用的东西。
E: Oh... Now that you mention it, Pom-Pom does have a backup measure.

C: 银枝说它是一盆会思考的盆栽，你不禁开始遐想——它是否真的具备思考的能力？
E: Argenti insists it's a potted plant with the ability to think, prompting you to question —does it really have intellectual capabilities?

C: 大家似乎变得消极了。
E: Morale on the Express is low.

C: 是他执意要这么做。
E: He insisted.

C: 我们不找交警对付他们就不错啦！
E: Compensation? They hit US!

C: 这可不多见！但不知道是不是好人。
E: Guests? I don't think they're here for tea...

C: 那位红头发的访客…
E: That visitor with the red hair...
Hmm...

C: 啊，我只是转述啊，没有要帮你的意思。唉，最近空间站的气氛越来越怪了，随便站队很危险的。
E: Uh, don't get me wrong, I was merely relaying information. I didn't mean I'd help you. *sigh* The atmosphere on the space station has been getting stranger lately. It's risky taking sides.

C: 暂时没有进展。
E: I haven't made any progress yet.

C: 嗯嗯，没有啦没有啦，还好的啦。
E: Heh, I'm not that wonderful. I'm just okay.

C: 带路吧。你说过这个阿德勒似乎有什么线索，但没来得及说出口。
E: Lead the way. You said Adler was on the verge of a discovery, yet couldn't confer his knowledge. Intriguing and frustrating, to say the least.

C: 那条视频很快就会在空间站传开。看着吧，用不了多久，「黑塔」就会变成一片火海。
E: That video will soon circulate, and this station's fate? Flames, nothing but flames.

C: 哼，我没在掩盖什么！倒是你鬼鬼祟祟的，到底想干嘛？
E: Hmph, I'm not hiding anything at all! You're the sneaky one! What do you want?

C: 我很信任你。
E: I do trust you.

C: 芝士流心说「阮•梅女士还未认可我是合格的生命。我还要继续努力！」啊！多么积极的芝士流心！
E: Molten Cheese Tart says, "Madam Ruan Mei still has not recognized me as a lifeform that passes the requirements. I need to work harder!" Ah! Such an enthusiastic Molten Cheese Tart!

C: 哎唷，芝士流心大人虽然看起来充满激情，但内心可是非常细腻的！
E: Oh, the honorable Molten Cheese Tart may have a crispy exterior, but deep down inside, it's incredibly sensitive and delicate.

C: 哼哼！
E: Oink oink!

C: 你喜欢芝士流心口味？
E: You like the taste of Molten Cheese Tart?

C: 接下来…我希望你陪我一同出席。
E: And now... I wish for you to attend this meeting with me.

C: 没人能拒绝星神的秘密，赞达尔也做不到。会有人回应我们的。
E: No one can refuse the secret of the Aeons, not even Zandar. We'll definitely get a response.

C: 我的生命体回收…还没完成，它们不止一个。还有一些，被存放在某个封闭的舱段。
E: The retrieval of my lifeforms isn't complete yet. There's more than just one, and some are stored in a sealed zone.

C: 记住，在舱段中央，有一个巨大的…培养皿。那里存放着我的「大麻烦」。
E: Remember, there is a giant... incubator... in the middle of the zone. That's where my "headache" is stored.

C: 学者将其视作星神力量的代行。那么，是从何时开始，又是在哪一点上，它变得比其他生命都更接近「星神」？
E: Scholars view them as the executors of the Aeons' power. So, when did it begin, and at what point did they become closer to the "Aeons" than any other lifeform?

C: （……好像比之前多了什么？）
E: (...Seems like there's something new?)

C: 不，我不会忘记你的。
E: No, I won't forget you.

C: 偶尔，我会想念#55余清涂，每逢告别，她总会给我调制一些好喝的饮品。
E: I miss member #55, Yu Qingtu sometimes. She used to always make something delicious for me to drink every time we parted ways.

C: 就像在拼图堆成的小山中寻找唯一正确的那片，过程千奇百怪，无比艰辛，却又令人感动，令人着迷。
E: It was like finding the single correct piece in a mountain of jigsaw pieces. The process was convoluted and unimaginably difficult, but it was touching and enthralling as well.

C: 地下一层，中转中枢，嘶嘶。
E: Basement One. Transit Hub. *buzz*

C: 阮•梅的口味……
E: Ruan Mei's preferences...

C: 完了，卷起来喽。
E: It's all over. The rat race now begins.

C: 怪我怪我，回家路上太激动了，把礼物的事都忘了。
E: It's all my fault. I got so excited while on the way home that I completely forgot to bring a gift.

C: 没想到这个小机器人还懂心理疗愈。
E: I had no idea this robot was trained in psychological treatment.

C: 呜、呜呜，我、我会的！我是个成熟的男子汉了！
E: Waaa! Waaa! O—Okay! I'm a big, strong man now!

C: 说实话，你是我见过的最懂品茶的人，我根据你的反馈改良出好几个爆款。
E: Honestly, I have never met someone who understands the art of tea tasting like you do. I've made quite a few extremely popular products based on your feedback.

C: 因为我们有来自「开拓」命途的微弱力量，能够适应严苛的环境。
E: Well the Trailblaze Path grants us faint power. It allows us to better adapt to harsh environments.

C: 谁要是敢找我们的麻烦，算他倒霉！
E: So, if people start creating trouble for us, they're gonna regret it!

C: （奇怪的物体…和这片雪原格格不入。）
E: (What a strange object... It seems really out of place in the Snow Plains.)

C: …欸，手机响了？是群聊吗？
E: ...Huh? Is that my phone? Must be the group chat.

C: 怎么样，{NICKNAME}？我的新礼服，感觉如何？
E: So? What do you think about my new dress, {NICKNAME}? Pretty neat, right?

C: 你们看过这幅画吗？我虽然不太懂艺术鉴赏，但大概也能从画家的笔触里看出些东西。
E: What do you make of this painting? I'm no expert, but just from the artist's strokes I can tell it's no ordinary piece.

C: 呼…真是吓了一跳，我们可是抱着参加庆典的轻松心情来的，才不想又被卷入什么奇怪的冲突里啊……
E: Whew... You scared the life out of me! We're here for the celebrations — we're not looking for more conflicts...

C: 但就事论事地说，既然贝洛伯格作为独立政体存续到了当下，那这笔债务就不能被当做坏账勾销。
E: However, objectively speaking, since Belobog has existed as an independent entity to this day, its debt cannot simply be written off.

C: …啊，有同事找我，实在不好意思啦。先走一步，有缘再见~
E: Oh, looks like one of my colleagues is after me. My apologies, but I should probably take this. Bye!

C: 喂，你们两个！是听不懂人话还是没长舌头？识相的话就给我让开！
E: Hey, you two! Cat got your tongue or something? If you knew what was best for you, you'd get out of my way!

C: 呃，两位站累了没有，要不要来旁边歇一会儿？公司员工应该能享有午休福利的吧？
E: You guys must be exhausted standing here all day. How about you take a little lunch break — I'm sure the IPC allows that, right?

C: 你不会才发现吧…多关心关心身边的同伴呀，{NICKNAME}！
E: Did it take you that long to notice, {NICKNAME}? I thought you were supposed to be the observant one!

C: 回头见啦，戍卫官！
E: See you later, Captain!

C: 她联系了你们，说明在布洛妮娅看来，这件事只有你俩才能帮上忙。我相信她的判断。
E: Bronya messaged you, which means she thinks you can help. I trust her judgment.

C: 「如果没有公司的介入，这个世界将走入末路」——对于这个结论，你是否深信不疑？
E: "If the IPC does not intervene, this world is doomed." Are you convinced of this conclusion beyond any doubt?

C: 喂，那个是秘密啦，秘密！
E: Hey! Shh! That's a secret!

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了希露瓦……
E: You tell Serval about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: …这还是在没有其它意外发生的前提之下。老实说，比起没办法亲眼见证的未来…我更在乎当下，更关心自己身边的人。
E: And that's assuming no other disasters occur. I care more about those in the present than a future I can't be sure of.

C: …真像她的作风，我大概能想象出来她是怎么和你们沟通的了。
E: ...I should've known. That sounds like Seele alright.

C: 铁卫体验营，这里报名！
E: Silvermane Guard training camp, sign up here!

C: 托帕小姐，如果你需要一个舒适的地方落脚……
E: Miss Topaz, if you need somewhere comfortable to stay...

C: 大守护者说过，会有神秘来宾前来参加煦日节的节庆活动——没想到她指的就是列车组的各位。
E: The Supreme Guardian mentioned there'd be mystery guests attending the Solwarm celebrations, but I didn't think it'd be the Express crew.

C: 能不能都冷静点？！
E: Calm down, will you!?

C: 但愿我这次的判断没出问题……
E: ...but I hope I made the right decision this time...

C: 哎…还有什么意义呢？我都已经得了绝症了 ，完蛋了，这辈子就这样了吧。
E: *sigh* ...What's the use? I'm terminal. Life'll be over before I know it.

C: 哎呀，我也只是道听途说…我也不信娜塔莎医生能干出这种事。
E: Agh, it's just something people were saying... I don't think Dr. Natasha could do something like that.

C: …他真会这么想？他难道不会希望我早点儿去陪他吗……
E: ...Do you think so? Wouldn't he want me to hurry up and join him...?

C: 我只是不太认可她的做法，缺乏效率，而且太过理想主义……
E: I just don't really approve of her methods, that's all. Too idealistic, and no real efficacy...

C: 散开，都散开！别废话了，你们改天再来吧！
E: Get lost! All of ya! Save your breath and come back some other time!

C: 多可怜啊，这些病人…好不容易找到能救命的特效药，居然还要碰上你这种强盗……
E: Those poor patients... Along comes a life-saving wonder medicine, only to be snatched away by a shameless bandit like you...

C: 娜塔莎不会放弃任何患者——
E: Natasha would never give up on a patient...

C: 现在，我宣布——
E: Now, I hereby declare...

C: 但我和他相处的时间最长，我知道，卡波特先生本性不坏，他只是拥有很多优越的条件，因此没办法理解别人的困境。简单来说，他只是被运气「宠坏」了。
E: But I have been with him for the longest time. I know that Mr. Capote is not a bad person in nature. He is just naturally gifted in many aspects, so he can't understand other people's difficulties sometimes. In short, he is just spoiled by fate.

C: 我有棒球棍。
E: I have a baseball bat.

C: 我自认为策划得非常缜密，没想到还是被你察觉了。
E: I thought I was careful, but you still noticed.

C: 今后还请多回黑塔来看看。别忘了，这里始终有你倾力建设的痕迹，还有你曾倾心帮助过的那些人。
E: Please come back to the space station more in the future. Don't forget, there are a lot of people who've received your help here, and many traces of your hard work throughout the place.

C: 你是？！
E: It's you?

C: 那边看热闹的，也都散了吧！
E: Hey everybody! Nothing to see here, let's bounce!

C: 对不起，这么说不太礼貌。他说过…对任何人都要时刻保持礼貌。
E: Sorry, it's not polite to say that. He said... gotta be polite, to everyone, at all times.

C: （继续保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: …果然。这块地砖没被砌进地里，也是人为改装过的、暗格一类的东西。查宝大概是因为这个把它判定成「被藏起来的东西」了吧。
E: ... Just as I thought. This floor tile was not built into the ground. It was also artificially modified and concealed. It's probably because of this that Findie judged it as "something hidden."

C: 你解决得倒也挺轻巧嘛，不愧是和前任大守护者斗智斗勇的人。
E: You handled that with such elegance. Looks like you truly are worth your salt.

C: 还记得我之前和你说的，有关我的养父母的事吗？
E: Remember my adoptive parents I mentioned to you a while ago?

C: 这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}说得对，贝洛伯格的城墙外遍地都是危险……
E: This {F#young lady}{M#young gentleman} is right. Danger is everywhere beyond the walls of Belobog...

C: 我不知道。这只是我脑海里一闪而过的想法而已。
E: I don't know. It's just something that suddenly occurred to me.

C: 我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。
E: I knew you'd pick the right flowers. Mom and dad will be so happy.

C: 你不会在动什么歪脑筋吧……
E: You aren't getting any funny ideas, are you?

C: 你知道文物失窃的事吗？
E: Do you know anything about the stolen museum artifacts?

C: 「有点野心，干一次大事」…从有钱的公子哥嘴里说出来，感觉不太对劲啊。
E: "Be ambitious in life, do something big for once..." Coming from the mouth of a wealthy gentleman, that sounded rather curious to me.

C: 如果诺尔伯特真的如华劳斯所说，已经连续几天不见踪影了，他身边一定有侍者知道那位公子的去向。
E: If what Wallace said is right, then Norbert must have been missing for several days already. There must be someone who knows where he is.

C: 嘘…！{NICKNAME}，里面有人在说话，我们听听看！
E: Shh...! {NICKNAME}, there are people talking inside. Let's see if we can hear them!

C: 报出通行口令，否则就滚远点！这里不是小市民逛街的地方！
E: Say the password or get out of here! This isn't any old shopping street, y'know!

C: 要是那些小朋友没有四处乱扔零食包装就更好了…这才多一会儿啊，我已经捡到三包吃到一半的雪地跳跳糖了。
E: Still, it'd be nice if those kids would stop littering... It's barely lunchtime and I've already picked up three half-eaten packs of snow-white popping candy.

C: <unbreak>500000</unbreak>信用点！
E: <unbreak>500,000</unbreak> credits!

C: 作为交换，还请你高抬贵手，别跟铁卫说起我的事…就说你扑了个空，反正他们也不会为难你这大英雄的，对吧？
E: In exchange, I only ask that you please don't tell the Silvermane Guards about me... Just tell them you missed the culprit. You're a big hero — they won't give you a hard time about it, right?

C: 在空荡荡的客房里等了一会儿……
E: You wait for a while in the empty room...

C: 虽然…但是…不用照看诊所吗？
E: Yeah... But shouldn't you be watching the clinic?

C: 好，那{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}先忙。
E: Sure. Come back here when you're ready, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 为什么要叹气……
E: What's with the sighing...

C: 为了她，你再考虑一下？
E: Can you reconsider... for Bronya's sake?

C: 哎…行吧行吧，把那个申请表给我……
E: *sigh*... Fine, I'll do it. Just hand me the application form...

C: 你怎么不自己写？
