E: Why don't you write it yourself?

C: 对了，我再确认一下，那个叫布洛妮娅的大小姐…真的是银鬃铁卫吗？
E: Oh, I wanted to ask you — that Bronya girl... Is she really a Silvermane Guard?

C: 就这样吧。我还有事要向首领报告，不陪你们了。
E: Anyway, I've got stuff to report to the chief. See you around.

C: 只能说时间不巧，我正好在那个时候去采购食材了——要不然谁想卷进这破事里来？
E: It's just that I happened to be out shopping for ingredients at that time. Otherwise, who'd want anything to do with this kind of thing?

C: 是你把老爹的探测器偷走了吗？
E: Did you steal daddy's detector?

C: 喂！你到底靠不靠谱啊？
E: What! Can I even count on you?

C: 你们刚才干什么去了？
E: Why, what happened?

C: ——哎哟，别动手！你消消气，别这么激动，有话好好说——
E: —Hey, calm down! Take it easy. No need to get physical with me. We can just talk it over—

C: 我好像听过同事讲过类似的故事，没想到这藏宝图居然在你手里，真行啊。
E: I seem to have heard a colleague telling me a similar story. I'd never guess the treasure had fallen into your hands. You sure have your ways!

C: 我们尽力了，交给时间吧。
E: We did all we could. Now it's a matter of time...

C: 当然，毕竟想要的东西不可能自己钻出来嘛。
E: Of course I do. It's not like the stuff we need is gonna come crawling out.

C: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
E: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

C: 我啊…也没什么好羡慕的。
E: I... I'm not as cool as you think.

C: 我们很幸运。
E: We're really lucky to see it.

C: 听着不错～那就这么定了。现在暂时解散，夜里再见咯。
E: Sounds good! That's settled then. Let's part ways for now and rendezvous later tonight.

C: 这幢建筑，还有这些小孩子的游艺设施…我见过。
E: This building, this playground equipment... I've seen it all before.

C: 我以前住在这里——就在筑城者将我带走，可可利亚大人收养我之前——我住在这里！我…是下层区的人。
E: I—I used to live here... B—Before the Architects took me away, before Madam Cocolia adopted me... I used to live here! I'm... an undergrounder.

C: 那真是太好了，谢谢希儿姐姐……
E: Great, thank you, Miss Seele...

C: 放肆，他敢威胁鼹鼠党的首领？
E: How dare he threaten the boss of The Moles!

C: …是尤利安？快，上去看看！
E: ...Julian? Quick, let's go see!

C: 去把剩下的孩子找出来吧。
E: Well, we better go and find them.

C: 虎克，尤利安……
E: Hook, Julian...

C: 应该不会有人故意在铆钉镇做这种事…难道是帕斯卡自己收集了这些书页，放在一起了吗？
E: Is there someone here in Rivet Town doing this...? Or could Pascal have collected the pages and put them together?

C: 莫非真是被裂界生物附体了…？
E: Could it be possessed by a Fragmentum creature...?

C: 哼，他是个机器人，听得懂什么？直接砍翻那坨废铁最快了！
E: Hmph, he wouldn't understand — you're forgetting he's a robot. It'd be faster to smash him to scrap metal!

C: 怎么说，铁卫丫头？我们这一圈人里，就你没有必须跟史瓦罗死磕到底的理由。我倒想听听你的打算。
E: What about you, Miss Silvermane? You're the only one here that isn't compelled to do or die with Svarog. I'd like to hear your plan.

C: 「内燃机说唱大赛」的总冠军是？
E: Who is the reigning champion of the Internal Combustion Engine Rap Tournament?

C: 回答正确。
E: Correct answer.

C: 三月，伸手。
E: March, put your hand out.

C: ——哎哟喂，疼疼疼……
E: ...Ah! Owwww...

C: 是在…很久之前，听说是上下层区刚封闭的时候……
E: It was... a long time ago. The same time the Underworld was sealed off, I think...

C: 就直接告诉她吧！我们是从别的星球来的！
E: ...Just tell her already! We come from a different planet!

C: 史瓦罗先生！请不要——
E: Mr. Svarog! Please, don't—

C: 怎么，你紧张了？
E: ...What's up, nervous?

C: 奥列格，他一直以来都在做我的「代理」，帮我处理下层区明面上的各种事务。
E: Oleg has always acted on my behalf — he helps me deal with all manner of problems in the Underworld.

C: 喂，你说谁丑呢？快收回你的话！
E: Hey, who are you calling ugly? Take that back!

C: 怎么？不想让我占到便宜是吧？那我倒要看看你们这玩偶里面藏着什么玄机，哈！
E: Don't want me to profit from your item, huh? Well in that case, I'm definitely gonna solve the mystery of your teddy bear, haha!

C: …「不感兴趣」？
E: ..."Not interested"?

C: 哟，新来的小屁孩，看来我也得帮你长长记性！大哥，我看{F#她们}{M#他们}像是有钱人，抢{F#她们}{M#他们}吧！
E: Huh, looks like two new brats showed up. We'll just have to teach you a lesson as well! Boss, they look rich. Let's rob them too!

C: 奶奶，拍卖会上有一个大熊玩偶，我们能买下来吗？
E: Can we buy the teddy bear at the auction, grandma?

C: 啊…希望这些钱就够了，虎克担心会拍不到探针……
E: Hmm... I hope this money is enough to buy the probe...

C: 走吧，荣誉队员！我们回拍卖会现场去。
E: Let's go, honorary member! Back to the auction.

C: 七百五十！各位听到了吗？这就是稀世珍宝的魅力啊！七百五十冬城盾一次！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak>! Did you hear that, everyone? That's what a one-of-a-kind treasure costs! <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going once!

C: 醒醒，这不是梦！
E: Wake up! This isn't a dream!

C: 它是不是一直在说…
E: Was it saying...

C: 嘿嘿～帕斯卡，好乖好乖。
E: Hehe, Good boy. Pascal.
█Failure█3██. █Back█Rivet1██!█fail██-ure██?

C: 冷静一下，克拉拉。不必急着给出结论。
E: There, there Clara. There's no need to rush to a conclusion.

C: 他的方案风险可控。
E: His solution is the safest.

C: 如果{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}准备好做出选择了，就告诉克拉拉吧。
E: Tell me when you're ready to make a decision.

C: 帕斯卡，为了帮你治病，我们请来了史瓦罗先生——他会帮你恢复健康的。
E: Pascal, we've got Mr. Svarog to help treat your illness. He'll help you recover.

C: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}！你，生活，愉快！帕斯卡，开心！
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! Your, life, happy! Pascal, happy!

C: 你们不是来做检修的吗？怎么在这里乱晃？
E: Aren't you the maintenance people? What are you doing over here?

C: 只要获得这台设备的权限，我们就能操作机关栈桥的终端。
E: As long as we can gain access permissions to the hub, we can operate the gear bridge terminals.

C: 我知道「星核」，你身后那几个犯人就是为它而来，但守护者大人已经对我说出了真相！这几人别有用心，想要偷窃筑城者的宝物。
E: I know about the Stellaron. It's exactly what the fugitives behind you are seeking. But the Madam Guardian has already revealed the truth to me! These people have ulterior motives, Serval. They want to steal this treasure from the Architects.

C: …布洛妮娅小姐？
E: ...Lady Bronya?

C: 咋办？哼，我告诉你咋办——就算真出了什么事，黑锅也是你们技术部来背。
E: What happens? Hmph, I'll tell you... even if something really happens, your Technology Division will take the blame!

C: 我感受不到过去，也看不见未来。我好像在一片雪地里独自漂泊，四周都是一模一样的黑夜。
E: I can't feel the past, and I can't see the future. I seem to be drifting alone in a blizzard, surrounded by nothing but darkness.

C: 于星空中更加宏伟的存在而言，千年的光阴不过一粟，渺小种族的成就毫无注目的价值。
E: To those entities of greater magnificence in the heavens above, a thousand years is but a passing moment, the attainments of insignificant beings nothing more than a footnote.

C: 但是，「存护」的克里珀——祂难道不是你所说的「宏伟存在」之一吗？一直在庇护着贝洛伯格的…不正是祂的力量吗？
E: But, Qlipoth the Preservation... Are THEY not one of the magnificent entities you speak of? Is it not THEIR strength... that has sheltered Belobog this entire time?

C: 放任敌人不管的话，我们有可能遭到前后夹攻。
E: If we avoid the enemy, we might be ambushed further in.

C: 到时候后悔就来不及了——就在这里击败它吧。
E: It'll be too late for regrets then... Let's defeat this one here.

C: 希儿，你能将「星核」被封印的消息带给下层区的大家吗？告诉他们，封锁很快就会结束…很快就能自由地呼吸了。
E: Seele, can you tell everyone in the Underworld that the Stellaron has been sealed? Tell them the blockade will soon be over... and they'll breathe freely again soon.

C: 活在！
E: in...

C: 哈，痛快。唯一的遗憾是看不到那家伙的表情……
E: ...Happy. I just wish I could've seen the look on her face.

C: 斯捷潘先生走了…他们也走了。所有人都离开了。
E: Mr. Stefan is gone... they've all gone. Everyone.

C: 那些箱子谜题和你有什么关系？
E: What's your connection to the box puzzles?

C: 真不想去啊…
E: I really don't want to go...

C: 不过，你怎么突然想起要调查这段历史？是出什么事了吗？
E: What got you suddenly interested in researching that history anyway? Did something happen?

C: 那么这里就拜托你了。
E: I'll leave it to you here.

C: 现在就是个好机会。
E: This is a good chance to do so.

C: …你能一句话说全吗？
E: ...Can you finish your sentence in one go?

C: 梅姐说了什么。
E: Mei's testimony.

C: 你的推理应该没有问题，走吧，我们去迴星港抓捕犯人。
E: Your inference seems right. Let's go to Stargazer Navalia to catch the suspect.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，我才明白，原来梅姐提心吊胆的，并不是她有多舍不得这份工作。
E: {NICKNAME}, I just realized that Mei is not worried about losing her job.

C: 仙舟上没有老无所依的故事吗？
E: So Xianzhou has no popular stories about the old and the helpless?

C: 你在研究什么？
E: What are you researching?

C: （告知陶德所要的药材一事）
E: (Recount about the ingredient Todd wants)

C: 你可是我的得力助手，全程配合了我的考察。检举我，除了让你的报酬落空外，对你有什么好处？
E: You have been my capable assistant and helped my investigation from the start to the end. You will gain nothing from reporting me — except losing out on your reward.

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: 我拍完照片了。
E: The pictures are all done.

C: 至少你的忧郁转化成了诗句…
E: At least your melancholy can be transformed into verse...

C: 非得加点儿战斗内容是吧？！
E: You really want to fight it out!?

C: 是题材和对象。
E: It's about subject and theme.

C: 是情感和意涵。
E: It's about emotion and meaning.

C: 唉，我真想带你走！
E: Oh, I really want to take you with me!

C: 即便人事错迁，谋生艰难，但父母面对孩子即将远行，仍是关怀备至。拳拳依恋之情，几分惆怅，尽在隐忍与不言之中……
E: Even if life is full of misfortunes and hardships, Parents always care deeply when their children leave. Their love and attachment, mixed with a tinge of sorrow, Are all expressed in their silence and restraint...

C: 好了，好了，没事学点好的。你以为我愿意这么五个字五个字说话吗？沟通效率太低了。
E: Hey, learn some manners when you've got downtime. Do you think I'm happy speaking in that rhythm all the time? It's so inefficient.

C: 这样的同心锁吗？
E: Is the lock similar to this?

C: 你听说过孤屿这个人吗？
E: Have you heard about someone named Guyu?

C: 我听过孤屿的名字，好像是位持明族诗人。静斋以前可没少提过他。
E: I've heard of him. I think he was a Vidyadhara poet. Jingzhai used to talk about him a lot.

C: …你不必再问我了。
E: ...Please stop bothering me.

C: 嗯。我就是蘑菇。
E: Yes. I'm a mushroom.

C: …算了，我不是蘑菇了。但是请让我继续悲伤地躺在这里。
E: ...Forget it. I'm no longer a mushroom, but please let me lie down to heal my broken heart.

C: 能给{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}分享一下吗？
E: Can you share your story with a fellow {F#sister}{M#brother}?

C: 但，你帮我把礼物带到，就是横跨宇宙，把两颗心、还有两个相隔无数光年的世界连在了一起。这…多么神圣。
E: But if you help me with this gift, you will be crossing the universe, joining two hearts, two worlds lightyears apart together. That would be so... reverent.

C: 你只是觉得听着很有意思吧。
E: You must find it amusing.

C: 我不知道你有什么目的，但是我先说清楚了，黛青小姐姐从来没有搞过诈骗，我们都是心甘情愿把钱打给她的。
E: I don't know what you're trying to achieve by coming here, but let me tell you something. Ms. Daiqing has never scammed us, we are the ones sending her money willingly.

C: 没来得及和狐仙亲密交谈…
E: I didn't get to talk deeply with the foxian beauty...

C: 来吧，掏出你的手机，咱们一块看看「她」玩什么把戏。
E: Bring out your phone, let's see what trick "she" is playing.

C: 我去跟温符瑞科员聊聊，让他头脑清醒清醒，看看「美丽狐仙聊天」这种低级骗术到底是怎么一回事。
E: I will go chat with Wen Furui and talk some sense into him. I'll teach him about the rudimentary scamming technique that the Foxian Beauty Chat employs.

C: 对对对，我们是来找一位知心网友，在这个地方碰面。
E: That's right, we're here to meet an online friend. We agreed to meet up here.

C: 我还以为你肯定会很伤心呢，没想到你恢复得这么快。
E: I thought you'd be more depressed than what you seem to be right now. I didn't think you'd bounce back so quickly.

C: 有进展之后再告诉我吧。
E: Let me know if there are any new developments.

C: 我的老师，贝尼尼一生热爱仙舟文化，他曾经写信向我描述过鳞渊境中奇异的生态和充满生命力的水体。
E: My teacher, Bernini, was a fan of Xianzhou culture all his life. He once wrote to me, describing the peculiar ecology in Scalegorge Waterscape and the water that was full of vitality.

C: 可惜，文化研究从来都是冷门领域，没有亮眼的成果就意味着没有经费。到最后，老师羞于见人，再也没有回学会任教，不知去哪儿高就了。
E: Unfortunately, cultural study has always been a niche thing. Without an impressive result, a study would not be funded. In the end, my teacher never returned to his teaching post out of embarrassment and left to work elsewhere.

C: 毕竟咱俩身上有着相同的勇气，学士研究未知，而无名客奔向未知。对吧？
E: After all, both of us have the same kind of courage. While we scholars study the unknown, the Nameless pursue the unknown, right?

C: （丹恒，呃不，丹恒的前世，呃不，丹恒前世的前世的前世…留下的文物。真是认识了个了不得的朋友啊。）
E: (This is an artifact left by Dan Heng... Errr, no, by Dan Heng's previous incarnation... Errr, actually, by his previous incarnation's previous incarnation... Seems I've made a remarkable friend indeed.)

C: 你明白了什么？
E: What do you understand?

C: {NICKNAME}，行行好，帮老夫去拿回那本笔记好么？
E: {NICKNAME}, could you do me a favor and help me retrieve my notebook?

C: （陶德要找的持明卵…啧，不同持明卵之间的体积差距也太大了吧……）
E: (Todd is looking for a Vidyadhara egg. Those eggs differ so much in size...)

C: （检举陶德）
E: (Report Todd)

C: 我刚刚在<color=#dbc291ff>龙尊雕像</color>那儿等了一会儿。有个一言不发的人一直看着这里，我以为是十王司的人，就先躲到这儿了。
E: I was just hanging out over at the <color=#dbc291ff>high elder statue</color> and there was this guy, completely silent, who couldn't take his eyes off me. I thought he could be from the Ten-Lords Commission, so I snuck over here.

C: 对了，我把自己的实验数据都记录下来了，想怎么处理，转交给我的弟子也好，销毁它也罢，甚至是给仙舟人…一切都由你处置。
E: By the way, I've recorded all the data from my experiments here — whether you want to pass it on to my apprentices, destroy it, or even hand it over to the Xianzhou authorities... The choice is yours.

C: 龙女…不是什么职位。只是大部分人对那位小姐的爱称罢了。
E: A Dragon Lady... isn't an official position. People address her that way out of love.

C: 药王怀慈，长生不老！
E: Clemency of Sanctus Medicus, the Eternity's pure birth!

C: …怎么可能。
E: ...How is that possible?

C: 你不知陶德未来有何打算，但你隐隐感到你们的命运仍有交汇之处。
E: You're not sure about Todd's future plans, but you somehow feel that your destinies will still intertwine somewhere.

C: …我的声音…怎么会变成这样……
E: Why is my voice... like this...?

C: 我看看我该怎么办？阴阳表里，寒热虚实……
E: What should I do? Serious imbalances of yin and yang, cold and heat...

C: 本小姐姑且还在逃亡，你有没有什么推荐的好地方？
E: *sigh* Anyway, do you know any good hiding places? I'm still on the run...

C: 小姐的称谓可不敢当，妾身不过是白露小姐身边区区一个侍女罢了。但接下来我要向大人提出一个不情之请……
E: You need not address me as "Miss" — I am but one of Miss Bailu's maids. Then again, if I may be so bold as to make a humble request...

C: 将军在此养病，倒是对谁见了我们一清二楚。
E: Your injury hasn't dulled your instincts, general — the Preceptors and the Commission seem deeply concerned.

C: 将军，你怎么看这事？
E: General, what do you think about this?

C: 他们本就是冲着我来的，反倒是我害你受了牵连。
E: They came for me — I'm sorry you got dragged into it.

C: 没错，看来已经打过招呼了呀，希望她比我更加称职。
E: Yes, I suppose you must have met her already? I hope she is more competent than I was.

C: 棺椁。
E: Coffin.

C: 其实有个问题，刚才我没问出口…怎么说呢，我总觉得杨叔不是那种凭「直觉」下判断的人……
E: ...I did wanna say something, though. Umm, I don't think Mr. Yang is the kind of person to make a judgment based only on instinct...

C: 罗刹穿过街道，走进了一个奇怪的角落。那里看起来很危险，但他似乎满不在乎，只拿着一把剑就踱步走了进去。
E: Luocha crossed the street and turned into a strange corner. It looks dangerous there, but he didn't seem to care at all. He paced in with nothing but a sword in hand.

C: 是啊，这发色都不一样。
E: True, their hair color is completely different.

C: 大毫他们可能并不清楚这个「危险品」是什么，但我们都清楚，那就是「星核」。
E: Dahao and the others are probably not aware of what that "dangerous object" might be. But we know for a fact that it's the Stellaron.

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们家杨叔从来不把情绪写在脸上，但我感觉他是不是有点…不安？
E: {NICKNAME}, I know Mr. Yang never wears his heart on his sleeve, but do you get the feeling he's a little... restless?

C: 这东西…之后应该有用，最好先别扔掉。
E: You'd better keep it. This thing... may be useful in the future.

C: 我还想问呢。
E: Same question.

C: （…算了，就这样吧。）
E: (...Nevermind.)

C: 这是我的全部积蓄，一共九千六百七十二万信用点。我把钱都给你，请你让我见见你的老板。
E: Here, this is all I have: <unbreak>96,720,000</unbreak> credits. Take it, and bring me to your boss.

C: 到了！仙舟罗浮最地道的小吃…其实是饮料啦！就在这个自动售货机里。
E: We're here! The thing about the most authentic snack on the Xianzhou Luofu is... it's a drink! And it's inside this vending machine.

C: 其实没关系吧…都是几十年前的东西了，对你们异邦人来说，大半辈子都过去了。
E: It should be fine — this is from decades ago. For you travelers, that's more than half a lifespan.

C: 其实我早猜到了…
E: I kinda guessed this myself...

C: （这件圣物似乎可以证明驭空对「巡猎」的虔信…晴霓认为这代表驭空对斗舰飞行士的生涯尚怀眷恋。）
E: (This divine object is a testament to Yukong's devotion to The Hunt... Qingni believes it's a sign that Yukong still misses the life of a fighter pilot...)

C: 不久后，我们就成了天舶司最为精锐的斗舰飞行士。那生活谈不上轻松，甚至称得上残酷——
E: We soon became the most elite fighter pilots of the Sky-Faring Commission. It wasn't an easy life... you could even say it was a cruel one.

C: 是…帝弓司命的神矢……
E: ...The Reignbow Arbiter's divine arrow...

C: 等你好久了，是怎样的包裹啊？
E: What took you so long? What kind of package is it?

C: 梁沐肯定欺骗了她！
E: No way, Liangmu must've tricked her!

C: 出示卡芙卡的短信
E: Show Kafka's message.

C: 您能代替我去吗？
E: Can you go instead of me?

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 「艾利欧能窥见未来，却无法干涉你的选择；我们都是『命运的奴隶』，可我希望你不是。如果你真的拥有自由意志，保持下去。以自己的意志抵达那个结局，我就是喜欢这样的你。」
E: "Elio can see the future, but he can't interfere with your choice. We are all 'Destiny's Slaves,' but I hope you are not. If you really have free will, hold on to it. Reach the ending of the story in your own way. I like you for this."

C: 嗯，不用担心后果，我会处理。
E: Uh-huh. Don't worry, I'll take care of any repercussions.

C: 他是一个长生种，据说以前是仙舟的剑首。
E: He's a long-life species, apparently he was Sword Champion of the Xianzhou at some point.

C: 我的话有那么消极吗？不，我们相信存在是有意义的，但意义由我们自身赋予，而非选择。
E: Do I sound that negative? No. We believe that existence has meaning, but that meaning is bestowed by ourselves, not by choices.

C: 我以前是什么人？
E: Who am I?

C: 黑塔失去兴趣后，这件事就被她忘了，但它记载在螺丝咕姆的数据库里，银狼尝试骇入螺丝星的时候，把它找了出来。
E: As soon as Herta got bored, she forgot about the whole thing, but all her research was recorded in Screwllum's database. Silver Wolf retrieved it when she hacked into Planet Screwllum...

C: 很聪明，{NICKNAME}。不过，牺牲一个问题来证明上一个答案是真是假，值得吗？…我不好说。
E: Very clever, {NICKNAME}. But was it worth sacrificing a question to determine whether the last answer was true or false? ...Tough to say.

C: 我是景元将军请来的贵客！
E: I am General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest!

C: 你是何人，也敢大呼小叫？
E: Who do you think you are, yelling like this?

C: 胡言乱语。众兄弟，将这人拿下！
E: Nonsense. Everyone, take them down!

C: 杨叔，别想了，办正事呢…
E: Focus, Mr. Yang. We've got work to do...

C: 到处都有人受伤……
E: There are wounded everywhere...

C: 小女子是罗浮天舶司商团接渡使「停云」。敢请教恩公尊姓大名？
E: My name is Tingyun. I'm the Amicassador for the Luofu Sky-Faring Commission merchant guild. May I venture to know the illustrious names of my heroes?

C: 你们仙舟有习俗叫：落叶归根，不是么？
E: I remember that the Xianzhou has a custom of burying its dead close to home, no?

C: 似乎认得。
E: I think so.

C: 从哪儿开始呢？是先去「迴星港」？还是「工造司」？
E: Where should we start? Should we go to Stargazer Navalia first? Or the Artisanship Commission?

C: 走吧。接下来，我们去工造司。
E: Let's go. The Artisanship Commission is next.

C: 喔？瞧你的样子，是想医好眼睛，还是别的什么病？
E: Oh, I see. Are you here for your eyes? Or is it something else?

C: 呸呸呸，是我多嘴啦，丹鼎司医士不挑病人。大姐姐，请您把手伸出来，咱们先从诊脉开始。待会再服下些透影虫，让我仔细瞧瞧。
E: Bah, who cares. The healers of the Alchemy Commission don't get to pick and choose their patients. Give me your hand — we'll start by checking your pulse. You'll need to take some translucence worms so I can take a closer look.

C: 当年逃离罗浮，我曾想过放弃复仇，抛下一切。但随着岁月增长，它越来越清晰，几乎成了与我朝夕相伴的老朋友，时时刻刻在耳畔呢喃。
E: I did think about giving up on revenge and letting go of everything when I fled the Luofu years ago. However, as time passed, it became more and more clear... It was like an old friend that accompanied me every passing day, always nagging in my ear.

C: …哦，「神策将军」果然名不虚传。
E: I... Well, they don't call you the Divine Foresight for nothing, General.

C: 我试过，除了在你身上多留些伤口，我帮不了你更多。
E: I have tried. Besides inflicting more wounds on your body, there is nothing else I can do for you.

C: 这就…完了？行动记录里也没有下文了？
E: And that's... the end? There's nothing else in the operations log?

C: 敌我对峙的感应有如天平之微妙，一侧微倾，另一侧必挟势而上。抓住这稍纵即逝的机会，狼首人模糊成一团灰色的暴风，裂地而来。
E: The subtle balance between the two sides is hard to maintain. One would take their advantage precisely when they get the chance. The wolf-head man soared forward as a mass of gray storm.

C: 我能得到什么好处吗？
E: So, what do I get out of it?

C: 你还真是个天才…
E: You really are a genius...

C: 不过这些事就让我们来操心吧。暂时还不需要你处理这些事…当然，你早晚也要负责处理这些问题，这是莳者的义务。
E: *sigh* Your work here is done — we'll take it from here... Of course, as a fellow disciple, there will come a time when you too will be tasked with resolving such issues — one among many duties of the Disciples.

C: 紫月季大人，这就是我跟你提到过的灰牡丹。是一位很可靠的莳者。
E: Mauve Moon, this is the reliable disciple I mentioned to you — Gray Peony.

C: 灰牡丹，这位是紫月季大人。长乐天地区的负责人。
E: Gray Peony, this is Mauve Moon — the head of our operations in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 况且，卧底也不能真的服下那些药王秘传的丹药，吃了那东西，这辈子可就全完了。
E: An agent can't actually consume those pellets of the Disciples... doing so would mean the end of their life as they knew it.

C: 呵呵，没想到简简单单几步路，横生这么多波折。
E: Hehe, I did not expect such a short journey to be filled with so many twists and turns.

C: 洪炉被卷起来了…
E: The Creation Furnace is utterly entangled...

C: 你不明白，我的安危倒在其次，唉……
E: You misunderstand, it's not my safety I'm concerned about...

C: 好师弟，想想今天之后咱能不能有命活下去吧。
E: Y'know, Ziming, I say we focus on surviving today for now.

C: 建木重生，势必引来众多祸患。云骑军定在毗邻「建木」的丹鼎司，向那边去即可。
E: The rebirth of the Ambrosial Arbor was bound to bring calamity... The Cloud Knights must be at the Alchemy Commission next to the Arbor. You should head the same way.

C: 走了这一路，舍不得和我们分开了吧。那咱们走。
E: Aww, you just can't bear to see me go, huh? Come on then, let's go together.

C: 现在是桑博旅馆的时代。
E: Now is the age of the Sampo Hotel.

C: 这六相之冰真是奇特…
E: This Six-Phased Ice is really weird...

C: 将军大人？
E: General?

C: 苦的才对身体好啊！
E: Bitter tea is good for your health!

C: 我知道了。那么，开始吧。
E: I understand. Let's do this.

C: 你曾是一位巡海游侠，你与同伴为了抵抗虫群残余而鏖战，你在爱墨瑞得救援行将被黑洞吞没的世界，你粉碎过原始博士精心罗织的阴谋。
E: You were once a Galaxy Ranger engaged in a bitter fighting battle with the remnants of the Swarm. You rescued a planet in the Emerald system that was about to be swallowed by a black hole, smashing through Dr. Primitive's carefully-laid plans.

C: 对了，那位优雅的女士临行前还有一句赠言——
E: Oh yes, I nearly forgot — that elegant girl mentioned something before she left—

C: 别担心，我们有两个人。
E: Don't worry, there are two of us.

C: 我不是在和你开玩笑，我要说的也不是什么荒诞不经的奇闻……
E: I'm not joking around, and I'm not making up some crazy story...

C: 危险？依我的愚见，真正危险的永远是挥动武器的手。
E: Dangerous? In my humble opinion, the real danger is always the hand wielding the weapon.

C: 美丽的小姐，若你执意要夺走受我保护之人…之物，请和我进行一场符合骑士礼仪的公平对决。
E: Fair lady, if you're intent on taking away this person... this sword that is under my protection, please engage me with a fair duel according to knightly etiquette.

C: 这个世界的居民还在用驼兽拉车，让他们帮忙修好星槎显然不可能。
E: The people on this planet still use beasts to pull their carts. Obviously, there's no way they can help us fix the starskiff.

C: 为什么？你还在坚持什么？！你和你那支可怜的杂牌军已经打了三十多年仗了。你们从没赢过。你播种的根本不是「反抗」，只是「绝望」罢了。
E: Why? What's the point!? You and your sorry excuse for an army have been fighting for over three decades, and you haven't won a single battle! What you're sowing is not "resistance," but "despair."

C: 等等，别着急。
E: Let's not rush.

C: 受造之物是否有资格成为自己想成为的样子？当然可以！我会实现孤云你的愿望，我会将你铸造成另一种器物。
E: Can a creation become what it wants to be? The answer is "yes"! I'll grant your wish, Guyun, and transform you into something different.

C: 最后，你们前往工造司的五兵坊，借用其中的铸炉。
E: Finally, you make your way to the Artisanship Commission's Pentad Armory, seeking the use of their forging furnace.

C: 甚好。仙舟人不设棺椁和灵位，能在故土上人来人往、烟火热闹之处安眠，想必他一定很满意。
E: That sounds good. We Xianzhou people don't make coffins or set up memorials, so I'm sure he would be happy to rest here where life is bustling.

C: 你想清楚，我的逻辑可是无懈可击的。
E: Take your time. My reasoning is solid.

C: 恐怕不行。橡木家系出面安抚了他的情绪，沙马里先生对梦中的不可思议表示理解，前往其他梦境继续度假了。
E: I'm afraid you can't. The Oaks came forward and calmed him down. Mr. Shamari expressed that he understands the unpredictable nature of dreams, and went on to vacation in another dreamscape.

C: 我倒是都记住了。不过…看来「侦探助手」先生还有疑虑啊…那，麻烦你再复述一遍？
E: Got it. But... it sounds like Mr. Assistant Detective has his own misgivings... Would you like to go over it again?

C: 啊？下一个谜题，这跟说好的不一样啊。
E: Huh? The next puzzle? I didn't sign up for this.

C: 那可是花火小姐的心血，我怎么舍得真的跳过呢？
E: All the painstaking effort that Miss Sparkle put into it — how could I ever miss it?

C: 想再确认下案情。
E: Just want to confirm case details again.

C: 没有其他问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 好像是哦，但「玉兆」这个名字好听多了。
E: Seems like it, but "jade abacus" does sound a lot better.

C: 正因如此，才须得符卿出马。要克制能观测未来的星核猎手，非得未卜先知的符卿不可。至于人手助力——我岂会没有准备？
E: And that is precisely why we need you in charge. When it comes to handling clairvoyant Stellaron Hunters, who better than Fu Xuan the seer? As for reinforcements, you didn't think I'd be unprepared, did you?

C: 哈！荒谬！竟然会有这种事……
E: Ha! Absurd! I'd never have thought it...

C: 她的目的和你的过去，难道你不想知道吗？
E: You don't want to know about her motives and your past?

C: 可是，太卜知道的就只有这么多了，因为艾利欧也没有将关键的信息告诉我。他预见太卜司会对我使用「穷观阵」。为了防止发生意外，此时此刻，我只知道仙舟联盟应该知道的事。
E: However, that's all the master diviner knows, because Elio withheld key pieces of information from me. He foresaw the Divination Commission using the Matrix of Prescience against me. To guard against setbacks, he ensured that I knew only what he wanted the Xianzhou Alliance to know in this moment.

C: 我不知道啊，阿基维利的消失非常神秘。能解答这个问题的，大概只有{RUBY_B#「智识」的星神}博识尊{RUBY_E#}了吧。毕竟，{RUBY_B#博识尊的诨名}机器头{RUBY_E#}什么都知道。
E: I don't know. Akivili's disappearance was very mysterious. {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#} is probably the only one that can answer that question. After all, {RUBY_B#Title of Nous}Droidhead{RUBY_E#} knows everything.

C: 至于为客人引路的事情，还需劳烦停云小姐再辛苦一阵子。
E: Miss Tingyun, I would like you to continue to serve as a guide for our Astral friends.

C: 我听其他人说啦，连将军都对你们客客气气，要请你们帮忙，可真了不得！我也没什么拿得出手的，喏，这本书送你吧。礼轻情意重！
E: I heard people say even the general has to watch his manners when asking you for help — pretty impressive! I don't have much to offer you... Uh, here! Take this book. It's the thought that counts!

C: …那也只是违法的时候狂一狂，该咋判还是咋判呀……
E: ...You gonna be this enthusiastic when it's jail-sentencing time?

C: 工造司乃机要重地，贼人退去，速～速～退去～呀呀呀呀！
E: Upon Commission grounds your feet do tread! Leave from whence you came or soon be dead! Deaaaad!!!

C: 这头玄鹿恐怕是「建木」诞下用来拱卫它的灵物，与根系联结紧密。仙舟众生大多没这般离谱的本事……
E: I'm afraid this Ebon Deer was likely birthed by the Ambrosial Arbor as its guardian — it shares a close connection with the Arbor's roots. Most living creatures on the Xianzhou don't have abilities like this.

C: 不是吧？我看着就是老大一拳没打动人家啊？
E: You sure about that, boss? They didn't even flinch.

C: 我想去见见那个孩子，要麻烦你为我引路。
E: I want to meet the little girl, can you lead me to her?

C: 我没必要回答你。
E: I don't need to answer you.

C: {NICKNAME}，我想请你先停手。在这里开战，我们只会两败俱伤，而这是在下最不想见到的结果。
E: {NICKNAME}, lay down your weapon. Our fighting will only result in mutual suffering — something I would not wish to see.

C: 你，一顿悄然潜行的午餐。狼群虎视眈眈地看着你，它们饿了。
E: You are simply a walking, moving lunch. A pack of wolves watches you hungrily. They are hungry.

C: 原来你认得我…
E: I see you know who I am...

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来了。我刚才和「四大善人」商讨了一下，究竟该给咱们一个什么样的「入会试炼」……
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back. I just discussed with the Four Benevolent Ones about the newcomer trial...

C: 我就不用担心，我永远不会卷入你们这些蠢事。咱们「微观派」的优越感正是由此而来。
E: I don't have to worry as I'll never have such concerns. That's why our Microscopic Faction is better than everyone else.

C: 或者说，真的有一双眼睛在天上时刻审视着咱们每个人的道德行为？在你伤害一个生命时，给你扣个几十分，在你拯救了某人的性命时给你加、加、加个一百分？
E: Is there someone up there who constantly reviews the morality of our actions? Will we get our points deducted when we hurt a living thing and gain points when we rescue one?

C: 秉承自信而活吧，我的小可爱们。药王慈怀，定会照亮你们前方的道路。
E: Always be confident, my little darlings. The gracious Sanctus Medicus will surely illuminate your path ahead.

C: 我是不是太过分了？
E: Did I go too far?

C: 嘘，家人学我，脚步放轻、放缓哈…
E: Shh, follow me. Keep quiet and tread lightly...

C: 看来，已经准备妥当了，接下来就该离开这里了。
E: It seems like we're ready. Now, we just have to get out.

C: 有人一起走就放心多了…不瞒你说，我已经快要站不稳了……
E: I feel much safer with you here... Still feel like I'm gonna faint, though...

C: {NICKNAME}，瞧见了没？这个姐姐肤色惨白，眼神飘忽…她到底是人是鬼啊？
E: {NICKNAME}, look how pale she is! And it seems like her eyes aren't even focusing... Is she a ghost?

C: 走吧，人家不想搭理咱。
E: Let's go. He doesn't want to talk to us.

C: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
E: You can call me Cirrus. I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

C: 别说这个了，我被岁阳附体了！
E: Forget about her — I got possessed by a heliobus!

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈哈哈！可笑可笑可笑，真是可笑极了！我原以为你逃脱了在洪炉里受苦的命运呢？
E: Haha... Hahahaha! Oh, this is funny! This is just too funny! I thought you'd already escaped the Furnace's destiny of torture!?

C: 我…我这些年后悔时抹下的眼泪，一定是当年做决定时脑子里进的水…
E: All the pain I've suffered since I met you must be retribution for my stupidity back then...

C: （被拉进来的时候，好像也有同样的镜子。）
E: (Didn't I see a similar mirror when I was dragged in?)

C: 你说的没错，{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}，这块地方正在不停变化着，试图阻止咱们几个逃离。
E: You're right, {M#boy}{F#girl}. This place is changing. It's trying to stop us from escaping.

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 藿藿，快到这边来，穿过镜子。
E: Come here, Huohuo. Come through the mirror.

C: 对了，你不必担心小桂子，她在病床上也不安生，也许过不了多久就来联系你了。
E: You don't need to worry about Little Gui. She won't be able to sit still, even in a sick ward. I'm sure she'll come find you again in no time.

C: 好像来错了地方。
E: I think I came to the wrong place.

C: 柯柯娜将一本杂志递给了你，她闭上眼睛，皱着眉头，身躯微微摇晃，好像不太舒服。
E: As Cocona passes you a magazine, she shuts her eyes, a frown creasing her brow, and her body wavers slightly. Could she be unwell?

C: 开始「钟表把戏」
E: Start the Clockwork

C: 「悲伤」如同水流一般进入了柯柯娜的内心，芜杂的记忆和过去像汹涌的潮水一样将柯柯娜淹没。
E: "Sorrow" streams into Cocona's heart like a stinging surge, jumbled memories and past drowning her like a turbulent tide.

C: 挺住，柯柯娜小姐——
E: Hang in there, Miss Cocona —

C: （柯柯娜就在前面…这次又会遇到什么样的记忆？）
E: (Cocona is just up ahead... What memories will I encounter this time?)

C: 我的确理解不了，柯柯娜……
E: I'm sure I don't understand, Cocona...

C: 只要不会伤害到你就好。
E: As long as it doesn't hurt you.

C: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
E: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

C: 嗯…我听说了。
E: Yeah... I've heard.

C: 从今天起，我会重新开始学习生活。我会融入到他们的世界中去…我要自这悲伤中超脱。
E: From today, I'll start learning how to live again. I'll integrate myself into their world... I'll free myself from this sadness.

C: 「我不相信什么死后世界，汤普森先生，我也不认为你真的相信自己脱口而出的那个概念。」
E: "I have never believed in life after death, Mr. Thompson. Nor do I think that you believe in these ideas that you spout."

C: 哈里……
E: Harry...

C: 戳破幻想。
E: Destroy the fantasy.

C: 没有人应该过那种生活…还是尝试着去拿回那些本就属于你的东西吧，姬莲小姐。
E: No one should live a life like this... You should work to try and reclaim the things in life that are truly yours, Ms. Jillian.

C: 我想我们找到源头了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: I think we have found the source, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 不…不对。
E: No... That's not right.

C: 原则上可以，别太苛刻就是了。
E: I'll acquiesce on principle. Just go easy on them.

C: 火速把我挂上去吧！
E: Chop-chop, then!

C: 能吸引客人眼球，又能凸显您风格的，便是最好的设计。
E: The best design must be attractive to guests and emphasize your style.

C: 您就是船长？我叫佩德罗，是您新招的大副，无名客的事迹我听说了，我最佩服您这种了不起的大人物！
E: You're the captain? Call me Pedro, I'm your new first mate. I've heard of the Nameless. I'm in awe of you!

C: 我收回之前说的话。今天才不是什么奇怪的日子，今天简直就是奇迹日！
E: I take it all back, then. Today isn't a weird day — today's a miraculous day!

C: 来自宾客的质问如期而至。你手无寸铁，只有灵活的脑回路和一口伶牙俐齿能当作武器——迎难而上吧，战士！
E: Questions arise from the guest, as expected. Weaponless, you are armed only with your quick wits and a sharp tongue — take them on, soldier!

C: 很可惜，你并不了解白日梦酒店平时是如何处理这种诉求的…但你还是想维持住自己专业的形象，所以你问了……
E: Unfortunately, you don't know how The Reverie normally handles this kind of appeal... However, you wish to maintain your professional image, so you ask...

C: 仙舟…我遇到过不少来自仙舟商会的歌迷，但的确一直没有机会去上一趟，去领略当地的风土人情。
E: Xianzhou... I've met many fans from the Xianzhou merchant guilds, but I've never had the chance to visit there myself and experience the local customs and culture.

C: 但别忘了，在矲主的祝福加持下，我们「四尺圣堂」可是战无不胜的！弟兄姐妹们，给我敲碎这些恶徒的膝盖！
E: Don't forget that we, the Four-Foot Hall, are invincible with the master's blessing! Everyone, crush the knees of these villains!

C: 我这就收拾收拾，准备回现实去……
E: Well, I'll pack up and return to reality...

C: 我不管，我还没打够。你如果要走，那就把{F#她}{M#他}留下来陪我们打牌！
E: I don't care! I'm not done having fun yet! If you're leaving, ask {F#her}{M#him} to stay and play with us!

C: 唔…那我就回去工作了。祝各位玩得开心，玩得愉快……
E: Well... I guess I should get back to work then. Have fun and enjoy yourselves...

C: 我一定会牢记矲主的训诫…
E: I'll heed the Master's admonishments...

C: 呃，那倒不是…只是觉得有点怪，好像缺了点什么？
E: Um, not really... This just feels a bit odd, like something's missing.

C: 别让我等太久。
E: Don't keep me waiting too long.

C: 好，好小子！老夫没看走眼啊。
E: What generosity! I knew I was right about you.

C: 我们肯定是欢迎的呀！对了，姬子姐姐和杨叔，今天不是也要回来吗？我们还可以找他们商量商量……
E: You're more than welcome, of course! Oh yeah, weren't Himeko and Mr. Yang saying that they wanted to come along today, too? We could find them to discuss it further...

C: 如果没有离别，我们又如何珍惜相聚的时刻？如果没有离别，我们又如何感受重逢的喜悦。三月小姐，请你不要伤感，离别只会串联起我们相遇时种种疏忽的细节……
E: If we were to never part, how would we treasure our time together? If there were no farewell, how could we experience the joy of a reunion? Miss March, please do not be sad, as our parting will only connect the dots between the details we missed when we met.

C: 我不是突然这么消极的，自从发现弄丢了老师的手稿之后，我就一直很消极。
E: It's not sudden at all. I've been depressed ever since I found out that I lost my master's manuscript.

C: 交给我了。
E: Will do.

C: 培养液？
E: Culture medium?

C: 你们应该听说过「建木」的传说对吧。据说那东西给仙舟上带来了一场技术变革。特别是丹鼎司，他们曾拥有堪称奇迹的技术……
E: You must have heard of the legends of the Ambrosial Arbor, right? That's what brought about a technological revolution on Xianzhou. Especially the Alchemy Commission, they had an utterly miraculous technology...

C: 星槎的雏形阶段已经拍摄成功了。
E: Photos have been taken of the starskiff in embryonic phase.

C: 所以才需要你的帮助嘛…
E: That's why we need your help...

C: 啊，系统锁死了。
E: Argh, the system is locked.

C: 可惜…
E: What a pity...

C: …这是不是自我感动呀？
E: ...Do people do that to make themselves feel better?

C: 噢，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩是顺路来帮忙的，别介意！你把遇上的事给我们讲明白了就行。
E: They just came along to help. Don't mind them! Just tell us exactly what happened.

C: 喂，朋友！
E: Hey, friend!

C: 我从来没怀疑过你，卢卡兄弟！欠你的这个人情我会一直记得…不介意的话，现在我想去给小飞和大奔做一次系统彻查。
E: I've never doubted you, Luka! I'll remember this forever... Right, time to take Little Fay and Big Ben for a systems check — until next time!

C: 走吧，两位！下一步，咱们要把这聚落里的裂界渣滓都给清理干净！
E: Let's go! Next, we're gonna clear up all the Fragmentum cronies still left in the settlement!

C: …哈？！裂界？但我记得这片聚落——
E: ...Huh? Fragmentum? But the settlement...

C: 哈，没想到这下层区还有你不知道的事，真是荣幸！
E: Ha! I'm honored to be one of the things in the Underworld that even you don't know about!

C: 我叫玛吉，和你一样来自熔锤镇，是你的忠实拳迷！虽然我从小身体不好，但还是梦想着有一天能跟你一样，成为擂台上的大明星！
E: My name is Margie, and I'm from Moltammerville too. I'm a big fan of yours! I've been sick since I was a baby, but I still dream of becoming a big star in the cage one day — just like you!

C: 既然各位乘客已经达成一致了，那我们就准备跃迁前往仙舟「罗浮」了帕。
E: Now that everyone's on board with the plan, it's time to warp to the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 我们希望能找到那种，在匹诺康尼的日常梦境中难得一见的特殊体验。我们的客户最喜欢这种梦泡了。
E: We're looking for unique experiences that you won't find on Penacony. Our clients love these kinds of dream bubbles the most.

C: 再见，也许这几天我们会在鳞渊境再相遇。
E: See you later. Maybe we'll run into each other there in a few days.

C: 别担心，有这样身手的女孩不多见，应该没那么难找。
E: Don't worry. There aren't many people out there with that kind of talent. It shouldn't be too hard to find her.

C: 怪老朽来得不是时候，三位客人见谅。
E: Please forgive me for coming at an inconvenient time.

C: 这一趟出行没白来。和朱明一比，罗浮真是热闹多了。
E: This trip is totally worth it. Compared to the Zhuming, the Luofu is so much livelier.

C: 演武仪典外人也能参加？
E: Can outsiders participate in the Wardance as well?

C: 每座仙舟在联盟内各有所司，各有所长。帝弓的将军们也并非各个都擅于冲锋陷阵。你刚才听见景元的介绍了，怀炎先生曾是朱明的巧匠之首。
E: Each Xianzhou ship has its own division and specialty within the Alliance, not all of the Arbiter-Generals are good at leading the charge. You heard what Jing Yuan said, right? General Huaiyan was once the head of all the skilled craftsmen on the Zhuming.

C: 但…这位怀炎将军看起来却像一个普普通通的老爷爷。他真的是仙舟将军吗？
E: But... General Huaiyan looks like an ordinary old grandpa. Is he really a Xianzhou general?

C: 斯科特先生能否核算出一个具体金额呢？在检修过后要是有所损坏，列车…呃，不对，是天舶司方面是愿意照价赔偿的。
E: Can you give us an exact amount, Mr. Skott? If there's any damage after the inspection, the Express... um, I mean, the Sky-Faring Commission will compensate you.

C: 这就是你想出来的解决方案？行啊，你干脆从我尸体上踏过去算了。
E: So, this is the great idea you came up with? Fine! Why don't you just step over my lifeless body?

C: 既然博识学会将货物交付给公司运输，公司就理应对货物的安全负责？为什么要联系博识学会？
E: Since the Intelligentsia Guild entrusted the cargo to the IPC for transportation, it's the IPC's responsibility to ensure its safety, right? Why would you need a member of the Intelligentsia Guild to be present?

C: 为什么这么说？
E: Why do you say that?

C: 我来时预感到公司的人难缠，只是没想到他们如此难缠。多谢灵砂小姐帮助。
E: I had a feeling that the IPC members would cause trouble, but I didn't think they'd be this tricky. Thanks for your help, Miss Lingsha.

C: 再见！
E: Goodbye!

C: 灵砂姐姐，可以开始了吗？
E: Can we start now, Lingsha?

C: 你的剑招芜杂凌乱，一味图快。罗浮云骑的剑术也不过如此。
E: Your technique was all over the place, and you relied too much on speed. Is this really all the Cloud Knights of the Luofu can muster? So disappointing.

C: 都不是。驭空，你知道{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#81}阮•梅{RUBY_E#}吗？
E: No, neither. Yukong, have you heard of a person named {RUBY_B#Genius Society #81}Ruan Mei{RUBY_E#}?

C: 你注意到鳞渊境的幽囚狱建造在古海之下，是不断向下延展的柱状结构。冥差们在这块屏幕前管理着不同囚室、不同囚犯的实时信息。
E: You notice the Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison was built at the bottom of the ancient sea, as a column structure that extends endlessly into the depths. Spiritfarers monitor and manage real-time information of prison cells and prisoners on this screen.

C: 此处的玉兆散发着奇异的光辉，不知演算着何物。也许是囚室的状态，也许是各处的安全状况……
E: The jade abaci here glow with an unusual luminescence as they perform their calculations, possibly on the status of the prison cells or the security of each area.

C: 机巧鸟扑腾起来，它颤颤巍巍地飞离幽囚狱底部，一头扎进幽深的通道深处。
E: The cycrane flaps its wings and unsteadily flies out of the lower levels of the Shackling Prison, charging straight into the depths of the shadowy passage.

C: {NICKNAME}，你好狠的心啊。
E: You're so heartless, {NICKNAME}.

C: 好啊，要的就是这股精气神。
E: Great! That's the spirit.

C: 闲话少叙，咱们开始上课吧。旁边这位是我请来的云骑教习，这第一堂课先和他过两招吧。
E: Alright, let's get started with the training. The person next to me is a Cloud Knight instructor I've brought in. For your first lesson, try exchanging a couple of moves with him.

C: 有点感觉了。
E: I'm starting to get the hang of it.

C: 云骑，天舶司的人，还有匠人…种类倒是齐全，检修的理由也说得过去，只是刚才那人嘴里迸出了一句奇怪的语言。你们听见了吗？
E: A Cloud Knight, a member from the Sky-Faring Commission, and a craftsman... They're from various departments, and the reason for the overhaul seems legit, but one of them blurted out some weird language just now. Did you hear that?

C: 三月小姐，你要往哪儿去啊？跟着他们！
E: Where are you going, Miss March? Follow them!

C: 更糟糕的是，如果我在列车上发现了一只蟑螂，那就意味着……
E: Even worse. If you find one cockroach on the Express, it usually means...

C: 从报告来看，景元将军也相信了这一说辞。这倒令我好奇，为何你们对此并无质疑？
E: General Jing Yuan believes in this prophecy too, as mentioned in the report. I'm curious why you didn't question it at all?

C: 毁灭的卒子渴望一具肉身活下去？这倒是个未曾考虑的角度。有意思。
E: So, a pawn of the Destruction wanted a flesh-and-blood body to live in? Hmm, interesting. That's quite a new perspective.

C: 狱内本是禁止使用「换境画屏」之类的装置，以免便利了犯人逃离。
E: Normally, using devices like the shifting screen is strictly forbidden, as they could help prisoners escape.

C: 你好无情！
E: You're so heartless!

C: 抵达门关处，我希望各位能竭力协助我将门户封死。之后我会尽我所能与步离人战斗，各位请找个地方躲起来，保护好自己。
E: Once we reach the gate, I hope you'll help me seal it. After that, I'll do everything I can to fight the borisin, and you find a safe place to hide and wait for reinforcements.

C: 妾身只是一介医士，不知旧事，还请将军点拨解惑。
E: I'm just a healer, and I'm not familiar with the past. I'd appreciate it if you could enlighten me, General.

C: 所以，元帅将呼雷囚禁在罗浮。这确实不是荣誉，而是…告诫。
E: That's why the marshal decided to imprison Hoolay in the Luofu. It wasn't an honor but rather... a warning.

C: 有言在先，联盟将我派来此处，是要我妥善处理公事，可不是让我选边站的。
E: But let me make it clear: The Alliance sent me here to handle the business impartially, not to choose sides.

C: 妾身打算为龙师们送去一份「请柬」。
E: I'll send an "invitation" to the Preceptors.

C: 请柬？
E: An invitation?

C: （挑拨，指出蟒古思的用心）
E: (Sow discord by pointing out Mangas' ulterior motives)

C: 大人让你去港口瞧瞧，贱畜，你还在这儿磨蹭什么？
E: Lord Hoolay ordered you to go to the port and take a look, you lowly beast. Why are you still lingering here?

C: 既然这样，咱们难道不该立刻与他汇合，和他一同铲除步离人。怎么又跑到迴星港来了？
E: If that's the case, shouldn't we immediately go there and join forces to eliminate the borisin? Why are we returning to Stargazer Navalia?

C: 应该是天舶司的职员。
E: The staff members from the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 你们还有多少同伙？原定计划打算在何处接应呼雷？
E: How many more of your comrades are here? Where were you planning to meet Hoolay?

C: 一直以来，我费尽毕生所学，想从你这样的怪物手中夺回那些赴死的生命。我精疲力尽地瘫坐下来、双手颤抖，我在想我所做的一切都是有意义的……
E: All this time, I've devoted my life to bringing back those who sacrificed their lives to monsters like you. I exhausted myself, and my hands trembled, but I believed everything I did was meaningful...

C: 听啊，这炮声隆隆——唤起了我心底所有关于战场的回忆……
E: Do you hear that? The rumble of the cannons... it brings back all the memories of past battles within me...

C: 拜托了，云璃师父，我都快要上场了，你就给我点信心吧！
E: Master Yunli, please, I'm about to compete! Can you say something that will give me a little confidence?

C: 他们要是问起，三月小姐该如何自我介绍，您准备好了吗？
E: If they ask you this, how will you introduce yourself? Do you have something prepared?

C: 没错，我就是那个三月七。
E: That's right. I'm the March 7th that everyone's been talking about.

C: 无论呼雷做什么，都没法改变一个事实：他被困在了罗浮仙舟上。想要逃离此处，唯一的办法就是寻到船只。
E: No matter what Hoolay does, there is one truth that cannot be changed: He is trapped aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. The only way for him to escape is to find a ship.

C: 这下连半个能问出情报的活口都不剩了。这些家伙里一定有人知道呼雷和椒丘的下落……
E: She didn't even leave a single survivor to get intel from. One of these men must have known about Hoolay and Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.

C: 例行检查而已，你不会真的要把船砸了吧？难道这也是你们朱明传统……
E: It's just a routine inspection. You weren't actually going to blow up the ship, were you? Is that also some kind of Zhuming custom...?

C: 你说什么？我只是个医士！我能做的只有——
E: What are you talking about? I'm just a healer! All I can do is—

C: （处置呼雷）
E: (Deal with Hoolay)

C: 我期待了如此之久，这场狩猎游戏终于走到了尽头…我说过，我为你准备了一条道路……
E: I have looked forward to this for so long. Our little hunting game has finally reached its climax... I told you before that I had a path prepared for you...

C: 可恶，我还以为能停下来喘口气的！
E: Ugh! Just when I thought we'd get a minute to catch our breath!

C: …为什么？为什么你还不消失？！
E: ...Why? Why won't you disappear!?

C: 你承认？
E: So you admit it?

C: 呜呜呜…三月七小姐……
E: Waaah... Miss March...

C: 没关系，我们再去问问别人。
E: It's all right. We'll ask someone else.

C: 唱歌的？看见了，之前有个醉鬼一边唱歌一边骚扰路人，刚被猎犬抓走了。
E: Singing? 'Course I did — there was a drunken fool singing and accosting passersby. He was taken away by the Bloodhounds.

C: 她没得选！她必须找回记忆！
E: She does not get a choice! She must find her memories!

C: 毕竟你是个好人嘛！
E: That's because you're a good person!

C: 你这想法还是挺天真的。
E: That thinking of yours is pretty naive.

C: 感谢你…希望有一天你能想通，自己究竟应该忠于什么。
E: Thank you... I hope you will one day figure out where your true loyalty lies.

C: 可以和平解决时，你会诉诸暴力。有必要动用武力时，你会滥杀无辜。有你在朝廷里，群臣都很不安。
E: When it could've been resolved with peace, you would meet it with violence. When strength was required, you'd massacre innocents. When you were in court, the other ministers stand uneasy.

C: 当然，当然，没有人生来就是残暴的畜生…但……
E: Of course, certainly, no one is born a brutish beast... But...

C: 陛下！叛乱已经平息，您这是干什么？
E: Your Majesty? The uprising has been quelled — what in the world are you doing?

C: 老人的视线投向你的左肩。
E: The elderly man sets his sight upon your left shoulder.

C: 按下起爆按钮。
E: Hit the detonate button.

C: 起爆指令已确认。对撞起爆器开始充能…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>50%</unbreak>…<unbreak>75%</unbreak>…已达到起爆临界点。
E: Detonation command confirmed. Collider charging in progress... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>50%</unbreak>... <unbreak>75%</unbreak>... Critical detonation threshold reached.

C: 现在…你经历了我一半的人生，也知道我的故事了。
E: Now, you have experienced half of my life and learned about my story.

C: …没有什么值得道歉的，这都是我理应付出的代价。
E: ...You don't have to. It's the price I have to pay.

C: 嗯，一个平静的结局。对于晚年的查德威克博士来说，算得上一种巨大的奢望。
E: Well, it's a calm conclusion. For Dr. Chadwick in his later years, This would count as quite a significant luxury.

C: 真遗憾，要是我能早两个琥珀纪意识到——
E: It's a real pity. If only I had realized two Amber Eras earlier—

C: 我的…研究…我的…知识……
E: My... research... my... knowledge...

C: 好，时间还来得及——把他带到控制室来，我去通知杜德利总监。动作快！
E: Good, we still have time then. Take him to the control room. I'll notify Director Dudley. Hurry, go!

C: …啾。满意了？
E: ...Tweet. Satisfied now?

C: 我早就想到了！
E: I knew it!

C: ——没听过来工地还要带孩子的！
E: ...I've never heard of anyone who brings their kids to the construction site!

C: 只有巴罗那种笨蛋才会明知故犯。这小子应该没这么傻…吧？
E: Only that fool Barlow would knowingly do something bad. This kid wouldn't be that stupid... right?

C: 我以隐夜鸫之名向你保证。
E: I promise you, in the name of the Nightingales.

C: …说到底，我始终是那个最胆小、最幼稚的家伙。大家都有想要建造的梦想，而我——只是想要一个鸟儿的「巢」吧。
E: ...In the end, I'm still the most timid and naive one. Everyone has a dream to build, but I... only want a nest for the birds.

C: 还要我继续说吗？
E: Do you want me to keep going?

C: 或许，那个筑梦师已经回到了属于自己的地方，这里剩下的只有折纸小鸟了。
E: Perhaps that Dreamweaver has already returned to a place where he belongs, and all that's left here is an origami bird.

C: 或许…对湛蓝爵士来说，这才像是真正的家人。它确实找到家了。
E: Perhaps... to Dr. Blues, this is what family is. It really did find a home.

C: （这段记忆应该在很久之前，那个梦境刚刚开始建设的年代……）
E: (This memory should be from long ago, the time when that Dreamscape was first being built...)

C: …抱歉。
E: ...My apologies.

C: …你是想自己替他赔钱？可那样还怎么给他个教训？
E: ...You wish to pay the compensation for him? But how will that teach him a lesson?

C: 哎呀，这群外邦人，一个个那么勤奋干什么？居然还跑过来给大地兽免费打工……
E: Bah, what're these outlanders doing, being so hardworking? They're even willing to work for the dromases free of charge...

C: 为什么不开设新的岗位呢？
E: Why don't you create a new stall?

C: 没错，「生存」是一件奢侈品。失去了城邦的人们在黑潮面前…没有胜算。
E: Exactly. Survival is a luxury. The homeless refugees who face the black tide... they have zero chance at victory.

C: 可惜，没有证据表明这种筛选真的存在。甚至还有公民认为，那不过是东道主的正当权利——我们有资格决定帮谁。
E: Alas, there is no evidence to prove that this sorting really exists. Even the citizens think that this is the authority of the host city — we have the right to decide who we help.

C: 我只在利益不受损时愿意。
E: I'll only agree to acts that don't harm my own interests.

C: 在克瑞斯关于进食规矩的科普中，你抱着装食物的容器跑远了。
E: As Kyros is rambling on fine dining practices, you've already left the vicinity, the vessels full of food bundled in your arms.

C: 给我们的？难道……
E: For us? Could you have...

C: 我的腿…它还在吗？我有些…没知觉了……
E: My leg... Is it still there? I can't... seem to feel it...

C: 我、我没有跟元老和法律作对的意思……
E: I—I have no intention of defying the Elder and the law...

C: 辩方代表，请停止你的情绪化发言，认真对待议题。
E: Defense counsel, please cease your emotional statement and address the matter more formally.

C: 外邦人只能当我的啦啦队。
E: The outlanders can only be my cheerleaders.

C: 看来不得不上了。
E: Looks like I have no choice.

C: 赞美瑟希斯，愿你令圣城子民早些理解我作品的魅力……
E: Praise Cerces! May you assist the people of this holy city in understanding the charm of my works...

C: 但人们都说墨涅塔的丝线就是黄金做的，如果用染色的丝线来替代，岂不是弄虚作假？
E: But everyone says that Mnestia's silk is made of gold. Using dyed silk would just be a forgery, wouldn't it?

C: 好吧，快点哦！
E: Okay. Be quick!

C: 总感觉这家伙说话不怎么靠谱…算了，为了雕像小姐，就让我们帮帮他吧。
E: I can't help but feel like this guy is shady... Whatever, let's help him for the statue lady's sake.

C: 瞧瞧这天杀的尼卡多利，自己天天喝蜜酿，却不让自己的孩子有嘴品尝美味。
E: Get a load of this wretched Nikador. Spending their days drowning in their sacramental wine while never giving their children mouths to sample the flavors of the world.

C: 她在看什么？
E: What is she looking at?

C: 怎么样，我们圣城的生活是不是比天天打架的悬锋城幸福多了？
E: What do you think? Isn't life in the holy city much happier than the life of constant fighting of Castrum Kremnos?

C: 我们一起行动太过惹眼，你先混着攻势出城。半个时段之后，我循着丝线的方向来找你。
E: It is too obvious if we make our move together. You use the chaos of the attack to slip out of the city first. In half an hour, I will follow the golden thread to find you.

C: 咳！我…我必须要说…在塞纳托斯降临前，我要诅咒你们这两个混账……
E: Ack! I... I must say this... Before Thanatos descends... I curse you two vile scoundrels...

C: 它纹丝不动，看来你这块儿还得接着练练。
E: It hasn't budged. It seems like you will need more practice.

C: 旁白，这并不好笑。
E: Narrator, that's not funny at all.

C: 今天天气真不错呀。
E: The weather today is great.

C: 命运到底是什么？这问题就像一把刀，割下我的眼睛，把它们留在废墟。我能在梦中听到未来，但双眼却只能看到过去。
E: What is destiny? This question feels like a knife, gouging out my eyes and leaving them at the ruins. I can hear the whispers of the future in my dreams, yet my eyes can only gaze into the past.

C: 好吧——阿伯，我有些怕疼，你能不能让欧洛尼斯它们快一些？我害怕。
E: Okay... Uncle, I'm afraid of pain. Can you get Oronyx to be faster? I'm afraid.

C: 伟大的传谕梦母，我并无祈愿，仅是来向您表达我们的感谢和敬意。
E: O Great Oracle Dreammother, I come not with a wish, but simply to offer our heartfelt gratitude and deepest respect.

C: 是属于所有人的故事。
E: It's a story that belongs to everyone.

C: 娜塔莎医生怎么说？
E: What did Dr. Natasha say?

C: 既然你们都这么说了……
E: Well, since you all say so...

C: 虎克「噌」的一下从床上蹦起，一溜烟跑远了。
E: Hook sprang up from the bed with a "whoosh" and dashed away in a flash.

C: 我只看到一个绝望的学者。
E: All I see is a desperate scholar.

C: 一张横亘历史学、神话学、人类学、生物学的学术蓝图正在我眼前徐徐展开——
E: An academic blueprint spanning history, mythology, anthropology, and biology is gradually unfolding before my eyes...

C: 你想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
E: You recall the promise of Trailblaze: the story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.

C: 老爹找你也没什么大事，就是顶着这把老骨头，每天还要处理阻塞，实在是干不动了……
E: It's nothing important. Just that lately I've had to go fix those blockages every day. I can't move my old bones anymore.

C: 有什么问题吗？搞清楚我们之间的身份差距没有？我可是仿生人，你只不过是团碳基生物。我的芯片运算能力当然比你的强得多。
E: Got a problem with that? You understand the difference between us, don't you? I am an android, and you're just a carbon-based life form. The computing power of my chip is far more superior to that pea brain of yours.

C: 寻找自我，要怎么寻找呢…「遵从内心的声音，跟随自己的喜好」，有资料是这么说的，我、我先试试看好了。
E: Be myself... How do I do that? "Listen to your heart, follow your dream." This is what some search results suggest. Let me try.

C: 我想起来了，原来是{NICKNAME}啊。刚才你也听到了吧，我们也不是故意背后说她坏话的。
E: I remember, you're {NICKNAME}, right? You heard it just now. We didn't mean to trash talk her behind her back.

C: 你就是传闻中的…
E: So you are the rumored...

C: 嘿嘿，我现在基本上能和别人聊得有来有回啦。
E: Heehee, I can pretty much chat freely back and forth with people now.

C: 上次她还特意安慰我……
E: She even specifically consoled me the last time...

C: （问他机器人故障的事）
E: (Ask him about the robots)

C: 但在一次实验中，那位科员不幸发生意外，将自己的精神思维和奇物发生了畸变投射……
E: But the researcher had an accident during an experiment, and his psyche was distorted and projected onto a Curio...

C: 我的朋友认为这并不是自己的臆想，绝不可能！但你说，防盗门为什么会……
E: My friend doesn't believe it's his imagination. Definitely not! But... How can a security door...

C: 但仔细想想倒也正常，毕竟…空间站里没几个人能听懂呜呜伯在说什么。
E: But if I think about it, it does make sense. After all... few people on the space station can understand the Wubbaboos.

C: 至于如何判断纸页是不是「幸运签」，很简单，在捡起「幸运签」时你会听到掌声，传闻这是星神对你的青睐与鼓励……
E: It's easy to determine whether a piece of paper is a fortune leaf — you will hear a round of applause when you pick one up. It is said to be the way Aeons express their admiration and encouragement for you...

C: 棕色！
E: Brown!

C: 等等，这个人……
E: Wait, this man...

C: 也许这张照片能让你改变看法？
E: Maybe this photo will change your mind?

C: 麻烦你，能礼貌地帮我回绝莱姆士汀先生吗？如果他想要的话，我可以帮他在照片上签名，权当一点心意。
E: Would you be so kind as to tell Mr. Limestein that I can't be his friend? If he wants, I can sign his picture as a token of my gratitude.

C: 在垃圾桶里翻找「垃圾大王」…
E: Sifting through the trash to look for the Garbage King.

C: 也许…帮你找回记忆？
E: Maybe... helping you find your memory?

C: 半桶红色的油漆，已经快干了。一页白纸静静地躺在桶里，上面写着：「你永远无法逃离我。」
E: Half a bucket of red paint, which is almost dry. A white piece of paper lies silently in the bucket. It says, "you will never get away from me."

C: 走吧，荣誉队员！我们去大矿区给伊蕾恩姐姐送物资！
E: Let's go, honorary member! Let's go to the Great Mine to deliver supplies to Elaine!

C: 那个…请问，您怎么会突然跑来大矿区，而且还是带着尤利安小朋友一起？
E: Em... if I may ask — why did you come to the Great Mine all of a sudden, with little Julian?

C: 你是不是一直在跟踪我？
E: Have you been stalking me?

C: 哇…待派送的快递实在太多了！只靠咱们两个恐怕一整天都送不完……
E: Wow... there are so many deliveries to be made! I'm afraid that just the two of us won't be able to deliver them all even if we work for the whole day.

C: 我在部队里服役二十来年，期间一直都在后勤工作，一次前线都没上过。开头的几年我还觉得这工作安逸舒坦，但越往后越觉得自己真是窝囊透顶……
E: I have served in the army for over <unbreak>20</unbreak> years, and I have been working in logistics this whole time. I have never been on the front line once. In the first few years, I still thought this job was easy and comfortable, but the longer I stay, the more useless I feel...

C: 他们可能只是礼貌一下…
E: Maybe they were just being polite...

C: 我将会提出两个问题，而你必须全部答对。
E: I will ask you two questions, both of which must be answered correctly.

C: 请您慢走。
E: So long.

C: 哈，我就知道能指望你，靠谱！
E: Ha, I knew I could count on you as always!

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 哎呀，是您——经过上次的会面，波瓦大臣对您赞赏有加，还评价您是贝洛伯格学术界冉冉升起的新星。
E: Oops, it's you. Minister Bova has been singing your praises since last time, calling you a rising star in the Belobog academic circle.

C: 当然没问题！您尽管看，慢慢来。
E: No problem at all! Just take your time and think things over.

C: 夺人灵魂的法术是禁术…
E: Stealing souls is black magic, and forbidden...

C: 说到这个，你能帮小女子一个小忙么？
E: Speaking of which — can you please help me out with just one little thing?

C: 就只是看看？
E: Am I just going to SEE what is happening?

C: 不了吧，清官都难断家务事啊。
E: I'll pass. Every family has its own problems.

C: 你也知道我是《水晶日报》美食专栏的记者吧？最近我在创作上遇到了一些瓶颈，脑子简直是一团浆糊了。
E: You know I'm a column journalist for Crystal Daily, right? I've hit a bit of a bottleneck with my writing recently. My brain is all a fog.

C: 您就不害怕吗？
E: Aren't you scared?

C: 哈哈，这不过是条小小的商业街罢了，哪有什么可害怕的东西呢？
E: Haha, it's just a small commercial street. What's there to be scared about?

C: （看来，不把饭端到他面前，他是不会罢休的……）
E: (Seems like he won't give up unless there's food before his face...)

C: 我不就是吗？
E: Aren't I the person you're looking for?

C: 说老实话，我看这漂流瓶里字迹工整，我怀疑这是有人整蛊…不过，为了安全起见，我会安排人手驾驶星槎前往波月古海搜救的。
E: Frankly speaking, from the neat handwriting in this letter, I suspect this is just another prank... But, to err on the safe side, I'll send someone to the Lunarescent Depths on a rescue mission via a starskiff.

C: （不知道跃渊会作何感受？）
E: (I wonder what Yueyuan will think of this?)

C: 这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
E: Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?

C: …这也许是「存护」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「存护」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「存护」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Preservation. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Preservation. How about trying out Preservation at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 嘿，你还记得吗？凡人在世间的种种行为与观念都是与命途相关的。有时一念之间，你就<color=#dbc291ff>产生了某个具体的倾向</color>。
E: Hey, do you remember? Every action and belief a mortal holds in this world is connected to their Path. Sometimes, a single thought <color=#dbc291ff>can cause you to stray in a certain direction</color>.

C: 呵呵，我压根就没掉头发，刚刚也没紧张，所以肯定是幻觉。
E: Well, I wasn't feeling nervous, and of course I didn't lose my hair at all. That must have been a hallucination.

C: 你凑近观察，冰块表面的水雾模糊了你的视线——说起来，这些冰块真的只是用来存放浴液的吗？不知为何你总觉得里面似乎有东西在动，或许是低温环境带来的错觉……
E: You inch closer to observe, the mist from the icy surface fogging up your vision. Say, are these ice blocks really just used to store bath liquid? You can't shake the feeling that something's moving inside — perhaps the low temperature is causing your eyes to deceive you...

C: 最伤人的东西除言语外，还有时间。
E: Aside from words, time is what hurts the most.

C: 赛杜尼拉默星群集结文明伟力，向绝灭大君「星啸」宣战。
E: The Sedounirama star cluster has gathered the might of its civilizations and declared war on the Lord Ravager Celenova.

C: 由星际和平公司主导，联合星穹列车、仙舟联盟、天才俱乐部等多方力量，寰宇文明共同取得了此次对「毁灭」的决定性胜利。
E: In a joint operation spearheaded by the Interastral Peace Corporation and supported by the Astral Express, Xianzhou Alliance, Genius Society, and numerous other forces, the civilizations of the universe have achieved a decisive victory over the Destruction.

C: 万民的浴场
E: Civilian Bathhouse

C: 不过，另一侧的，我倒是从来都没有用过。
E: I have never used the other side before, though.

C: 那如果我在两侧都放上砝码呢？
E: What if I place weights on both sides of the scales?

C: 你记住了「曾在浴场接待员处购买过商品」
E: You remembered "Purchasing Items at the Baths Reception."

C: 绳结学派有这样一个比喻——我们的种种感受就像树根，经过意志的树干，生发成知识的树冠…但在此之外，才是漫无边际的无知之海。
E: The Nodists have a metaphor: Our varied perceptions are like roots, which, through the trunk of will, grow into the treetop of knowledge... But beyond this lies the boundless sea of ignorance.

C: 我们，不会操控，诡计之神，厌恶。求帮忙，感谢。
E: We, lack control. God of Trickery, despised. Aid requested. Gratitude.

C: 传言是真的…好美的一座庭院，到处是闪闪发亮的小物件，萤火虫、玻璃片、彩纸…我从没见过这么漂亮的地方！
E: The rumors are true... It is a beautiful courtyard covered in shining objects: Fireflies, shards of glass, colored paper... I have never seen such a beautiful place!

C: 叫你走…不肯走…你从小就不听话……
E: You never listen... just like when we were kids...

C: 你好啊，贵客，进展如何？
E: Hello, dear guest. How have you been getting on with things?

C: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，我是无法提供协助的——等您方便时再来吧，贵客。
E: Hmm... I cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Come again another time, dear guest.

C: o((〒ω〒; )っ「我叱咤浴场这么久，还是第一次被新豹击败」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )っ "In all my time reigning the baths, I've never been defeated by a new pup." )∋
o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "I'm taking you down with me!!!" )∋

C: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ「那一定意味着，你也是一个双拼爱好者吧？」)∋
E: o(-`<color=#eb4d3dff>ω</color><color=#73b0f4ff>ω</color>´-# )っ "It must mean that you're also a flavor pairing enthusiast, right?" )∋

C: 嗷呜嗷呜。
E: Awoo-awoo.

C: 你早说啊，我会反着选…
E: Why didn't you say something? I could've bet the opposite...

C: 这座圣烛的在火炬形状的顶部装置下，是几道树枝般向上盘旋的金属支柱。细看之下，支柱上刻着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神徽。
E: Beneath the torch-shaped device at the top of this holy candle stand several metal pillars that spiral upward like tree branches. Upon closer inspection, one can see the divine emblems of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}.

C: 每隔一段时间，仓库里就会莫名其妙多出来一些财物，妈妈总说是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的眷顾，但我一直都不相信。
E: Every so often, some mysterious objects appear in the warehouse. Mom always says it's {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s blessings, but I've never really believed it.

C: 天哪，赛飞儿大姐头，这这这，这我可不敢收啊……
E: Oh my gosh, boss Cipher. I... I can't possibly accept this...

C: 我需要你保护好这颗火种。如果你看到天空出现异样，不要犹豫，用你最快的速度找到救世小子，把火种交给他。
E: Then I need you to protect this Coreflame. If you notice anything unusual in the sky, then go find the Deliverer boy as fast as you can and give him this Coreflame. Don't delay for even a fraction of a second.

C: 是大工匠亲手打制的神兵利器！我早就想买一把了，只是预算一直不够，这下得偿所愿了，就是牺牲了也值得！
E: These are marvels of weaponry forged by the Grand Craftsman himself! I've always wanted one, but never had the budget. Now, I get my wish — even if I die, it will be worth it!

C: 我…我也一样啊，大姐头。如果不能和你一起施展一次最伟大的骗术…「诡计」一定也死不瞑目呀！
E: I... I feel the same way, Boss. If I don't get to perform the greatest deception... "Trickery" with you once, I won't be able to rest in peace!

C: 这路面碎得恰到好处，有种你在做梦的错觉。
E: The pavement is broken in just the right way, giving you the eerie sensation that you might be dreaming.

C: 现在这里一片寂静。满目疮痍，触目可见的只有回忆。
E: Now, only silence remains. Ruins stretch before you, and all that lingers are memories.

C: 你将其记录…愿西风为人们带去宁静。
E: You record it... May the west wind bring peace to all.

C: 不再聆听「冬」。
E: Stop listening to "Winter."

C: 没错…即便要付出一切，也应当把命运掌握在自己手里。
E: That's right... even if it costs everything, we should take control of our own fate.

C: 来了个好心人！一下不够，再来一下！快用伟大的翻飞之手把木马打碎，救我出去啊！
E: Looks like a helpful person showed up to save the day! One hit's not enough, hit it again! Use the mighty Whimsy Hand to smash the wooden horse and get me out!

C: 不错。我认为决心与过去告别，并非「看不见」，而是「视之如常」。
E: Exactly. I believe that being determined to bid farewell to the past isn't about "not seeing it," but rather "seeing it as ordinary."

C: 与你告别过去不同，我就是过去本身，我怀念与那四人出生入死的时光。
E: Unlike saying goodbye to your past, I am the past itself. I miss those life-and-death moments with those four.

C: 你看，我始终记得三月七保护你的心愿……
E: You see, I never forgot March 7th's wish to protect you...

C: …恐怕那时，无论是你，还是我都将不复存在。
E: ...I'm afraid by then, neither you nor I will exist anymore.

C: 如你所见，我处在这个奇怪符号的圆心，下面还有一双手托住我尊贵的机械躯体。
E: Look at me, positioned right at the center of this mysterious symbol, with hands underneath supporting my prestigious mechanical body.

C: …我会记住，这份温暖嗡。
E: ...I'll remember this warmth, buzz.

C: 这只黄金般的若虫站在一尊羽毛状琥珀前，交相辉映。
E: The golden nymph stands before a feather-shaped amber, their radiance complementing each other.

C: 灯泡散发着柔和的光线，你狠狠地瞪着它。
E: The light bulb emits a soft glow, and you stare hard at it.

C: 哪来的镜子？
E: Where's the mirror from?

C: 你要努力活到那时候。
E: Keep on striving for it until your time comes.

C: （梦里会有佩佩吗？）
E: (Do you think I'd be in your dream?)

C: 拿你偷走的奇物报答吧。
E: Hand over the Curio you stole as compensation.

C: （收到！线索加一！）
E: (Got it! One more clue!)

C: （我记得安保系统后台可以控制门的开关，我钻出去瞧瞧？）
E: (I remember that the backend of the security system controls the opening of doors. Let me go in and take a look?)

C: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
E: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

C: 不知道！反正弄不清，先当成心有灵犀吧！
E: I have no idea! Everything's a bit fuzzy. Let's just say it's some kind of mystical bond for now!

C: 急死了！
E: I'm getting impatient!

C: （假装睡着了）
E: (Pretending to be asleep)

C: 哎呀，怎么还自豪起来了，人家可没在夸你呢。
E: Why the pride all of a sudden? I wasn't giving out compliments here.

C: 同道。
E: Kindred spirits.

C: 突然想到…这本书的扉页，是不是缺了点什么？
E: I just realized... Isn't something missing from this book's title page?

C: …人家就不问发生过什么了。
E: ...I won't even ask what happened.

C: 嘻嘻，那人家也会哦，和{NICKNAME}呆在一起，开心得要爆炸了呢。
E: Hehe, I could explode too! Spending time with {NICKNAME} makes me so happy, I feel like I might burst with joy!

C: 千万记得，要等人家不在的时候再打开哦？不然，我会不好意思的。
E: Promise me this: only open it when I'm not around, okay? If you don't, I'll be too embarrassed.

C: 滴、答…我到底是谁……
E: Tick... tock... Who exactly am I...

C: 滴答！欢迎来到美梦小镇！
E: Tick tock! Welcome to Dreamville!

C: 小心点，可别放错地方了…
E: Be careful. Don't put them in the wrong spots...

C: （一声无奈的*哼*）
E: (Let out a resigned grunt)

C: 欢迎…
E: Welcome...

C: 不错，老夫得把这个想法记下来，要是金人能够挥动这样的岁阳武器的话，肯定是所～向～披～靡，无～人～可～挡～
E: I will write down this idea. If aurumatons can wield such a heliobus weapon, they will be unstoppable~

C: 想法倒是挺不错的。要是真能这么着，我便可以找些云骑军飞行士到驾驶舱里来试上一试……
E: Not a bad idea. If this can work, I can find some Cloud Knights to try it out in the cockpit...

C: 是吗？有徒弟说，这玩意儿要是能缩放比例做成机巧玩偶，可以赚一大笔经费。
E: You think so? Some of my apprentices said that if aurumatons can be scaled to make ingenium dolls, we can make a fortune.

C: 这次的占算对象是什么呢？
E: What's the divination target this time?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 不对！我不是被十王司镇伏了吗？我怎么附身到聪明人身上。
E: Wait, no! I've been suppressed by the Ten-Lords Commission. How am I supposed to possess someone smart?

C: 一点心意不成敬意，事成之后这些都是您的。
E: It isn't much, but they're all yours once the deed is done.

C: 我和宝箱在这等您。
E: I'll be waiting for you here with the chest.

C: 最强棋手的称号随时等待您摘取。
E: Sure. The title of Grandmaster will always be here for the taking.

C: 没有，乐趣才是重点。
E: No. Enjoyment is the key.

C: 滴、答…游客，我们又见面了。
E: Tick, tock... We meet again, guest.

C: 对啊？咦…难道看着不像？我有那么与众不同吗？
E: Yeah? Err... Do I not look like one? Am I really that different?

C: 若虫是什么？
E: What's a nymph?
Nine flames.

C: 你想住的话，随时可以来。
E: If you want to stay here, you can come whenever you please.

C: 好吧…刚才我讲的故事，的确和事实有一些微妙的不同。其实是敝人打开兽牢的大门，把斗兽群赶进了竞技场，还顺手偷走了角斗士的武器。
E: Fine... I did take some creative liberty in the story I told you... It was actually me who opened the beast cage and herded the beasts into the arena. Then, I stole the gladiators' weapons while I was at it.

C: 我是欧洛尼斯的眷从。
E: I am Oronyx's kin.

C: 既然您不愿意透露身份，那我也不再追问了。不过，您好像认得我？
E: If you're unwilling to reveal your identity, I would not pursue the matter. But you seem to recognize me?

C: 和现在很不一样。
E: It's very different from your present self.

C: 听听你最引以为豪的。
E: Your proudest feat.

C: 当然，这不过是游戏的一部分。诡计如果蔓延到游戏之外，那肯定不是什么好事。
E: Of course, it's all part of the game. Tricks that go outside the game would be a problem.

C: 别闹了，快把宝箱给我。
E: Stop playing games and give me the chest.

C: …嗯？等等。我是不是不经意间讲了一个冷笑话？既然是冥界，那熟悉这里情况的家伙当然也只能是「鬼」了嘛，桀桀桀桀……
E: ...Hmm? Wait, did I just stumble into a deadly joke? Well, I suppose there wouldn't be any living being left to tell the tale with this "killer" on the loose, hehehe...

C: 咳咳咳…好像一不小心暗示得有点多了。天机不可泄露！拜拜！
E: Ahem... I might've let slip too many hints. Some secrets must remain hidden! Bye now!

C: 别煽情，我只是为了宝箱。
E: Cut the sentimentality, I just want the chest.

C: 如您所见，咱是它老人家的一个分身，只是因为有点古道热肠，所以在协助奇美拉和小海豹们避难。不过既然被您如此捉住，那咱想必是好心办了坏事——
E: As you see, I'm one of its projections, but being somewhat kindhearted, I'm helping the chimera and baby seals escape. But since you've caught me, I must have done wrong while meaning well—

C: 这要是战场，你早死了。
E: On a real battlefield, you'd be dead by now.

C: 告诉我你主人的秘密！
E: Tell me your master's secrets!

C: 不愧是你。
E: As expected of you.

C: 但你一定能从无趣的命运手中，偷来更有趣的未来，对吧？
E: But I know you'll snatch a more thrilling future right out of fate's boring little hands, won't you?

C: 在很久很久以前——啊，也可能就在上个轮回里——有一支来自哈图西里的雇佣兵被困在了奥赫玛城外。
E: A long, long time ago... Ah, or maybe it was just the last cycle... a group of mercenaries from Hattusili found themselves stranded outside the city of Okhema.

C: 在下听说，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}偶尔会说出善意的谎言——比如说，有时候人们的行动不符合预言，过早地逼近了某些真相。
E: I've heard stories about {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. Sometimes they speak kind lies — like when people's actions veer too close to a truth that wasn't meant to be uncovered.

C: 理解力不错。不觉得这就是命运泰坦们的安排吗？放心，报酬少不了你的。
E: That's some quick understanding. Don't you think this is the arrangement of the Fate Titans? Don't worry, you'll be well-compensated.

C: …{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}在上，我宣布，辅祭的职位出现了空缺，而你得到了它，恭喜你。
E: ...{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} above! I declare the acolyte position vacant. Congratulations, you're now appointed.

C: 祭司大人，您有所不知。家父在因身体欠佳而长休前，曾是一位著名的讲师，教导过的门生不计其数。
E: Priest, you might not know this, but my father was a renowned lecturer who taught countless students before retiring due to poor health.

C: 是吗…呵……
E: Is that so... Well...

C: 瞧瞧谁来了？你的气色不错，辅祭，来找我是有什么事吗？
E: Well, look who's here! You look great, acolyte. What brings you to me today?

C: 你也是清洗者？
E: Wait, are you a Cleaner too?

C: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下？对了，火种匣，要继续打开火种匣。
E: You're... {NICKNAME}? Right... the Caskets. I need to keep opening them.

C: 打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。
E: The first layer's down. The next ones will only get more complex — stay sharp.

C: 义不容辞。
E: I won't turn my back on this.

C: 难怪感觉哪都空空的…
E: No wonder it feels so empty...

C: 做好事要留名啊！
E: Good deeds deserve a name!

C: 好像有人受伤了！
E: It looks like someone's hurt!

C: 吾到此是为正本清源，捉拿要犯——星核猎手。此人剑技非凡，手持神兵，危险至极。
E: I came to address the root of our crisis by arresting a fugitive — a Stellaron Hunter. This villain possesses exceptional swordsmanship and wields a divine weapon — they are extremely dangerous.

C: 当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
E: Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.

C: 它模拟的是什么？
E: What exactly does it simulate?

C: 黑塔？
E: Herta?

C: 黑塔的声音适时响起：「又遇见浮黎了，进展不错。在你之前的测试者甚至得不到浮黎的回响。」听上去她已经从短暂的激动状态中醒觉，因为声音又恢复成那平淡冷漠的，仿佛机械般毫无热情的语调了。
E: You hear Herta's voice at just the right time. "You met Fuli again. Well done. Previous testers never even got a response from Fuli." Sounds like she has settled down from her excitement, and her voice has returned to the usual emotionless and mechanical register.

C: 「哦，好，明白了，这样啊。」黑塔流畅地回答，「有个好消息告诉你：通过这段时间的沉浸体验与学习，这台机器已经很适应你了，现在你通过深度沉浸，让『模拟宇宙』引导你的意识，为你打造专属的 <color=#dbc291ff>『位面饰品』</color>。」
E: "Ah, okay, I see. Got it," replies Herta fluidly, "I've got some good news for you: The computer's grown highly adapted to you throughout all the immersion experiences and machine learning we've been doing. You can immerse yourself deeper now. Let the Simulated Universe guide your mind and build your own exclusive <color=#dbc291ff>Planar Ornament</color>."

C: 现在你可以选择自己认识的人加入队伍，他们的能力也和现实中你的认知一致。
E: Now you can choose from people you know to join your team. Their abilities are consistent with your perception of them in reality.

C: 购买一个随机稀有祝福
E: Buy a random rare Blessing

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「在这里就不多说了，接着探索吧，可以进行沉浸的时候我再向你说明。」</color>她难得地笑了一声。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"That's all you need to know for now. Get exploring, and I'll fill in the gaps once you are ready to get immersed."</color>She lets out a laugh, a rare thing from her.

C: 你伸手抚摸脸颊，似乎什么东西溅到了你的脸上…触觉并不美妙。
E: You reach for the cheeks and feel something splashed onto your face... The sensation isn't pleasant.

C: 你还没有反应过来，黑塔的声音开始变得渐渐扭曲……
E: You have yet to come to senses, and Herta's voice starts becoming distorted...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>歌语对抗饕餮消亡交错哀语由衷捕捞沙王记忆海面背处子嗣吞噬搏斗伶人虚空倒转旧影撰写</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>lyric confront gluttony decease entwine eulogy sincere catch sand king memory sea surface backside children devour brawl actor void inverse vestige compose</color>

C: 那些音节…组成祂的声音。那些名号…是于祂的控制下，依照确定的时代，顺序兴起后又湮灭的帝国、城邦、文明……
E: Those syllables... make up the Aeon's sound. Those names belong to the empires, states, and civilizations that have risen and fallen in predestined times and sequence in accordance with the Aeon's control...

C: 「噢，集群星之母！」阿哈开始夸夸，祂的话却使你浑身不适，「只要你想做的事情足够好玩——哪怕是接力棒游戏！局势瞬息万变，上一次我们还在洽谈，下一次太一就变成了你。惋惜…我的老朋友！但祂使你看上去更*好*了。」
E: "Oh, the mother of all stars!" Aha starts the compliments, but the words make you uncomfortable. "As long as what you want to do is fun enough, even if it's a baton game! Changes happen rapidly. We were still negotiating last time, but this time, Ena already became you. It's a shame, my friend! But I must say Ena makes you look even better."

C: 「结论：丰饶星神此时<color=#dbc291ff>尚未出现</color>。」螺丝咕姆机械齿轮般的声音响起，「依照约定，我会支付筹码给黑塔女士。」
E: "Conclusion: The Aeon of Abundance <color=#dbc291ff>didn't exist during this time period</color>." Screwllum's robotic gear-like voice comes. "As promised, I'll pay Madam Herta some chips."

C: 他们渴望你给予回答，渴望你从「开拓」中带来答案——他们的神去了哪里？现在你要给出回答…你就是那个救世者；你没有人可以依靠！你仿佛理解了药师的慈怀之心，你平心静气、深深呼吸，将从万千杂音中寻找到可回应的那一缕……
E: They long for you to give an answer, an answer you can bring from Trailblaze — Where did their god go? Now, you have to answer them. You are none other than the savior — having no one to rely on! You seem to understand Yaoshi's compassion now. You calm down and take a deep breath before searching for the one voice among many to which you can respond.

C: 你终于忍无可忍，将一个光着身子的男人从石柜中拉出：「没有虫子了！别躲了！」
E: In the end, you lose your patience and pull a naked man out of the cabinet, shouting, "Stop hiding! The Swarm is no more!"

C: 此刻，一种奇异、复合的声音从天空的四周传来——你看到贡多拉上众人的怪异反应，他们似乎无法抵抗这种声音。你难以理解这些是来自何种维度的声音，它是轰鸣、呜咽、笑声和横向排列的颂歌和音集结；你身边的人如得神启，不顾阻拦，在粉尘中跟着节律敲击「忆泡」——直至它破裂！
E: At that moment, an eerie, amalgamated sound emanates from all corners of the sky — you see everyone on the gondola acting bizarrely, seemingly unable to resist this sound. You have no idea which dimension the noise can be sourced from, but it sounds akin to a cacophonous carol with booming, whimpering, and laughter combined with hymns arranged in parallel. Everyone except you succumbs to the noise, falling into a state of ecstasy as if they have witnessed divine revelations. Despite your attempts to stop them, they follow the rhythm and pound the Memory Bubble in the dust until it cracks!

C: 彼时，戈尔康达智械的祖先正沉浸于机械星系的基建，对有机生命面临的危机浑然未知：正如此后无机与有机生命间将出现的不可调和矛盾，一场又一场沙盘推演在宇宙间悄然发生——
E: At that time, the ancestors of the Intellitrons of Golcondar were immersed in the infrastructure of the mechanical planetary system, completely unaware of the crisis faced by organic beings. Their ignorance laid the foundation for the countless irreconcilable contradictions that would arise between inorganic and organic life in the future. Endless wars raged on the vast sandbox of the universe...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 我十分想念你。
E: I miss you a lot.

C: 「是的，『同谐』的光辉接着显露了。」阮•梅的声音冷不丁地响起，「有趣的是，在『欢愉』、『同谐』的迹象之中，『均衡』的现象似乎一直存在。我们未推演出祂，但祂贯穿始终，在天平发生偏移时产生微妙痕迹，祂的决定无法被质疑。」
E: "Yes. The Harmony's radiance then reveals itself," Ruan Mei's voice suddenly rings out. "Interesting enough, the phenomenon of Equilibrium appears to have always been present amidst signs of Elation and Harmony. We did not manage to deduce the Equilibrium, but THEY were present throughout everything, creating subtle traces evident when the scales of balance tip — THEIR decisions are not to be questioned."

C: 「是啊。」黑塔冷冷地说，「又不是真的。只是数据消散罢了，再次聚拢就好啰。『战争』才不会在乎个体的死活…我们都死一遍也很正常。哈，但是我们能在模拟宇宙中作弊呀！多好。」
E: "Yep." Herta says coldly. "It's not real anyway. It's just data being dissipated, and we just have to gather it again. War doesn't care about individual deaths... It's perfectly normal that we've all died once. Ha, but we can cheat death in the Simulated Universe! How useful is that?"

C: 「而祂们永恒凝视。」螺丝咕姆说。
E: "And THEIR gazes are timeless," Screwllum remarks.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 「螺丝！你来自螺丝星，是螺丝族的一员！」安达吐尔•扎扎罗笑了起来，「没错，你有<color=#dbc291ff>智能</color>。你也许会发展出情感、思维、感受和自由意志，看，我的手掌就是『认知测试』的机器。它现在在你头顶，咱们试试。」
E: "A Screwhead! You come from the Planet Screwllum and are part of the Screwlites!" Andatur Zazzalo chuckles, "Indeed, you have <color=#dbc291ff>intelligence</color>. There's a chance you can develop emotions, thoughts, senses, and free will. See, my hand is a device that can evaluate your cognition, and I've placed it above your head. Let's try it out."

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 获得第一个启示。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Obtaining the first revelation.

C: 你无法…切断它。
E: You cannot... sever it.

C: 但直觉告诉你并非如此，因为有人没能发出声音，而你也不愿相信一位暴君。所以，你想要赌一把，想要见见那些怪物，用生命记录一份暴行。
E: But your intuition informs you otherwise, as one of them fails to make a sound — and you don't want to believe a tyrant. So, you intend to try and take a gamble, wanting to meet those monsters and to record an act of violence with your own life.

C: 在意识残留的最后时分，你看到一些干枯的躯体飘浮在黑暗里，他们在怒吼。
E: In that last fleeting second of consciousness, you see some desiccated bodies floating through the darkness. They are roaring.

C: 失去了天穹的斑斓星，阳光再一次洒在大地上。你梦见了泊维利-Ⅲ，在琥珀色的辉光里，故去的人们微笑着向你告别。
E: With the sky dome no longer up, resplendence gazes down on the land once more. You dream of Bavelli-3, those fallen smiling as they say goodbye beneath the amber glow.

C: 你推起售货的小推车，看着眼前的人们对一群猴子大呼「艺术」和「报酬」。
E: You shove aside the sales trolley and see people shouting "art" and "reward" at a troupe of apes.

C: 香醇的新天地，点缀着大大小小的肉泥。那片苍翠的山脉可以留下，舒适的环境能让初生的幼虫更早迎来蜕壳，吃了太多肉类，那些清甜的植物也能稍稍润泽你的口舌。不过这里的云层太过厚重，漫长的雨季会影响鞘翅的飞行。
E: This aromatic new world is dotted with meatballs of all sizes. The lush green mountains can stay behind, and too comfortable an environment can cause newborn larvae to molt early. If you eat too much meat, the sweet plants can moisten your lips. However, the cloud cover here is altogether too thick, and the long rainy season will impact the movement of elytra.

C: 海洋的深处传来一阵震颤，你连忙穿戴好跃迁装备，黑暗在瞬间遮蔽住你的眼眸。
E: A tremor pulses out from the depths of the ocean. You rush to wear your warp jumping gear, before darkness overwhelms your vision in an instant.

C: 到终点站了。
E: We're at the final destination.

C: 你仿佛看到一个婴孩，永远也不会长大，只是蜷缩在死亡的缝隙里，持续着伤痛的啜泣。他将你吞入口中，也将星星吞入口中。
E: You see what looks like a baby before you, one that will never grow older, but remains curled up in the crevice of death, forever sobbing in pain. They swallow you into their mouth, as they swallow the stars above.

C: 兼并更多成员。
E: Merge more members.

C: 诊断他们的疾病。
E: Diagnose their conditions.

C: 你将实验的目光放到了一颗行星上，它的大小正巧能够容纳一个智慧种族的诞生，多样的生命占据了每个角落。
E: You set your eyes on a planet as the subject of your experiment. Its size is perfect to support a race of intelligent life and diverse life forms thrive in every corner.

C: 你再也无法忍耐对学者身上那股浓烈情绪的食欲，你冲他猛扑过去，袭击未遂。「我能感觉到我们离成功已经越来越近了，这次能把你的思维做成火焰的灯芯，下一次就能把你塞进帝皇的碎片里。」
E: You can no longer restrain the intense hunger for the scholar and unleash a ferocious attack that does not land. "I can sense that we are getting ever closer to success. I can take your thoughts from this experiment to use as the wick for the flames. Next time, I will be able to insert you into the Imperial Fragment."

C: 另一位穿着斗篷的来访者从怀中取出一个匣子，你注意到这位来访者斗篷下的獠牙与铁锈味的指爪。他打开匣子，里面存放着一枚跳动的果实。
E: The other visitor draped in a cloak produces a box from their arms as you notice their fangs and rust-scented claws concealed underneath. As he opens the box, you see a beating fruit inside.

C: 你决定从初始记录开始检索，那里的数据量少的像一滴水。你看到这颗星球上的第一种文字，那是一块距今两万三千年前的石板，歪歪扭扭的符号记录着一场丰收。
E: You decide to begin searching from your earliest records, though the data is sparse, like dripping water. You see the first ever written text of this planet. It is from a stone tablet from <unbreak>23,000</unbreak> years ago, with crooked symbols recording an abundant harvest.

C: 数据量开始激增，宗教、道德、文学、艺术、哲学、科学、它们在历史的舞台上先后登场，无数的人物和事件汇聚成江河，再从江河奔向汪洋。
E: Your data begins to increase rapidly: Religion, morals, literature, art, philosophy, and science. One-by-one they take to the stage of history as countless human events form a great river that rushes towards the ocean.

C: 「医者可以自医，但卜者不能自卜。如果我们所在的宇宙就是一位特大号卜者，一旦他瞥视自我的命运，会不会选择自戕呢？」面具人鞠了一躬，「现在请诸位欣赏喜剧：『量子历史衰落史』。」
E: "Though a healer can heal themselves, a diviner cannot tell their own future. If our universe is but a great diviner, once they glance their own destiny, would they not simply end their own lives?" The masked man takes a bow. "Now, please enjoy our comedy: 'The Decline of Quantum History.'"

C: 「…看来你已经很了解我了。」
E: "...Seems like you do understand me well."

C: 参与跨学科交流活动。
E: Join in the cross-discipline discussion.

C: 「那道涟漪的起点，是<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊演算的『时刻』！</color>那是…星神思考时的驻波。」
E: "The origin of these waves is an <color=#dbc291ff>"Instant" extrapolated by Nous!</color> That's the standing wave generated from an Aeon's thought!"

C: 为坟场的智械而建。
E: Built for the Intellitrons in the graveyard.

C: 「我先先先先撤啦——」斯蒂芬的残留声音也一同消散。
E: "I'm g-g-g-g-going to go first..." Stephen's fading echo also dissipates into the air.

C: 黄金与机械？
E: Gold and Gears?

C: 非常感谢您的帮助，黑塔女士。尾款支付会在……
E: I appreciate your help, Madam Herta. The final payment will be made...

C: 不过，它用自己账户里全部的信用点，在星际互联网络帮模拟宇宙发布了「招募合伙人」的消息。它说愿赌服输，虽然不能透露工作内容，但可以换种形式。
E: Still, it spent all the credits in its account to post a "Collaborator Recruitment" advert on the Interastral Network for the Simulated Universe. It said although it couldn't disclose the exact details of the job, it can honor the bet in a different way.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 你身处「西格玛星系联合剧院」的五号大厅。你不敢相信，自己坐在一群衣香鬓影的绅士与淑女之间。
E: You are in Hall No. 5 of the Sigma Galaxy United Theater. You find it hard to believe that you're sitting among a group of well-dressed and sophisticated ladies and gentlemen.

C: 「你回来了。我知道我不会等太久。」她看到你，双手交叉靠在下颚，丝毫不感到意外。
E: "You're back. I knew you wouldn't make me wait too long." She puts her chin on her crossed fingers, not at all surprised by your visit.

C: 你在「哀恸洞穴」中被困已久…你逐渐变得胡子拉碴、眼神颓靡。倘若此时任谁到来帮助你，你都将其视之为「救赎」。
E: You have been stuck in the Mourning Cave for ages... You have become unkempt, with a weary look in your eyes. If anyone were to come and help you at this moment, you would see them as your salvation.

C: 骑士为你献上一朵花。
E: The knight offers you a flower.

C: 你一无所获，这令你非常伤心。
E: You feel sad. You gained nothing.

C: 你的鸡尾酒搅拌完成了。一位身着缀有亮片的礼服、目光婀娜的女士突然走过来，她带着珠光的耳坠正在灯光下闪烁，这光芒令你眼花缭乱。她抢走了你的酒，却还对着你笑，她挑衅地对你招了招手。
E: You have finished stirring your cocktail. A lady in a sequined dress with a sensuous gaze suddenly walks over. The gems on her earrings sparkle under the lights, and you are bedazzled. She grabs the cocktail from your hands but still waves at you with a provocative smile.

C: 「你知道什么是双乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…双乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
E: "Have you heard of the Double Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Double Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."

C: 他是谁？
E: Who is he?

C: 「逻辑：鉴于大一统方程缺失，本机尚未具备完整的造物机能，因此，仅支持模糊需求的物品生产，请见谅。」
