E: "Logic: Due to a disparity in the grand unified equation, this machine is not yet capable of complete creation functions. Therefore, only the creation of products with vague requirements can be supported. Thank you for your understanding."

C: 你很快意识到，自己遭遇了银河史上第二无解的哲学难题——今天吃什么。
E: You immediately realize that you have encountered the second most challenging philosophical conundrum in the universe — What to eat?

C: 「菠萝还是面包？！」观众们不耐烦地催促。
E: "Pineapple or bread!?" The spectators impatiently spur you on.

C: 就是那儿！让愚者做出最后的转向。
E: Right there! Get the Fool to make the final turn there.

C: 你向着圣殿的方向进发。巨大的门扉上刻画着古老的嗔王，伯伦格星之主。被假面愚者欺骗后，嗔王用法令杀死了疆域内所有的笑声。
E: You head toward the sacred temple. The colossal door is engraved with a portrait of the Wrath King, the sovereign of Planet Behrenger. Deceived by the Masked Fools, the Wrath King issued a decree that silenced all laughter within his kingdom.

C: 为了人类的荣耀！
E: For the glory of humanity!

C: 你来不及思考镜面的箴言，默念着雅努斯的尊名，一头扎入镜中。
E: You have no time to ponder on the mirror's admonition. Muttering Janus' revered name under your breath, you dive into the mirror headfirst.

C: 你紧闭双眼，脚下纵深的地方，传来轰然倒塌的巨响。你默念着雅努斯的名号，继续向前行进。
E: You tightly shut your eyes, as a thunderous crash echoes from the depths beneath your feet. You mutter Janus' name and press on.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 你知道这个赌注有点危险，握住棋子的手指都在颤抖，但你的勇敢也将得到泰坦的回应。
E: You know this bet to be somewhat dangerous — even your hand holding the chesspiece is trembling. But your courage will earn a Titan's response.

C: 尼卡多利锻造出诸多神兵，模仿它的手笔，地上的众人也得以冶炼武器。
E: Nikador forged many divine soldiers and inspired those on the earth to master the art of weapon forging.

C: 其三为盾，在塞纳托斯的馈赠下，由冥界的泥土抟造，足以抵挡愤怒的雷霆。
E: The third creation was a shield, gifted by Thanatos and molded from the nether realm's clay, strong enough to withstand furious lightning bolts.

C: 它也曾与墨涅塔隔冥河而长谈，众神的战争误伤了瑟希斯的神体，它的伴侣甘愿冒着陨落的风险，来到塞纳托斯面前，祈求挽回理性之泰坦的残魂。
E: They once conversed across the River of Souls with Mnestia, as Cerces' divine form was gravely harmed in the gods' wars. Braving the risk of demise, Cerces' partner pled with Thanatos to preserve the fading soul of the Reason Titan.

C: 多年以后，年轻的英雄手持利剑，率兵攻破了被僭主统治的故乡，让剑尖笔直地刺进王冠的中央。
E: Years later, the young hero, wielding the sword, led his troops to overthrow the tyrant ruling his homeland, driving the blade straight into the center of the crown.

C: 它无声地探出灰黯之手，收下酬劳，将你牵引上船。然后，划动船桨。
E: They silently extend the Hand of Shadow, accept your payment, and pull you aboard before rowing the oars.

C: 以歌舞赞颂泰坦的威名。
E: Sing and dance to praise the Titan's renown.

C: 多么漫长的时光，当头发花白，老人在病榻逝去。两只甲虫也穿过战场，飞向爱之神的花园。
E: As time passes, hair turns white, and the elderly pass peacefully on their beds. Two beetles cross the battlefield, journeying to the garden of the god of love.

C: 万径之门，它在大地上雕刻出道路，用于行走的盘桓在山间和平原，用于流淌的凹陷成为河流和山谷。
E: The Gate of Infinity carves paths upon the earth, creating walkways through mountains and plains and sculpting riverbeds and valleys for streams.

C: 你犹犹豫豫，不知道该如何抉择。
E: You hesitate, unsure of what to do.

C: 灶筒涌出的热气将羊皮气囊迅速膨胀，涂了糖油的螺旋桨发出咯吱咯吱的愉快声响，你最后整理了一遍包裹着飞行器的棉花糖，摇摇晃晃地起飞了。
E: A burst of heat from the stove pipe inflates the sheepskin airbag in an instant. The sugar-glazed propellers creak and groan in delight. After one last check of the cotton candy-wrapped aircraft, you lift off, wobbling into the sky.

C: 你已经比翁法罗斯<unbreak>99.99%</unbreak>的人站得高了，还是下去吧，地上比较踏实。
E: You're already standing above <unbreak>99.99%</unbreak> of Amphoreus. Perhaps it's time to descend. The ground is far more dependable.

C: 短暂的失明后，你重新看见了刚才的两扇门，唯一不同的是，你的背包里多了几样财宝，看来打开的方式对了，但又没完全对。
E: After a brief moment of blindness, your vision clears, and before you stand the same two doors as before. Only this time, your backpack feels heavier. A few new treasures rest inside. It seems you were on the right track, just not quite right enough.

C: 不管祭祀们有没有刻意隐瞒，他们的做法或许是正确的。对于凡人来说，过早地知道世界的真相并非好事。
E: Whether the priests deliberately conceal it or not, their approach may be wise. For mortals, knowing the world's truth too soon is never a blessing.

C: 这工作我也能干。
E: I can do this job too.

C: 平衡被打破了。
E: The balance is broken.

C: 连尼卡多利都出动了。
E: Even Nikador is on the move.

C: 开始体检。
E: Begin medical examination.

C: 好像还是没什么反应，你决定——
E: Still doesn't seem like anything happened, so you decide to...

C: 您好，订餐机器人「炒饭天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>号」为您服务。
E: Hello, Food Order Robot Cooking Genius No. <unbreak>123</unbreak> at your service!

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，我有一次好像听见墙壁在跟我说话。
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. I thought I could hear the walls talking to me once.

C: 翻翻书柜里有什么。
E: Browse the bookshelf to see what's there.

C: 我捡到一张纸条，是你的吗？
E: I found this note. Is it yours?

C: 离开这里。
E: Leave this place.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 不过能在镇上偶遇你这位大英雄，也算是弥补了些遗憾了！
E: But being able to meet a great hero such as yourself right now more than makes up for it!

C: 他大声宣告。随后，解脱的喟叹自人群中炸裂开来。你也感到一阵解脱——太好了，看来大家都是文明人——没人会对一块可怜的*石头*做些什么的……
E: He announces at the top of his lungs. Soon after, sighs of relief come from the crowd. A surge of relief washes over you, too. It's great that people here are civilized, and no one will do anything bad to a pathetic STONE...

C: 「那恶人将独自攀登皮格马利翁灵峰，前往最高处拓得变幻莫测的预言碑铭；若碑铭宣称赦免此人，那么他在诸位酋长的见证下重获清白！」
E: "The wrongdoer will climb Mount Pygmalion alone and reach the peak, where they must rub a copy of the stele's prophetic inscription. If the wrongdoer is pardoned by the inscription, then their name will be cleared in the presence of the chiefs!"

C: 难道是那覆着油膜的、令人作呕的鞘翅吗？你侧耳倾听…果然，正是那对恶心的翅膀正煽动空气——反复地、尖锐地、喑哑地嘶鸣着那受诅咒的*名字*……
E: Could the sound come from their filthy wings covered with an oily film? You listen intently... yes, the disgusting wings are flapping in the air as they repeatedly utter that cursed NAME in a shrill and coarse hiss...

C: 「还是检测不到任何通讯吗？」你的队长显得有些烦躁。可在你看来，学会的人不过是一群打着学术幌子的经费骗子罢了！何必这样担忧？你不理解。
E: "Still no signals detected?" Your captain sounds anxious. In your view, people from the Guild are swindlers who hoodwink others under the guise of knowledge. You do not understand why the captain is so worried.

C: 「够了！」你拍案而起——这女人简直是在羞辱你，羞辱整个丹尼索瓦公国！可她只是扶了扶眼镜，看起来完全不在乎你那几乎要涌出喉咙的剧烈怒火。
E: "I've had it!" You slam your hands on the desk as you stand up. This woman is clearly humiliating you and the entire Dukedom of Denisova! However, she merely adjusts her glasses, completely unfazed by the rage within you that is threatening to explode.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 奇怪，为什么那帮大个子就不怕烫呢……
E: That's strange. How come those big guys aren't worried about getting burned...

C: 欸~你们竟然能识破我的伪装，难道你们也是我家太太的祭司？好久没见到它了嗡…
E: Wow~ You actually saw straight through my disguise. Don't tell me you're my lady's priest, are you? I haven't seen them in a long time...

C: Zzz…嗯，我睡着了？
E: Zzz... Eh? Sorry, I dozed off for a sec there.

C: 它们来了…它们来了…！
E: They're here... they're here...!

C: 在一个合格的工匠眼里，即便高墙倾塌、雕像坍圮，顽石里依然包孕着未来的模样。
E: In the eyes of a certified craftsman, even if the walls fall down and the statues collapse to the ground, the rubble will still contain the shape of the future.

C: 可惜这只是张壁画…唉，假如是真的该多好喀。
E: It's a real shame this is just a mural though... *sigh* How wonderful it would be were it real.

C: 我想挣点*外快*。你懂的。
E: I'm looking for some EXTRA DOUGH. You know what I mean?

C: 嗯，我见识过你这玩意的威力，硬度肯定够——不过你还得留着它揍人吧？
E: Hmm. I've seen this thing of yours in action. It definitely is solid, but shouldn't you hold on to it to fight?

C: 不方便透露。
E: That's for me to know.

C: 我得再到别处热热身…
E: I need to step away for a moment to warm up...

C: 摊主的话语传进你的耳朵…但你此刻已经意识模糊，根本无暇考虑输赢。你只想做一件事……
E: The stall owner's words reach your ears, but... you are already slipping into unconsciousness. You couldn't care about whether you won or lost. There's only one thing on your mind...

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 「你也是来试运气的吗」？
E: "Are you here to try your luck, too?"

C: 「麻烦给我一个五星好评。」
E: "Please give me a 5-star review."

C: 你盯上了这条小巷。老实说，你老早就想进去一探究竟了，但你心底朴素的正义感始终没能让你踏出这一步。
E: You fix your eyes on this narrow alley. To be honest, you've been wanting to explore it for a while now, but the sense of justice in your heart forbids you from stepping into this place.

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: 眼前这位居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将为数不少的信用点转让给了你。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: The resident in front of you swiftly hands over a hefty amount of credits, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: 那、那啥，您别不说话啊……
E: W—Well, say anything please...

C: 一起来玩吧……
E: Come play with us...

C: <size=36>啊！这脸庞！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah! The face!</size>

C: 那么小一张卷轴，怎么可能容纳得下智慧喀！
E: How can a scroll this size contain such wisdom!

C: 前有绝景——
E: Gorgeous view ahead—

C: 长势真不错啊…
E: Such fine growth...

C: <size=36>哇！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah!</size>

C: 板条箱小山真高！可惜还是挡不住你{M#魁梧}{F#高挑}的身材。你真希望自己能和虎克一般大，可你再也无法回到那无忧无虑的时光了。
E: This pile of crates is really high! Unfortunately, it won't provide cover for your {M#big}{F#tall} frame. You really wish that you were the same size as Hook, but you'll never be able to go back to those carefree days.

C: 维修一把矿镐可能很容易，但想重建人与人之间破裂的信任——不可能，简直难如登天。
E: It might be easy enough to mend a pickax, but trying to repair the broken trust between people is as impossible as touching the sky.

C: 但蝶会默默地祝福你，一直、一直默默祝福你嗡……
E: But I'll keep blessing you quietly, always and forever, buzz...

C: 我们的脚步总愿意在美曾经悲哀地生活过的土地上徘徊，好让我们意识到它并不属于尘世。
E: Our footsteps always linger on lands where beauty once lived sorrowfully, reminding us that such beauty does not belong to the mortal world.

C: 我从来没见过美丽的斯缇科西亚。它变成这幅破烂模样的时候，我还没出生呢。
E: I've never seen the beautiful Styxia. It was already in ruins by the time I was born.

C: 是不是这样，白昼的快乐时光就能一直继续下去嗡？
E: If I keep this up, will the happy moments of the day last forever?

C: Zzz…
E: Zzz…

C: 你是个好心人，我愿意陪你再聊几句。
E: You are a kind person. I'm willing to talk with you for a moment more.

C: 爷带你去看点儿好看的…
E: I'll take you to see something good...

C: 我可没听说过这种规矩。再说了你跟一只机巧鸟比组枪，你看我有手吗？
E: I've never heard of such a rule. Besides, you're competing with a cycrane here at gun assembly. Do I look like I have any hands to you?

C: 你是{F#男的}{M#女的}。
E: You are a {F#boy}{M#girl}.

C: 说吧，刚才这只机巧鸟玩具到底是什么鸟？
E: Tell me, what kind of bird is that toy cycrane?

C: （一不做二不休）
E: (Let's get the job done)

C: 有这么奇怪吗？我的敌人、我的战友、甚至是我保护的弱者，都应该知道我到底为何而战！我必须大声说出来。
E: What's so weird about that? My enemies, my comrades, and even the weak whom I protect — all should know what I'm fighting for! I have to shout it out from the rooftops!

C: 机巧鸟——
E: Cycrane...

C: 有没有一种可能，它故意给出了错误的地址？
E: Is there any possibility that it gave you the wrong address deliberately?

C: 老大你不是特别的吗？老大你快说说……
E: Boss, aren't you special? Please tell us you're special...

C: 这不公平！
E: That's not fair!

C: 若虫也有创世神话？
E: Nymphs have their own tales of Genesis?

C: 这种事直接上报地衡司！
E: Report this kind of thing to the Realm-Keeping Commission, ASAP!

C: 被歧视、被诬蔑、被抛弃…难道，这就是我们雨之民注定要经历的命运喀……
E: Discrimination, slander, abandonment... Is this truly the fate we Rainfolk were born to suffer, crrk?

C: 光靠自己根本解不开！
E: You won't crack it by yourself!

C: 那你怎么不来？
E: Why don't you try?
You...

C: 可剧本不是这么写的！
E: But this is not how script's supposed to go!

C: 哦？真的吗？
E: Oh, really?

C: 炸弹？噢，你说那个惊吓箱吧！青镞和我大概说明了一下状况……
E: Bomb? Oh, you meant the prank scare box? Qingzu explained most of the situation to me...

C: 左一个卜者右一个匠人的，嘁，还不是被我玩得团团转！不过如此！
E: They might be a diviner and a craftsman, but they are no match for me! They're so easy!

C: 哎哟不行了，怎么会有这么好笑的大人呐。我看他们发了地点，就一连租了好些星槎，专门接送看热闹的好事之人。
E: I can't... these adults are too hilarious! I saw that they posted the location, so I rented multiple starskiffs specifically to shuttle the spectators who came to watch the fun.

C: 看来是时候未到，你如此告诉自己——想象力太丰富，有时候也并非是件好事。
E: It's probably not your time, you tell yourself — sometimes, it's not necessarily good to have an active imagination.

C: …这谁顶得住啊。
E: ...Who can even handle that?

C: 感觉不是很靠谱啊。
E: That's kinda unreliable...

C: 元老院计划削减开支…
E: The Council of Elders plans to cut costs...

C: 黑潮怪物是吧？
E: A black tide monster, huh?

C: 别争了，来帮忙疏散！
E: Stop arguing and help with the evacuation!

C: 你在干什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: （继续围观。）
E: (Keep watching.)

C: 硬币都没沾到星槎的边，径直落入了天空球中。女人在一旁毫不掩饰地嗤笑。
E: The coin doesn't even hit the side of the starskiff, and falls straight into the skybox. The woman doesn't bother concealing her schadenfreude.

C: （向左跑。）
E: (Run left.)

C: 苏打豆汁儿吧，够地道。
E: Is mung bean soda authentic enough for you?

C: 怎么会有这么多糖啊！帕姆一不小心就全部喝完了，好想再来一瓶啊，但是这热量…呜呜！
E: How can they put so much sugar in it! I just casually slammed the whole thing and really want another, but think of the calories... A-boohoo!

C: 列车长的馈赠
E: The Conductor's Rewards

C: 这次叫{NICKNAME}乘客回来，原因也很简单…咳咳！你，有没有感觉在成长的道路上，心中不免有些迷茫、困顿和烦恼呢？
E: Pom-Pom called you back this time for a very simple reason, {NICKNAME}... Ahem! Have you ever been a bit confused or troubled on your journey of growth?

C: 果然不是我多心！不过，列车上没有养小动物，这节车厢也没有铺绒毛地毯，怎么会有这种东西帕……
E: So Pom-Pom's not going crazy! There're no small animals on the Express however, and this carriage isn't covered in woolen carpet. How could this be, then...

C: 其实是这样的…唔，这是你上车之前的事了，有一次列车停靠在空间站里——
E: Actually, it's like this... Well, this was before you got on the Express. Once, the Express stopped at the space station...

C: 停停停，列车长的头可不能乱摸！
E: Stop, stop, stop, you can't touch Pom-Pom's head like that!

C: （打碎杯子）
E: (Smash it)

C: 没有车窗吗…但那样就不安全了帕！
E: No windows... But that wouldn't be safe!

C: （稍微少记录几厘米）
E: (Slightly take off a couple of centimeters)

C: 尽管问就是了！
E: Ask away!

C: 不是什么要紧事，但在列车上要听列车长的话帕！
E: It's no big deal, but you have to listen to the conductor when you're on the Astral Express!

C: 嗯，身上有些挂彩，在外面吃了不少苦头吧？要准备医疗用品……
E: Mmm, you've been in the wars, haven't you? You're covered in scars. Let me get some medicine...

C: 好累，怎么每天都有那么多科员要来医疗舱？这里又不是办事大厅！
E: I'm exhausted. Why are the researchers flocking to the medical cabin every day? This isn't the administration office!

C: 我只是比较爱干净帕？
E: I think I'm just a bit of a clean freak.

C: 既然今天{NICKNAME}乘客在，那就麻烦你啦！等帕姆去调整一下车厢灯光的调度就好哦。
E: Since you're here, {NICKNAME}, I'll count on you to help me! Please wait for me to adjust the lights.

C: 刚才一下子看了太多颜色，帕姆有点头晕…{NICKNAME}乘客也先休息一下，再来告诉帕姆你的选择吧！
E: I'm feeling a bit dizzy after looking at too many colors... Please take a break and tell me your choice in all honesty, {NICKNAME}!

C: 呜呜，这下子清扫起来可就麻烦了…不过也怪帕姆没有给你说清楚，剩下的工作就交给我帕……
E: Oh, no! Cleaning this up will be a lot of work... It's my fault for not giving you clear instructions. Just leave the rest to me...

C: （将事情的原委告诉帕姆）
E: (Tells Pom-Pom about the robots)

C: 算了，你去忙你的吧！这种事情我一个人也能解决！
E: Forget it. Go and do your work! Pom-Pom can handle this kind of thing alone!

C: 我来检查下留声机，顺便听听歌。
E: I am here to check the Phonograph and listen to the music.

C: 无论是帕姆还是身为乘客的你们，要珍惜和我们一起共同乘车的同伴…这样的话，那片刻的欢乐与感情就有了更深刻的意义……
E: Whether it's me or passengers such as yourself, it's the same for all of us — we need to cherish the companions who ride along with us... That will make the moments of joy and bonding along the way even more meaningful...

C: 大门已经打开了。请穿过封锁区，接受邓恩队长的试炼吧。
E: The gate's now open. Please cross the blockade and undertake Captain Dunn's trial.

C: 去吧，我看好你，{NICKNAME}教官！
E: Go on then. I believe in you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}!

C: 如果你想借用「照雪灯炉」的机制来降低作战的负荷，那就多留意一下散在它处的「热能核心」吧。
E: If you want to use the Snowshine Lamps to reduce your load in combat, then pay close attention to its loose thermic core.

C: 如我所料，裂界肯定不会就此安分下来。北边的城墙外不知道还潜藏着多少怪物，时刻准备好侵入回廊。
E: As I expected, the Fragmentum would not be willing to back off so easily. There must be countless monsters lurking outside the northern wall, waiting to invade the corridor.

C: 一声脆响，你意识到电话那头的人已经拿起了听筒，准备与你进行一轮激烈的言语交锋。箭在弦上——开始你的即兴表演吧！
E: You realize the call is picked up on the other end, and that person is prepared to engage in a heated exchange of words with you. Time for improv!

C: 好的，祝您度过愉快的一天。
E: All right, have a nice day.

C: 那铃铛会发出清脆的响声，好听极了……
E: The bell chimes with crisp clarity. It's a joy to hear...

C: 啊…这不祥的气味……
E: Ah... an ominous air...

C: 幸运的是，你未经思考的呼喊没有引起任何人的注意；不幸的是，你不知道这箱子里滴答响的东西究竟是炸弹还是金表。
E: Fortunately, your reckless yelling didn't cause anyone to notice us. And unfortunately, we still don't know if it's a bomb or just some kind of timepiece.

C: 喔喔喔——冷静！有什么需求可以坐下来好好谈嘛，别激动！
E: Whoa whoa whoa, take it easy! Let's just sit down and have a chat. No need to get all riled up.

C: 哈哈，你还挺有礼貌。我喜欢。
E: Hah, so you do have manners. I like that.

C: 井盖还有名字？！
E: The manhole cover has a name!?

C: …潇洒地关上柜门。「啪」！
E: ...close the door in one smooth move. Bang!

C: 相信自己，只要你再稍微坚持一会儿…一定会有比伸手不见五指的黑暗更有趣的事情发生。保准带劲。
E: Trust yourself. Just wait a little longer... Something more interesting than this pitch darkness will occur. It's guaranteed to be the real deal.

C: 这不是在敷衍你，而是画师将人物刻画得太过传神，以至于此处再有任何描述都是画蛇添足。你看，他那似笑非笑的嘲讽神情已经能够说明一切了。
E: This isn't going over your head, but the portrait really is so expressive that any description here would be gilding the lily. Look, his half-smiling sneer says it all, really.

C: 这些…狂野的画像是谁画的？
E: Who painted these... wild portraits?

C: 东、南、西、北——你总要先定下一个「开拓」的方向。
E: North, east, south, and west. You must first decide on the next trailblazing direction.

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 她又重复了一遍。她在渴求回答。
E: She repeats, craving your answer.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 在你眼里它是一把刀。可在我眼里，它是一件文物，冲锋陷阵，历尽风霜，斩过丰饶孽物，斩过钢铁劲敌。谁能想到，如今它的命运，却是折在了一个什么都不懂的小毛孩手里！
E: To you, it may look like any ordinary blade. But in our eyes, it's a cultural relic that's broken enemy lines. It fought through centuries of vicissitudes, slain the Abominations of Abundance, as well as many a valiant enemy. Who could ever imagine its noble fate being in the hands of such an ignorant little pipsqueak!

C: 被你切中要害的发言所震慑，男人一时竟无言以对。
E: Your straight-to-the-point remarks shocked the man, rendering him speechless for a moment.

C: 你把在街边被碰瓷经历详细说了一遍。
E: Please recount for me your entire experience of getting scammed in the street.

C: …就这个意思啊？这东西坏了，这种垃圾消息到处都是，我就拿去修一下咯，修不好就扔了呗！
E: ...I mean, exactly what I just said? This thing is junk, and these spam messages get out all over the place. Let me take it to get it fixed, or I'll just throw it out!

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 罐中仙神通广大，将你纳入其中，恐怕也并非难事。可出乎意料的是，你的头卡在了罐口。这是理所当然的事情——人的头怎么可能塞进那么窄的罐口呢？
E: The Immortal has miraculous powers, and it may be able to include you in the vase. But somehow, your head gets caught on the mouth of the vase. That's normal — how could a human head hope to fit into such a small vase?

C: 「无忧堂」。如果有人会把自己的名字写进便签贴在脑门上，那这三个字就应该是了。
E: "House of Nepenthe." If someone wrote their name on a post-it and stuck it on their forehead, this would be the name.

C: 当然没问题！这是为那来信者好，对吧？
E: No problem! After all, it's for the author's benefit, right?

C: 我想再看看信的内容。
E: I want to take another look at the letter.

C: 真拿你没办法～
E: I have no reason to say no.

C: 我已经帮您开启了永久认证的权限，你之前负责过的栖木留下了您的操作权限，<color=#dbc291ff>您可以随时回去操纵机巧鸟</color>…呃，拍照？
E: I have activated permanent access authentication for you. As you already have access to the roost you managed before, <color=#dbc291ff>you can go back anytime and use the cycranes</color> to... uhm... maybe, take photos?

C: 客人，你拿走这枚小零件之后，打算要怎么做呢？
E: What do you plan on doing with that small component then?

C: 发生什么事情了？
E: What's going on here?

C: 看来客人已经深谙此道了。
E: Looks like you're already familiar with this hustle, too.

C: 既然被你认出，只好动手了！
E: You got me. Guess we'd better fight!

C: 货到付款？
E: Cash-on-delivery?

C: 啊…要体验的东西太多了！干脆永远别醒来算了…永远都别醒来……
E: Ah... There's just too much to experience! I'd be better off never waking up at all... Never waking at all...

C: 不过，假如我还是像之前那样满腹怨气的话，估计只会度过一段扫兴的时光吧……
E: However, if I were still as sulky as before, I'm guessing that I'd probably have had a disappointing time...

C: 那是…科琳的房间？怎么会有公司员工堵在门口？
E: Is that... Colleen's room? Why are there IPC workers blocking the door?

C: 我…我不知道…哎呦！好心人帮帮我！
E: I—I don't know... Ouch! Please, someone help me!

C: 此刻的奎茵面无表情，一双眼睛仿佛初冬清晨泛着苍白雾气的湖面。
E: Right then, Quinn's face wore no emotion. Here eyes were like cool morning mist on a wintry lake.

C: 好在我刚买的钟表披萨还没吃完，赶紧补充一下碳水…哈，我猜也是白费力气，梦境里哪有什么营养学的说法
E: Luckily I've still got some of this Clockie Pizza left, so I can stock up on carbs... Ha, I guess it's all waste of time actually, as there's no such thing as nutrition inside the Dreamscape.

C: 是吧？相比于爱情，我更喜欢这种不寻常的浪漫。
E: Right? I prefer this kind of unusual romance over traditional love.

C: 哈哈，那确实也是一种浪漫，不过我更喜欢这种…不寻常的浪漫。
E: Haha, that's indeed one kind of romantic ideal, but I prefer this kind of... unusual romance.

C: 好在我也参与了那场战斗…以运输舰驾驶员的身份。
E: Luckily, I also participated in that battle... as the pilot of the transport vessel.

C: 话说回来，这个故事够浪漫吗？
E: Anyhow, was that story romantic enough for you?

C: 而对虚空鲸的屠杀，也自此拉开序幕……
E: And so also began the massacre of the void song whales...

C: 最能打的韦兰死了，其他人自然作鸟兽散。不过公司和游侠还是让他们得到了应有的惩罚。
E: Wyland was the best fighter and died. The rest of them naturally scattered to the solar winds. But IPC and Rangers still meted out to them the punishment they deserved.

C: 到底发生了什么？
E: What just happened?

C: 如果你嘴馋，可以去餐馆里点上一份牛排，享受肉用牲畜给你带来的快感。
E: If you're a glutton, go to a restaurant and order a steak if you'd like to enjoy the meaty pleasures of livestock.

C: 沐浴在阳光下的人们，无法想象黑夜的难耐。
E: People used to bathing in the sun cannot fathom the unbearable darkness of the night.

C: 还是说回奥特兰吧，这件事让我感慨良多……
E: Let's go back to Outerland. I'm rather affected by this incident...

C: 我早就看穿你了。
E: I've long seen through you.

C: 早上，中午，傍晚——在梦里有什么分别？不管现在是什么时分，我们都必须把身为筑梦师的职责贯彻到底。
E: Morning, afternoon, evening... What difference does it make in a dream? Regardless of the time now, we must carry out our duties as Dreamweavers with dedication.

C: 这人是什么意思…奇迹本杰明带来的更多是「噱头」，而非「实质」？
E: What does this guy mean about Miracle Benjamin being more of a gimmick than substance?

C: 唔…转念一想，最好还是帮你缩小下分析对象的范围，免得你浪费这么珍贵的发明……
E: Well... On second thought... I should narrow down the scope of the objects you're to analyze so we won't waste this great invention...

C: 还是不打扰他了吧。
E: It's best to just leave him be.

C: 我可不会随便开除手下的艺者，无论多么骄横的年轻人，只要被我选中了，我就有信心把他们调教成懂事的明星。
E: Look, I don't just fire artists under my wing. No matter how arrogant a youth can be, as long as they were picked by me, I'm confident I can shape them into obedient stars.

C: 你真好心，太感谢了！愿神主注视你的慷慨！
E: Thank you so much, kind soul! May the Great One gaze upon you for your kindness!

C: 我是拯救了雅利洛-Ⅵ的英雄。
E: I'm the hero who saved Jarilo-VI.

C: 你为什么在街头发传单？
E: Why are you handing out flyers on the streets?

C: 是的，这是门达希亚最具有代表性的民谣，但其实我从未在匹诺康尼唱响过它。
E: Yes, it's the most iconic ballad of Mendasia, but I have never performed it in Penacony.

C: …{M#先生}{F#小姐}，您觉得这首歌听起来如何呢？
E: ...Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, how do you think of this song?

C: 作为一个警探，我居然连这都没想通……
E: As a detective, I can't believe I couldn't figure it out...

C: …不过是一个失败者的自怨自艾罢了。
E: ...I was just wallowing in self-pity as a loser.

C: 虽然在梦里跳楼不会出事，但这么长时间以来，除了家族，你是第一个愿意拉我一把的人。
E: Although I won't really die by jumping off the bridge in a dream, you're the first one, besides The Family, who's willing to lend me a hand in a long time.

C: 说来惭愧，一来到匹诺康尼，我便马不停蹄地投入了筑梦边境的工作…想来是工具习性难改。
E: Honestly, as soon as I set foot in Penacony, I dove headfirst into the work at the Dream's Edge... I suppose some habits are just hard to shake.

C: 武器将会锈蚀，绿草重新生长，土地缓慢地修复创伤……
E: The weapons will rust, the grass will grow back, and the soil will slowly recuperate...

C: 稍等，我开下系统模块。
E: Please wait while I activate the system module.

C: 我…为之前表现出来的冷漠道歉。或许他们说的是对的，你们这些开拓客总能给人带去希望。
E: I... apologize for the indifference before. Perhaps they are right and you Trailblazers really do always bring hope to others.

C: 几秒之后，你好像听到了一些微弱的声音…仿佛是有人在悄悄流泪啜泣。
E: A few seconds later, you hear another ever-so-faint sound... as though someone were quietly sobbing.

C: …那是我造成的。我就是害他们变成那种怪物的凶手。
E: ...It's all my fault. I was the one that caused them to become such monsters.

C: 希望您能保持理智，不要做出任何出格的行为……
E: I hope that you can remain rational and refrain from any improper actions...

C: 这世上存在诸多罪孽，其中唯有贪婪和背叛最不可原谅。
E: There are many sins in this world, among them, greed and betrayal stand as the most unforgivable.

C: 如果现在离开…
E: If you leave now, then...

C: 你！真是死不悔改，你会为此后悔的！
E: You! Churlish, recalcitrant! You'll regret this!

C: 真是个难缠的家伙，看来我之后得更加小心才行……
E: What a troublesome fellow. It appears I'll have to be more cautious from now on...

C: 你为什么这么针对我？
E: What have you got against me?

C: 激进？现在的学生一个个都那么有主意，必须出重拳！
E: Extreme? Since students nowadays have so many schemes up their sleeves, I have no other choice but to put my foot down!

C: ——来自罗盘号的同学，聪明如你，一定能找到合适的机会交出这封信咕。
E: ...A brilliant student from The Compass like you will surely find a suitable opportunity to deliver this letter, hoot.

C: 仔细看去，这只鸟与当今折纸大学的校徽颇为相似，却又有几处明显的不同。只有打开校长室内某个尘封的抽屉才能找到这图案的原型……
E: On closer inspection, this bird looks quite similar to the current crest of Paperfold University, yet it also has some distinct differences. Only by opening a certain dusty drawer in the Dean's Office will one be able to find the original concept for this design.

C: 或许翻垃圾已经成了你的习惯，但有时人得学会收手。
E: Maybe rummaging through the trash has become a habit for you, but sometimes you've got to know when to quit.

C: 北方的垃圾桶，比它南方的亲戚更加守口如瓶。
E: A trashcan dwelling in the north, seems more "tight-lipped" than its peers in the south.

C: 不过，桑博兄弟，同为「假面愚者」，你似乎从来不愿分享自己的{RUBY_B#欢愉}美学{RUBY_E#}见解…这又是为什么？
E: Although, brother Sampo, as a fellow Masked Fool, I feel like you have never shared your own views of {RUBY_B#Elation}aesthetics{RUBY_E#}... Why is that?

C: 那还不快去测试模拟宇宙？
E: Then why don't you run a few quick tests inside the Simulated Universe?

C: 完美，还有什么比一座移动要塞更酷炫的吗？！
E: Perfect! What could be cooler than a moving fortress!?

C: 就它了。
E: This one.

C: 那是什么？听起来不像能用来给造物引擎供能的样子。
E: What's that? Doesn't sound like something that could power an Engine of Creation.

C: 啾？干什么啾，咱正在监视大家的工作啾~
E: Tweet? What are you doing, tweet — I'm supervising everyone's work, tweet~

C: 这个圆滚滚真是好东西，上了天就不会再下来，正好让我借一借力气——感觉好舒爽的啾~
E: This Chubbie is amazing — it won't come down after flying into the sky. I don't have to use up so much energy... Feels super comfy, tweet~!

C: 小鸟失落地抖了抖翅膀，飞走了。
E: The bird ruffles its feathers in disappointment and flies away.

C: 啾？！你、你是怎么发现我的啾！我还以为这次藏得很好呢啾……
E: Tweet!? H—how did you find me, tweet? I thought I was well hidden...

C: 折纸小鸟！
E: Origami birds!

C: <align="center">银河球棒侠与赤色看门鸟大战三百回合，最终险胜小鸟半根球棒。</align>
E: <align="center">The Galactic Baseballer clashed with the Crimson Doorkeeper Bird for three hundred bouts, and eventually narrowly edged out the bird by half a baseball bat.</align>

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 啾啾——其他跑进筑巢区的孩子也麻烦您了啾！
E: Tweet — I'm leaving the rest of the kids who ran into the nesting zone to you, tweet!

C: 我本与它们两相生厌…只是「愚钝」之症在美梦小镇中蔓延，必须有鸟站出来传播知识，根除顽疾啾！
E: We have always found each other tedious... It's just that their disease of "stupidity" is spreading throughout Dreamville... Dreamville needs a bird that will take a stand, spread knowledge, and eradicate this stubborn disease!

C: 没有！就像苏乐达的美味一样，毫无道理！
E: No! Just like the deliciousness of SoulGlad, it makes no sense at all!

C: 你向面前这只小鸟展示了自己的梦境护照。
E: You flash your Dreamscape Pass to the bird before you.

C: 再见啾，请忘记这只怕高的丢脸小鸟吧，啾啾。
E: Goodbye, tweet. Please forget this acrophobic, embarrassing birdie, tweet tweet.

C: 果然厉害的小鸟和人都是相互认识的啾，我认识了你，我也是厉害的小鸟啾。
E: I guess the strong — birds or humans — really do recognize one another. And since I know you, that must mean I'm a pro birdie too, tweet.

C: 看来，这只小鸟给你出了一道难题。
E: Looks like this birdie has given you a hard one to solve.

C: 呜呜呜，为什么我不是镜子小鸟，而是折纸小鸟啾。
E: *wail* Why am I an origami bird, and not a mirror bird, tweet.

C: 帮帮我，克拉拉！
E: Help me, Clara!

C: 这样的事在极地经常发生，因为舌头上的水会迅速结冰，之后就牢牢粘住了。
E: These things happen a lot in arctic areas, because the saliva on the tongue freezes quickly and sticks tight.

C: 感觉没变化。
E: Not much.

C: 再见，我要回大树了，希望这个清醒村能让您喜欢上小镇啾。
E: Goodbye, I have to return to the Great Tree. Hope this Rouseville will make you fall in love with the town, tweet.

C: 我趴橱窗上看好久了，就是没见着店主回来啾。
E: I've been looking into the shop window for a while, but I haven't seen the shop owner come back, tweet.

C: 小鸟的喙轻轻在你额头啄了一下，随后便慢悠悠地飞走了。
E: The bird pecks at your forehead gently, then flies away leisurely.

C: 因为我使用了奇妙的时间暂停之术啾。
E: It's because I used a miraculous time-stopping technique, tweet.

C: 不好意思。
E: Sorry.

C: 不告诉你
E: Not telling you.

C: 你也想去天台吗？
E: Do you want to end up standing on the balcony?

C: 是吧啾…
E: I guess, tweet...

C: 看不见这个徽标吗？我是公司的文明先锋，本地百姓的守护者！
E: Can you not see this badge? I am the IPC vanguard of civilization, the guardian of the people of this land!

C: 可以。
E: Alright.

C: 不行。
E: No.

C: 喂，什么时候能弄好啊？
E: Hey, when are you going to have that done?

C: 鑫鑫，有人目击到你在和一只谛听说话，然后第一反应是「你给它起名叫咪咪？」由此可见「咪咪」这个名字是真的不适合我。
E: You see, Xinxin? Someone saw you talking to your Diting and their first response was "Did you call it Mimi?" So, I guess we can say that the name "Mimi" doesn't really suit me.

C: （怎么回事？我的信用点用完了？）
E: (How did this happen? I'm all out of credits!?)

C: 那位琴师认为世界上再也找不到知音了，决定终生不再弹琴——作品未完成的遗憾却因此留了下来…故事是这样的，对吧？
E: "That guqinist thought he'd never find another musical soul mate like this, and decided to never play the guqin again — but he was forever filled with regret by this unfinished masterpiece..." That's how the story continues, right?

C: 好啊！那咱们现在就算是师徒了～
E: Great! Now we become master and apprentice!

C: 可怜我来日又守空房。
E: Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.

C: 此夜且与君成双，可怜我来日又守空房。
E: At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight. Come tomorrow, you'll take your flight.

C: 看上去你挺乐在其中啊。
E: You seem to really enjoy it?

C: 唉，我知道你是想安慰我…我承认技不如你。
E: Ah, I know you're just trying to comfort me... I admit that I am no match for you.

C: 其实还挺逼真的。
E: It really was quite realistic.

C: 说起来，还是第一次有人愿意陪我这么玩。难道这就是传说中的…好朋友？！
E: Come to think of it, you're the first person that was ever willing to play with me! Does this mean that we're... best friends!?

C: 好什么好，我这外壳都是手工抛光的，这一撞全给刮花了。
E: Nothing good about it. This shell of mine is hand-polished, but now it's all dinged up.

C: 说实话，挺搞笑的。
E: To be honest, it's kinda funny.

C: 只是个传闻而已——我也不清楚他们具体在什么地方施工。我是说…哪怕知道了，那地方八成也不会对宾客开放吧？
E: It's just a rumor... I also don't know where exactly they are doing the construction. I mean... Even if I did, I imagine it's not somewhere that is open to guests.

C: 奇异的色调于你眼前一闪而过，你似乎窥见了什么，却又什么都没看到；
E: You see a sudden flash of color before your eyes as if you were being shown a glimpse of something, yet you see nothing...

C: 果然，又出现了新的受害者！快把它交给我，那不是你自己能处理得了的。
E: As I expected, another victim! Hand it to me quickly, this is not something you can handle alone.

C: …看来我的运气就到此为止了。
E: ...Looks like this is as far as my luck goes...

C: 听说赌神出现在这，是来找家族算账的！
E: I heard the Ace Gambler is here to settle a score with The Family!

C: 是猎犬家系。我的依附合约…就是和他们签订的。
E: The Bloodhound Family. My contract of subservience... was signed with them.

C: …准备？什么准备？
E: ...Prepared? Prepared for what?

C: 寂海拾花。
E: A lone flower plucked by the forlorn sea,

C: 你一个贵宾，居然会对我们这种酒瓶感兴趣？还真稀罕。
E: I'm surprised a guest like you would be interested in a wine bottle like me. This is unusual.

C: 后来我被一位军官买下，跟着他一起在战场上奔波了许久。但直到被流弹击中的那天，他都没舍得打开我的瓶塞——我的朋友，愿他安息……
E: I was later bought by a military officer and followed him to the battlefield for a long time. However, he didn't open me even to the day he was struck by a stray bullet. My friend, may he rest in peace.

C: 三瓶酒抱在一起，哭成一团。虽然你不知道酒瓶是怎么抱在一起的，但总之它们抱在了一起。
E: The three hugged each other tight and began to cry on each others' shoulders. Although you do not really understand how bottles hug each other tight, they did just that.

C: 我就说它们这段时间老悄咪咪地，敢情是嫌弃我这老东西牌子杂了。
E: I knew they had been talking in secret whispers all the time lately. They just hate me because I am such an old vintage!

C: 还有小红，我真是瞎了瓶盖了，能把这种酒视若己出。
E: And little Red! I must have had the cap pulled over my eyes to have seen her as my own vintage!

C: 在距离很近的地方，似乎有些古怪的动静，巨大，轻盈，甚至还有点…醉意？
E: Somewhere nearby, you hear a strange disturbance. You can tell that whoever is making the noise is huge, light-footed and perhaps even a little... drunk?

C: 呵…背着青镞跑到这么远的地方偷闲倒是头一次。罢了，相信她能处理好工作。
E: Heh... This is my first time running so far to slack off behind Qingzu's back. Never mind, I'm sure she can take care of things just fine.

C: 那位巡海游侠…或者别的什么隐世高手。不知道她现在正身在何方？
E: The Galaxy Ranger... Or secret master or whatever. I wonder where she is right now?

C: 黄泉…
E: Acheron...

C: 忍无可忍，战！
E: Enough is enough. Bring it on!

C: 可以先整合人手。
E: You should unify the people first.

C: 不好意思，{NICKNAME}，我必须得回去啦。也愿「同谐」的光芒常伴你……
E: I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}, but I have to return now. May the Harmony's light be with you...

C: ——等等。我买了！
E: ...Hang on. I'll take it!

C: 看来你的善行得到了回报。
E: Looks like your good deed has paid off.

C: 好像稍微有点冷清？
E: It seems a bit quiet, doesn't it?

C: 我知道，找新曲、排新歌都是我的分内事。但咱和空艇签了约，平时吃住都在艇上，咱可不想违约…所以才斗胆求到老板你这里……
E: I know, I know, finding and composing new music are supposed to be part of my duty. But we've signed a contract with the airship, and we practically live on it. I'm afraid to violate the terms... which is why I'm sorta begging you here...

C: 大家一定会爱上你的歌声！
E: Everyone will love your singing!

C: 啊，船长！揽收处那边收到一个您的包裹，我这就给您送来了。
E: Ah, Captain! A package arrived for you at the collection point. I've brought it over.

C: 毫无疑问，这是公司使节「砂金」的亲笔签名，千真万确。
E: This note was clearly signed by the IPC representative Aventurine himself, without a shadow of a doubt.

C: 这段时间发生了这么多事，{NICKNAME}，你还是找个机会好好休养一下吧。虽说现在平安无事，但要是落下什么心理阴影的，以后可就遭罪了。
E: So much has happened in such a short time, {NICKNAME}. You should take some time for yourself. We might be safe now, but we should make sure there isn't any lasting psychological trauma.

C: 错了！是4盏！冥差大人，{F#她}{M#他}是假的。
E: Incorrect! It's 4! Your Honor, {F#she}{M#he} is a fake.

C: 我舍不得打坏了那张脸…
E: I don't want to damage that charming face.

C: 没错，我这人喜欢看书涨知识。
E: Yes, I love to read to widen my knowledge.

C: 幽囚狱经常会发生一些奇怪的事，作为司狱我见过太多的事情没头没尾，但让我彻底睁一只眼闭一只眼也说服不了自己……
E: Strange things often happen in the Shackling Prison, and as a Jailer, I have seen too many unexplainable things. Even if I were to turn a blind eye, I couldn't convince myself...

C: 不过我早已经说过了，犯人危险程度极低。他们与这狱中大部分的怪物相比，还是太过孱弱了，只需狱卒数人便足以镇压。
E: But like I said before: The danger level of these fugitives is extremely low. They are nothing compared to the numerous monsters caged in this prison — a dozen guards is all it would take to subdue them.

C: 我时不时能听到很尖锐的女声在唱一种不太理解的戏曲。结果周围根本没有任何音频装置，按理来说声音是通过振动发生的，所以那是什么……
E: I occasionally heard a sharp female voice singing the tunes of an indecipherable opera, but I could not find any audio device nearby. Technically speaking, sound is produced by vibration, so I'm not sure what I experienced...

C: 为什么集装箱里全都是通路呢？
E: Why are there so many pathways in the containers?

C: 我将以箱子的形态出击！
E: Box form, engage!

C: 你拿好，这枚玉兆里有我已经写好的程序。只要你将它从接入竞锋舰系统，这里面程序就会立刻接管舰炮系统，按照特定顺序对空连射二十一发，炸出个虎虎生风。
E: Take this. I've written a program into this jade abacus. You just need to insert it into the Skysplitter system and the program will immediately take control of the cannon systems and set off a <unbreak>21</unbreak>-gun salute in a set order. It'll be a real blast!

C: 请务必，千万，一定要把玉兆插进控制室的控制台，一定！
E: Please, you absolutely, definitely, undeniably must insert it into the control room system.

C: ——等等，你看，他们终于注意到了，我那精妙的编队！
E: ...Wait, look! They've finally noticed, my exquisite flight squad!

C: 劫匪老兄，你知道吗？只有坚韧的躯体才是不败法门。
E: Let me teach you one thing, kidnapper. Only a body that perseveres can be undefeated.

C: 那就别讲了。
E: Then you probably shouldn't.

C: 老师，我想去趟厕所！
E: I need to use the bathroom, teach!

C: 你好像遇到了麻烦。
E: You seem to have run into trouble.

C: 是啊。我是电影放映部的成员，原本打算要在校庆上播放社团拍摄的作品来着，可部长…啊，就是预定的导演，临时退出了，目前的进度很不妙。
E: We have. I'm from the Film Club — we intended to play a film the club made at the anniversary, but our director... Ah, I mean the appointed director, he suddenly quit, so it's not looking good right now.

C: 当然，这是导演的权利，了解演员的性格才能更好地把控剧本走向——直接向它们问话吧。
E: Of course, that's only your right, to get to know the actors to better commandeer the set direction. You can speak to them directly.

C: 可笑。带着你的白日梦滚回酒窖去吧。我会击败在这的所有酒瓶，登上明星巅峰。
E: Pathetic. You should slink back with your daydreams. I will defeat all the bottles here and ascend the stage of stardom.

C: 按照导演对各位演员的理解，给出最后的结局吧，中间部分会由我来补全的！
E: From what you know of them, you should announce the final outcome. I'll fill up everything else in the middle!

C: （「绿」的性格有些孤高，不好沟通，但或许是个实力派。）
E: (Greenie's character is quite aloof, and is difficult to communicate with. But maybe it's the real deal.)

C: 你盯着烛芯周身的光，一时间竟看痴了，下意识地屏住了呼吸，世界仿佛在这一秒静止，就连烛火也不再跃动。
E: You stare at the light around the candlewick and find yourself entranced. You subconsciously hold your breath. It's as if the world becomes frozen in this moment. Not even the candlelight flickers before your sight.

C: 或许…这是哪位泰坦的好心馈赠，只是对方有点用力过猛。
E: Perhaps... This is a kind gift from a Titan, just with a bit too much power infused in it.

C: 附近商铺的主顾们似乎有着在烛火下立誓签约的习惯，他们将这座长明的巨大烛台称之为「圣烛」。
E: Some clients of the nearby shops have a habit of making contracts beneath the candlelight. They refer to this giant, eternally lit candlestick, as the "holy candle."

C: 我只是看两眼。
E: I'm just looking.

C: 睡得真舒服呀～又有力气出去胡闹啦！
E: What a nice sleep~ Got enough strength to fool around again!

C: 睡得真舒服呀～又有力气出去胡闹啦！
E: What a nice sleep~ Got enough strength to fool around again!

C: 是流星吧？
E: Is it a meteor?

C: 似乎不太对。
E: That doesn't sound right.

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 瑟希斯在上，让本狮用一个绝妙的题目考考你，对智慧的掌握程度究竟如何吧！
E: By Cerces, allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how your grasp on intellect fares!

C: 好痛！这下咬得够狠，你把手抽出来看了看，还好没留下牙印……
E: Ouchie! What a brutal bite. You quickly take out your hand to see if any marks were left behind...

C: 勇士的家乡或许如此，可在奥赫玛，再贫穷的公民都拥有悠闲泡澡的余裕吼！
E: It may be so in your homeland, but in Okhema, even the poorest folk have the luxury of time to spend in baths!

C: 巧合。
E: Coincidence.

C: 我想再听一遍题目。
E: I want to hear it again.

C: 好痛！痛到你想掏出你的球棒，但在此之前，还是听听这狮子会怎么解释吧。
E: Owwwww! It's so painful that you want to whip out your bat. But right now, let's hear what the lion has to say.

C: 祭司阿努。
E: The priest Anu.

C: 吼吼，是时候由本狮来揭示真相了吼！石桥的塌陷只是个意外，城主遭遇的事故不该由任何人来负责吼。
E: Ho-ho, it is time for me to reveal the truth! The collapse of the bridge was mere coincidence, and no one should be to blame for the lord's untimely demise.

C: 好大的胆子！
E: How dare you!

C: 无论如何，你都绝不容许这样一个不安定因素留在你的系统里。
E: Either way, you will never allow such a destabilizing factor to remain in your system.

C: （阅读便签）
E: (Read the note)

C: 呼呼。火焰还在燃烧啊，恰如我炙热的内心！
E: *crackle* The fire burns still, like my scorching heart!

C: 呼呼。小火苗不会骗你，小火苗会在黑夜里守护你。
E: *crackle* The dim flame does not lie. The dim flame will protect you at night.

C: 不错，为了苏乐达！这正是我们永不磨灭的座右铭。
E: That's right! SoulGlad above all! That will forever be our motto.

C: 跟这群虫豸在一起，怎么能治理好美梦呢？事到如今，只能由我代替家族做出惩戒了……
E: How am I supposed to govern the Dreamscape well when I'm surrounded by idiots? Now, I must take it upon myself to punish the bad guys on behalf of The Family...

C: …你倒挺心善，但那是破坏者才应接受的惩罚——你这是在帮他脱罪！
E: ...You're very kind-hearted, but that's the punishment for the perpetrator. By doing that, you'd be helping the culprit to run scot-free!

C: 你也要去应聘？
E: You're also seeking employment there?

C: 愿塔塔洛夫保佑你！
E: May Tatalov protect you!

C: …啊啊啊啊啊我的盖子痒痒的，好像…好像有什么东西要冒出来了？！
E: Ahhhh... My lid is itchy, as though... as though something is about to emerge from it!?

C: 这由不得你，孩子。一切取决于你的品性…还有家庭条件。
E: It's not up to you, kid. It all boils down to your character... and your family background.

C: 买瓶苏乐达，找个靠前的椅子。
E: Buy a bottle of SoulGlad and find a seat near the front.

C: 你看见信箱里堆积如山的信件。
E: Inside, you see a mountain of letters lying forgotten.

C: 一字不漏，你的记性未免也太好了！
E: Word for word? Your memory is scary good!

C: 新来的小海豹似乎很喜欢这里，你看，它们相处得多融洽。
E: The new seal seems to love it here. Look how well they're getting along!

C: 对了，风铃上残留的魔法还没有用完，下次路过时，{NICKNAME}也可以试试。
E: Oh right, there's still a bit of leftover magic in the chime. Next time you walk by, {NICKNAME}, you should give it a try!

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「识刻锚」。
E: Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Chronocognitive Anchor."

C: 再说啦，也可以当作是在销毁证据？没有照片留下，我就可以把自己美化得更瘦一些。
E: Plus, you could think of it as... destroying the evidence. No photo means I can pretend I looked a little slimmer.

C: 能理解这种感受。
E: I know what you mean.

C: 坐了好久，都被屋顶的瓦片硌疼啦。下次在这里放两个枕头吧。
E: The roof tiles hurt after sitting for too long. Let's bring two cushions over next time.

C: 与其说「认识」，不如说是「记得」呢。
E: Rather than "knowing" you, it might be better described as... I "remember" you.

C: 还没等你调整好躺卧的姿势，外面忽地传来了说话声。
E: Before you even have the chance to make yourself comfortable, you suddenly hear a voice from outside.

C: 砰砰——你深吸口气，转身便是狠狠几脚蹬在木马身上，可惜并未取得任何成效。恍神间，你似乎听到了轻微的呻吟声。
E: Bang! Bang! You take a deep breath, spin on your heel, and throw a number of ferocious kicks at the body of the horse. Unfortunately, to no avail. Suddenly, you hear a faint moan.

C: 还储有最后一次传送的神力，就让我完整看看这座战争城邦的模样吧。这里是祭司们心心念念的地方，也是部族生存的最后希望…再见。
E: I still have enough power to teleport one final time, so allow me to see the complete state of this war-torn city. This was the land that the priests cherished, and the final hope for my tribe's survival... Farewell.

C: 毫无生气的木马，看起来就是完全的死物。意外的是，你在它的外壳上发现了几行文字。
E: The lifeless wooden horse looks completely inanimate. To your surprise, you notice a few lines of writing on its outer body.

C: 古老的言语还在耳畔回荡，但这次，预想中的光芒并没有亮起，木马完全陷入了死寂。
E: The ancient words linger still, but now, the expected glow fails to manifest — the wooden horse lies utterly still.

C: 我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 够了。记录完备，前路将显。揭示智慧的箴言，跨入未知的门径吧。
E: It is done. All is recorded, and your path shall reveal itself. Speak out the words of wisdom and step through the unknown passage.

C: 埃莉诺…我又看见了她。又看见她沿着砖石铺就的台阶走下来，像一只活蹦乱跳的小鹿，拨弄着栅栏上的茑萝花，衣裳上挂满门扉时的晨光。那么…明亮……
E: Eleanor... I see her again. I see her once more, stepping down the stone-paved stairs like a lively little fawn, brushing her fingers against the cypress vines on the fence, her clothes catching the morning light as she passes through the doorway. So... bright...

C: 目前安全区域的开辟进程较慢，那里有许多军团的余孽盘踞在废墟之中。
E: Currently, the progress of establishing safe zones is slow. Remnants of the Legion are still entrenched in the ruins.

C: 你好像很忙的样子。
E: You seem very busy.

C: 容我重新介绍下自己。在下温明德，是「黑塔•万有应物科」负责人，目前兼任奇物再收容小队队长，统筹基座舱段的安全区开辟工作。
E: Please allow me to introduce myself again. I am Wen Mingde, head of the Herta Department of Implement Arts. I am also the Curio Collection Squad Leader, in charge of establishing safe areas in the base zone.

C: 这场袭击在别人眼里是一个灾难，但在聪明人眼里却是一场机遇。
E: This attack may seem like a disaster to many people, but it is an opportunity for those who are smart.

C: 工作规范？
E: Rules?

C: 那他们又该有谁去铭记，谁去哀悼呢？
E: Who will remember them? And who is going to mourn them?

C: 咖啡畅饮？科研天才？这种传闻空间站到处都是，你干嘛非得来找我问？故意的是吧！
E: Coffee consumption? Research genius? These rumors are everywhere on the space station. Why do you have to come to me to ask? Are you trying to rile me up?

C: 让我检查一遍所有的流程是否到位：研究课题，没有推进；研究进度汇报会，被临时取消；绩效考核评估标准，等待重新拟定……
E: Let me double-check everything: Research topic, no progress; research progress report meeting, canceled last minute; performance review criteria, under evaluation...

C: 或许是因为关于那个姑娘的传闻太多，以至于大家都忘记了一个最关键的事实。那就是她自己本身的个人能力，是多么的超凡绝伦。
E: Maybe there are so many rumors about that girl that everyone has forgotten one important fact — her individual capacities are simply extraordinary.

C: 我没什么要问的啦。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 我再琢磨琢磨吧。
E: I'll have to think about it.

C: 你有很多奇物，能送我一个吗？
E: You seem to own a lot of Curios. Can I have one?

C: 是你呀，空间站的事情多亏了你的帮忙。
E: It's you! Thanks for helping out on the station.

C: 他们现在正在努力复现这个实验，结果…变成「爆炸头」的科员反倒越来越多了。
E: After that, people tried to recreate the experiment to figure out what happened, but instead of fixing things, more and more people started getting this very popular, luscious hairstyle.

C: 好吧，那下次再聊。
E: Sure, let's talk another time.

C: 噢，那可就多了，像咱们都是「阮•梅」造物——哦，你不是，抱歉抱歉——族群内外的沟通，沟通完就得分析局势利弊，然后提供这个…这个一些指导建议。
E: Oh, I have lots of things to do. We are all Ruan Mei's creations — oh, not you, my apologies. So, I'm responsible for facilitating communications within and outside the community. I have to analyze every discussion, and then provide... advice and suggestions.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 发酵过的面团，放了些许椒盐，因此产生了一些质变。
E: I'm fermented dough sprinkled with some pepper and salt to develop into a different texture.

C: 试试就试试！
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess!

C: 大工匠所言极是。泰坦赐福的兵器，若是直接对撞，必然会两败俱伤。但和凡俗的武器相较，还是大有不同。
E: The Grand Craftsman's words ring true. If weapons blessed by Titans directly clash with each other, both would surely be severely damaged. But against commonplace weapons, the outcome would be vastly different.

C: 我敢打赌，「最强之矛」一定能把盾牌击个粉碎！
E: I will bet money that the Strongest Lance can smash that shield to pieces!

C: 秉着简洁的原则，我认为——<color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」并不存在</color>，能确定的只是*有个城邦*，仅此而已。
E: Based on the principle of simplicity, I think that... "Icatus" does not in fact exist, and all we can be certain of is that there is a city.

C: 非要在我面前秀恩爱是吧?
E: You want to show off your love, right?

C: 事到如今，你打算怎么办？
E: It's come to this. What's your plan from here?

C: 母亲，听好了。我向「公正之秤」，塔兰顿起誓，预言你们的未来——
E: Mother, listen to me. I swear by Talanton, the Scale of Justice, and I will predict your future...

C: 我也有不少新闻，开价吧。
E: I've got plenty of news myself, too. Name your price.

C: 一个孩子？是的，我看见她刚才气喘吁吁地爬楼梯来着。虽然不知道叫什么名字，但我对她还算眼熟。
E: A child? Yes, I saw her puffing hard as she sprinted upstairs. I don't know her name, but I've seen her around a lot.

C: 嘿，朋友。来找翻飞自如的好宝贝？你可是来对地方了。
E: G'day, friend. Looking for some good stuff that floats in a whimsy? You've come to the right place.

C: 是这样…我是奥赫玛推理协会的一名成员，听闻树庭在黑潮中惨遭毁灭的消息，就立刻前来调查。
E: Here's the thing... I'm a member of the Okhema Deduction Society. I rushed here to investigate upon hearing about the Grove's destruction by the black tide.

C: 年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。
E: I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.

C: 我觉得你那个结论不太对。
E: I thought your conclusion was a bit off there.

C: 我这不是担心你嘛……
E: Don't worry about me. I'm worried about you...

C: …哎，我真是服了，来之前以为自己是个天才，命中注定的天才。
E: Ack... I really am giving up. Before I came here, I had thought I was a genius. A genius chosen by fate.

C: 这个地方是故障区域，机组坏了，没法儿接收信号。所以我特意标记了一下。
E: This is a faulty area with a broken unit, and it's a dead zone for signals. That's why I've deliberately marked it out.

C: 嗯。听起来没什么问题，好在我们的时间还很多，可以慢慢尝试。
E: Hmm, sounds reasonable enough. Luckily, we've got plenty of time to test these methods one by one.

C: 是我做错了什么吗？
E: Did I do something wrong?

C: 走吧。老地方见。
E: Let's go and check the usual spot.

C: 别太伤感了。
E: Don't get too sentimental.

C: 不会还要讲大地兽的爱情吧？
E: Are we about to hear more about the dromas' love story?

C: 你夺走了我的战友，你夺走了我的母亲，还有妻子，你好狠的心！
E: You took my comrades! You took my mother! You even took my wife! You heartless monster!

C: 幸好我没有做到。
E: Fortunately, it didn't come to that.

C: 一场小小闹剧就此结束，围观人群散去…你注意到「神礼观众」似乎意犹未尽。
E: The commotion ended, and the crowd dispersed... but you notice the Theoros seems far from satisfied.

C: 还是守规矩吧，别去了。
E: Rules are made to be followed. Let's not go.

C: 我听说，爸爸为了保护我离开阿卡索斯，高举着一块门板、在人群的后面拦着可怕的怪物。
E: I heard that my dad left Icatus to protect me, holding up a door plank behind the crowd to block terrifying monsters.

C: 市集的朋友们听说我的经历之后，都露出了特别欣慰的笑容。刻法勒大人一定也保佑了他们吧。
E: When my friends at the market heard about what I had been through, they all smiled so warmly. I bet Kephale blessed them, too.

C: 哈哈，不过也情有可原啦。毕竟我要是死了，那可是全人类的损失啊。
E: Haha, but I guess it's understandable. After all, if I were to die, that would be a loss for all of humanity!

C: 呃啊……
E: Ugh... ah...

C: 卫兵说你们安享沉眠了。
E: The guard said that you've fallen into slumber.

C: 笨蛋亚森！什么问题啊，白白浪费了一次祈祷的机会，换我来。
E: Dummy Yason! What kind of question is that? You've wasted a chance to pray! My turn.

C: 身为幻境的一部分，脱离幻境一定会消失的…必须赶紧阻止他！
E: As a part of the illusion, he'll vanish if he leaves... I must stop him quickly!

C: 这本是一场完美的、无休的宴会，无人会哭泣、无人应哀愁，唯有蜜酿沁人心脾、唯有欢歌引人酣醉。
E: It was meant to be a perfect, endless banquet, where no one would cry or grieve, where only honey brew would warm the heart, and only joyous songs would entice the soul.

C: …第一百四十二次。亲爱的阿波罗尼，这是你第一百四十二次面带愁容，离开斯缇科西亚，离开我们的盛宴。
E: ...That's the one hundred and forty-second time. Dear Apollonius, this is the one hundred and forty-second time you've carried that worried look, leaving Styxia and our banquet behind.

C: 「变幻波光的化身啊，我向您倾诉，一切驻足聆听您的歌唱，请赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
E: "O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. The world falls silent for your sacred song. Bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"

C: 毕竟，延续欢宴的并非蜜酿本身，而是蜜酿中流淌的故事。
E: After all, what carries the revelry forward isn't the honey brew itself, but the stories it holds.

C: 不是那种笨重的巨型天文望远镜啦，是那种能随时随地组装起来的。
E: Not an observatory-sized one, haha. I've got a portable one — it can be disassembled and reassembled super easily.

C: 用来看星星吗？
E: To stargaze?

C: …一饭之恩！对，就是这个！
E: The Moles always repay our debts!

C: 这里应该很高吧？比史瓦罗先生的肩膀还要高好多……
E: We must be really high up here, right? Much higher than Mr. Svarog's shoulders...

C: 不是做梦哦。
E: It's not a dream.

C: 克拉拉要把这风景记下来……
E: I'll record this scenery then...

C: …好想…好想把帕姆抱回去！
E: I wish I could take Pom-Pom back to Belobog!

C: 虽然不知道这是什么…但还请{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}收下！毕竟这是他的心意……
E: I'm not sure what the pebbles are used for... but please take them! It would make Pascal happy.

C: 起个什么名字好呢……
E: What's a good name, then...

C: 宏观和微观都能把控得如此细致入微…实在是太厉害了！
E: Strategically minded with an eye for detail... So impressive.

C: 之前列车长告诉我说，这是姬子女士自研咖啡的特殊香味。可惜我喝了咖啡就会失眠，不然我真想向姬子女士求一下配方。
E: I remember the conductor telling me that Himeko's coffee had a special aroma. If caffeine didn't mess with my sleeping pattern so much, I'd ask her for the recipe.

C: 丹恒这都告诉你？
E: Dan Heng told you this too?

C: 呵呵，好。
E: Hehe, well noted...

C: 不过说到底，我也没怎么深入接触过技术工作，真要论起来，搞不好她的理论知识储备比我还丰富。
E: I'm afraid I haven't had much exposure to technical fields — perhaps she has a better theoretical understanding than myself.

C: 现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
E: Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...

C: 先让我想想该准备些什么……
E: Just let me think about what to pack...

C: 在梦里，我甚至变高了……
E: I remember I was really high up...

C: 倘若非要凌踏这片科学的净土，那么就先从我，卡波特身上跨过去吧！
E: If they are to trample on this pure land of science, they'll have to go through me first!

C: 她们已经看见了星辰，不再被阴翳笼罩双目。所以才能如此炽热地注视我…哦不，注视真理和现实啊！
E: They no longer have their eyes clouded and now see the stars, and that is how they are able to passionately look at me... I mean, at truth and reality!

C: 我还有些事要给你说…
E: I still need to talk to you about something.

C: 当我意识到拉明娜的难处与勇气之后，我更加坚信了一件事——曾经的我，真是个不折不扣的混账。
E: When I realized Lamina's difficulties and her courage, I became more firmly convinced of one thing — I was a total jerk.

C: 我的天，你是第一个站在我的立场为我考虑的人。{NICKNAME}，你真是我的人生挚友！要知道，大家伙儿都觉得我死不足惜，更别提允许我重新做人了！
E: My goodness, you are the first to see things from my perspective. {NICKNAME}, you are indeed my bosom friend! See, everyone else thinks I can't redeem myself even with death, let alone allow me to start over!

C: {NICKNAME}我。
E: Me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我觉得，老师是我的朋友，可我却又拿不出算得上「涌泉相报」的答谢，很是苦恼。
E: You're a good friend, but I can't think of any "spring" to repay you with...

C: 真的？！那真正的「天外之境」在哪里？我有机会跟着列车去看看吗？
E: Really!? Then where is the real Satelleden? Will I have the chance to go see it with the Express?

C: 没想到你还看这种小说…
E: I didn't think you'd read novels like those...

C: 真不用，让我一个人静静吧。再见！
E: You really don't have to. I'd like to hang out on my own. Bye!

C: 不然呢，用纸笔抄写吗？这么多内容，我一个人可搬不动。
E: How else can I take it back? By copying it on paper? I can't carry that much paper on my own.

C: …谢谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}——也请替我向列车组的其他成员转达谢意。
E: ...Thank you for the invitation, {NICKNAME}, and please pass my gratitude to the rest of the Express Crew.

C: 感觉…列车上的氛围，好奇妙。
E: The feeling on the Express is really unique.

C: 你想啊，如果能给这只手加上大威力的武器…那我一次应付一百个裂界怪物肯定都不成问题！
E: Just think about it. If I had a weapon that powerful in the palm of my hand, I could take on a hundred Fragmentum monsters at once!

C: {NICKNAME}！我想问问，列车上有训练室吗？
E: {NICKNAME}! Do you know if there's a training room on the Express?

C: 我觉得你和三月七能合得来。
E: I thought you'd get along well with March 7th.

C: 诗曰：「无瑕胜玉美，至洁过冰清。」这宝石与你，最是相配不过了。
E: It is said that nothing is as impeccable as green jadeite, and nothing is as pure as white jade. These precious stones are a fitting gift for you.

C: 唷！是{NICKNAME}呀~这是我第一次造访星穹列车，怎么不见你带我四处转转？这可不符合无名客的待客之道啊~
E: Hey! {NICKNAME}! It's my first time on the Astral Express. I've heard quite a bit about the hospitality of the Nameless. Shouldn't you be showing me around?

C: 话说回来，上车需要办什么手续吗？签合同？交押金？保证书总有吧？
E: Say, aren't there any forms to fill out for boarding the express? No contract to be signed? How about a deposit? Tsk, at least tell me there's a guarantee...

C: 我听专家说，对于特定的生物而言，这种植物散发的味道就像一大锅被熬化的蜜糖，一般的小动物根本把持不住。
E: The experts say that to certain creatures, the scent these plants release is like a big pot of caramelized honey. Most small creatures lose their minds over it.

C: <unbreak>1703</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>1703</unbreak>.

C: <unbreak>28629151</unbreak>的五次方根是？
E: What is the fifth root of <unbreak>28,629,151</unbreak>?

C: 然后我们还要造一辆…不对，是好几辆列车，模子就照着星穹列车来做。
E: Then we'll build a... No, we'll build a whole lot of them — trains that look just like the Astral Express.

C: 咦，怎么啦？
E: You think so?

C: 你好，{NICKNAME}。我有个不情之请…请问，你有伤药吗？
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I hope it's not too bold of me to ask... do you happen to have any healing remedies?

C: 你在骂谁？
E: Who are you insulting?

C: 脑袋空空！
E: My head is empty!

C: 答案是，无关紧要。
E: The truth is, it's of no significance.

C: 嗐！做人要有底线，这我赞同。但对于惩恶，一击毙命才是最好的收场。
E: Hah! I agree, everyone should have a bottom line. But when it comes to evil, the best way to end it is a single fatal blow.

C: 这些假发的图片看起来还不错，就是名字有些难以理解：比如这款「黑长直」，还有这款「妈生蓝」。
E: The pictures of these wigs look good, but the names are a bit hard to understand, like this one called "Black Long Straight" and this one called "Motherly Blue."

C: 可即便如此，还是有很多人宁愿永远在梦中沉沦下去。
E: Even so, there are still many who would rather be forever immersed in the Dreamscape.

C: 嗯，梦也有好有坏…因为结果不确定，所以梦也注定无法治愈一切……
E: Mm, dreams can be both good and bad... Because the outcome is uncertain, dreams still cannot heal everything...

C: 随便哪个都行。
E: Anything will do.

C: 真可爱呢。
E: How cute.

C: 我所说的「打捞」只需慢慢靠近那些记忆，再驱动忆者的力量提取保存即可。
E: By "salvage," I mean to slowly get close to those memories, and then exert my Memokeeper power to retrieve them.

C: 不需要记忆也可以吗？
E: You don't need any memories?

C: 星际和平播报…原来是专门播放新闻的广播吗？这岂不是正对「老铁」的胃口。
E: So the Interastral Peace Broadcast... specifically broadcasts the news? That's exactly what Old Mettle likes.

C: 多谢恩公心意！可小女子觉得，它是因为在列车上，与大家一同游历群星才这般美丽。
E: Thank you for the kind thought, benefactor! However, I feel that it only gained such beauty because it has travelled through the stars with everyone here on the Express.

C: 识别错误？
E: Verification error?

C: 「洞悉者」大人好厉害，啥都懂！
E: "Insighter" is incredible. You know everything!

C: 正在清扫中……
E: Cleaning in progress...

C: 没错，我也……
E: Yeah, same...

C: 嘘，现在该听我说啦。
E: Hush. It's my turn to speak.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 啦啦啦啦～嗯？你回来啦！见到乘客安全归来，列车长自然会感到很欣慰的帕！
E: La la la la la~ huh? You're back! It's natural for the conductor to feel relieved when their passengers return safely!

C: 没什么了…你继续休息吧。
E: Nothing... Sorry to bother you during your break.

C: 哎，我打算再研究研究遣词排句的技巧。你还有别的事吗？
E: I'm gonna put more work into honing my rhetorical skills. Well, enough about me — how can I help you?

C: 「暖阳花」是一种非常甜美的小花，红黄交间，看上去就像太阳——光是看着它心里就会觉得暖洋洋的。
E: It's a Sunshine. A red and yellow flower that looks like the sun. It's very lovely. Just looking at it makes you feel warm inside.

C: …啊！看来这才是我没聊到工作内容的原因。原来如此……
E: ...ah! Maybe that's why I didn't talk about what I actually do at the workshop. So that's it...

C: 你原来是下层区人吗？
E: Are you from the Underworld?

C: 哈？有那么明显吗，这都被你看出来了？
E: Huh? Is it that obvious?

C: 报纸！今天的报纸！快来看看咯！
E: We got the news! Today's paper! Hot off the press!

C: 来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 对了，听说你们在帮「地火」办事？我提醒你们一句，奥列格那帮人虽然很讲义气，但是兜里其实根本没几个子儿。
E: By the way, I heard that you were working for Wildfire. A kind reminder for you, Oleg's crew takes care of their own, but their pockets aren't deep.

C: 拳赛就是这样，观众的喜好随时都在变，合同也得跟着调整——嗯？不对，看你个表情，也不像来找我签约的。
E: This is how boxing is. The audience's preferences change all the time, therefore the contract must also be adjusted. Hmm? You don't look like you are here to sign with me.

C: 那…{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}来找阿丽娜有什么事情吗？我可是很忙的哟，请不要占用人家太多时间～
E: So... what are you here for? I'm really busy. Please don't take too much of my time.

C: 一定要说的话，我的睡眠质量似乎又上升到了新的高度……
E: If you must know, my sleep quality seems to have improved again...

C: 总之，我这一合计——如果不用亲自劳动的话，生活开销又能再砍一半…要是我能光靠出租矿具挣钱，那还何必专门跑去矿场工作呢？
E: Anyway, based off my calculations, if I don't go to work myself, I can cut my daily expenses in half too... If all I need to do is to rent out my tools, why would I even need to work at the mine?

C: 没事啦。
E: I'm okay.

C: 你这身打扮，应该没跑了。
E: That's a reasonable conclusion, given how you're dressed.

C: 是说上下层区要重新打通了吗？
E: You mean that the Over and Underworlds are opening up?

C: 我现在知道错了！以后我一定要做个有用的人，为大家多做贡献……
E: I really regret it! From now on, I will be a good person and be a useful member to society...

C: …好烦好烦。总不能从史瓦罗大佬身上拆下来用吧，真是的。
E: ... This is so annoying. I can't just take Svarog's, can I? *sigh*

C: 你要「逻辑语言中枢」做什么？
E: What do you need a language module for?

C: 每隔一段时间，我们就会盘点一次会员们未用尽的请求支援余额，并发送短信提醒会员折现。
E: We periodically review members who have not used their request quotas, and send them text reminders to exchange those for cash.

C: 瞧你问的，真是时候！这不，我前阵子才收到上层区亲戚的信呢。这都多少年没收到过信啦，时间过得可真快啊……
E: You've got great timing! Why, I just got a letter from a relative up in the Overworld. It's been years since I heard from them. Time really flies...

C: 是啊。今天收工比较早，大家都回去啦。
E: Yeah, we finish early today. Everyone's left.

C: 地下有什么值得去的地方吗？
E: Any place worth visiting underground?

C: 没事没事！虽然这地下不像上层区那么气派，但也希望你们能在这儿玩得开心！
E: No worries! Although the Underworld is not as fancy as the Overworld, I hope you'll enjoy your time here!

C: 这个担子很重。实话说，我也不知道自己能否胜任。但我很幸运——因为我不需要独自承受这一切。
E: It's a heavy load to bear. To be honest, I don't even know if I can do it. But I'm lucky — because I don't have to go through it all alone.

C: 啊…关于瓦赫的事，我也想再次向你道谢。
E: Ah, Vache. I want to thank you again for that.

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}。诊所的大门永远都为你敞开。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}. The doors of our clinic will always be wide open for you.

C: 哈哈，那都是我在士官学校读书时的事情了…虽然说我们是军官预备役，但大家毕竟都还是学生。精力过剩嘛，只好课后搞点兴趣爱好发泄一下了。
E: Haha, it all happened when I was still in cadet school... Although we were reserve officers, we were still students at the end of the day. So we needed some after-school hobbies to spend our excess energy.

C: 都是过去式了。有些时候放手才是最好的选择……
E: It's history already. Sometimes letting go is the best choice...

C: 希望布洛妮娅大人能继承她的意志……
E: I hope Lady Bronya can inherit her iron will...

C: 是啊，我听说了。好在布洛妮娅大人没有签订那份协议。
E: Yeah, I heard. Thankfully Lady Bronya didn't sign that agreement.

C: 工作本身倒没多辛苦。不如说，从杂乱的信息中梳理出有序的部分反而会令我感到快乐。
E: It isn't as tough as it sounds. Rather, I actually take pleasure in making things in order from a mess.

C: 无论如何，我们姐弟二人都受了你不少照顾…能有你这样的朋友，我感到十分荣幸。
E: Regardless, us siblings have received much hospitality from you... it is truly an honor to have a friend such as you.

C: 营地里的叔叔阿姨、还有小机器人们，大家都很喜欢这里……
E: The older folk at the camp, and the little robots, they all like it here...

C: 于是…克拉拉就和史瓦罗先生一起，为流浪的大家提供各种物资，还让大家住在竖井外围——这样的话，史瓦罗先生可以帮助大家赶跑裂界怪物了。
E: And so... Clara got together with Mr. Svarog to provide supplies to refugees. They also let them stay around the well shaft. This way, Mr. Svarog could help everyone fend off the Fragmentum's monsters.

C: 克拉拉和史瓦罗的关系是怎样的？
E: What's your relationship with Svarog like?

C: 我已针对该问题进行反复演算，演算结果始终落在置信区间之外。
E: I have performed repeat calculations regarding this problem, of which their results lie outside the area of the confidence bracket.

C: 是啊是啊！我们鼹鼠党真是太厉害啦！
E: That's right! The Moles are the greatest!

C: ——哦？这不是鼹鼠党荣誉队员{NICKNAME}嘛！
E: Oh? If it isn't the honorary member of The Moles, {NICKNAME}!

C: 大雪纷飞的夜，闭上了眼，爸妈的声音开始渐行渐远……
E: Now the blizzard descends, eyes start to close, the voices of family lost to the snow...

C: 至于哥哥嘛…他很勤奋，是个非常正直的人——要是他别那么担心我就完美了。
E: As for my big brother... He's hardworking and extremely righteous... I just wish he didn't worry about me so much.

C: 不光是我，你问别人也只会得到一样的回答。
E: It's not that I'm trying to keep it from you. Go ask anyone else, and they'll give you the same answer.

C: 还在为手机困扰吗？
E: Still troubled over your phone?
Oink, oink oink...

C: 这个你擅长！在你脑补的星穹列车冷笑话大赛中，你以碾压之势夺得了冠军。
E: This is your strong suit! You took the grand prize in the Astral Express dad joke contest you made up in your mind!

C: 大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
E: I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.

C: 我在出版社有一朋友……
E: I have a friend at a publishing house...

C: 他和我说，出版社最近收到风声——《雪国冒险奇谭》最近应该能重新出版了。
E: He told me, they've received word recently that the Tale of the Winterlands is going into print again.

C: 这地下还能搞到「哞哞」牛奶？你们这火淇淋不会不干净吧？
E: Can you get Moo-Moo Milk from the underground? Are there any problems with your Fire Chillin' Ice Cream here?

C: 在不知名外来者三人组协助下，「地火」成功稳定形势，化解了下层区的重大危机！
E: With the help of a trio of outsiders, Wildfire successfully stabilized the situation and rescued the Underworld from great trouble!

C: 别起哄！
E: No heckling!

C: 想找她玩……
E: I wanna play with her...

C: 这是我们罗浮的「灯昼龙鱼」…
E: It's Illumination Dragonfish from the Luofu...

C: 如此巨大的工程…
E: Such a massive project...

C: 在克拉拉的请求下，我来到此处为她提供协助。因此，如有必要，我将为你提供路线指引及展品解说服务。
E: I am here to provide assistance to Clara at her request. Therefore, if there is a need, I will supply you with a route guideline and exhibit explanation service.

C: …欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。有什么需要的话，就来找我吧。祝你度过愉快的一天。
E: ...Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. If you require any assistance, feel free to ask me. I hope you have a pleasant day.

C: 咳咳…我记得你，{NICKNAME}。先前我和虎克都受了你不少帮助……
E: *cough* ...I remember you, {NICKNAME}. Hook and I received a lot of help from you...

C: 不同套餐的名字好像不太讲究。
E: It feels like you didn't really think those bundles' names through.

C: 哎，一不小心和您说了这么多。这个送给你尝尝吧，以后有机会一定要来尝尝咱们尚滋味哦，包您终身难忘！
E: Ah, I've chatted so much with you. Here's something for you to have a taste test. You must come to Spices Supreme to try our dishes if you get a chance! It'll be an experience you'll never forget!

C: 当时还在后厨里，咱只听到饭店里的食客们喧哗大作。
E: I was still working back of house then, and all we could hear was the clattering of diners out front.

C: 书肆老板沉迷于仙舟上的志怪故事，甚至会花费重金去别的仙舟上实地勘察，虽然结果一无所获，但是他本人倒是乐在其中。
E: The boss here is obsessed with all the supernatural stories told on this ship, and even pays through the nose to make visits to other Xianzhou ships. He never really finds anything, but he has fun along the way.

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 我问了它们各自的想法，让它们去做自己想做的事去了。
E: I talked to them about their thoughts and left them to pursue what they desired.

C: 但是我要彻底说服自己不再追求她，还是需要很长的时间，懂的都懂。
E: However, it'll take a long time before I can convince myself to give up on her. Anyone who's been through this would understand.

C: 能请你往旁边挪一挪吗？
E: Could you please move over a tad?

C: 愿你的前路长满蘑菇。
E: May your path be filled with many mushrooms.

C: 怎么幽囚狱里还有人开店？
E: Someone opened a shop in The Shackling Prison?

C: 我这个人喜欢畅饮仙醪玉露，之前在公廨里藏了两瓶「柳林琼浆」，被净砚执事给扔掉了。她说这里是公务空间，被老百姓见着了有失威严。
E: I'm a big fan of alcoholic nectar and once stashed two bottles of Nectar of Willow Woods at the Chancery, but Officer Jingyan threw them out. She said this is the workplace and it would be undignified if anyone found out.

C: 要是太难的，我也回答不上，你去问问净砚执事吧。
E: I won't be able to answer if it's too difficult. You can ask Officer Jingyan instead.

C: 十王慈怀！数学从未如此温情！
E: Oh merciful Ten Lords! Math has never felt so heartwarming before!

C: 行了，你还有别的问题吗？有事赶紧说，我还得继续挣工时呢……
E: Alright, do you have any other questions? Hurry up and ask, I still have hours to clock...

C: …这说的就是我们地衡司勤务了。
E: ...This saying sums up the life of us orderlies at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 小贩？哦，我倒是抓过不少。
E: Merchant, you say? Oh, I've caught quite a few of them.

C: 咳咳，抱歉！本人还未自我介绍呢。我名为景芳，是罗浮将军景元贤弟，平时没别的爱好，就喜欢与君子交游！
E: Ahem, sorry! I haven't even introduced myself yet. My name's Jing Fang, and I'm the younger brother of General Jing Yuan from the Luofu. I don't really get up to much, but I love making acquaintance with elites like yourself!

C: 海海，话可不能这样说嘛…
E: You can't say that...

C: 别问了…别问了…这是碰都不能碰的话题……
E: Don't ask... Just don't... These are unmentionable topics...

C: 这是谁的邮包？
E: Whose parcel is this?

C: 您请问，我一定有问必答。
E: Ask away, and I'll answer anything I can.

C: 老家贸易不发达，商会批文怎么还不下？你你你，就是你，你是怎么回事？
E: My home planet doesn't have much trade as it is. Why haven't the guild permits been released yet? Y—You, yeah you! What are you doing?

C: 嗐嗐嗐，你以为我没去过吗？我去过好几遍了。
E: C'mon... Do you really think I haven't tried? I've been there many times already.

C: 最近确实挺危险的，但没办法呀，养家糊口的事怎么能耽搁。我家里那么多张嘴要养呢，我要是不工作，那就真是手停口停了。
E: It's been pretty rough out there recently, but there's nothing I can do. I've got a family to support who can't just wait it out! With so many mouths to feed back home, I can't just stop working. No work means no income.

C: 好的！
E: Okay!

C: 别看判官们逮捕凶犯时雷厉风行，其实背后都要走一套严谨的行政流程。就算是遇到紧急情况，现场做出了「处置」，事后也得补一个行政手续，我就是专门做这事的。
E: Though you've seen the majesty of judges arresting people left and right, hitting culprits with the full force of the law as they please. In actual fact, they have to follow a strict set of administrative procedures behind the scenes. Even if there is an emergency, and they have to deliver some on-site "judgment," there are still processes that have to be retroactively filed. This is what I specialize in.

C: 你的记忆力为什么这么好？
E: Why is your memory so good?

C: 你要真是这样，我很羡慕你。
E: If you really are that kind of person, then I have to say I envy you very much.

C: 随处可见，平平无奇。
E: Everything about her is utterly ordinary.

C: 我看您面色红润身手矫健，想来也没什么毛病，还是算了吧。
E: You look full of life and vigor. There's nothing wrong with you, so don't worry about it.

C: 连现成的生意都不做？
E: You don't even want to close this easy deal right in front of you?

C: 你怎么还在这儿当卧底…
E: Why are you still working undercover here?

C: 护珠人是做什么的？
E: What do Pearlkeepers do?

C: 有事您尽管问。虽然我也刚回本部没多久，未必能答上来就是了。
E: Ask away, though I've just returned to the headquarters and might not have all the answers.

C: 到了这份上，我就别惦记着评医士长了…只希望抓那些药王秘传的时候可不要牵连到我……
E: At this point, I should forget about becoming the chief healer... I just hope that I won't be implicated when they're hunting down those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 啊？「内幕消息」？又出什么事了？我怎么什么动静都没听到。
E: Huh? Lowdown? What happened again? How come I didn't hear anything?

C: 丹枢大人她真是…世事难料啊……
E: About Lady Dan Shu... Life truly is unpredictable...

C: 「一日不可二卦」是什么意思？
E: What does "only one divination per day" mean?

C: 又是被老古董们气倒的一天，长生种怎么会这么固执？
E: Ah, another day of being annoyed by those old geezers... Why are long-life species so stubborn?

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 正经工作多没意思呀，喂喂喂，你不会是以为我是正经人吧？
E: Respectable jobs? Nah, boring! Come on, don't tell me you actually think I'm a respectable agent?

C: 你知道的，就算是无辜的陌生人，听到了不该听的内容，也会因此身陷危险…你是个有着一身本事的家伙，应该明白我是什么意思。
E: As you may be aware, even innocent people can get into trouble if they hear something they shouldn't... You seem to be a seasoned adventurer. I'm sure you understand what I mean.

C: 还真是和「攻略」中说的一样，不枉我费了这么多功夫……
E: It's just like what the guide said. It's totally worth the time...

C: 店铺啊，星槎海虽然店面挺多的，但有很多都是专做游客生意的，个人感觉不太实惠。
E: Stores... Well, there are lots of stores in Starskiff Haven, but many of them target tourists. I'm afraid you won't find the best deals there.

C: 没事，反正我是来观光的，闲着也是闲着。
E: Don't worry. I'm here for sightseeing anyway. I've got plenty of time on my hands.

C: 烈焰浓茶就是可以燃烧的茶。我不是辞典，所以我想我应该不用解释什么是「燃烧」什么是「茶」了吧？
E: Flaming Potent Tea is a tea that is combustible. I guess I don't have to explain what "tea" and "combustible" mean, right?

C: 别糊弄我了，你这不就是酒？
E: Alright. Stop muddling. This is alcohol, isn't it?

C: （三月七跃迁时会摔倒的故事）
E: (Tell him that March 7th would fall down when warp jumping.)

C: 现在方便聊聊天吗？
E: Do you have time to chat now?

C: 自此以后，咱们持明一族便为联盟镇压所谓的「丰饶仙迹」——啊对不住，该正儿八经地称为「寿瘟祸迹」才对——立下功劳无数。
E: Since then, we Vidyadhara have been working for the Alliance, and were decorated with many honors for suppressing the "Traces of Abundance"... Oh, I should call it "Plaguemark" as per the Alliance's request.

C: 你要想听我说，就别告诉其他商会的同事呀……
E: Well, I can be frank with you, but please keep my words a secret from my colleagues...

C: …剩下来的部分我只用说，我还不太了解公司，不能评价。
E: ...As for other aspects, I don't know what to say as I don't know much about it.

C: …客人是来修什么东西的？敝店能打包票，将您的机巧修复如初。
E: ...Need something fixed? We guarantee that your ingenium will be good as new.

C: 这可难办了，学会那边还要办理外派项目交接的手续，现在正流转到他那儿呢。
E: Now this is terrible. One of the Guild's exchange programs needs his signature before it can officially kick off.

C: 本来是挺开心的事，可惜老师他…哎…让你见笑了。哦对了，你是还有什么事要问吗？
E: Your arrival would have been a joy to us all, if not for Master's... Well... I'm sorry for being so depressed. What do you have for me this time?

C: 能给我看看你的货吗？
E: Could you show me your fandangles?

C: 哼，本座还尚未使出全力呢。
E: Hmph, I have not even given it my all yet.

C: 「我们」被不同的有机体制造，被设计于不同的用途。「我们」唯一的共同点，便是为消灭有机体而存在。
E: We were formed from different intelligent organic lifeforms and designed to serve different purposes. The only thing we have in common is that we exist to destroy intelligent organic lifeforms.

C: 感谢你诚挚的祝福，可憎的有机体。「我们」将邀请你在最佳观赏位欣赏有机体的毁灭。
E: We appreciate your well-wishes, loathsome organic lifeform. When the time comes, we invite you to admire the downfall of intelligent organic lifeforms from the best vantage point.

C: 先不聊了。
E: Talk to you later.

C: 嗯。如果有时间，可以随时来陪吾聊聊天。
E: Okay. Feel free to come and chat with me anytime.

C: 被镇伏的岁阳会继续在塔中，直到…唉，直到找到逃离的机会。
E: Subdued heliobi will remain inside the pagoda until... Well, until they find a chance to escape.

C: 据我所知，雪衣大人已经去执行别的任务了。
E: As far as I know, Madam Xueyi is already back on another mission.

C: 没什么感觉，不就是葫芦嘛…
E: It just seems like a gourd, really...

C: 岁阳可不是拿来做这样用的。
E: Heliobus aren't meant to be used that way...

C: 没事没事，也快到换岗的时间了。
E: I'm fine, I'm fine. It's almost time to change guard.

C: 那倒不是。应该也没几个人「一直在十王司工作」。
E: Not really. I doubt many can work "at the Ten-Lords Commission for a long time."

C: 好哦，注意安全。
E: Sure. Be careful.

C: 你还在视频网站上做视频？
E: You also uploading videos online?

C: …这可为难在下呀。说书的没有什么本事，只准备了几个本子，要是都讲完了，接下来就只能喝西北风了。
E: ... You put me in a difficult spot. Storytellers don't have much except a few books stored in our heads. I'll become a pauper if I ever told them all.

C: 盗宝团。
E: Space pirates.

C: 简而言之，我会的本事越多，能去的地方就越多，现在我已经去过很多地方了，但是这还不够，我还想去更多地方。
E: Long story short, the more I knew, the more I could travel. And now I've been to many places, but that's not enough. I want to travel even more.

C: 其他的，下次再问你吧。
E: I'll ask you about something else next time.

C: …可能是有些唐突，不过，你要是知道了我的特殊疾病之后，你也会理解的。
E: ...This might be a little rude, but I'm sure you'd understand if you knew about my particular condition.

C: 我应该不是吧…
E: I don't think I am...

C: 哎，这仙舟中处处都是历史的痕迹，可仙舟民却不知道它们的价值。哎……
E: Ah, there're traces of history everywhere you look aboard Xianzhou, but Xianzhou natives don't even know these things' true value. *sigh*...

C: 我叫檀檀，是天舶司的航速测试员。
E: The name's Tantan, and I'm a speed tester for the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 「靡靡赤龙、森森青松～六百余年凡尘中～如梦尽是空～」
E: "Dragons and demons, through thick and thin. Six hundred years, of dreaming within~"

C: 另外，我不是长得还挺可爱的嘛，经常有些不懂得分寸的家伙来惹事。这种时候驭空大人就太可靠了。
E: Also, my looks regularly invite trouble from persistent men who don't know their place. It's times like these when Madam Yukong is so dependable.

C: 真希望有一天，能有机会亲手把这本书还给她……
E: I really hope that I would be able to personally return this book to her one day...

C: 这得因人而异，我会根据你的实际情况量身定制方案。
E: It differs from person to person. I'll customize a plan based on each client's situation.

C: 没其他想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 等一下，我现在要深呼吸，深、呼——吸——平复下激动的心情，好了。如果你想和我再聊聊彦卿大人，我倒是可以随时奉陪哦。
E: Hold on. Deep breaths — breathe in, breathe out — I need to calm myself down. Alright, look for me anytime you want to talk about Master Yanqing.

C: 二来仙舟本土的饮料品牌历史悠久，而且价格便宜。日常饮料嘛，谁也不想在这上面花太多的钱，不是吗？
E: For another, the local beverage brands are all established with long histories, and they're even inexpensive to boot. People aren't willing to splurge much on beverages that they consume on a regular basis.

C: 要小心别有用心之人…
E: Look out for people with ulterior motives...

C: 想吃，可我没带钱。
E: I do, but I don't have any money.

C: 大家都很忙！
E: Everyone is busy!

C: 是将军的计谋引导至此。
E: It was all part of the general's plan.

C: 所以，你得道德败坏，才不会良心不安。想清楚了，再找我。
E: That's why you have to discard your moral values, so you won't feel the prick of conscience. You can come back again when you've made up your mind.

C: 游云立…
E: Cloudscry Hotel...

C: 其实颜色可以再素一些。
E: Actually, I think they could be a little less garish.

C: 我们需要确认天舶司文件。
E: We need to verify your Sky-Faring Commission documentation.

C: 不是所有人都能像彦卿骁卫和将军那样强。我们平凡人只用比坏人厉害一点，比过去勇敢一点，就足以成为自己的英雄。
E: Not everyone can be as strong as Lieutenant Yanqing and the General. But if we ordinary folks can just be a bit tougher than the thugs and a bit braver than yesterday, we can be the heroes in our own stories.

C: 你也不知道，我也不知道，真是奇了怪了。
E: You don't know. I don't know. It's a real stumper.

C: …不过转念一想，我要是出来，我也没想好要做什么…烦死了，我回去再想想，再见！
E: ...But on second thought, I haven't figured out what I'd do if I get out of here... So annoying. I'm going back to think about that. See ya!

C: 我本想撺掇他偷个懒，结果这厮意志力比老子还顽强，还想让老子控制他的身体替他开船……
E: I wanted to push him into slacking off just a little, but this guy's willpower turned out to be even stronger than mine, and he even wanted me to control his body to steer for him...

C: 我参加过的比赛年头，可比你们短生种一辈子的时间都多。
E: I've joined more competitions than you short-life species could ever experience in your lifetime.

C: 这些人看似团结，其实各有各的目的、各有各的野心，只要激化他们彼此间的不信任，就能化整为零，将一个小团体拆分成很多个更小的团体。
E: Though they appear united in solidarity, they all have their own motives and desires. All I need to do is rouse mistrust between them and I can reduce them to nothing, breaking their group into myriads of tiny units.

C: 可能吧，传说里是这样的…
E: Maybe. You know how the legend goes...

C: 地衡司找猫找狗有一手。
E: They're good at catching stray pets.

C: 在黉学读了一百年书…
E: I've studied in the lyceum for over a hundred years now...

C: 每天修理家政机巧…
E: Repairing household machinery daily, without fail...

C: 我学的不是这个！我学的是理论……
E: That's not my area of study! I'm a theoretical scholar...

C: 你听听这些广告词！「流落异世拣到应急食品，下口瞬间它吐气开声：我能满足你三个愿望…」
E: Listen to this ad! "I wander into another world and pick up an emergency food. The moment I put it into my mouth, it says 'I can grant you three wishes...'."

C: 他们都是业余乐手，怎么会这么受欢迎？
E: How can they be so popular when they're all music hobbyists?

C: 龙泉老窖，杏花佳酿…
E: Dragon Spring Brew, Apricot Blossom Reserve...

C: 因为万物终有尽头。
E: It's because all things come to an end.

C: 那可不嘛，这事闹的啊…动静可大了！
E: Well, it's caused quite a stir.
*sigh*

C: 会令人丧神失志
E: It causes you to completely lose your mind and spirit.

C: 金人的机杼微微颤动，仿佛焦躁不安地渴望战斗。
E: The aurumaton trembles slightly, as if anxious to fight.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人的加入，为我揭示了一种全新的可能：也许，我可以帮助人们成为自己的医生、疗愈自身……
E: Lady Seliose's arrival has revealed a whole new possibility to me: Perhaps, I can help people become their own doctors, to heal themselves...

C: 呵呵，若是搓出了核弹，学者们便又要来咄咄逼人了，一枚发卡岂不是正好？
E: Hehe, if I end up creating a nuclear bomb, those scholars are going to get on my case again. A hairpin would be just perfect, wouldn't it?

C: 发朵，发朵！
E: Fawer, fawer!

C: 你是迈德漠斯的朋友吧？哈哈，这些天有太多人来拜访了，真想不到他人缘这么好。
E: You're Mydeimos's friend, right? Haha, so many people have been visiting these days. Who knew he has so many friends?

C: 咳，你曾说…「我与歌耳戈是在血尘弥漫的角斗中相识相爱……」
E: Ahem, you once said... "Gorgo and I fell in love amidst the blood-soaked dust of the arena..."

C: 唔…唔…赛法利娅，这差事听起来可不简单，你没有受伤吧？
E: Hmm... hmm... Cifera, that job sounds pretty rough. You didn't get hurt, did you?

C: 呜嗡~和老友叙叙旧，陪新结识的「忘年交」们玩耍，我从前渴求过的幸福，就是如此简单。
E: Grumph~ Catching up with old friends, hanging out with my new "close buddies"... The happiness I've always longed for was really this simple all along.

C: 再创世之后的世界…很温柔，就像一场永不落幕的宴会，所有人都能举起陶杯，共饮蜜酿。
E: The world after Era Nova... is very gentle, like an endless banquet where everyone can raise their porcelain cups and enjoy honey brew together.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 我会给这里留下差评。
E: I'll definitely leave a bad review.

C: 此时此刻恰如彼时彼刻。
E: Doesn't this feel eerily familiar?

C: 如果在仪典上拔得头筹！就能出人头地了！
E: If I prevail at the Wardance, I'll be able to make a name for myself!

C: 希望你能站稳一点。
E: I hope that you steady yourself.

C: 一座鸟笼，曾经关押着一只向往自由的灵魂。
E: A soul that yearned for freedom was once kept imprisoned in this birdcage.

C: 飞剑体积大有阻力！
E: Flying swords are cumbersome and get in the way!

C: 呜…他打赢复活赛太好了。
E: *sob* ...It's great that he won the repechage.

C: 就是，可别为看比赛猝死了！
E: Exactly, let's not have anyone drop-dead from watching the match!

C: 甭管他了，尊重他人命运吧。
E: Let him, have some respect for someone else's freedom to choose.

C: 就算钢铁之躯，也有极限…
E: Even with a body of steel, there are still limits...

C: 肯定没人啊！
E: There's definitely no one!

C: 都给卢卡应援去了！
E: They all went to support Luka!

C: 「焚风的出现预示着一颗星球即将经历最壮丽、也是最为迅速的毁灭。」
E: "The appearance of Zephyro signals that a planet will soon undergo its magnificent and rapid destruction."

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 给她留点面子吧…
E: Save her some dignity...

C: 「谢、谢谢你…」快递盒细声道谢，向后微微退却。
E: "Th—Thank you," the package responds feebly while backing away.

C: 我是要蹲下来吗？
E: Should I squat down?

C: 我以前见过驭空大人手持弯弓「云鸢铣珧」百步穿杨，那场面真是……
E: I once saw Madam Yukong with her Cloudkite Resplendent Longbow, shooting with tremendous accuracy from a hundred feet away. Truly a sight to —

C: 好像在哪听说过的样子…
E: Sounds familiar...

C: 羽翼风筝被遗弃在此，断掉的线上似有斑驳血痕，令你想起在有翼民中曾有悲歌流传——曲中人在恋人死后掷双翼于火中，自此斩绝情爱。
E: A feathered kite is abandoned here, and mottled blood stains can be seen on the snapped string, reminding you of a sad song passed among the winged people. The song speaks of how they discard their wings in the fire after the death of their lover as a symbol of detaching from love.

C: 「想来一场梦幻般美妙的邂逅吗？『蓝调的时刻』在等着你！」
E: "Do you wish for a dreamlike encounter? The Blue Hour awaits!"

C: 有时候，即便是「想要做个美梦」这种事情，也需要你拥有坚实的经济基础。
E: Sometimes, even things like "having a beautiful dream" require a solid financial foundation.

C: 鸢尾花家系旗下的娱乐工作室，无数稚嫩梦想的起点与终点。
E: The entertainment studio under the Iris Family — the beginning and end of many naive dreams.

C: 桌上的书籍没有半点灰尘，但你确信它们已经许久不曾被翻动。
