E: There isn't a speck of dust on the books on the table, but you're sure they have not been touched in a long time.

C: 「您正在呼叫的是，『太阳的时刻』。『初醒图书馆』将随时对您敞开大门。」
E: "You are calling the Moment of Sol. The gates to the Primal Waking Library are always open to you."

C: 这群囚犯天天喝那什么甜汽水，把脑子都喝傻了…喂，你们几个，过来把地面清理干净！
E: What's that sweet soda these convicts are drinking all day? It's rotting their brains... Hey, you lot, clean up this floor!

C: 你可以继续上路，也可以提出问题。盛会之梦会响应你的所有诉求。
E: You can continue your journey or ask questions. The Dream of Festivities will respond to all your requests.

C: 成功，发财，奋斗，梦想…还搁这喂公子吃饼。我呸！
E: Success, wealth, hustling, dreams... and I still have to treat this man like he's my master. Phooey!

C: 哈…哈哈哈哈……
E: Ha... Hahaha...

C: 有吗，我理理…证书是很努力才能得到的东西，受到认可，大家都喜欢。获得证书，说明我很努力，我得到了认可，大家都喜欢我。
E: Have I not? Let me think... A certificate is obtained through hard work. Everyone likes someone who's recognized. Getting a certificate means I've worked hard and gained recognition, then everyone will like me.

C: 家里的长辈说…不能随便给人摸这个球。
E: My elders said... not to let strangers touch this ball.

C: 星穹列车？唔，是那群忙于开拓的无名客吧？很崇高，我很喜欢。
E: The Astral Express? Oh, that bunch of Nameless scurrying about with their Trailblazing? How admirable! I quite like that.

C: 知更鸟居然是家族的人！
E: Robin is a member of The Family!?

C: 要是再拿不出像样的选题，我肯定会被报社开除的……
E: If I can't come up with any decent headlines, the agency will surely fire me...

C: 我实在不想掺和这事。
E: I really don't want to get involved.

C: 旧型号越堆越多，都是那群开发人员的错！
E: It's all the fault of the developers' that the old models are getting piled high!

C: 讲讲仙舟「罗浮」的事。
E: Talk about the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 没想到啊，梦境里居然能碰见比我还矮的人。我对你挺有好感的，可以交个朋友。
E: I didn't expect to meet someone shorter than me. To be honest, I'm quite fond of you. We can become friends.

C: 就是说，任何外观都可以进入。
E: Which is to say, any appearance is allowed in.

C: 因为我的工作失误，给您造成了困扰。向您道歉了，真的很对不起。
E: I'm so sorry for this misunderstanding. I apologize and am very sorry.

C: 呜？呜呜！
E: Woo? Woo-woo!

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 家族正费尽心思为人们编织没有锐角的美梦，我也要贡献自己的一份力量才行。
E: The Family does all they can to weave a dreamscape without any sharp corners, and I also want to play my part, too.

C: 庸俗，糜烂。缺乏审美，词不达意。
E: Vulgar, decadent. It lacks melody and the lyrics fail to convey any meaning.

C: 有一瞬间，你从她身上看到了那个曾经骄傲的影子，纵情地施展着歌喉、放着光——尽管你未曾亲眼目睹过她当年的风采。
E: For a moment, you can see her once-proud countenance putting her voice and dance moves to full use — even though you never even witnessed her grace back in the day.

C: 你把我训练的脆筒给、给吃了！我饶不了你啊啊啊！
E: You a—ate my Cone in Training! I will not forgive you!

C: 夏洛特周边的空气似乎被染上了颜色，化作一抹忧伤的紫。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte seems painted with colors, and it suddenly turns into a sad violet.

C: 你知道吗？我第一次画画是在两岁的时候…那时的我连一句完整的话都不会说。
E: Do you know? I started painting when I was two... I couldn't even complete a sentence then.

C: 夏洛特周边的空气似乎被染上了颜色，化作一抹欢脱的黄。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte seems painted with colors, and it suddenly turns into a carefree yellow.

C: 那天中央车站的人很多，但我一眼就在人群中看见了她。她越走越近，在一众广告牌中准确无误地走到我面前。
E: There were many people in the Golden Central Station that day, but my eyes immediately picked her out of the crowd. She walked closer and closer and, amongst all of the many billboards around, she came and stood in front of me.

C: 失礼，刚刚没来得及自我介绍——鄙人来自螺丝星附近的「哈利伯顿钟表工坊」，是一位钟表匠人。
E: My apologies. I got carried away and never introduced myself... I am a watchmaker from the Haliburton Watch Workshop near Planet Screwllum.

C: 哈利伯顿看着远方的匹诺康尼歌剧院陷入沉思。
E: Haliburton falls into a thoughtful silence as he stares at the distant Penacony theater.

C: …还好，工作是保住了，工资是扣光了；信念是守护了，信用点是守不住了。
E: ...Fortunately, I managed to keep my job, but my paycheck took a hit. While my dreams were intact, my pride got bruised.

C: 这帮家伙不感恩就罢了，还总要摆出一副嘴脸，好像我们上辈子欠了他们钱一样……
E: I'd tolerate these buffoons if they were ingrates, but those disapproving faces they make... It's like we owed them money in a past life...

C: 这里虽不如大街上繁华，但视野极好，空气也要新鲜不少，还有免费的相声听……
E: This place may not be as bustling as the main street, but it's got a good view, and the air is fresher too. And there are free crosstalk performances to listen to...

C: 天天你来我往，就跟说相声似的。这帮「艺术工作者」可真艺术啊…哈哈！
E: It's just like performing crosstalk, these "artists" sure are artsy... Heh!

C: 无名客…那你想想，假如有人发明了一种智能探测仪，管它们叫「自动无名客」，把你们「开拓」的任务全都抢走了，说不定还要把你踢下列车，你难道不恨它们吗？
E: Nameless... Just think about it: If someone invented a smart detector and called it the "Auto-Nameless," it took away all your trailblazing missions and kicked you off the Express, wouldn't you hate it?

C: 比方说折纸大学的另一个教授，嘎鲁酋长——以前还是博识学会的呢。她就一直强调要跳脱「建筑语言的直叙性」，创造一种「比喻性的建筑语言」。
E: Take my fellow professor at Paperfold University, for example: Chief Gru — former member of the Intelligentsia Guild. She always stressed the need for us to break away from the "direct narrative nature of architectural language" and create a kind of "metaphorical architectural language."

C: 匹诺康尼当前通行货币为「苜蓿币」。进入梦境后。您账户中的信用点将自动等比兑换为苜蓿币。
E: The prevailing currency in Penacony is Alfalfa credits. Upon entering Dreamscape, the credits in your account will be automatically converted to Alfalfa credits at an equal exchange rate.

C: 人们总喜欢沉迷于短暂而不真实的欢愉，酒是这样、梦也是如此。
E: People tend to indulge in fleeting, unreal pleasures, whether it's through wine or dreams.

C: 另外，正在维护或修缮中的梦境相对不稳定，为了您的安全，请勿靠近此类区域。
E: In addition, areas undergoing maintenance or repair tend to be unstable. For your safety, please avoid approaching such areas.

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 真不敢想象回到现实的她内心会有多么失落……
E: You can hardly imagine how disappointed she must feel when she returns to reality...

C: 伊德莉拉…终有一日我会求得你的瞥视，在我的心脏停止跳——
E: Idrila... One day, I will finally bask in your gaze. Before my heart stops beating...

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: …我就是到处逛逛。
E: ...I'm just window shopping.

C: 嗨，这位朋友，要是遇到了困难，请随时来找我。无论什么时候，疾风侠都是弱者最好的伙伴。梦境的和平与公义，就由我来守护。
E: Please come to me if you're in trouble, my friend. Quicksilver will always be the companion of the weak, no matter what happens. I'll maintain the peace and justice in the Dreamscape!

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 怎么回事？
E: What happened?

C: 我当即呼叫了猎犬的家人们将他拿下，永远逐出梦境。
E: I summoned the Bloodhounds instantly to arrest him and exiled him from the Dreamscape forever.

C: 康娜的脸上闪过一丝笑意。她本想遮掩，却忍俊不禁。
E: A smile flashes across Conna's lips. She initially tries to hide it, but can't help it nonetheless.

C: 如你所见，克劳克影视乐园还有很多地方不够完善，主要是人手太有限了…当然， 我们有在努力改进。
E: As you can see, there are many aspects of Clock Studios Theme Park that aren't up to the task yet, mainly because we severely lack manpower... Of course, we're working on improving that.

C: 不管在现实还是梦境，每部能被人观赏的作品都是千万个系统时辛勤劳动的结晶。
E: Whether in reality or in the Dreamscape, every work that manages to finally reach the audience is the fruition of tens of millions of system hours of blood, sweat, and tears.

C: 当失去了为你打点好一切流程的的团队后，你得时刻关注市场动向和家族政策、得紧巴巴地控制资源投入与制作周期，你得分神打点资金人脉、亲自宣发造势，甚至还不得不费大力气处理盗版维权的问题……
E: When you lose a team that did everything for you, you have to pay attention to market trends and Family policies, stringently manage your resources and production timelines, personally promote yourself and manage your sponsors and network. You even have to spend huge amounts of effort on combating copyright disputes...

C: 哦哦哦，我的战甲正在以<unbreak>12</unbreak>倍功率运转！
E: Wow, my armor is overclocking <unbreak>12</unbreak> times more than its original rate!

C: 真想来场说走就走的星际冒险啊……
E: I wish I could just run away on an interstellar adventure...

C: 你知道我那俩「结拜兄弟」吗？不知道也没关系，听我说就是了。
E: Do you know about my "sworn brothers"? If you don't know, I'll explain anyway.

C: 欢迎来到美梦小镇，滴答！
E: Welcome to Dreamville, tick-tock!

C: 和家族周旋是个麻烦事，后面还得再想想办法。
E: Dealing with The Family is always troublesome, I'll need to think more about this in the future.

C: 「假如我说，你真美啊，请稍稍停留——」
E: "What if I said... Stay, you're so beautiful!"

C: …你很喜欢打台球吗？
E: ...Do you enjoy playing billiards?

C: 不行不行，虽说我的职责是帮助您消除烦恼，但这也并不意味着……
E: No, no, no, even though my duty is to help you alleviate your worries, it doesn't mean...

C: 看来情报不错。你的说话风格确实…幽默。
E: It seems my intel was spot on. You do have a rather... humorous manner of speaking.

C: 维修工作经常因为意外情况加班，所以我一般会订一份速食营养餐，去现实吃掉就立马回来。
E: Maintenance work often requires working overtime because something comes up, so I typically will order some kind of healthy fast food meal that I'll eat quickly in the real world, then rush back to work.

C: 多谢你的关心，亲爱的。但那些老爷们向来只看结果，不关心过程。
E: Thank you for your concern, darling, but all those old geezers care about are results, and not how they are met.

C: 介绍下热砂的时刻？
E: Tell me more about the Moment of Scorchsand.

C: 要求一位免费攻略的创作者拥有崇高的道德、纵览全局的眼界…你说这事好不好笑？
E: Demanding the creator of a free strategy to have upstanding morals and wide-reaching vision... isn't that hilarious?

C: 这么说或许有些冒昧，但你和你的同伴在「戏梦奇战」中的表演，其实并不那么…出彩。
E: I might be speaking out of turn by saying so, but what you and your team did for the Dreamplay Fantasia performance wasn't exactly... out of this world.

C: 我可是主角。
E: I'm the lead.

C: 行啊，你要和我聊点什么？
E: Alright, what do you want to talk about?

C: 要是真让我碰上家族成员，我才不会给他们好脸色看！
E: If I ever come across a member of The Family, I'll make them regret it!

C: 男人自顾自沉浸在自己的世界中，对你的试探毫无反应。
E: The man is lost in his own world, and he has no reaction to your inquiry.

C: 只是…我该怎么回去呢……
E: The only problem is... How do I get back...?

C: 这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
E: Is this... really the life I want?

C: 若鸟儿生来并无镣铐，又是何物束缚我命运……
E: Birds are born with no shackles, then what fetters my fate?

C: 在与他们一起训练的过程中，我们遭遇了无数困难，灰心丧气、中途退出、被误解、被拒绝…甚至恶语相向——但他们终究没有辜负自己的努力。
E: In the process of training with them, we have encountered countless hardships. Becoming disheartened, giving up, being misunderstood, being rejected... We have even exchanged harsh words... But in the end, they never gave up on all their hard work.

C: 虽然平时在训练的时候，我常常有意无意和孩子们开玩笑，老师要是突然消失了该怎么办，但他们总是嘻嘻哈哈地应付过去。
E: Even though I'm constantly joking with them about "what if the teacher suddenly disappears one day" during our practices, they always just laugh it off.

C: 除了学者的身份之外，我也经常在流梦礁开设关于忆质的科普活动，担任孩子们的科学教师。
E: Besides being a scholar, I often run science programs on memoria in the Dreamflux Reef and serve as a science teacher for the kids.

C: 在折纸大学，忆质动力学的课本里居然连她的名字都没有，取而代之的是所谓的学术权威——她无力为自己辩解，但这并不是他们篡夺学术的借口！
E: At the Paperfold University, her name isn't even mentioned in the memoria dynamics textbook. Instead, it was replaced by the so-called academic authorities — she cannot defend herself, but this is no excuse for their usurpation of her works!

C: 能够花这么多时间在自己感兴趣的研究话题之上——回过头想象，也是一种幸福……
E: Come to think about it... I consider myself lucky to be able to spend so much time on a research topic that interests me...

C: 在这一路上，我遇到了许多震撼人心的事与人，成群结队如同光影一般闪烁的忆者，庞大到令人窒息的忆域迷因，在忆质的潮水中退守最后家园的人们……
E: Along the way, I encountered many stunning things and people, such as hordes of Memokeepers who shimmered like lights and shadows, gigantic Memory Zone memes suffocating in their size, and people who retreated to and guarded their last homes in the tidal wave of memoria...

C: 那些旅途的孤独和痛苦，回头望去也许是上天的馈赠——它将痛苦教给我们，同时也教会了我们从痛苦中感受幸福的能力。
E: Looking back at the loneliness and pain in these journeys, they may have been a gift from heaven — to teach us pain as well as the ability to feel happiness from those painful moments.

C: 现在流梦礁的情况怎么样？
E: How's the situation of the Dreamflux Reef now?

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 显而易见，我是只折纸小鸟，你也可以叫我湛蓝爵士。
E: Obviously, I'm an origami bird. You can call me Dr. Blues.

C: 啾？看来你已经找到剩下的小鸟了。
E: Tweet? Looks like you've found the remaining birds.

C: 哎呀～是位面生的客官，是专程来见人家的吗？啾啾？
E: Oho, a familiar customer. Did you come all this way to see me? Tweet tweet?

C: 你误会了。
E: You misunderstand.

C: 这里是鸟儿唱歌的地方——飘荡着乐曲的「好梦剧场」啾。
E: This is the Dreamgood Theater, where birds sing and melodies glide and mingle, tweet.

C: 让我想想…对了，<color=#dbc291ff>有个会自动变形的房间</color>，没有人家这样成熟稳重的小鸟指引，孩子们一进去就很容易迷路啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, <color=#dbc291ff>there's a room that structurally shifts on its own</color>. Without someone mature and poised like me, children are bound to get lost if they enter, tweet!

C: 我曾无声呐喊，丛生杂草侵占沃壤良田\n喉舌干涸喑哑，却唤不来野火雹冰闪电
E: I was once voiceless to shout, the weeds invading fertile fields.\nThroat and mouth parched and mute, unable to call upon wildfire, hail, and thunder.

C: 隐夜鸫振翅，衔来善的嫩芽与希望的种\n殷勤耕作出，今日的欢歌与明日的笑颜
E: The Nightingale beats its wings, carrying with it budding shoots and seeds of hope.\nDiligently toiling the joyful songs of today, and the smiles of tomorrow.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 在我曾经是「玩具」的那段时光里，阿斯蒙人不允许我们体验他们的快乐，但又为了乐趣给我们加装了丰富的情感模块，名为「无聊」的病毒无时无刻不在侵蚀我的系统。
E: During my time as a toy, the Asmonians never allowed us to experience their joy, yet installed a repertoire of emotional modules for their own entertainment, resulting in the virus called "boredom" that constantly pervaded my system.

C: 米哈伊尔给我讲了很多旅行奇遇；拉扎莉娜教会了我如何查阅星图；铁尔南教会了我该怎么拿起武器，保护自己。
E: Mikhail told me of his many adventures. Razalina taught me how to read the astral charts. Tiernan taught me how to use weapons to protect myself.

C: 抱歉，我不怎么会隐瞒，只能把那个老人告诉我的事情原封不动地夹在了故事中。
E: Sorry, I'm not great at embellishing things. I just retold the story that the old man told me verbatim.

C: 嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
E: Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?

C: 呃…谢谢夸奖？
E: Ah... thank you?

C: 我有种预感——您将来还会染上更多色彩，它们或许会令您无比强大、又或者走向毁灭。
E: I have a premonition that you will be stained with even more shades of color in the future. These hues will either grant you strength beyond compare or steer you toward destruction.

C: 当然，名声对我而言并无意义——除非它能为我提供拍摄素材。
E: Naturally, fame is meaningless to me, unless it can aid me in acquiring more source material to capture.

C: 接下来一定会出人命的——无论是他的，又或是你的。
E: This dish will be the death of someone — either his, or yours.

C: 哎？这位客人……
E: Huh? This guest...

C: 就在奶油和蛋糕胚之间涂上一层芥末吧。
E: I'll add a layer of mustard between the chiffon cake and the cream.

C: 您愿意收下一份我的名片吗？我是专业理财顾问杰萨梅，您不会因此感到后悔的。
E: Would you like my business card? You won't regret it. I'm Jessamy, a professional financial advisor.

C: 但在从事眼下职业这么久之后，如果您再次问起这件事，那我一定会说——
E: But after being in this line of work for so long, my answer is now:

C: 嗯…也不知道他们有没有夸大其词。
E: Mmm, I hope they didn't exaggerate.

C: 「基于忆域的不确定性，我们的刊物不能接受从梦境中得到的研究结论。」
E: "Due to the indefinite nature of the Memory Zone, our publication is unable to accept any conclusions that stem from Dreamscape research."

C: 对不起…对不起……
E: Sorry... I'm so sorry...

C: 她甚至都要带上几分哭腔了。
E: Her voice quivers, teetering on the brink of tears.

C: 你也是住客吗？难得有缘相见，你要是有什么不懂，可以问我——哈哈，我可是仔细研究过「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」的！
E: Are you a guest here as well? Since fate has us crossing paths, feel free to ask me anything. I've done my homework on The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand!

C: 我只能说，我来这儿是提供一些法律咨询服务的，除此以外的内容…我很抱歉，基于「公司」的保密原则，恕我不能透露。
E: I can only say that I'm here to provide legal advice. I'm bound by the IPC's confidentiality agreement, so I'm afraid I can't tell you anything more.

C: 抱歉，我还有些法律事务要处理，我们下次再聊。
E: Excuse me, but I have some legal matters to see to. Let's talk again sometime.

C: 这种方法我认为虽然费时，但属于是磨刀不误砍柴工。船员们能发挥出自己最大的潜力，我们的团队服务质量便会水涨船高。
E: I do find this process time-consuming, but all the preparation will only help the task go more smoothly. If we can get our crew members to maximize their potential, the quality of service we render will follow with a parallel increase.

C: 对，这才像话！我就知道我们是一路人，以后你在折纸大学的麦芽汁我全包了，不管什么年份的，都随你挑！
E: That's the spirit! I knew we were on the same page! From now on, I'll cover all the malt juice you drink at Paperfold University. Whether it's vintage or not, it's all on me!

C: 你在害怕什么？
E: What were you so nervous about?

C: 以财富学院学生会主席的名义，我可以明确告诉你。实习、面试、商务洽谈，不管哪个地方都用得上这门技术。
E: I don't mind telling you this as president of Fortune Academy's student council: People are always portraying a certain image, whether at internships, interviews, or business negotiations.

C: 「来自谐乐学院二年级的普蕾玛势不可挡，上周末以一场华丽的胜利，拿下预选赛积分第一。她将同其他三位车手一齐，代表谐乐学院出战今年的格拉克斯杯。」
E: "Prema, a second-year student at Charmony Academy, proved to be unstoppable, taking a glorious victory over the weekend and securing the highest score in qualifying. She will join three other drivers to represent Charmony Academy and battle for this year's Glaux Cup."

C: 我要真有他们说得那么神乎其神，还在这开球笼车？
E: If I really were as exceptional as they say, would I still be racing Spheroids here?

C: 你猜怎么着，那个老教授不仅连几艘仙舟的名字都讲不出来，把天击将军说成是步离人，还宣称《银河忍法帖》的那个主角是从出云来的。
E: Guess what? Not only could he not even name the few Xianzhou ships, but he also said that the Merlin's Claw is a borisin and that the main character in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions is from Izumo!

C: 这些知识连我都知道。
E: Even I know these things.

C: 嗯？又是你啊……
E: Hm? You again...

C: 能在学校里看到忍符…我还挺开心的。
E: To be able to see a ninja talisman at school... It makes me pretty happy.

C: 「——我等乃是『缭乱』！！！」
E: "...We are The Dazzling!!!"

C: 难道是因为我平时对待他们过分严格？但我这样做，都是希望他们能将心思放在学业上。督促学员认真学习，这不是教师的职责么？
E: Is it because I'm usually too strict with them? But I do this in the hopes that they will concentrate on their studies. To guide a student's diligent study, is that not a teacher's duty?

C: …你？学院代表？哈哈哈，等你先拿到谐乐学院的毕业证书再说吧！
E: ...You? Academy representative? Hahaha, get a graduation certificate from Charmony Academy before making such bold claims!

C: 我不是什么富家子弟，社团的勤工俭学勉强能凑出来生活费，拿不出什么贵重的谢礼……
E: I'm not from a wealthy family. The money from the club's work-study program is meager and barely covers my daily expenses. I can't afford any expensive gifts...

C: 你对未来有什么打算？
E: What are your plans for the future?

C: 容许我再给自己的账号打下广告——请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
E: Please allow me to advertise my account once more... Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 就是同学们写给我的留言，没什么要求，你想写什么都行。
E: It's just messages written to me by other students. There are no requirements. Just write whatever you want.

C: 茫然无措时，再来找我吧。
E: Feel free to talk to me whenever you're feeling lost.

C: 美梦苏乐达，经典百年传。
E: SoulGlad, a beautiful dream, a time-tested classic.

C: 不知为何，你突然害怕它们会把你围住，然后疯狂地复读「恭喜你」。
E: For some reason, you are afraid they will surround you and begin wildly telling you: "Congratulations."

C: 你眯起眼，看见飞艇的尾翼，你忽然意识到它在高空中是如此抢眼。只可惜，上面什么也没有。这地方能涂点什么上去吗？或许有船员会知晓这一切……
E: You squint and look at the ship's empennage, suddenly realizing that it is truly eye-catching, even high up in the sky. It's a pity that it's a plain design. Can you paint something on it? A crew member might know about this...

C: 沙发的每一处都如此舒适，但你知道，住客们的选择往往归于哪个位置离电源插座更近。
E: Every inch of the sofa is truly comfortable, but you know that lodgers typically choose whichever spot is nearer to the power outlets.

C: 喔…原来船长这样啊！
E: Oh... So that's what the captain is like!

C: …等一下，那月亮怎么有点眼熟呢…该不会又是找蜗居公主「借」来的？
E: ...Wait a sec, why does that moon look so familiar? Don't tell me it was "borrowed" from Princess Homebody again?

C: 当然！梦里他还在和毛绒玩具说话呢！
E: Of course! In that dream, he was talking with a plush toy!

C: 没一个比我混得好！
E: None of them are doing as well as I am!

C: 你看我那群同学，各个上的都是名校，有什么用？现在有钱来匹诺康尼消费的还不是只有我？
E: Just look at my classmates. They all went to a famous school. For what? Who's the only one who can afford to vacation in Penacony right now? Me.

C: 前方是施工区，有怪物出没。你一定要过去的话…家族可不负责。
E: The area ahead is still under construction, and there are monsters roaming around. If you insist on going there... The Family will not be responsible for your safety.

C: 她是来取材的吗？
E: Is she here to get references?

C: 而且都是活着的传奇。
E: And they are all living legends.

C: 你到底过不过…
E: Are you going or what...?

C: 如果你想的话…
E: If you're up for it...

C: 它的结构和重量…
E: Think about its structure and weight...

C: 比如…用胶水？
E: Maybe... with glue?

C: 「蓝调的时刻」吧。
E: Blue Hour, I guess.

C: 怎么回事、怎么回事！你倒是给我吐钱啊！
E: Hey! What's happening! Spit out the money!

C: 我早就不再年轻了…但我还是会为你们获得的成果感到惊喜。
E: I'm no longer young... but I'm still impressed by the results you've achieved.

C: 难道…我手上这份《匹诺康尼十大景点揭秘》是假的？
E: Could it be... this Top 10 Attractions in Penacony in my hands is fake?

C: 他说投靠了公司。
E: He said he's going to the IPC.

C: 比赛都结束了谁关心这个？
E: Who cares? The competition's over.

C: 别多问，都是为了家族，年轻人要有奉献精神！
E: Don't ask, it's for The Family. Young people should practice the spirit of dedication!

C: 再等等吧，快结束了。
E: Just wait, it's almost finished.

C: 会场设备也进行了全面升级。
E: The venue's facilities have also been overhauled.

C: 在你们这里待着实在可惜，要不…让他跟我签约吧。
E: He's wasting his potential by staying here with you lot. Why not... let him sign with me?

C: 如果不接受他们的帮助，我在想…光靠我们家系的力量，真的能重启大典吗？
E: If we don't accept their help, I think... can we really restart the festival with just our lineage's influence?

C: 飞艇轮候这边请——
E: This way please to wait for the ship...

C: 请保持安静！
E: Please be quiet!

C: 道歉有用的话……
E: If apologies could fix things...

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 偶尔会有些烫手，除此之外挑不出缺点。
E: It occasionally gets a bit hot to handle, but other than that, it has no flaws.

C: …你决定让它休息一会儿。
E: ...You decide to let it rest for a while.

C: 请不要那么说他，朱诺婶婶。伏尔甘很好，既温柔又有耐心，而且非常踏实肯干……
E: Please stop badmouthing him, Aunt Juno. Vulcan is a gentle soul. He's caring, patient, and persistent...

C: 衣匠答应了你的要求，数道几乎快不可察的光线在眼前掠过，乱码的文字重新被缝到了一起。
E: The Garmentmaker agrees to help you, and a faint shimmer passes before your eyes as the chaotic text is sewn back together.

C: 嘿，你，终于醒了。
E: Hey, you. You're finally awake.

C: 而「自我」就相当于一种平衡，在冲动和自我规范之间协调……
E: And the "ego" serves as a balance, mediating between impulses and self-regulation...

C: 你啊…行吧，这次给你算便宜点。
E: Come on... Fine, I'll cut you a deal this time.

C: 石榴。
E: Pomegranate, please.

C: 蜜果。
E: Figs, please.

C: 为什么不当厨师了？
E: Why did you stop being a cook?

C: 扣响时空之扉、追忆往昔之影
E: To ring time's bells, recall days of yore. Hunting corrupted gold, lost to the core.

C: 此外图书室、池中餐厅等设施…嗯，这部分还是让浴场的其他同事们为您介绍的好。
E: As for the reading room, pool restaurant and other amenities... Hmm, I'd better leave their introductions to my bath coworkers.

C: 而那些瑕疵品总会莫名流入奥赫玛的服装市场，标注着我的名字被高价拍卖，成为某位王公贵族的收藏。我虽不乐得见此，但也无权禁止，就随他们去吧。
E: These rejected items always inexplicably end up flowing into Okhema's clothing market. They're tagged with my name and auctioned for high prices to be added to some aristocrat's collection. Though I do not like this, I cannot forbid it. They can do as they please.

C: …小灰，吓*我们*一跳。但门径好像没打开诶……
E: ...Gray Hair, you scared us! And it doesn't seem that the gate is opened...

C: 不对不对！小灰用力过猛啦，听上去好像要把空间都给消灭掉啦！
E: No, no! That's far too violent, Gray Hair! It sounds like you want to completely annihilate space itself!

C: 容我打断你的追问，我拒绝接收火种自有我的道理。我不会因你而动摇自己的决定，无需再费口舌。
E: Allow me to interrupt your interrogation here. I have my own reasons for not accepting the Coreflame. I will not allow my decision to be shaken by your intentions. You may save your breath.

C: 嗯，因为诅咒，我不便与他人同行，只能寻些独处的喜好。
E: Indeed. It is difficult for me to work alongside others due to my curse. I have no choice but to find hobbies I can enjoy alone.

C: 想不到阁下也对翁法罗斯的历史神话故事感兴趣呀！正巧，漫长岁月里我攒了不少有趣的故事，不知阁下想听什么样的？
E: I never would have thought that you were also interested in the mythological tales of Amphoreus, {F#miss}{M#mister}! As luck would have it, I have collected many interesting stories over my long years. What kind of tale would you like to hear?

C: 可我明明记得…我那一箭，射穿了它的眼睛…不对，是心脏…大家被救了出来，我们还一起饮宴庆祝，可是现在…为什么只有..我却被困在这里？他们人呢？
E: But I clearly remember... That arrow, it pierced its eye... No, it was its heart... Everyone was saved and we held a feast together! But now... Why am I the only one... that is trapped in this place? Where are they all?

C: 啊…有个雇主找我，你们先聊。对了，刚刚没来得及说，我最近新研究出一个涂装辅助机，虽然性能还不太稳定，但已经能运行起来了，回头你来给我测测。
E: Ah... One of my patrons is calling me. You two carry on. Oh, I forgot to mention — I developed a spray-painting machine recently. It isn't completely reliable just yet, but it's running. You should come and test it for me sometime.

C: 哎——好好好！你先忙你的，我做完今天的祈祷就去找你！
E: Oh... Sure, sure! Do what you need to do, and I'll come and find you after my daily prayers!

C: 人们都说当{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}给你关上一扇门的时候，祂还会为你打开一扇窗……
E: They say when {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} closes one door, they always open a window...

C: 忙碌的人类，就像忙碌的蚂蚁一样缺乏意义。只不过……
E: Busy humans are just as meaningless as busy ants. And yet...

C: 聊聊烟火气吧。
E: Let's talk about that warmth then.

C: 因为那声音…我听着感觉就像是远古的号角在呼唤着什么一样，我能感觉到它们有某种情绪包含在内，难道是…今年又要来一次「躁动的创生季」？
E: Because that noise... It sounds just like an ancient horn, rousing me to action. I can feel some special kind of emotion within it. Don't tell me... this year we'll be getting yet another "restless Creation Season"?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 虽然大地兽们最近的表现是有些反常，但不管怎么说，大地兽是吉奥里亚赐予我们的礼物！
E: Despite the dromases behaving a little abnormally these days, they're still our gift from Georios no matter what happens!

C: 像我们研究植物的，经常要去荒郊野外做调查，要不然就是窝在农田里观察作物。有趣倒算不上，只能说是一些疯狂往事吧。
E: Botanists like me are often researching in the wilderness or curled up in a field observing crops. I can't say much is interesting, but I will say I've got a few crazy stories for you.

C: 你半信半疑地答应下来，掏出球棒前去「调解」，场面一目了然，有几位看上去不太文明的家伙正在恐吓旁人。
E: Hesitant at his assurance, you pull out your bat and prepare to "mediate" the situation. When you arrive, it is clear that a number of uncivilized-looking guys are intimidating passersby.

C: 场面一度尴尬起来，围观的人都觉得莫名其妙，不一会就散了。
E: An awkward atmosphere fills the air as everyone watching the show struggles to understand what just happened. Before long, they are all gone, too.

C: 哈哈哈哈，奥赫玛的哲学家实在有点多，要是人人都拦着你要辩论的话，那是挺累的！
E: Hahaha, Okhema is rife with philosophers. I'm sure it can become tiresome if everyone is stopping you to discuss such things!

C: 好像曾经有位黄金裔说过，人生也不过是一场春秋大梦，就看谁先能清醒地意识到自己的命运。你相信吗？
E: I believe there was a Chrysos Heir who once said: "Life is but a grand dream. Let us see who is first to awaken to their true destiny." Do you believe that?

C: 对手的架势被破坏，你却不敢追击，反倒让自己露出更多破绽——那你不死谁死。
E: Your opponent loses their stance, yet you don't kick them while they are down, instead exposing even more weaknesses yourself... Then I guess it's your lot to die.

C: 你干嘛？哎哟…
E: What are you doing? Owww...

C: 好，言语的交锋亦是战场，我们都能从中学到许多。
E: Sure, a war of words is also a battlefield. We can learn much from within.

C: 难怪丹恒的枪被斫断了。
E: No wonder Dan Heng's spear was cut in half.

C: 山之民，曾经是奴隶，抓走，当铁匠、守卫、矿工、饲养员。
E: Slaves, Mountain Dwellers once were. Taken, they were, to be blacksmiths, guards, miners, and keepers.

C: 收集长了一副怪脸的硬币就能拿到宝贝，而且宝贝本身也都是些个怪玩意，更别提那硬币还跟扎格列斯老爷同名？怪到泰坦家里去嘞。
E: Collecting those funny-faced coins earns you treasures, which are themselves odd bits and bobs. And what's more, they're named after the Great Zagreus? It's the oddest of oddities.

C: 如沉睡的泰坦一样伟大，你在世界之巅醒来，圣城不过一道俯瞰的风景……
E: As grand as a slumbering Titan, you awaken at the peak of the world, the holy city nothing more than a speck of landscape in the distance...

C: 表演倒立。
E: Perform a handstand.

C: 不错，漂亮的三段论。知识必须从存在的事物中来，我们拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，因此可以推断出「阿卡索斯」必然存在。
E: Not bad. Textbook syllogism. Knowledge must come from things that exist. We have knowledge of "Icatus," therefore, we can deduce that "Icatus" must exist.

C: 以偏概全是知识的大忌，没有人能将自身的想法置于其余人之上。
E: Generalization is a taboo when it comes to speaking of knowledge. No one can impose their thoughts on others.

C: 嗐，这还不是前几天，传信石版上有人说，有个外地人在客房里蹲了两星期没出门，把自己活活饿死了……
E: I'm serious, though. Just the other day, someone on the teleslate mentioned an outlander who holed up in a hotel room for two weeks without leaving and starved to death.

C: 我很好奇…
E: I'm curious...

C: 我最喜欢测东西了！
E: I love testing things!

C: 再后来…唉，他在拉冬城毁时丢了命，给他打的腿到头来也没怎么能派上用场，但我这造东西的习惯，倒是养下来了。
E: Later on... *sigh* he lost his life when Ladon city was destroyed. The prosthetic leg he received didn't end up being of much use, but the habit of creating things, well, that stayed with me.

C: 「塔拉萨波利斯」，对吧？是个我从来没听说过的名字呢，原来翁法罗斯还有这样一个城邦吗？
E: Thalassopolis, right? I haven't heard of that name before. So, there's a city like that in Amphoreus?

C: 你听好了，其实我就是预言中的十二黄金裔之一。只不过，阿格莱雅大人她们还没有找到我。
E: Listen closely. In fact, I am one of the Twelve Chrysos Heirs in the prophecy. It's just Lady Aglaea and the others haven't found me yet.

C: 我不可能认错！就是那个泛着蓝光的浮空旋转塑像。我亲眼看到你跟一位黑发的同伴，陪同着阿格莱雅大人，在浴场门口放下了那个物件。
E: I can't be mistaken! It was that floating, rotating sculpture with a bluish glow. I saw it with my own eyes — you and your black-haired companion, accompanied Lady Aglaea, placed that object there at the entrance of the baths.

C: 你在念叨什么呢？
E: What are you mumbling about?

C: …你是谁？我先警告你，偷听是违反塔兰顿律法的行为，小心把你给举报了！
E: ...Who are you? I'll warn you first, eavesdropping is a violation of Talanton's law, so be careful or I'll report you!

C: 嗨，正好我刚想出在下次讨论会上发表的观点，心情大好，陪你简单聊聊也不是不行。
E: Hey, I just figure out the point I can present at the next discussion. I'm in a good mood, so I don't mind chatting with you a little.

C: 若是不信，你可以看看离我们最近的第一个书架，百余本全是馆藏目录。多亏我们一位同僚发明出了「分类编号法」，不然想找本书，简直难如登天。
E: If you don't believe me, you can take a look at the first bookshelf nearest to us. Our catalog alone is over a hundred books thick. We're lucky that one of our colleagues invented the classification numbering system, or else finding a book here would be as difficult as climbing into the sky.

C: 你的故乡就是…
E: Your hometown is...

C: 没有没有，奇美拉是很可爱的生物，也很有研究价值。
E: Oh nothing, not at all. They're very cute creatures worth studying.

C: 这么说吧，如果你在几百年前就丢失了一只特夫犬、一匹提兰马、一只斑鸠——或者别的任何动物，时至今日，你还会继续寻找它们吗？
E: I'll put it this way: If you lost a Taffe dog, a Tyrian horse, a turtledove, or any other animal, would you still be looking for them in this day and age?

C: …在卡尼兽濒临灭绝的这个时代，的确是奇美拉继承了它们「人类最好的朋友」这样的职能。
E: ...In this age when the Canis is borderline extinct, the chimeras have indeed inherited the role of "man's best friend" from them.

C: 地行龙非常胆小，习惯揣测人类的意图——继承了部分特征的奇美拉，在心性上也相当敏感，甚至像人那样拥有极其丰富的心思与性格。
E: The Terrazard was timid and adept at guessing the intents of humanity. The chimera has inherited a portion of these traits, for they are also emotionally perceptive, their wealth of thoughts and personalities comparable to humans, even.

C: 守卫呢，我要举报。
E: Where are the guards? I want to make a report.

C: 所有知识都该对公众开放，你要是想从树庭学点什么，来找我，我会免费教你。让我姐姐那种拿学问谋利的家伙看看，真正的知识是怎么传播的！
E: All knowledge should be shared with the public. If there's anything you wish to learn from the Grove, just approach me, and I'll teach you everything free of charge. I'll show those selfish scholars like my sister how true knowledge should be disseminated!

C: 何况对悬锋战士来说，肚量也是战斗力的一部分——英雄不光要能打，还要能喝，不然怎么撑得过庆功宴！
E: And to a Kremnos Warrior, a belly's capacity is also part of battle ability — heroes must be good at both fighting and drinking! How else would we last through the victory banquet!

C: 没错，我超勇的。
E: That's right. I'm the warriorest of warriors.

C: 是谁从过往的长河中将它们打捞上岸？这个问题恐怕没法被轻易回答。
E: Who salvaged them from the long river of the past? Unfortunately, that's a question that isn't easy to answer.

C: 其实我也知道大概率是回不了本的，但是朋友之间不必那么计较金钱上的得失，何况我也不缺钱。
E: I know it's a long shot, but when it comes to friends, money shouldn't matter. Plus, I'm not exactly short on cash.

C: 这个…怎么说呢，虽然爸爸听到会很高兴，但我们是为了报恩——很久以前，母亲还是个小女孩的时候，欠过圣女大人的人情。
E: Well, my dad would be thrilled, but we're here to honor an old debt — when my mother was just a little girl, she owed a significant favor to the Holy Maiden.

C: 安德烈——啊，也就是安德烈亚斯，他是我们几个之中最年轻的，和我一样都是奥赫玛土生土长的居民。他是刻法勒的信徒，因为家里有个不敬神的哥哥而经常头痛不已。
E: Andreas is the youngest of us, born and raised in Okhema just like me. He's a devoted disciple of Kephale, though his brother's lack of reverence frequently gives him headaches.

C: …我？呃，我的事情好像没什么可讲的。
E: ...Me? Well, there isn't much to say.

C: 记忆的残像似乎晃了晃，过往回忆中的言语，因其承载的情感而重现……
E: The fragment of memory seems to waver — words once spoken are reappearing now due to the emotion they contain...

C: …愿我们都能如吾师所期盼的那般，与诸多逝者在那鲜花芬芳的西风彼岸重逢。
E: ...May we all, as my teacher hopes, reunite with the many departed at the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 好呀，我也很乐意和灰宝聊天呢！
E: Sure! I'd love to talk with you too, Grayie!

C: 昏光庭院是个什么样的组织？
E: What kind of organization is the Twilight Courtyard?

C: 在漫长的岁月中，战争、黑潮，诸多的灾难与阴霾使它失去了光彩，并最终解离、消逝。
E: But over the long years, war, the black tide, and countless disasters and shadows stole its radiance, and eventually, it dissolved and faded away.

C: 我还想活着，别告诉我。
E: Let's skip it. I'd like to stay alive.

C: 你放心，没人相信那是真的。
E: Don't worry. No one actually believes it.

C: 想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'd like to chat with you.

C: 不过，就像最高端的食材往往只需用最简单的调料加以烹饪…如果说到靠创作赚钱，那么最重要的也不过是「让自己成为观众」。
E: But, just like the finest ingredients only need the simplest seasoning, when it comes to making money through art, the most crucial thing is "to become your own audience."

C: 讲讲寂寂无名的人…
E: The nameless ones...

C: 我并不了解它们，我在太多的石碑前徘徊过。
E: I don't understand them. I've simply been wandering in front of too many graves.

C: 人们对逝者的悼念，不仅仅止于入土为安。竖起一块墓碑，留下只言片语，都是对逝者一生恰如其分的认可，来完成这漫长的告别。
E: Mourning continues beyond the act of burial. To erect a tombstone and to leave behind a few words... These are appropriate ways to acknowledge the life of the deceased and steps toward completing this long farewell.

C: 我记住了。
E: I will remember.

C: 再谈异邦，斯廷法洛最显赫的世家，乃是吉奥里亚圣殿的祭司一族，他们一心为泰坦，乃至在民众看来有些霸道，但却从未有人指责他们违背荣耀。
E: Now to the outlands. The most prominent family of Stymphalia is the priest clan of the Temple of Georios. They are pious devotees to the Titan, bordering domineering in the eyes of the people, yet no one ever accused them of dishonor.

C: 关于若虫，我有些问题想问。
E: I have some questions about the nymphs.

C: 作为{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的宠儿，它们想必比我们更理解「再创世」的真谛……
E: As {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}'s beloved creatures, they probably understand the true meaning of Era Nova better than we do...

C: 相信我，朋友，这地方可是整个奧赫玛最好的席位——无论是见证神明的谢幕，还是观看凡人的演出。
E: Trust me, my friend, this spot offers the best view in all of Okhema — whether witnessing a deity's final act or observing mortal theatrics.

C: 不过我对戏剧不怎么了解，所以也说不好，这究竟算是场悲剧、喜剧、还是闹剧呢……
E: Though I'm no drama critic — hard to say if this is tragedy, comedy, or farce...

C: 几百万次？
E: Millions of times?

C: 我是说，既然没有经过太大的挑战，我们就可以迎来「再创世」——那它可能从根本上就是世界规则的一部分。
E: What I'm saying is, if "Era Nova" can arrive without tremendous struggle, then perhaps it's simply an inherent part of our world's cycle.

C: 并不乐观。黎明云崖到处是黑潮的恶兽，战士们拼死也只能搏出寥寥几处安全区。
E: Far from good. Dawncloud is crawling with black tide creatures, and our warriors are dying just to secure a few safe zones.

C: 英雄阁下，我必须向你致歉……
E: Hero, I must apologize to you...

C: 你怎么站着不动？
E: Why are you standing still?

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 衣匠运转一百万匹金丝之力，将你触碰过的那几只若虫拽回。
E: The Garmentmaker channels the power of a million strands of golden thread to pull back those few nymphs you once touched.

C: 你还记得迷？
E: You still remember, memi?

C: 我和大家约好了去草地里追蝴蝶，风铃一响就出发。
E: We've all promised to chase butterflies in the meadow today. Once the wind chime rings, we're off.

C: 只要保持平衡，就能把大石块垒在小石块上……
E: As long as you keep your balance, you can pile the big stones right on top of the small ones...

C: 种瓜得瓜，种豆得豆，种萤得萤，嘤……
E: You reap what you sow~ Whether it's melons, beans, or fireflies... *sob*

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 好呀。人家会一直在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 想做些有意义的事。
E: I want to do something meaningful.

C: 很久以后，或许这宴会行将结束，逐火再度启程。黄金裔将击落那些苟延的泰坦，而我，也会如愿夺得天空的权柄。
E: A long time after, perhaps this celebration will end, and the Flame-Chase will re-embark. The Chrysos Heirs will defeat those Titans hanging on for dear life, and I will claim the authority of Sky.

C: 只可惜，她被仇恨蒙蔽了双眼，无法明白这个道理…只能由我来让死亡来赐予她清醒，保全清洗者的未来……
E: Unfortunately, she was blinded by vengeance and could not understand this rationale... Only I can bestow death upon her to awaken her and protect the future of the Cleaners.

C: 吼吼吼！天外的救世主啊，今天有空来拜访本狮吼？
E: Roarrr! Deliverer from beyond the sky, what brings you here to visit this mighty lion today?

C: 啊啊，抱歉吓到你了，但你也吓到我了嘤。
E: Ah, I'm sorry I scared you, but you scared me too, eep.

C: 玩得开心吗，贵客？
E: Enjoying yourself, honored guest?

C: 嗯…有位织者胆子很小。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>秘密通道角落的碎罐中</color>，瑟瑟发抖呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is terribly timid. The golden thread brings tidings: They are tucked away <color=#dbc291ff>in a broken jar in the corner of a secret passage</color>, trembling in fear.

C: 仿佛是预感到未来的你仍会回到哀丽秘榭，在启程前，昔涟在桌上悄悄地留了一封信笺——
E: As if she sensed you'd one day return again, she quietly left behind a letter on the table, just before you left.

C: 怎么看新开张的餐馆？
E: What's your take on the new restaurant?

C: 迷，白芋芋切块细致，大小均匀，火候掌握纯熟，摆盘也一丝不苟，勾芡食材的酱汁调和到了最佳比例……
E: Mem, the white taro is sliced with precision, every piece even in size, perfectly cooked, and plated with great care. The sauce tying everything together is blended to an ideal ratio...

C: 有生日折扣，有惊喜点心，甚至员工还会围到桌子前，为我唱生日歌…听得我眼睛湿湿的。这才是过生日该有的样子迷！
E: There were birthday discounts, surprise desserts, and even the staff gathering around to sing to me... It made my eyes go all misty. That's what a real birthday should be like, mem!

C: ——请关注下期树叶小报的哆徕徕迷美食探访专栏评测迷！
E: —Tune in next episode on Leaflet News for Doreremem's food exploration review column, mem!

C: 不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
E: No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...

C: 悄悄告诉你们，我真的听见刻法勒的声音了。
E: To tell you a secret, I truly heard Kephale's voice.

C: 嗐，这也就是你家那个儿子出息…瞧瞧我家那几个，找不到工作不说，花钱还大手大脚！唉……
E: Ack, that's only possible with a good son like yours... Just look at our lot. None of them can find a job, but they spend money like it's going out of fashion! *sigh*...

C: 快成了，就快成了…
E: Nearly done, almost there...

C: …这不太好吧…
E: ...That doesn't sound like a good idea...

C: 嗷呜嗷呜嗷！
E: Awoo awoo aw!

C: 咕咕，随时欢迎你来折纸树林上课。
E: Hoot hoot, you are always welcome to attend class in Paperfold Woods.

C: 那就…先乖乖参加期末考咕！
E: Then... be good and sit for your final exam first, hoot!

C: 哦！你也是对这次入侵事件感兴趣的科员吗？这件事可有来头了！
E: Oh! Are you also interested in the invasion? That was a huge event!

C: 即便我努力克制，精心设计，希望不要为他人添麻烦，但也都是徒劳。
E: No matter how hard I try to refrain myself and avoid causing trouble for others, it never works.

C: 你看，绩效考核会推迟，这就意味着我不用熬夜去思考怎么做汇报了。看你的样子像是新来的，肯定不知道咱们这里的汇报流程有多烦琐……
E: Look, the performance review is postponed, which means I don't have to work late thinking about the report. You look like a newbie. You've no idea how cumbersome our reporting process is...

C: 有什么身体不舒服的问题可别直接问我，我只负责工作分内的患者，临时偶遇的概不负责。
E: Don't come to me if you are not feeling well. I'm only responsible for the patients under my scope of work. I don't take care of any random people I bump into.

C: 如果莱斯莉真的回应了洛奇的感情，那洛奇可要加把劲儿。不然两个人的差距太大，生活方式都不同，就算在一起了，以后也会吵架。
E: If Lesley really says yes to Rocky, he'll have to work hard. Otherwise, the gap between them will be too big and their lifestyles will be too different. Even if they are together, they will fight a lot.

C: 哎，真是我的不幸，更是地概科的不幸啊！
E: Sigh. It's my misfortune as well as the Department of Cosmic Geography's misfortune!

C: 老板好认真呀~
E: Boss, you're so diligent~
Hmm...

C: 你不知道那是一阵沉默，还是细若无声的呢喃。这位衣匠是那样神秘，就像它所在的这座大墓一样。
E: You can't tell if it's pure silence, or a whisper too soft to hear. The Garmentmaker is just as mysterious as the great tomb it dwells in.

C: 我记得我已经提供了一只若虫的线索…是我又失忆了吗？
E: I remember I've shared the whereabouts of one nymph... or did I lose my memory again?

C: 奇美拉——奇美拉永远是最棒的——！
E: Chimeras! Chimeras are forever the best!

C: …唉，假若尼卡多利知道我这么训导新兵，定会降下天谴吧？
E: *sigh* If Nikador knew how I was training these recruits, they'd probably smite me from above, wouldn't they?

C: 怎么能说骂呢，难道你歧视后勤工作吗？再说了，作为弟子，你难道不想继承老师的衣钵，继续造福人民吗？
E: Patronizing? What? Is being an assistant beneath you? Besides, shouldn't a good disciple want to follow their master's footsteps and continue their noble work?

C: 就算为了带货也不能鼓吹它的效果呀，您看，我跟这位寻土人先生一直争执不下。
E: Even if it's for promotion, you can't just make up its effects. Look, I've been arguing with this Earth Scout over it the whole time.

C: 这是有区别的，你要是不信，我这里还有树庭买到的「大地兽语翻译器」，我们问问！
E: There's definitely a difference! If you don't believe me, I've got this "dromas translator" I bought from the Grove. Let's ask!

C: 我看看——「嗯…」
E: Let me see: "Hmm..."

C: …卫兵阁下们！听说您终于转型成功，开了个小食堂？
E: ...Esteemed guards! I heard you finally changed careers and opened a little diner?

C: o((■ω■- )o「连小海豹王国的██最强黑厄大人都重新变回白厄了，豹还有什么理由再黑化下去呢？」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "Even the █████ mighty Lord Pie-non of the baby seal kingdom has reverted to Phainon. What reason do I have to stay in the dark?" )∋

C: 谢谢。在织坊的日子，是我回忆里极为温暖的时光。若是能重回那样的生活，我很期待。
E: Thank you. My days at the weaving workshop were some of the warmest memories I have. I look forward to returning to that kind of life.

C: ——这不终将升起的烈阳吗？
E: ...Isn't this the Blazing Sun that is destined to rise?

C: 我们曾在哀丽秘榭共度过一段恬静美好的时光。那时候我问过你，以后回想起来，会怎么想象当时的我？
E: We shared some peaceful, beautiful moments together at Aedes Elysiae. Back then, I asked you, when you look back on these times, how will you picture me?

C: 这个…毕竟有人觉得这本书里描绘的「裂分之枝」和「黄金之茧」，是在影射某次新轮回嘛！
E: Well... After all, some people think that the Bough of Rift and Chrysalis of Gold depicted in this book are alluding to a certain new cycle!

C: 聊聊天外的大地吗？
E: Wanna chat about the lands beyond the sky?

C: 嗯…有位织者已习惯与自己对弈。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>池畔的棋盘边</color>，于寂寞中独孤求败呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's gotten used to playing chess alone. The golden thread brings tidings: They're by <color=#dbc291ff>the chessboard near the pool</color>, seeking worthy opponents in their solitude.

C: 三束光芒…如果指的不是三位生灵的话，应该就是字面意义上的光芒了。
E: Three beams of light... If it's not referring to three living beings, then it must be literal rays of light.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 最近她变得越来越积极了，可我觉得，那孩子只是努力用表面的快乐遮挡实质的恐惧呢……
E: Lately, she's been getting more proactive, but I believe she's only trying to cover up her fear with a superficial happiness...

C: 银河里流传着一个说法：列车的核心是星神阿基维利的心脏，它提供了星穹列车穿越诸界的能力。但我在列车上没有找到对应的证据。
E: There is a legend in the galaxy: The heart of Akivili themself lies in the core of the Astral Express, providing it with the power to travel between worlds. But I found no evidence of that aboard the Express.

C: 我也托黑塔女士发出了讯号，如果我的家人能收到的话，他们会知道我平安无事的。
E: I've asked Madam Herta to send a signal to my home. If my family receives my message, they will know that I am safe.

C: 没有什么曲折的救援过程，只是正常程序罢了，列车上也多了两个乘客。
E: There was no torturous rescue process, just the normal procedures. In the end, there were two new passengers on the Express.

C: 那是一个很美丽的世界，四季分明，有壮丽的山脉与海洋，是一颗宜居星球。
E: It's a beautiful planet, with distinct seasons, splendid mountains and oceans, and a habitable atmosphere.

C: （「矿灯」、「让一切都回到它本来的位置，让群星回到天空」…）
E: ("Miner's Lamp," "Let everything return to its original position, let the stars return to the sky"...)
Hmm...

C: 你在这片矿区做了很久吗？
E: Have you been working in these mines for a long time?

C: 滴、答…哦吼吼，这里都有宾客的啊，您何时跑进来的？
E: Tick, tock... O-ho-ho, a rare guest here. When did you get in?

C: 滴、答，每天都要跟陌生的宾客说话，太可怕了……
E: Tick, tock, talking to strangers every day is super scary...

C: 它们肯定都是无良小报编撰的阴谋论，肯定是假的…应该是吧？
E: I'm sure they're all just conspiracy theories dreamed up by some B-grade tabloid, they must be fake... Right?

C: 滴、答，我们都只是虚构之梦的一部分，我的烦恼也是虚妄…放下一切吧，和我一起坠入那无底的黑洞，真理就在入灭中！
E: Tick, tock. We're all just part of this artificial dream. Even my troubles are manufactured... Lay everything down, and descend into that bottomless black hole with me! The truth lies in annihilation!

C: 是人都想要一个完美的梦，对吧？老大交待给我的职责我还记得呢。
E: After all, everyone wants to have a perfect dream. I still remember the duties that Boss assigned to me.

C: 找黑塔帮忙？
E: Have you asked Herta for help?

C: 这样一来，我就能拿到测试数据了…今晚就开始写报告吧，我可不想让世玲姐反过来催我。
E: I can get my test data now... I'll start writing the report tonight. I don't want Miss Shiling rushing me about it.

C: 怎么了？你说吧。
E: What's up? Speak.

C: 公司是个好地方，就是太大了，我这种分部的小职员，可能忙活半辈子也没法和那些大咖见上一面。
E: I liked that workplace, but it was too big. A small fry like me could spend half a lifetime there without bumping into any bigwigs...

C: 嘘，这件事我已经知道啦，伦纳德发出的第一条短信就是给我的。
E: Shh— I already know about that. The first person Leonard messaged was me.

C: 她能入侵第一次，自然就能做到第二次，以后说不定还有第三次。
E: If she can invade the first time around, then she can do it a second time — or even a third time.

C: 所以我要去他工作室催稿？
E: So I gotta pay him a visit in his studio to chase him up?

C: 所以——你是谁——？
E: And so, you are...?

C: 啊…世界上还是好人多啊！
E: Ah... Kind people still exist in this world!

C: 你只要在<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区</color>找到<color=#dbc291ff>操纵杆</color>，再把它带回来就好。
E: It would be great if you could fetch for me from <color=#dbc291ff>the Great Mine</color> this <color=#dbc291ff>operating lever</color>.

C: 现在可以用了？
E: Can this thing be used in real-life scenarios?

C: 看来布洛妮娅大人已经到了。接下来的事，大守护者应该会亲自和你说明。
E: Looks like she's here. I'm sure Lady Bronya would prefer to confer with you herself.

C: …你不必谦虚，我相信你的直觉。至于如何组织得体的语言，交给我就好。
E: ...You don't have to be modest. I trust your instincts. As for how to organize such language properly, just leave it to me.

C: …我很高兴你给出这样的评价。
E: ...I'm glad you gave this evaluation.

C: 嗯，拜托你了。
E: Sure, take as much time as you want.

C: 有关「愚者」希莉儿的画像…
E: About the portrait of Cyrille the Fool...

C: 这些自动机兵是不是真的能动起来？
E: Can these automatons move?

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了沦为裂界的边堡城塞。
E: A work of photography that captures the fallen citadel that has become part of the Fragmentum.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了贝洛伯格的客运缆车。
E: A work of photography that captures a Belobogian cable car.

C: 机械宠物的圈子里最受欢迎的型号——可能只是因为名字里有个「犬」。看来，名字对一个产品来说真的很重要。
E: In the mech-pet circle, this is the most popular model, just because it's modeled after a puppy. Looks like appearance is really important to merchandise.

C: 主题二：「守护众人之人」。
E: Topic 2: "The Protector of All."

C: 走、走吧，捉鬼小队出动！
E: L—Let's go. Ghost-hunting squad, move out!

C: 我听说妈妈从星槎上离开时，幽灵星槎上还有一位狐人飞行士，穿着天舶司的衣服。
E: I heard people saying that when Mom left the starskiff, there was a foxian pilot on the skiff as well. They were wearing the Sky-Faring Commission uniform.

C: 是什么大事，竟然这么多人来找我？
E: What's the matter? You've brought quite a big group here.

C: 与我身形肖似的狐人不少，想来是看错了。
E: There are many foxians who have a similar figure as mine. I suppose that person is mistaken.

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 别想打扰我们……
E: Don't you dare disturb us...

C: 当女儿的有什么事能瞒得住妈妈呢。
E: Do you think a daughter can hide anything from her mother?

C: 判官小姐，岁阳已经被收服了。我想，你们的任务应该也完成了。
E: Miss Judge, the heliobi have been captured. I believe your mission here is complete.

C: 你这拍的不是佩佩吗？
E: Is this a photo of Peppy?

C: 我想给你拍张照片。
E: I'd like to take a picture of you.

C: （交出信用点）
E: (Pay the credits)

C: 哎哟，别别别，上次因为倒票这事，卢卡小兄弟差点给我一拳！
E: No no, don't do that. Luka nearly punched my lights out last time for scalping tickets.

C: 等了很久，机兵们终于满足地离开了……
E: After a long time, the automatons finally leave in contentment...

C: 啊，对啊，这不就是我吗！
E: Ah, yes. Isn't this me?

C: 写作导游，读作吃白食的。
E: "Tour guide"? Sounds like a fancy way of getting free food.

C: {NICKNAME}，买小吃的事就拜托你了，别让我等太久啦。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm counting on you to go buy all the snacks — don't keep me waiting too long!

C: 这样吧，咱俩打一个赌，要是商会能还上公司的租金，我就当着金人巷父老乡亲的面低头道歉……
E: How about we make a little bet — if the Merchant Guild can pay back the money it owes, I'll get down on my knees and apologize to all the people of Aurum Alley...

C: 答应他！
E: Take the bet!

C: 能再仔细讲讲吗？
E: Can you fill us in on the details?

C: …啊？你再考虑考虑嘛。
E: ...Huh? Go consider some more, then!

C: 天舶司收到了许多商铺的联名请求：「重组商会」。换句话说，商户们希望你能辞任商会会长一职。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission has received a joint request from several merchants concerning the reorganization of the Merchant Guild. Mr. President, the merchants would like you to resign as the president of the Guild.

C: 太好了，令令令郎，不是，令堂？…哎！您父亲真的很固执。
E: Great! Uh... your father is a very tough nut to crack.

C: 你好像更加支持公司的做法？
E: You seem to be on the side of the IPC?

C: 请客的人来了！
E: Right on time to pay the bill!

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: 小少爷脑子灵活、目标明确、再加上资金充沛，我们确实不占优势。
E: Indeed. Xiaohan is eloquent and knows exactly what he wants, not to mention the funding he gets from the IPC. It will be an uphill battle.

C: 金人巷的商铺们可不这么想！
E: The shops think otherwise!

C: 确实，金人巷也太幸运了。
E: Indeed. The Alley got lucky.

C: 现在就开始规划吧。
E: Let's get the planning started.

C: 让我连线，我现在就要连线。
E: I love planning stuff. I wanna do it now!

C: （好，「货物」顺利送到了。回去和霍三哥说一声吧。）
E: (Alright, the "goods" have been delivered. Go back and talk to Mr. Huo.)

C: 那些商铺们知道吗？
E: Do the shops know?

C: 我们美馔阁也算是金人巷美食街的老字号了，但是游客们提起金人巷美食却总是提起「尚滋味」，你想想阿姨这要是做了外卖，可不就……
E: You see, Delicacy Pavilion has been around for a while, but when people talk about food in Aurum Alley, they think of Spices Supreme. If I were to start this whole takeout business...

C: （尽量记住吧。）
E: (I'll just do my best.)

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，我记得第一位客人点了份葱醋鸡，还有一份什么？
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, I remember the first diner wanted a portion of scallion chicken, and a — what else?

C: 大碗，我点的是大碗。
E: Large. I wanted a large bowl.

C: 我认为这不是你的问题。
E: I don't think this is your problem.

C: 激辩开始！
E: The debate starts now!

C: 临时编个病症是行不通的，丹鼎司专门派人找过我，确认病因病状是否有医典记录。
E: Making up an illness on the spot won't get you anywhere. The Alchemy Commission has sent someone after me before to check if the symptoms I listed are recorded in their medical texts.

C: 接下来，商会一方提出，斯科特代表一直在暗中破坏码头经营活动，对此你有什么要解释的吗？
E: Next order of business — the Merchant Guild has accused Representative Skott of secretly sabotaging dock operations. Do you have anything to say about that?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 会长，我要是你，我会将个例变成普遍案例。
E: If I were you, Mr. President, I would think of ways to translate the success of that one sample into something that can benefit everyone.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 因为人们需要金人巷的美食街，<color=#dbc291ff>这一点，我们可以证明</color>。
E: Because people want it to retain its food street. <color=#dbc291ff>We have proof of that</color>.

C: 是哪位长官派你们来的？
E: So which captain was it who sent you?

C: 时间不早，我还得继续运货去。谢谢你，陌生的朋友。
E: It's getting late and I have to get back to these deliveries. Thank you, stranger.

C: 我…*嘈杂的机械运转声*
E: I... *Whirring machine noises*

C: 简而言之，你可以把「客制运单」当作客户的信任挑战，完成之后就有相应的好处。
E: So basically, you can think of custom orders as special challenges from our customers, and completing them will bring you splendid rewards.

C: 解决商铺的麻烦，取得商户信任，这才是商会应该做的。
E: Solving merchants' problems and earning their trust — that's what any good merchant guild should do!

C: 哎，我们鹤运物流的导航数据有点问题，可我才上岗没几天，金人巷的「美食地图」还是一片空白……
E: Hey, my Heron Express data is a bit buggy. I've only been working this gig a few days, but the Foodie Map over in Aurum Alley is completely blank...

C: 你不确定你们现在所在的方位，于是便打开手机查看了下地图。
E: You're not sure where you are, so you look it up on the map in your phone.

C: 我原本以为今天下不了班了呢！还好，咱们仙舟上还是好心人多啊！真的太感谢了！
E: I thought I wouldn't be able to finish my job today! Thankfully there are so many kindhearted people on this ship! Thank you so much!

C: 走吧走吧，搞不好我搭档就在那儿等我呢！
E: Let's go there. Maybe my partner is waiting for me there!

C: 只是{NICKNAME}大人没注意罢了。
E: It's {NICKNAME} who didn't pay enough attention.

C: 不过它们是什么时候偷走的呢…难道潜伏在我的身边？难道就是你！
E: But when did they manage to steal it...? Could they be hiding next to me? Are you the thief!?

C: 瞧你畏畏缩缩的样，还不如这个过路人态度坚定！
E: Look at you, so hesitant, even a passerby is more firm than you!

C: 重重的一拳敲击在坚硬而又冰冷的地髓表面。
E: A heavy strike lands on the cold, hard surface of the geomarrow ore.

C: 哎，应该就是那帮老家伙嫉妒我的才华，故意针对我吧！天才就是要背负这样的压力…我了解！
E: *sigh* It must be the act of those old guards being jealous of my talents. They must be deliberately targeting me! Such is the pressure a genius faces... I can understand!

C: 真可惜，你错过了匹诺康尼下一位脱口秀大师的出场秀！
E: What a pity. You missed the debut show of the next stand-up comedy mater in Penacony!

C: 说的是啊！所以兄弟们才要逃狱嘛。
E: Exactly! That's why we decided to get out of this place.

C: 现在出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 哇、哇？！这、这是什么情况？这片空间…好像彻底乱套了！
E: Wh—Whoa!? Wh—What's all this? This space... It's like a total mess!

C: 喔…没想到你就是编导口中的「场外嘉宾」。
E: Oh... I didn't expect you to be the "special guest" the director mentioned.

C: 放心吧，这件事很简单。
E: Don't worry. This thing is simple.

C: 哈哈，也可以这么说？和怪物深入交流的机会可不是哪都有的，算是特色了吧。
E: Haha, you can put it that way. The chance to have in-depth conversations with monsters doesn't come by every day. Consider it a perk.

C: 但怪物们很需要你。
E: But those monsters need you.

C: （准备得差不多，该开始营业了。）
E: (Almost ready. Time to open for business.)

C: 好啦。忙碌了那么久，现在去给你自己调杯<color=#dbc291ff>专属饮料</color>吧，就当是留个纪念。
E: Alright, now go make yourself an <color=#dbc291ff>exclusive drink</color> as a souvenir of your drinksmith career.

C: 继续让人打白工？
E: You want me to keep working for free?

C: 没有线索的条件下做到这一点，您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You found it without any clues! Surely you're a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 拜托了！这部影片是「钟表匠」先生非常看重的作品——我们绝不能让他跟克劳克影视乐园一起在梦境中消亡！
E: Please do us a favor! The film series means a lot to Mr. Watchmaker! We can't allow it and the theme park to go into oblivion in the Dreamscape!

C: 应该是吧，但我们也不能完全否认这种观点，答案可能只有「钟表匠」先生知道。
E: I guess so, but I can't rule out the possibility completely. Mr. Watchmaker might be the only one who knows for sure.

C: 不，我们早就完成了这部胶卷的修复，但现在它并不在我们手里……
E: No, we've long done restoring the reel, but it isn't with us at the moment...

C: 说出这些话的时候，米莫萨眉头紧皱，仿佛那些话触碰到了她心中的某些伤口。
E: Mimosa's brows furrow as she speaks as though those words are triggering a wound inside her.

C: 你们的排期现在很紧吧？那就别磨蹭了，之后的动画制作我也会帮忙。
E: You must be on a tight schedule now, isn't it? Then stop wasting time. I'll also help with the animation later.

C: 难道是您让这位女士来归还胶卷的吗——不愧是匹诺康尼的英雄，面子也太大了！
E: Could it be that you've sent this lady to give us the film reel? No doubt you're the hero of Penacony! This is such an honor!

C: 那么——无论出于对观众的尊重，还是为了继承「钟表匠」先生的精神，克劳克影业都会努力将《美梦往事》的最后一部制作完成！
E: If that's the case, whether it's out of respect for the audience, or to carry on the spirit of Mr. Watchmaker, Clock Studios promises to do its best and complete his last film of Dreamjoy Memoir!

C: 他问我：「你认为《钟表小子》能带给人们什么」，我回答：「幸福、欢笑、感动，以及对美梦的一点儿反思」——但说实话，最后一个是我喝醉了瞎掰的。
E: He asked, "In your opinion, what does Clockie bring to the people?" I replied, "Happiness, laughter, heartwarming moments, and a bit of reflection on the sweet dreams." Honestly, the last one was just me blabbering away in my state at the time.

C: 怎么样？我演的是不是特别有同情心！
E: How's that? Was my acting totally compassionate or what!

C: 汪，汪汪，嗷呜——
E: Arf, arf arf, arrooo...

C: 准备好了？那让我们继续吧——
E: Ready? Let's continue then...

C: 「美梦小镇的英雄——钟表小子！将会潜入石头老板的办公楼，为居民们重新带回笑容！」
E: "The hero of Dreamville — Clockie — will infiltrate Boss Stone's office building to bring back smiles to the townspeople!"

C: 啧，行吧，反正工期也挺紧的。

C: 恭喜恭喜，恭喜你！

Ahhhh!!!

C: 感觉你这一趟确实领悟了不少。

C: 姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
E: Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?

E: I get how you feel. Honestly, I don't have much of a life outside of work either.

Shh!

E: {NICKNAME}, long time no see! Welcome back to Belobog!

E: Long after this, when you see a trashcan, you will still recall the time when you stood with them against the academy's representative. There will never be another moment as glorious as this.

E: I appreciate Madam Herta's intentions, but I am nowhere near retirement age, and can continue providing *quality* dining services to the Nameless.

E: Pom-Pom will hand out the <color=#dbc291ff>Express Fund</color> based on your duty performance. Use it to conduct <color=#dbc291ff>Room Construction</color> just the way you like it!

C: 花火篡改了咱俩的课题，大家看了我们的照片，一定很摸不着头脑……

C: 滴~答！粉色的朋友、灰色的朋友，多亏你们的支持，聪明勇敢的钟表小子终于把石头老板赶跑啦！
E: Tick-tock! Pink-haired friend, gray-haired friend, it's all thanks to your support that the smart and brave Clockie managed to repel Boss Stone!

C: ——茄子！

C: 不用谢！反正我也不是自愿工作的！

C: 唔…灰宝！
