C: 有点受伤又有点感动。
E: Ouch... but very touching.

C: 我向你介绍一下，这是来自密底斯泰歇的三兄弟——阿水菲斯，阿波菲斯，阿淼菲斯…他们是这次{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}狂欢节的主办方。
E: Let me introduce them to you. They are the Mythemis Brothers — Aquafis, Apophis, and Amorphis. They are the organizers of this {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} Festival.

C: 我要是不参加，会有生命危险。
E: If I don't, I could lose my life.

C: {NICKNAME}选手，你来得正好，比赛分组出来了——你和缇宝大人分到了一组，缇宁大人分到了另外的组。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're just in time. The matchups are out. You are in the same group as Lady Tribbie. Lady Trinnon has been assigned to another group.

C: 我不同意，我并非无法战胜！
E: I disagree. I'm not invincible!

C: 有裁缝女和缇宝阿姐两位半神坐镇，你们怕什么？
E: With our two demigods, the seamstress and big sis around, what are you afraid of?

C: 而现在，狡猾的小贼已经拿到她的玩具，不会再出现了。
E: And now, the cunning thief has her prize in hand. She won't appear again.

C: 我们成名人了？
E: So we're famous now?

C: 对对，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次的那个。咱这游戏就是以它为灵感创作的。
E: That's right, the biannual event at Pier Point each Amber Era? That's what inspired this.

C: 而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
E: And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"

C: 好的，这段时间我都会留在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。祝你游玩愉快！
E: Alright, I'll stay here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me. Happy gaming!

C: 我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险、寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。
E: Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the galaxy, seeking the legendary strongest weapon — the Bat."

C: 你的车很不错，现在是我的了。
E: Nice ride. But it's mine now.

C: 就按你说的办吧。
E: Let's do it your way.

C: 我知道…在世俗的眼光里，可能看不出我有性命危机，只觉得我玩得上瘾。
E: I know... To normal people, I probably don't look like I'm in mortal danger — just addicted to this game.

C: …竟然你一句我一句地聊起来了！你一定要加油啊，银河忍者小姐姐——
E: ...Wait, they're actually having a conversation!? You've got this, Miss Galactic Ninja —

C: 对元祖店来说，有点寒酸！
E: Pretty bare-bones for an original store!

C: 行了，闲话到此为止，小怂包应该搞定了——！
E: Alright, enough chatter, the scaredy-cat should've handled things by now!

C: 你输了。
E: You lost.

C: 答案：因为他的服务对象是「无酩客」。「酩」和「名」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Answer: Well, his customers are "the Nameless." And what's a drink without a spirit? No name, no spirits!

C: 欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」！
E: Welcome to the Dreamjolt Hostelry!

C: （开始调饮）
E: (Mixing begins)

C: 多谢。这杯调饮，就敬难得的空闲时刻吧。
E: Thank you. Here's to those rare moments of downtime.

C: 托帕慌忙点开办公终端，酒吧瞬间被全息弹窗的蓝光淹没。
E: Topaz fumbles to open her work terminal, and suddenly the lounge is swimming in blue holographic windows.

C: 相比之下，现实都平静得有些美好了…难道这也是放松的一种方式？
E: And now reality seems blissfully calm... is this some unconventional relaxation method?

C: 呵，往好处想，至少你比那些听了课但什么也没听懂的学生，多得到了一段甜蜜的睡眠。
E: Well, look at it this way. At least you enjoyed a lovely nap, unlike the students who stayed awake and still understood nothing.

C: 自己想成为的样子？听起来还真和「魔法」似的。
E: Their true essence? That really does sound like "magic."

C: 成长得太快了，有点显老。
E: That was too much growth, too quickly. Looks a bit aged now.

C: 因为…阮·梅女士是能得到黑塔女士认可的对象。
E: Because... Madam Ruan Mei is someone who has earned recognition from Madam Herta.

C: 当然没有，因为我根本就没发呀。嘻嘻，这杯饮料就送给你吧~
E: Of course you didn't. I never sent one. Hehe~ this one's on the house!

C: 你气喘吁吁地向二人说明了原委。
E: Gasping for breath, you quickly fill them in on what just happened.

C: 还有这种好事，奖品是什么？
E: Now that's what I like to hear. What's the prize?

C: 不好意思，婉拒了。
E: Sorry, I'll pass.

C: （递上调饮。）
E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 舒翁女士说要替离去的友人照看孩子，因此把酒吧经营暂时托付给了我。而我，亲爱的开拓者，我只是个路过的酒保而已。
E: Miss Siobhan said she must care for a departed friend's child, so she entrusted the lounge to me for now. And I, dear Trailblazer, am merely a wandering drinksmith.

C: 你不知道有多少双眼睛正盯着这个位置。偷偷告诉你，之前叽米先生还私下向战略投资部递交了转岗申请呢。
E: You have no idea how many eyes are on this position. Let me tell you a secret: Mr. Owlbert even submitted a transfer application to the Strategic Investment Department in secret.

C: 关于公司的竞争对手…
E: About the IPC's competitors...

C: 至于搞得这么神秘吗？
E: Why so mysterious about everything though?

C: 你负责探路和保护我，我负责找古代遗物。到时候我把找到的东西卖个高价，我们五五分成，如何？
E: You take care of the pathfinding and protection, and I'll be in charge of finding the ancient relics. We'll sell anything later on at top price and split the profits fifty-fifty. How about it?

C: 说不准，古代遗物千奇百怪，很多东西我也叫不出名字。
E: I'm not sure. There're lots of varied and strange relics there, and I don't even know what most of these are called.

C: 你现在倒是能歇着了，我可闲不下来。我还得继续往下找更深的遗迹呢！
E: You're able to take a break now, but I can't. I have to keep digging to find even more hidden ruins!

C: 说不定咱们之前还遗漏了什么好宝贝呢…你说是吧？
E: Perhaps there's something juicy that we missed before... What say you?

C: 还好有你，不然还真就要栽在地下了…看吧，我就说你一定能找到法子解决！
E: Lucky I have you, otherwise I'd no doubt be six feet under... See, I told you I have faith in your problem-solving ability!

C: 叫我来做什么？
E: Is there anything I can do?

C: 您听我说——「那药王秘传的魁首与烬灭军团沆瀣一气，受赐神力，祭起炉鼎，喷薄毒烟，直欲将{NICKNAME}等英雄豪杰一锅烩了！」
E: Listen up — "The Legion was in cahoots with the master primus of the Sanctus Medicus. Using their arcane powers, they activated elixir cauldrons to spew forth venomous vapors as they tried to take out {NICKNAME} and the other munificent heroes in one fell swoop!"

C: 呃…您先别乱，给我思路都打断了…「初代司鼎希望有能人破除禁制、通过试炼，在危急时刻服下他炼制的『九转升天丹』，救罗浮于水火。」
E: Uh... Don't try to confuse me. You've interrupted my train of thought... "The first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission hoped that one day, someone could break the containment mechanism, clear the trial, and take the Elixir of Dragon Oil right in the nick of time to save the Luofu from certain doom."

C: 「最后，{NICKNAME}将『风雷天根』投入丹炉中，霎时间电闪雷鸣，丹炉那方寸洞天中竟下起了一场雷雨！」
E: "Finally, {NICKNAME} tossed the Whirlbolt Pneumatophore into the crucible. With a flash of thunder and lightning, out of the blue an entire thunderstorm formed inside one square inch of the crucible!"

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 我的愿望是再要三个愿望！
E: My wish is for three more wishes!

C: 我要你找到这颗持明卵，为新任龙尊接生。此后，这新任龙尊将成为你的助力，帮助你渡过眼下的难关。
E: I want you to find this Vidyadhara egg and deliver the rebirth of the new high elder. From then on, this new high elder will be your help, and support you in overcoming any hardships you may encounter.

C: 行了，闲话少叙，小衍，讲讲你们的这个评书吧。我评估一下这角色值不值得我出演。
E: Okay, enough gossip for now. Xiyan, tell me more of your storytelling. Let's see if this role is worth my taking on.

C: 准备好了，开始吧。
E: I'm ready. Let's begin.

C: 呃…怎么就变成这个样子了！看来是找错种子了。
E: Huh... How did that happen!? I guess that was the wrong seed.

C: 又是喜闻乐见的寻宝环节？
E: Let me guess, it's treasure huntin' time, innit?

C: 啊？到我说台词了？
E: ...Ah? What's my line again?

C: 放入「冷却液」
E: Put in the coolant

C: 根据我的整理结果，有一个好消息和一个坏消息要告诉你。
E: And based on this paperwork, I've got good news and bad news to tell ya.

C: 之前我碰见个热心的云骑姑娘，是你的朋友对吧？
E: I met a warmhearted Cloud Knight lady not long ago. She's your friend, right?

C: 我听说素裳姑娘说，阿来和阿往是曲艺界的新星，放我家这摊子上说上几段也不算失礼。
E: Sushang mentioned Back'n & Forth to me. They're up-and-comers in the storytelling industry, and I think they'd be a great fit for my stall.

C: （他俩态度这么坚决…哎，直接去西衍先生那儿碰碰运气吧。）
E: (There is no room for negotiation in this matter, it seems. Maybe I should just try my luck with Mr. Xiyan.)

C: 其实我先前已经试营业过一段时间，起初客流量还可以，可没过多久，就无人问津了。
E: Honestly, I've tried it before, but my customer base just slowly disappeared over time.

C: 现在时机正好，我去喊点人来，希望这次「鉴宝」活动能圆满举行吧……
E: It's about time to get this show on the road. I'll gather up some folks here. Fingers crossed that this event will be a success...

C: 当你忙完跑堂，回过神来，明曦已经受邀来到美馔阁了。
E: When you finally have some downtime after serving the customers, Mingxi had already arrived at Delicacy Pavilion.

C: 唉，我居然连新手都打不过了，好怀念刚开服的时候，虽然游戏里只有几个以太灵，还有一堆漏洞，但肯定比现在有趣…曾经的快乐已经一去不返了，你这种新手是不会懂的……
E: Ahh, even a noob beat me! I miss when the server had just opened... There may have only been a few Aether Spirits in the game and loads of bugs, but it was way more fun than it is now! I'll never get the joy of those days back, noobs nowadays just won't get it...

C: 那我就不客气了…
E: Don't mind if I do...

C: 出发，前往第一个「决胜乐园」——<color=#dbc291ff>残响回廊</color>！
E: Let's head towards the first Victory Zone — <color=#dbc291ff>Corridor of Fading Echoes</color>!

C: 话说回来，两位恐怕是第一次进入<color=#dbc291ff>「决胜乐园」</color>吧？
E: Am I correct in saying that this is your first time entering a <color=#dbc291ff>Victory Zone</color>?

C: 不愧是三月七！
E: March never fails to impress!

C: 到目前为止，二位的感觉如何？应该已经熟悉这款游戏了吧？
E: I imagine you must be quite familiar with the game by now, how have you been faring?

C: 相遇是缘——咱们缘分一场，从今儿起啊，咱几个就都是朋友啦！我平时在那长乐天撂地杂耍，各位有空可来捧个场哈～
E: Fate has brought us together — that makes us friends! I often perform at Exalting Sanctum, so if you've ever got time, come and enjoy the show!

C: 话又说回来了——小娃儿们，可曾见过一名常带着面具的、名叫乔瓦尼的化外民哪？他要我转告二位一件事……
E: That reminds me... Have you two ever crossed paths with a peculiar fellow that goes by the name of Giovanni? He's an outsider with a fondness for wearing masks. He tasked me with delivering a message to the pair of you...

C: 多谢公输师傅！
E: Thank you, Master Gongshu!

C: 乔瓦尼先生…好像也在这里？
E: Is that... Mr. Giovanni?

C: 哈，对了。
E: Oh, hang on.

C: 欸…好像确实是这样？可次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神的主人说到底还是艾丝妲小姐……
E: It... sounds like it? But, Miss Asta is Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord's owner...

C: 别灰心嘛，我看好你们！
E: Hey, don't lose heart, I'm rooting for you all the way!

C: 玩家信息认证完成。你好，你好。欢迎来到「决胜乐园『大矿区』」——
E: Player credentials validated. Hello, hello. Welcome to the Great Mine Victory Zone.

C: 调用完成——请操作「自动机兵•蜘蛛」引发爆炸，驱散捣乱的员工——
E: Access granted. Please take control of the Automaton Spider and trigger an explosion to disperse the disruptive workers.

C: 是啊，矿车能用来干嘛？
E: What do we need a mine cart for?

C: 那名「托帕后援团」成员正在看向这边——
E: That support squad member is directly facing us.

C: 呜呜伯将<color=#dbc291ff>电梯解锁密钥</color>交给你后悠悠地飘走了，仿佛在说：「我还没来得及把电梯解锁密钥藏起来呢。」
E: Wubbaboo gives you the <color=#dbc291ff>elevator encryption key</color> and then leisurely walks away as if saying: "I haven't had time to hide the encryption key."

C: 看来你真的为这游戏付出了很多心血啊，之后也请多多支持我们公司的项目~
E: I see you've really put blood, sweat, and tears into this game. I hope you'll continue to support the IPC in future~

C: 可恶，看来还是需要考虑更多变量……
E: Dang, looks like there are more variables to consider...

C: 冠军首席的实力果然不同凡响啊，鄙人已经开始期待再与你较量了！
E: The power of a Champion truly is something else! I already cannot wait to battle you again!

C: 比赛即将开始，请问您要现在入场吗？
E: The contest is about to begin. Do you wish to enter the arena now?

C: 祝二位比赛顺利！
E: Good luck out there!

C: 大的要来了？
E: So, it's finally time to meet this mysterious person?

C: 它被尾巴摆了一道，心里一直耿耿于怀，只要咱们能激起它的好胜心，就能让它按我们的想法来行事。
E: I think Tail made a fool of Cirrus, and Cirrus has a held a grudge ever since. If we can get them worked up over it, we might be able to use them to our advantage.

C: …什么，你不应战？你不应战？！
E: ...What? You refuse? You won't fight me!?

C: 打就打呗，能靠武力解决的问题都不是问题。
E: We'll be fine! For us, any problem that can be solved by force isn't a problem at all.

C: 这名字比其他岁阳幼稚一些。
E: Sounds like a childish name for a heliobus.

C: 就在旁边那条路啊。我总感觉那里有小孩儿在嬉笑的声音，是风声？
E: On that road there... and I swear I can hear a child giggling whenever I walk by. Must be the wind...

C: 不过，你眼下已是这支小队的一员了，若要彼此合作，那么了解自然是少不得的一环。我就和你谈谈自己所知的一些秘辛旧事好了。
E: However, since you are now a member of the squad, and in the interest of everyone working together, it's best that we know each other a little better... — I'll tell you some of the secrets I know.

C: 那都是我们友谊的增稠剂！
E: That's just the sticky glop that holds friends together!

C: 我还记得之前判官大人手里有个名叫「藏月瓠」的宝贝，能吸锁岁阳…呃，就是被我打碎的那个…不知还在不在？
E: I remember one of the judges had a precious item called a Lunaumbra Gourd, which could absorb and imprison heliobi... Uh, come to think of it, I think that's the thing I smashed... I wonder if they fixed it?

C: 干嘛要道歉啊？我和你一样，虽然已经快成年了，不过还总是忍不住怀念小时候光着脚到处乱跑的日子。
E: Apologize for what? You know, you and me have a lot in common. I'm almost a grown-up now, but I still miss my childhood days and running about barefoot.

C: 关上前面那扇门…她就只能往那个方向逃了……
E: That door over there is the only way out... We'd better close it...

C: 嗯，很像是被太卜司那位著名的牌手上了身。
E: A certain Celestial Jade-playing Divination Commission employee, perhaps...?

C: 十王司的进展很顺利嘛。现在你们来见我，想必是又有所求咯？
E: It would seem the Ten-Lords Commission has everything under control... What is it you want from me?

C: 当然可以，毕竟人生「总会有选择的」，这可是你教我的啊。
E: Of course I can. After all, there are always choices in life. You taught me that.

C: 各位代表十王司弭平了太卜司中的灾异，功勋彪炳，令小女子也与有荣焉。我会上秉十王，表彰诸位。
E: On behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission, I commend you for your great service in resolving the Divination Commission crisis. I will honor all of you before the Ten Lords.

C: 我听到我的刀这么说，心中满是不服气，不知怎么地，居然就…就对彦卿兄弟出手了。
E: When I heard my sword say the name, I was in disbelief... and then, for some reason, I just... attacked Yanqing.

C: 它仿佛觉察到你们的来意，迅速靠近，绕着你们急旋。
E: Upon detecting your presence, it approaches and starts flying in circles around you.

C: 从刚才那位云骑大哥的遭遇来看，危险的怕不是彦卿，而是……
E: Based on what that Cloud Knight said, it isn't that Yanqing's in danger...

C: 远超彼等，无可限量……
E: Matchless, without limits...

C: 该动手了，只有血能洗去剑上的耻辱。
E: It's time to finish it. Only blood can cleanse the shame of the sword.

C: 这一击，是我侥幸胜了。
E: One hit, one stroke of luck, one victory.

C: 你不必自责，这些都是浮烟早就计划好的。
E: There's no need to blame yourself. This was Cirrus's plan all along.

C: 哎哟这不是尾巴大爷吗，看到你又当回看门狗，真是可喜可贺呀。
E: Oh, and is that "Mr. Tail"? Back to being a guard dog I see — how delightful... This calls for a celebration!

C: 所以还是得亲自上前线确认咯？
E: So we still have to go out and fact-check the leads?

C: 放心，我们是不会给十王司的工作添堵的。
E: Don't worry, we promise not to make your job any harder than it already is.

C: 他们都是被你附身之后强行带回来的，不是吗？哪里是回来了……
E: They're only here because you possessed them and made them come back. This isn't what I meant...

C: 这是棋？这是什么棋？
E: This is chess? What kind of chess is this?

C: 看起来只能这样了。
E: Looks like we have no choice.

C: 倾尽才智就这？
E: You used all your intelligence just for that?

C: 我们还是快些下棋吧，这棋鬼手里毕竟有人质，还是不要激怒她比较好。
E: We should play with her already. This Chess Ghost has hostages, it would be best not to anger her.

C: （如果这个妻子是岁阳幻化出的假相，应该会有破绽。）
E: (If the wife is actually a heliobus illusion, it must have a weakness.)

C: 两、两位方便吗？啊，那个…我们有话想和两位聊聊……
E: A—Are you free to chat right now? Er, so... we'd like to talk to the two of you...

C: 但事情就是这样，有时候即使我们把一切都做对了，结果依然可能令人不快…这就是十王司的工作，也是判官的职责。
E: But here's the thing: Sometimes even when we get everything right, the results can still leave us feeling unhappy... That's the job of the Ten-Lords Commission. That's the job of a Judge.

C: 不怪。人有七情六欲，渴望出人头地或坐拥亿万家财，这些都是常情。
E: It is not. People are creatures of desire, it is normal for them to crave renown and fortune.

C: 我想要豪宅、星槎…不，我是说歼星舰！
E: I want a huge house and a starskiff... No, I want a starnought!

C: 已经没有那种世俗的欲望了。
E: I no longer feel these worldly desires.

C: 人群被兴奋的浪潮淹没，人们为青雀吐出的每一个字拼命鼓掌。
E: The crowd was overwhelmed with a wave of exhilaration, the people applauded every word Qingque had uttered.

C: 符玄拍了拍青雀脑袋，转身离开了。
E: Fu Xuan patted Qingque on the head, turned, and left.

C: 给我专心点！
E: Focus!

C: 哎呀，资源都是我给你的，不要客气嘛，直接<unbreak>10</unbreak>连！
E: *sigh* Don't be shy. I'll put up the resources for it. Do <unbreak>10</unbreak> in a row!

C: 出动！
E: Move out!

C: …不应该吧。
E: ...Nope.

C: 就在你凑近观察的时候，广告板突然活了过来一般，翻转了过来。
E: Just as you move closer to inspect, the advertisement board suddenly flips over, like it's come to life.

C: 当然没有，我很少出门，怎么会和人结仇呢？
E: Of course not. I never really go out. How could I make any enemies?

C: 我们什么交情呐，你可千万别这么想。
E: We're friends. So don't even sweat it.

C: 且慢，你先把之前半夜扰民的事交代清楚，不说清楚别想走。
E: Wait up. Please clear up for me what all that midnight ruckus was about before. You're not going anywhere until you do.

C: 怎么会呢，要是你当时没骂醒我，可能我现在还是个神憎鬼厌的混蛋吧。
E: How could I? If it weren't for you scolding me then, maybe I'd still be an insufferable wretch now.

C: 唔，也是呢…毕竟你是带着这项任务来的嘛。
E: Uh, that's true... After all, you came here for this mission.

C: 但我还是想将它放归宇宙，毕竟它的族类是从那儿来的。
E: But I still wish to release it into the universe. After all, its kind's from there.

C: 我深思熟虑，但偶尔也会后悔。
E: I make decisions after lots of consideration, but I still regret some choices...

C: 仙舟美食博大精深，少吃几顿我都觉得受不了，我感觉我这胃已经是地地道道的「仙舟胃」了。
E: The Xianzhou cuisine is so broad and deep that if I don't eat it for a few meals, I'll go nuts. This stomach of mine, I feel like it's already an authentic Xianzhou stomach.

C: 就这些了。
E: And that's all.

C: 等等等等…你是在逗乐子吧？喂，不要胡言乱语啊，观众们会当真的！
E: Waaaaait a minute... are you punking me? Hey, don't mess around like that, or they will think you really mean it!

C: 全体目光，向我看齐！我要宣布个事儿！
E: All eyes on me, please! I've an announcement to make!

C: 不得不说你好可爱啊。
E: I have to say, you really are so cute.

C: 你是担心身体受损吗？放心，只是远程连接，不会有直接接触的。
E: Are you worried about getting injured? Fear not, it's a remote connection, so there's no physical contact.

C: 您的反馈已记录，后台数据已传输完毕。检测到更新内容，「知觉难度提升版界种科最新难度惊天地泣星神科员看了无比绝望模式扩充包」已安装成功。
E: Your feedback has been recorded and saved. New update detected: "Perceptual Difficulty Enhanced Edition: Department of Ecology's New Hard Mode Heaven-Shattering Aeon-Shuddering Researchers-Shall-Gaze-Upon-This-And-Despair Mode Expansion" has been successfully installed.

C: 它的样子发生了很大变化，但它自己也说不清究竟是怎么回事。
E: Its appearance has altered, but it doesn't seem to have an explanation either.

C: 到时候，难道你要将所有造物都送走吗？
E: When the time comes, are you going to try and give away all the creations?

C: 它是第一个主动要求见你的「阮•梅」造物。
E: It is the first creation of Ruan Mei's that's asked to see you.

C: 先说我的要求——我和她的合照，请务必发给她看，我很好奇她和黑塔看了会有什么反应。
E: First up, here's my official request: A photo of me with her, and you have to send it to her. I'm curious about how she and Herta will react.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要听我讲故事吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like me to tell you a story?

C: 我禀告过了，可夫人不听！它还说…还说……
E: I've told Madam, but she wouldn't listen! She even said... that...

C: 其实…听闻您远征归来，小女子早就准备好了庆功的特调，请您品尝。
E: In truth, upon learning of your return from your expedition, I have prepared a commemorative beverage for Your Excellency.

C: 唉，我从来都是孑然一身，若是未曾抱有过期待，何来抛弃？
E: *sigh* I have always been on my lonesome. If the expectation was never envisaged, how would one be considered abandoned?

C: 材料都不齐还敢开酒吧，搁这搞笑呢。什么破店，连个像样的饮料都调不出来。走了！
E: What!? How dare you open a lounge without decent ingredients? What a joke! You can't even whip up a decent drink. I'm leaving!

C: 喂，喂，听得到嘛？
E: Hey? Hello? Mister?

C: （这里是…过去的「惊梦酒吧」？）
E: (This is... the Dreamjolt Hostelry from the past?)

C: 若是家族势太甚~咱就卷铺盖走人~莫要乞求莫担忧，饿肚皮也好过把气受~
E: We'll just pack up and leave if The Family is too powerful~ There's no need to beg or worry. Better to be hungry than angry~

C: 这家酒吧不行吗？
E: Why not have your date right here in the lounge?

C: 下次还会来找您的，要对人家的到来充满期待呀！
E: I'll drop by next time! Please look forward to my arrival!

C: 当然有。你要是让我开心，我就会常来光顾这家酒吧，你也能拿到更多小费。
E: You see, if you make me happy, I'll drop by more often, and you'll receive more tips.

C: 对我有好处吗？
E: What's in it for me?

C: 我曾疯狂地迷恋戏剧，那是由缤纷华服与妆饰共同构造起的幻梦。
E: Once, I was fervently obsessed with plays, dreams woven from vibrant costumes and make-up.

C: 嘻嘻，何必这么较真呢。您都做了这么长时间调饮师，应该很清楚，心里话呀，还是不说出来为妙。
E: Hee-hee, why so serious? You've been a drinksmith for quite a while, and I'm sure you know better than to speak your mind.

C: 真的不想听？人家准备直接回去了哦。
E: You really don't want to hear it? Fine. I'll just head home.

C: 人家呢，偶然间得知了舒翁的秘密。
E: Actually, I stumbled upon Siobhan's secret by chance.

C: 记录「忧郁派」的情况。
E: Record information about Melancholy.

C: …黑桃。
E: ...Spade.

C: …忧郁派。
E: ...Melancholy.

C: …黑桃。
E: ...Spade.

C: …忧郁派。
E: ...Melancholy.

C: 饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。
E: Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.

C: 我不是很熟练。
E: I'm not quite skilled at it.

C: 聚光灯下的生活实在太过喧嚣…我讨厌待在镜头前，讨厌数不尽的演出采访，更讨厌念那些乏味到让我想吐的台本。比起跟吵闹的人群相处，我更愿意待在它们身边。
E: Life under the spotlight was too much for me... I despised being in front of the camera, the never-ending interviews, and the mind-numbingly boring scripts. I'd rather be with those monsters than in a rowdy crowd.

C: 这次的拜访就到此为止，感谢接待！
E: That's it for this visit. Thank you for your hospitality!

C: 明明是个打工的人，就不要用调饮师来自称了嘛。名字再厉害，也掩盖不了本质嘛。
E: If you're just here working a job, you shouldn't use the title of drinksmith. A fancy title isn't going to cover your essence.

C: 你不觉得自己更过分吗？
E: Don't you think you're the one crossing the line here?

C: （快点把它送走吧！）
E: (Please, get it out of here!)

C: 启动调饮模拟器！
E: Activate the drinksmith simulator!

C: 咳，我去匹诺康尼，除了度假之外，顺道还解决了一道技术难题。
E: Ahem, so I went to Penacony for a vacation and ended up solving a technical issue along the way.

C: 对啊，花了我不少心血的，我自己测试过了，特有意思。
E: Yeah, it took me a lot of effort. I tested it myself, and it's pretty fun.

C: 汪汪
E: WoofWoof

C: 汪    汪汪
E: Woof    WoofWoof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 空间<rhythm>站<rhythm>是<rhythm>我家
E: The <rhythm>Space Station <rhythm>is <rhythm>my home

C: 现在是「美梦进行曲」的进阶试炼啾。
E: This is the Advanced Trial for March of Sweet Dreams, tweet.

C: （感觉黑桃说话有点疯疯的，但还算是好接触的类型？）
E: (I feel like the way Spade talks is a bit crazy, but they seem pretty easy to get along with.)

C: 如果你收到过我们的通知…就快说出「密码」吧。
E: If you've received a message from us... say the password.

C: 银狼小鸟
E: Silbird Wolf

C: 怎么还不过来…在那嘀嘀咕咕什么呢，不会是在说我坏话吧？
E: Are you coming? What are you mumbling about over there? You'd better not be talking smack about me!

C: 我最近刚好想要稍微散散心，就过来看看。
E: I felt like I needed a change of pace lately, so I decided to pop by.

C: 那勇者最后救出公主了吗？
E: Did he rescue the princess in the end?

C: 非常感谢各位的参与，后续我们将根据测试数据及获得的意见反馈，对游戏进行更深度的打磨，敬请期待！
E: Everybody, thank you very much for participating. We'll use the data gathered from the test and the feedback provided by you to improve the game even further. Please look forward to the final release!

C: 既然如此…我也不好拒绝。
E: If that's the case... I'd be hard-pressed to refuse.

C: {NICKNAME}教练，陪我去一趟金人巷吧。我得当面拒绝他们。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, can you head over to Aurum Alley with me? I need to decline their offer in person.

C: 不不不，这里面还有多方采访呢！总不可能是「自动采访机」瞬间完成的吧？
E: That's impossible! There are multiple interviews in this! There's no way they have an "automatic interviewer machine" that can instantly do all the interviews!

C: 你在说什么胡话呢？和公司勾结的不就是你吗？
E: What nonsense are you talking about? Isn't it you who's colluded with the IPC?

C: 学派间为了支配「权杖」的算力打得你死我活，或是私底下有不可告人的交易，这些都无关痛痒。真正值得藏起来的，只可能是一种东西——知识本身。
E: The schools shed blood over the allocation of the Scepters' computational power, or there could have been clandestine exchanges happening, but all are inconsequential. There's only one thing truly worth concealing — knowledge itself.

C: 不过这并非无益，逻辑：两位宝贵的合作伙伴，其权重远高于个体安全和运行效率。
E: But it was not all in vain. Logic: The two research partners are of far more import than individual safety and operational efficacy.

C: 搭建车厢的配件可没那么容易买到帕……
E: It's not that easy to find the parts needed to build another car...

C: 「咖啡」是这么随机的产物吗？
E: Is coffee really such a random product?

C: 你只不过是把连接线插错了插槽，漏过了两个卡扣，装反了元胞运算芯片。都是些小问题，作为一个新手，能做到这一步已经不错。
E: You just plugged the cables into the wrong ports, missed a couple of clips, and installed the cellular calculation chip in reverse. These are minor issues. For a beginner, you've done quite well.

C: 那我不去了。
E: I'm not going then.

C: 可我还是希望有人能记住我们家乡的名字，以及这里曾经发生过的一切。因此，我留下了这小小的一部分回忆。
E: Yet, I am still hopeful that people will still remember the name of our native home, as well as the events that have transpired here. This is why I have left a tiny portion of my memories here.

C: 这八座山堵塞了通往城区的路，为百姓生活带来了严重不便。
E: They cut off all paths to the city, making daily life a struggle for its citizens.

C: 之后我要闭关一阵。在此期间，那颗蛋就托付给你了。千万别让它被愚昧之人破坏。
E: I need to go off-grid for a while. The egg is in your hands now. Keep the ignorant away from it, please.

C: 嗡！（开心！每天除了吃就是玩，能不开心吗！）
E: Grumph! (Yup! I've been eating and playing every day. What's not to love!)
Grumph... (...)

C: 它…为什么突然变得那么大？
E: Why did it... suddenly grow so huge?

C: 很好！现在你还害怕失败吗？
E: Great! Now, are you still afraid of failures?

C: 没事的，要相信它。
E: It'll be fine. Just trust the kid.

C: 希望它能向我们证明，大地兽的可能性……
E: I hope it can show us what a dromas is truly capable of...

C: 咱不测了，干脆回家吧。
E: Let's skip the test and go home.

C: 呜…嗡嗡……（感觉上次见面过去还没多久…算啦。）
E: Grumph... Grumphhhh... (Feels like it wasn't that long since we last met... never mind.)

C: 来吧！
E: Let's do this!

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 嗯，明天也要来进修啊。
E: And yes, come for more training tomorrow.

C: 捡到了宝贝，你就自己收着吧…
E: Found a treasure, huh? You can keep it...

C: 形态各异的小家伙需要越过重重障碍，抵达赛道终点，争夺更高的名次…听起来是不是还挺有意思的？
E: These unique little ones need to overcome various obstacles to reach the finish line and compete for the top spots... Sounds pretty fun, doesn't it?

C: 这场造物们的越野训练得到了星际和平公司的资金支持，因此，叽米先生会作为解说出场，实时播报赛况哦。
E: This creations' great obstacle race is sponsored by the IPC, so Mr. Owlbert will be providing live commentary as our commentator.

C: 放心吧，艾丝妲站长可是专门拨了一笔经费下来的，我们绝不敢贪墨分毫！
E: Don't worry, Lead Researcher Asta specifically set aside some funds for this. We wouldn't dare take a penny!

C: 没想到试营业反响这么好。农田里的作物应该也都成熟了，来大干一场吧，伙伴。
E: Can't believe our soft launch is already such a hit. The crops in the field should be ready too. Now it's time to go all out, partner.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 若是意指金织爵，我有件要事交代她去处理，想来明日便能见到结果。
E: If you mean the Dux Goldweaver, I sent her on an important errand. We should see the results tomorrow.

C: 需要选出代表性的菜品呢。我们的招牌菜，就交给店长决定啦。
E: We'll need something that best represents our restaurant. The choice of our signature dish now rests in your hands.

C: 人家也来——星级餐馆！轻轻松松！
E: Hooray! A starred restaurant! Easy-peasy!

C: 哼，看好了。
E: Hmph. Watch closely.

C: 我——奥赫玛同盟的领袖，圣城的凯撒——在此倡议，为表敬意与纪念，餐馆的首个经营活动。
E: In honor and commemoration, I — leader of the Okhema Alliance, Imperator of the holy city — hereby propose the first-ever restaurant event.

C: 坐地起价是吧？
E: Trying to jack up prices, are we?

C: 没想到缇宁这么能吹…
E: Wow, didn't expect Trinnon to be this good at bragging...

C: 方才我请金织爵引路，已初步勘察过场地。白厄阁下对用餐区域的规划相当成熟，无须再作调整。
E: I had Dux Goldweaver show me around earlier. Lord Phainon's layout for the dining area is already top-notch. No change is needed.

C: 迷！咸之天王，正是在下。在我看来，咸食的最高境界便是…味大，无须多盐！
E: Mem! I'm the Salty Overlord! For me, a master chef worth their salt lies in bold flavor, not just more salt!

C: 我们将轮流发起挑战迷。看看你们的菜品，能否填饱挑剔的胃口迷！
E: We'll challenge you one by one, mem! Let's see if your cooking can satisfy our picky palates!

C: 至于村长说的惊喜，究竟是什么呢。看来只有等餐馆达到四星级后才能知道了。
E: So, about that surprise the village chief mentioned... Guess we'll only find out once the restaurant hits four stars.

C: 还请两位阁下去农田里劳作数日，以示惩戒。
E: You two are going to work the fields for a few days as punishment.

C: 还有不小的进步空间。
E: You could definitely do better.

C: 作为回报，妖精们特意准备了一份超级大礼。由这位特邀评审员公证，我宣布——
E: In return, the fairies have prepared a magnificent gift. With our special guest reviewer as witness, I hereby declare...

C: 迷！小涟，村长在找你！
E: Mem! Reney, Chief is looking for you!

C: 再等等吧。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 佩佩自告奋勇承担守门任务。
E: Peppy volunteers to watch the door.

C: 一天的辛苦在炒饭入口的瞬间烟消云散。
E: The day's hard work vanished into thin air the moment you took a bite of the fried rice.

C: 见证了英雄的故事，放入那一缕「无名的追忆」
E: Having witnessed the hero's tale, now drop in that strand of "Nameless Recollection"

C: 同伴
E: Companion

C: 好学生
E: Good Student

C: 常有人看到孩童们，\n乘着巨大的火筒，\n做圣城里的流星。
E: People commonly see the children\nriding on enormous flaming rockets,\nlooking like shooting stars blazing through the holy city.

C:
她葬下一个又一个陌生的面庞，
她记得早夭婴孩的睡颜，
也记得母亲绝望的眼神，

她记得战死将领的伤痕，
也记得孤孀满面的泪涟。
E:
One burial after another she presided over,
From the angelic visage of a babe passed in the cradle,
To the despairing eyes of the mother drowning in sorrow.

From the scars on a war-battered general's torso,
To the unending tears pouring from his bereft widow.

C:
生来蒙承恶咒，
那致人死地的铅白与朱砂，
她都能亲手装点逝者容颜。

相传，她的技艺能给予任何一人美貌，
甚至使人改头换面。
E:
Born with an evil curse,
Her hand dips into lethal cinnabar and white lead,
To personally decorate the faces of the dead.

Her skills are said to bestow beauty on anyone,
Even transforming their appearance completely.

C: 「清晨勿言黄昏事。」 花在垂下它的露滴， 风在摇曳它的叶子， 两人坐着，悄无声息。
E: "Do not speak of dusk when you have yet to see the dawn." Dew drops from the petals, As wind pulls on the leaves, And the two of them sit, in quietude.

C: 「翁法罗斯之心…德谬歌。」 谁在唤你？ 那是你的名字？ 「…嗨，想我了吗？」
E: "Heart of Amphoreus... Demiurge." Who's calling you? Is that your name? "...Hi, miss me yet?"

C: 想听她再多分享些……\n你第一次这么想。
E: You find yourself wanting to hear more from her...\nA thought that's never crossed your mind until now.

C: 在那鲜花芬芳的西风彼岸，\n我随手撷下一朵，\n转身回望。
E: On the fragrant shores of the west wind where flowers bloom,\nI picked one without thought,\nand turned to glance behind me.

C: 「吉奥里亚，就此伏诛！」
E: "Georios shall be executed here!"

C: 「醒来吧，我们熟悉的故人，已经降临。」\n如初生的黎明。
E: "Wake up. Our familiar old friends have already arrived."\nLike the newborn dawn.

C: 孩子们喜欢这个故事。\n于是，随着月相更替，\n故事便成了真理。
E: The children love that tale.\nTherefore, as the moon turned and shifted phases,\nThe story became true.

C: 不败的凯撒于巅峰销歇。\n冠上的烈火在湖中寂灭。
E: The invincible Imperator faded at the pinnacle of power.\nThe crown's flames extinguished in the lake.

C: 「我将征服诸天，群星皆为臣邦。」
E: "I shall conquer the heavens, and all stars shall submit."

C:
当远在他乡的少女得知噩耗，
风吹来须臾的恍惚，
也吹干了留存刹那的泪珠，
少女展现的仍是笑靥。
E:
When the girl, far from home, hears of such grave news,
The wind brings to her a moment of confusion,
But it also evaporates the tears that briefly sparkle into being,
And the girl still smiles bright and happy.

C: 天空的祝福，\n为它的后人代代相传。
E: The blessings of the Sky\nWere passed down through generations of their heirs.

C: 哀丽秘榭，男人的故乡。\n如同他的身世，神秘而深藏。
E: Aedes Elysiae... the man's hometown.\nShrouded in secrecy, just like his past.

C: 「这里没有剑，只有农具。」\n面对雄心壮志的男孩，\n店家不忍嘲笑，耐心解释。
E: "There are no swords here. Only farming tools."\nFacing the ambitious boy,\nThe shopkeeper kindly explained.

C: 「松开我的胡子，白头发的小子！」\n「不。」\n「唉…算你胜，行了吧？」
E: "Let go of my beard, you white-haired rascal!"\n"No."\n"Fine... You win, okay?"

C: 每一次长久地眺望黎明，\n他总是微笑着，\n对他物不闻不问。
E: Each time he gazed long toward the coming dawn,\nA smile remained fixed on his lips,\nPaying no mind to anything else.

C: 那谦逊的少年人，\n随火焰消逝在昨天。
E: That humble youth,\nFaded away with the flames into yesterday.

C:
可如今，
那些记忆也化作怒火…
他是如此憎恨，
自己无法留住重视的一切，
尽数珍藏。
E:
But now,
Even those memories have melted into fury...
His hatred is such,
That he cannot hold onto what he cherishes,
Though all is precious to him.

C: 那双手从不索取众神的恩赐，\n只接下自己抛出的逆谋。
E: Hands that never seek the benediction of gods,\nAccepting only the tricks and plots his brain presents.

C: 初见泰坦，\n渎神者已称得上客气万分。
E: Upon his first meeting with the Titan,\nThe blasphemer is already on his best behavior.

C: 不。\n「我不喜欢奉承的话语，还有委迤的场合。」
E: No.\n"Ingratiating words do not sit well with me, nor do duplicitous machinations."

C: 在一众扎格列斯信徒之中处于顶点的，便是被称为「多洛斯之风」的半神——赛法利娅。
E: Among all followers of Zagreus, at the pinnacle stands the demigod known as "Wind of Dolos" — Cifera.

C: 为什么缇缇每天都不一样呢？其中一个孩童飞过望不见顶的圣殿高墙，去往树庭，带回「曳石学派」学者冷酷的诊断结论：这叫精神分裂，属于癔症的一种，以后常冷水浇身，每日锻炼罢！
E: Why was Trity different every day? One of the children flew past the towering temple walls that stretched beyond sight, went to the Grove, and brought back the cold diagnostic conclusion from a Helkolithist scholar: It's all in the mind! Just get plenty of rest and she'll be fine!

C: 「但『星穹餐车』…显然不同于之前那些宵小之辈。」阿格莱雅为众人介绍起天外的挑战者。据说他们乘坐一辆无与伦比的餐车，航行于宇宙各地，搭建出联通不同美食流派的星轨航图。
E: "But the 'Astral Food Express'... is clearly not like those petty rivals." Aglaea began to explain the challengers from beyond the sky to everyone. Rumor had it they traveled the stars aboard a peerless food truck, creating a Star Rail Map of astral routes that linked every culinary tradition across the cosmos.

C: 「万敌选手，方便问一问…它与赛题『背叛』有什么关系？」
E: "Chef Mydei, may I ask... how does this relate to the theme 'Betrayal'?"

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 来古士
E: Lygus

C:
石头老板每天都让镇民们去挖石头，却只给他们喝鳄鱼池里的脏水，吃沼泽地里的杂草，弄得大家苦不堪言。
于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了用汽水控制镇民的心智——他希望借此组建自己的王国，成为噩梦小镇唯一的主人，汽水先生就是这样一瓶野心勃勃的饮料。
但他的行为却触怒了石头老板，他可不允许有人在自己的地盘上肆意妄为。卑鄙无耻的石头老板利用诡计捉住了汽水先生，把他丢进了大牢。

所幸哈努兄弟和钟表小子救出了汽水先生。汽水先生成为了他们的伙伴，一起对抗石头老板。
汽水先生的苏乐达控制了许多人，他让镇民们为自己所用，让鳄鱼们纷纷倒戈，石头老板节节败退。
E:
Boss Stone sent the townsfolk to dig for stones every day, but he only fed them dirty water from the crocodile pond and weeds from the swamp, making everyone's life miserable.
To control the minds of the residents, Mr. Soda starts to concoct a mysterious drink. He hoped the drink could help him establish his own kingdom and become the sole ruler of Nightmareville. Mr. Soda was one such ambitious drink.
Yet, Mr. Soda's action infuriated Boss Stone, who couldn't allow anyone to behave willfully on his turf. Boss Stone unscrupulously captured Mr. Soda using a dirty trick and sent him to prison.

Fortunately, Brother Hanu and Clockie managed to rescue Mr. Soda. Mr. Soda then joined them to rebel against Boss Stone.
Through SoulGlad, Mr. Soda had many under his control. He had the townsfolk at his disposal and had the crocodiles defected to his side. Boss Stone was defeated again and again.

C: 缭乱流派对
E: Dazzling School Party

C: 即便进入了演艺圈，以后要走的路还长着呢。加油，我在道路尽头等着你来挑战！
E: Even if you've entered the entertainment industry, you still have a long road ahead. Keep pushing, I'll be waiting for you to challenge me at the end of the road!

C: 奇美拉施工队
E: Chimera Operation Team

C: 我曾游历一个古老国度，那里的人们以舟楫为家，展开锦绣织造的巨帆，在一片虚空中远航。\n他们对木工有独特的见解，通过框架的嵌合，构建稳固的结构。\n或许，这对你修理信箱能有一些启发。
E: I once journeyed to an ancient land where people lived on ships. Their homes adorned with vast, resplendent sails, gliding across the void.\nThey had a unique philosophy of woodworking — using interlocking mortise-and-tenon joints to build structures of astonishing stability.\nPerhaps that might inspire you when fixing your mailbox.

C: 突然的自我
E: Sudden Self

C: 银河梦幻共演
E: Galactic Dream Duet

C: 「开拓」特调
E: Trailblaze Special Mix

C: 一孔之见，愿效绵薄之力。尔不妨
E: {SPACE}humble opinions on this matter, which I hope could serve you well. It'd be wise to

C: 扑神
E: Trotterlord

C: 伐木机枪
E: tree-felling machine gun

C: 请用伦道夫给你的拍照软件，尽可能拍摄隐藏于星槎海中枢人群中的「垃圾桶」吧。
E: Use Randolph's photo-taking app to capture as many "trashcans" hidden among the crowd at Central Starskiff Haven as possible.

E: Snack Time

E: Maintenance Overhaul

E: Brewing Coffee

E: Incentive Tile: Greatly increases Action's effectiveness

E: Sofa (Right)

E: Storage Cabinet (Lower)

E: Medium

C: 深谋远虑智囊队
E: Team "Strategic Vision"

C:
粗粗观察了一下，列车的安保措施似乎还有提升的空间。

银河间的旅行充满了难以预测的风险，完善的安保体系会大大降低意外事件的发生概率。

如果大家需要的话，我可以为列车提供一些关键的安全设备。
E:
From a general glance, the security of the Express still has room for improvement.

The galaxy is filled with many unexpected dangers and upgrading your security systems will greatly reduce the chance of unexpected accidents occurring.

If needed, I can offer some essential pieces of security equipment to the Express.

C: 也许只是匆匆过客
E: She's just a passerby in my life

C: 它的出现肯定是某种隐喻
E: Its appearance might be a hidden sign

C: 只是一段旅行的插曲
E: Just an interlude for the journey

C: 你厌恶浮华之物，所以你也厌恶「黄金的时刻」。\n啊，一个时刻保持警醒，绝不会被眼前的灯红酒绿蒙蔽的灵魂。向你致敬。\n考虑到你已然身处梦中，不如暂时放下成见，纵情感受盛会之城的魅力。当然，时刻长个心眼总不会错…如果你不想反被这座城市吃干抹净。
E: You despise pretentiousness and therefore scorn the Golden Hour.\nAh! A soul that remains ever vigilant! Never fooled by the glamour parading before you! I salute thee.\nConsidering you are already in the dream, perhaps you can put aside your prejudices for a while and enjoy the charms of this city of festivities to its full. Though, do remember to keep some wits about you, lest the city swallows you all.

C: 一个活生生的卡通形象出现在你面前…这一定是对你这段旅途的某种隐喻。\n第一幕出现的枪，在第三幕一定会开火，对吧？你想的或许没错，在这个遵从因果的宇宙里，没有任何一次相遇是毫无意义的。
E: A living cartoon character has manifested right before you... This feels like some kind of allegory for your journey.\nThe gun that showed up in scene one has to go off in scene three, right? You might just be right. In this universe ruled by causality, not a single encounter is without significance.

C: 目标达成后，获得<color=#f29e38ff>#1</color>个<color=#f29e38ff>「古代防具」</color>。
E: After accomplishing the objective, receive <color=#f29e38ff>#1</color> piece(s) of <color=#f29e38ff>Ancient Armor</color>.

C: ——这里充斥着危险的气息，四周挤满了凶猛的敌人。
E: — Danger percolates the space as fierce and aggressive enemies flood the place.

C: ——在遗迹中，你好像看到了熟悉的身影……
E: — Within the ruins, you seem to detect a familiar silhouette...

C: 当生命值为0时，模拟测试将结束并退场，<color=#f29e38ff>请务必努力存活</color>。
E: When HP reaches 0, the simulation test will end, and you will exit the test. <color=#f29e38ff>Please do your best to survive</color>.

C:
奖励：难度较低的节点，拥有无限的行动值，敌人会随机掉落战利品晶矿。
战斗：具有挑战的战斗节点，你将面对不同竞争对手阵营中的普通、精英敌人。
补给：提供若干组角色和装备的补给包，可根据当前阵容情况自由选择补给。
遭遇：可选难度的挑战节点，完成战斗挑战后可获得额外奖励。通常挑战敌人难度越高，可获得的奖励品质越高。
首领：当前位面的首领挑战，完成挑战后可通关本位面。
E:
Reward: Nodes with lower difficulty have infinite Action Value, and enemies will randomly drop the crystal ores as rewards.
Battle: Challenging combat Nodes where you will face normal and elite enemies from different competitor factions.
Supply: Provides several sets of character and Equipment Supply Packs. You can freely choose supplies based on your current lineup.
Encounter: A challenge node with selectable difficulty. You can receive extra rewards after completing the combat challenge. Generally, the higher the difficulty of the enemies challenged, the higher the quality of the rewards you can obtain.
Boss: The Boss challenge for the current Plane. Completing the challenge will allow you to clear this Plane.

C: 有些泰坦符文需要巧妙<color=#f29e38ff>借助其他机关</color>调整图案，待其拼合完整后才能继续下载。
E: Some Titan runes require cleverly <color=#f29e38ff>using other mechanisms</color> to adjust their patterns before they can be fully assembled and continue downloading.

C: 转盘有两种<color=#f29e38ff>旋向</color>，分别为顺时针转动和逆时针转动。
E: Two types of <color=#f29e38ff>rotations</color> exist: Clockwise and counterclockwise.

C: 点击按钮，进入<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄识别</color>模式。若附近有能被识别的目标时，按钮会<color=#f29e38ff>闪烁</color>。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Photographic Recognition</color> mode. If there are identifiable objects nearby, the button will begin to <color=#f29e38ff>flash</color>.

C: 回溯后的浮桥仅能<color=#f29e38ff>供人通过一次</color>，之后便会再度塌陷。此外，浮桥由下方的晶石供能，<color=#f29e38ff>对晶石造成冲击也可直接令浮桥塌陷</color>。每座浮桥的塌陷方式可能存在差异。
E: The rewound floating bridge can <color=#f29e38ff>only be crossed once</color> before it collapses again. Additionally, the bridge is powered by crystals below it, and <color=#f29e38ff>impacting the crystals will also cause the bridge to collapse</color>. Each bridge may have a unique means to collapse.

C: 镇球塑像的<color=#f29e38ff>基座可以被攻击破坏</color>，球会滚向塑像面朝的方向，撞坏路上的障碍，也可以撞开虚掩的大门。
E: The Ball-Holder Statue's <color=#f29e38ff>base can be destroyed by attacks</color>, causing the ball to roll in the direction the statue faces, breaking obstacles along its path, and pushing open slightly ajar doors.

C: 寻找<color=#f29e38ff>三个代表「愿望」的凝晶</color>，依次将它们<color=#f29e38ff>重塑</color>，即可完成试炼。
E: Find <color=#f29e38ff>the three Crystals representing "Wish"</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>reforge</color> them in sequence to complete the trial.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>古代遗物</color>可以为单次战斗提供增益效果。达成遗物的挑战，还可以获取额外的奖励。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Ancient Relics</color> can provide buffs for single battles. Additionally, completing relic challenges grants additional rewards.

C: 通过反弹「惊梦剧团的甜猿泰山（投影）」攻击触发<color=#f29e38ff>【反震还击】</color>机制后，可将<color=#f29e38ff>「关卡增益」</color>提高1个档位。\n随着「关卡增益」档位提升，「关卡增益」的<color=#f29e38ff>评级</color>也将提升。
E: After rebounding the attack of Dreamjolt Troupe's Sweet Gorilla (Projection) to trigger the <color=#f29e38ff>Quake Counter</color> mechanic, you may upgrade the <color=#f29e38ff>Stage Buff</color> by 1 rank.\nAs you increase your Stage Buff rank, the <color=#f29e38ff>rating</color> for the Stage Buff will also increase.

C:
武器组合推荐
风雷属性：雷电荆棘、疾风巨锤、游侠长弓
消灭敌方目标后触发：疾风巨锤、甜美的沉眠
相关配饰：飓霆拷链（风雷属性伤害提升）
E:
Recommended Weapon Combo:
Wind and Lightning-Type: Thunderbolt Thorns, Storm Gale Hammer, and Ranger's Longbow
Triggered by Defeating Enemy Targets: Storm Gale Hammer and Sweet Slumber
Related Accessory: Lightning Storm Shackles (Increases Wind and Lightning DMG)

C: 小桶初始拥有1点生命值，我方角色生命值<color=#f29e38ff>降低</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>回复</color>时，小桶<color=#f29e38ff>回复等额生命值</color>。\n生命值回复至上限时<color=#f29e38ff>升级</color>，最高可升至<color=#f29e38ff>究极金</color>形态。
E: Minicans start with 1 point of HP. Every time allied characters' HP is <color=#f29e38ff>lost</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>restored</color>, minicans will <color=#f29e38ff>heal for an equivalent amount of HP</color>.\nWhen the HP restored reaches the cans' max HP, the <color=#f29e38ff>minicans evolve</color>, up to the <color=#f29e38ff>Ultra Gold</color> form at max.

C: 本次活动中，可操作指定角色作为<color=#f29e38ff>「魔法师」</color>，与<color=#f29e38ff>「小桶宝力」</color>共同进行战斗。\n<color=#f29e38ff>注意</color>：每个关卡仅能使用<color=#f29e38ff>指定魔法队友</color>进行战斗。
E: In this event, you can control the designated character as a <color=#f29e38ff>Magician</color> and fight alongside <color=#f29e38ff>Litter Pony</color>.\n<color=#f29e38ff>Attention</color>: You can only use the <color=#f29e38ff>designated magical teammates</color> to fight in each stage.

C: 当任意一方选手的「气氛值」达到上限，赛场进入<color=#f29e38ff>「强化鼓舞」</color>状态。\n获得观众支持的选手将获得强大的<color=#f29e38ff>增益效果</color>，以赢得比赛。
E: When either participant's Vibes reach the maximum, the match will enter the <color=#f29e38ff>"Super Hype"</color> state.\nThe participant who earns the audience's support will gain powerful <color=#f29e38ff>buffs</color> to win the match.

C: 首领敌人会主动召唤<color=#f29e38ff>【灵魂石】</color>。\n消灭【灵魂石】，触发<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: The Boss Enemy will actively summon <color=#f29e38ff>Soulstones</color>.\nDefeating the Soulstones will trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlight</color> and grant a massive amount of Vibes.

C: 在有限轮次内击败尽可能多的敌人，努力提升队伍等级。\n队伍等级提升后，可以从随机出现的武器或配饰中进行一次选择。
E: Defeat as many enemies as possible to raise your team's level within the allotted Cycles.\nAfter your Team Level goes up, you'll be able to choose one of the randomly drawn weapons or Accessories.

E: A cannoneer of the Silvermane Guards who wields a portable hand cannon into battle.\nDuring combat, Silvermane Cannoneers will launch brutal chain attacks with their allies. This entity is a phantom borne from your memories.

C: 美梦剧团中取悦宾客的酒侍。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献杯，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「当下」的剧目。此刻是彻夜的欢宴，喜乐的渴望在杯中荡漾，以佳酿进献设宴的主人。
E: A waiter responsible for entertaining the guests in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be serving in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Present." The present is a feast lasting through the night, desire for joy rippling in each cup, offering fine brews to the host who sets the banquet.

C: 嗯，我也来帮忙啦！
E: Mm! I'm here to help, too!

C: 本姑娘出马，怎么可能会输嘛~
E: With me out here, how can we lose~

C: 我会提供充足的支援…就按你想的来吧，丹恒，大胆去做。
E: I'll be right behind you with all the support you need, Dan Heng. Be fearless.

C: 你知道「存护」克里珀的信徒是怎么演变成「星际和平公司」的？神明要筑墙，而人类为了跟随神明的脚步，开始寻找筑墙的建材——这件事充满着黑色幽默。
E: Do you know how the followers of Qlipoth the Preservation became the Interastral Peace Corporation? The Aeon wanted to build a wall, and humanity started searching for building materials so they could follow in Qlipoth's footsteps... it's pretty funny when you think about it.

C: 站好了。
E: Stand still.

C: 毫不意外。
E: No surprise there.

C: 我喜欢的游戏总在同一天更新版本，他们是约好了么？
E: My favorite games always update on the same day. Do you think it's deliberate?

C: 哟，敌人刷新了呀。
E: Huh, more enemies.

C: 这点疼痛不足挂齿。
E: Is that all you got?

C: 颇有收获嘛…
E: That's quite the loot...

C: 很棒的策略。
E: A brilliant strategy.

C: 别放过任何一处破绽。
E: There's always a weakness.

C: 哈，这下没人敢找我们麻烦了吧？
E: Ha, try standing in my way now.

C: 这就让你解脱。
E: I'll free you from your chains.

C: 银鬃铁卫情报官，佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜前来报到。你可以叫我佩拉。
E: Pelageya Sergeyevna, Silvermane Guards Intelligence Officer, at your service. You can call me Pela.

C: 玲宝是我…咳。玲可是我…咳咳。玲可是…贝洛伯格首屈一指的科考专家，也是我喜欢的…好朋友！
E: Lynxy is one of my... Uh, Lynx is one of my... Ahem! Lynx is... one of Belobog's number one researchers, and... one of my best besties!

C: 还有精进的空间。
E: Mm, there's still room for improvement.

C: 原来关键要点在这里…
E: So that's how it works...

C: 我本来以为，来自不同生态系统的小动物肯定没法共同生活，所以我把家里分成了好多个不同的生态区。结果，你看你看——这两个小家伙处得多好！它们明明来自完全不同的两个星球，却能变得如此亲近…真是太奇妙了！
E: I used to think creatures from different ecosystems would be incapable of living together, so I divided my home into different ecological zones, but now... Look! Look how well these two are getting along! They're obviously from different planets, but they're best friends now! Isn't that amazing!?

C: 季度奖金的一部分~
E: A little extra for the quarterly bonus⁓

C: 之前只当她是牌馆的常客，但近来却听说她是太卜司的卜者…那儿不是忙得脚不沾地么？哪还有空去牌馆呀？
E: I just thought she was a frequent customer of the games parlor, but recently I heard she is a diviner from the Divination Commission... Aren't they always busy over there? How can she have the time for a games parlor?

C: 持明族的尊长不好当啊…希望她这一世一切安好。
E: It's hard being the High Elder of the Vidyadhara... I hope she remains well in this lifetime.

C: 彼岸…葬送！
E: A vale... to send you!

C: 我不管，我才不会认输！
E: So what? I won't surrender!

C: 小时候，我若在街上碰到讲云骑英烈传的狐人先生，立刻便走不动道了，要不是我娘把我拽走，我能听他说个一天一夜！
E: When I was a kid, I was mesmerized by the foxian gents on the streets telling the stories of the Cloud Knight martyrs. If my Ma didn't drag me away, I would have listened to them all day!

C: 云骑军素裳，回来报到！
E: Cloud Knight Sushang, reporting!

C: 人人称本座「法眼无遗」，本座却不这么看。推占卜筮，哪有百试百灵的？我是卜者，不是口宣神谕的先知。
E: People say that nothing escapes my omniscia, but that isn't true. No divination can be entirely accurate. I am a diviner, not a prophet who speaks for the divine.

C: 本座腹笥深广，博览万卷，说话时难免会有些引经据典的习惯，却总有人吹毛求疵，要我「说人话」…哼。
E: I am educated and well-read, and so sometimes I can't help but quote the classics. Still, there are those that tell me I'm speaking "Fu Xuan." Hmph...

C: 晚上瞧见那位大姐姐可把我吓坏了！一看就知是长年操劳工作，失眠久郁，情志纷乱的病征。要我说，非得调养个百八十年，什么活也别干，不然不见好转。
E: I ran into her on a dark night once — she scared me half to death! Overworked, chronic insomnia, emotional turmoil — all the signs are there. If you ask me, she'd need to take it easy for a few decades to show any signs of recovery.

C: 疗效好！
E: Look lively!

C: 她似乎同我谈起飞过的星星、行遍的奇景、逃离的险境……但我都不记得啦。那些记忆，在我的脑袋里转啊转…任我如何都抓不着。
E: We talked about the stars we flew past, the views we saw together, and the dangers we escaped. But... I can't remember the details. The things we said and did together have all been shrouded in a layer of mist... a mist I cannot see through...

C: 剑刃上的返照，映出诸多过往。
E: The blade's reflection illuminates the past.

C: 如今，时异势殊。
E: The times are changed beyond recognition.

C: 此地有我煽风点火，你大可潜入敌方为所欲为。
E: I'll fan the flames. You sneak in from the shadows~

C: 稍事休息后，就该奔向下一片战场了。
E: A short respite, then time for the next fight.

C: 如果一个人看起来像个火锅，闻起来像个火锅，办起事来更像个火锅…那我只能将他诊断为一个火锅。
E: If it looks like a hot pot, smells like a hot pot, and acts like a hot pot... I can only diagnose him as being a hot pot.

C: 成为一道影子意味自动门会常常无视你。罢了，我通常也不走正门。
E: Being a shadow means that automatic doors often don't detect you. Whatever. I don't usually use the main entrance anyway.

C: 我是纯美骑士中的「授勋骑士」，镌刻整齐的铠甲是我们的象征。
E: Among the Knights of Beauty, I am one of the Honorclad — we are distinguished by our engraved armor.

C: 遵循纯美骑士的职责。
E: The Knights' duty is my guiding light.

C: 纯美，永驻。
E: The Beauty... is eternal.

C: 人类太过高估逻辑，执着于理性会成为情绪奴隶——科学出自狂热，这是种天赋。
E: Humans overestimate the infallibility of logic, and in clinging to reason can become slaves to their emotions. Science is born from fanaticism — it is a gift.

C: 我听不惯现代乐，听戏却极易入迷，琴弦拨动，时间便流往过去。
E: I've never been able to really get into modern music, but I find opera enchanting. Time passes like a river whenever I listen to the strings and voices in an opera performance.

C: 让我再睡睡嘛……
E: Can I finish my nap first?

C: 我会珍惜这次机会…危险的记忆，总是更迷人一点。
E: I'll cherish this opportunity... dangerous memories are always a bit more alluring.

C: 不祥之征，重现。
E: Again, the ill tidings manifest.

C: 是你呀…我们都应当珍惜彼此存在的时光。
E: So it's you... Our time spent with one another is precious.

C: 我曾作为「铎音」聆听受苦者的哀告，知晓这世上不存在白白救人的神。要改变什么，人只能依靠自己。
E: I was once "Bronze Melodia," listening to the pleas of those who were suffering, knowing there were no gods who would save people unconditionally. To change anything, you can only rely on yourself.

C: 需要帮助么？
E: Need a hand?

C: 可别让我失望。
E: Don't let me down now.

C: 难得休息，不如跟我回「慈玉典押」坐坐？
E: Finally, a rare break. Why don't we head to the Bonajade Exchange and hang out for a bit?

C: 拜拜。
E: Bye-bye.

C: 怎么，没见过好看的？
E: What's wrong? Never seen perfection up close before?

C: 一同编织前途吧。
E: Let us weave the future together.

C: 缇宝：特大喜讯~\n缇宁：喏。
E: Tribbie: Huge news~\nTrinnon: Hehe.

C: 直击灵魂！
E: Straight to the soul!

C: 猜猜我有几条命？
E: Guess how many lives I have? Mmm?

C: 那位大人很早便成了半神，她心思神秘，行踪更是捉摸不定…她总抱怨逐火之旅一定会让她赔得血本无归，但总感觉背后还有什么无法说出口的苦衷……
E: She has been a demigod for a long time. Her thoughts are mysterious, her whereabouts elusive... She often laments that the Flame-Chase Journey is a business that will eventually leave her with nothing. Yet there seems to be an unspoken sorrow hidden behind her words.

C: 愿阁下的晖光，为灾厄中的众人带来希望。
E: My lord, may your light bring hope to everyone in this calamity.

C: 我会铭记此刻的温度。
E: I shall remember this warmth.

C: 战场如课堂，期待您的真知灼见。
E: The battlefield is like a classroom. I look forward to your valuable insight.

C: 我的性命，本就微不足道。
E: My existence is of little consequence.

C: 拨开阴翳与云雾，重见澄澈晴空！
E: Dispel the gloom and restore clear skies once more!

C: 会不会还有其他解法呢……
E: Could there be another solution...?

C: 盛宴在即，想来共演一曲么？
E: The feast draws near. Shall we play a piece together?

C: 听，那风暴的喧响在呼唤。
E: Listen. The storm's cacophony is calling.

C: 下次，我来为你撑伞~
E: Next time it rains... I'll be there, umbrella in hand~

C: 这位优秀的裁衣师本该为翁法罗斯编织出更多的回忆，若是我的话，一定会为自己无法亲眼见证翁法罗斯的未来而感到遗憾。
E: Such a talented tailor should have woven more memories for Amphoreus. If it were me, I would certainly feel regret for not being able to witness Amphoreus's future with my own eyes.

C: 瓦尔特先生，请放心，我们已经不是新手无名客了。
E: Be at ease, Mr. Yang. We're no longer the fledgling Nameless we once were.

C: 就像花儿留下种子，种子又盛开了花。记忆的每一道涟漪都闪烁着相同的色彩，你更喜欢哪个「我」呢？嘻…不用说出来，「爱」就是这样，捉摸不透，却又始终如一♪
E: Flowers leave seeds behind, and these seeds bloom into new flowers. Every ripple of memory sparkles with the same shade. So, which "me" do you prefer? Heheh... You don't need to say it. That's just how "love" is, unfathomable, yet always the same ♪

C: 凯撒，再带领我们冲锋一次！
E: Lead us in a charge once more, O Imperator!

C: 攻击按钮切换
E: Switch Ability

C: 轮盘
E: Shortcut Wheel

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
若开拓者在以往版本完成过对应角色的试用关，可以直接领取奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.
If Trailblazers have already completed the trials of corresponding characters in past versions, they can directly claim the rewards.

C: 尽快消灭【幼蛰虫】使【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】退出【基因复制】状态。
E: Defeat the "Juvenile Stings" as quickly as possible to force the "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" out of its "Gene Duplication" state.

C: %TargetName进入【天敌】状态，可无视【速效进化】效果造成暴击伤害
E: %TargetName enters the "Nemesis" state, and can deal CRIT DMG while ignoring the "Rapid Evolution" effect

C: 回忆最终如何呈现，是由你决定的。在那场美梦结束时，你以流萤渴盼的方式，将她铭记。 做梦的人，也是造梦的人。造梦的人，也是做梦的人。 献出自己的往事，才能织就最美好的梦境。 人们不会沉溺其中，不愿复醒。他们会在美梦中，重新获得面对未来的勇气。 然后，向着明天。
E: You decide how memories are ultimately presented. When that beautiful dream ended, you immortalized Firefly in the way she longed for. The dreamer is also the dream-maker. The dream-maker is also the dreamer. Only by offering up one's past can the most beautiful dreams be woven. People will not lose themselves within them, unwilling to awaken. In their beautiful dreams, they will regain the courage to face the future. And then, walk toward tomorrow.

E: A shell covered in strange matter, distorted by a Stellaron's will as if a suit Glamoth armor corroded by "Propagation." Deep within the dreamscape, the Swarm Disaster resurfaces in this form.

C: 总有一天，我们会从梦中醒来。「秩序」崩解，哲学的胎儿自高台坠落，而知更鸟从空中接住星期日。「哥哥，梦，该醒了。」
E: One day, we'll all wake up from our dreams. As Order disintegrated, the Embryo of Philosophy plummeted from its high pedestal. Robin caught Sunday midair. "Brother... The dream... Is over."

C: 知更鸟利用「同谐」力量为初入梦境的你调律，但依然感到力不从心。在星期日的帮助下，对你的调律才得以顺利完成。
E: Upon your first entry into the dreamscape, Robin used the power of Harmony to perform a tuning for you, but felt her strength was insufficient. The process was only completed successfully with Sunday's assistance.

E: Gallagher explained to Firefly that Mikhail wanted the Nameless to witness his legacy. Firefly found it romantic, and at the same time, the call of a doll caught her attention.

C:
艾格勒的千目尚未闭合时，
世上曾有一种铁做的鸟儿。
它们是天空之民的造物，
精钢的身躯，却没有双脚，只能终日飞翔；
——为战而生的武器，当然不被允许落地。
操使着无足的铁鸽，天空之民征服了天空，
随后便把矛头指向彼此。
铁鸽们分属于烈阳与阴雨，
如视仇寇般相互冲锋、啄击，
又纷纷从空中坠落，像一片铁做的雨。
触碰大地之时，无足的鸟儿才终于得以休息，
并第一次闻到了青草的香气。
E:
Before Aquila's Thousand Eyes were closed,
there was a kind of bird made of iron.
They were the creations of Skyfolk:
Forged in steel, yet no legs to stand on, they roam the skies for all eternity.
Born as the war machine, they were never allowed to touch the ground.
With these footless iron doves, the Skyfolk conquered the skies,
only to turn their spears against each other.
The iron doves were divided between the Blazing Sun and the Cloudy Rain,
charging and pecking at each other like mortal enemies,
falling from the sky like a rain of iron.
Only when they touched the earth did these footless birds finally rest,
and for the first time, they caught the scent of green grass.

E: Buffered Damage

E: Respite By The Waters

E: Dirge

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。完成赛事组安排的数场定级赛，确定你的初始等级吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Complete several placement matches arranged by the tournament organizers to determine your initial rank!

C: 但我相信，你不会因为一名星核猎手的突然到访而惊讶，对吧？你我本就是这样的存在——星穹列车逐光而行，在身后投下长长的阴影。
E: But I trust you won't be surprised by a Stellaron Hunter's sudden visit. After all, that's what our two groups are. The Astral Express travels in pursuit of the light, casting long shadows in its wake.

C: 彼时，一场「同谐」的盛会即将开幕。而一封邀请函，恰好寄到了你们的手中——
E: At that time, a grand celebration of the Harmony was about to begin. And as fate would have it, an invitation found its way into your hands...

C: 以及，前橡木家主，星期日。他是「秩序」的命途行者，将在不久后，篡夺齐响诗班的伟力，与你们为敌。
E: And then there was Sunday, the former head of the Oak Family. A Pathstrider of the Order, who would soon usurp the power of the Harmonious Choir and become your enemy.

C: 别死就行。
E: Just don't die.

C: 没错。大打出手也没用，这可是人家的地盘，跟送命没区别。
E: Exactly. And a brawl won't change a thing. This is their turf. You'd be throwing your life away.

C: 原来如此，是地下通道啊。
E: Oh, I get it now. It's the underground tunnel.

C: 就像你说的，是来追忆一些旧事。
E: Like you said, I'm here to reminisce about old times.

C: 你呢，你又为何而来？
E: What about you? What brings you here?

C: 哎呀，我倒是没料到，会被一只小鸟套了话。
E: Geez, I didn't expect to get played by a little bird.

C: 你也很聪明，几乎把一切都猜对了，唯独搞错了一件事——
E: You're also quite clever. You got almost everything right, except for one thing...

C: 失声的小鸟，有没有一种可能，美梦从来都没有变。它之所以不再欢迎你，只是因为你「长大」了。
E: Silent little bird, have you considered that maybe your sweet dreams never changed at all? They just stopped welcoming you because you "grew up".

C: 如果是我误会了…事后，我会认真补偿。
E: If I'm wrong about this... I'll make it up to you properly afterward.

C: 那片舞台名为「美梦」。每个人都各怀目的，希求将其实现。而愿望在交织与碰撞时，火花总是极为纷繁，令人难以看清。
E: That stage is called the "sweet dream." Everyone upon it carries their own desires, striving to see them fulfilled. Yet when those desires intertwine and collide, the sparks that fly are dazzling, and clarity itself becomes obscured.

C: 是忆域迷因，匹诺康尼有些传说提到过它，并把它称为「死亡」。我捕捉到了一些不同寻常之处，但没来得及看清。
E: It's a Memory Zone Meme. Some Penaconian legends mentioned it and called it "Death." I caught something unusual, but couldn't get a clear look at it.

C: 嗯，不是今天。虽然为时已晚，但也有其他事，我能为她去做。
E: Hmm, not today. Though it's already too late, there are still other things I can do for her.

C: 现在，该我提问了：你究竟是谁？
E: Now, it's my turn to ask: who exactly are you?

C: 尚不是时候。
E: It's not yet time.

C: 在分别前，我也送上一则忠告吧——
E: Before we part ways, let me give you a piece of advice...

C: 梦想之地，匹诺康尼。
E: Land of the Dreams, Penacony.

C: 可我…我分明是在…帮这里对抗虫灾……
E: But I... I was clearly... helping fight against the Swarm here...

C: 我不知内情，星期日先生说，你会明白的。
E: I don't know the details, but Mr. Sunday said you would understand.

C: 还有…谁说我在那时就背叛了他们？我来到这里，就是为了完成冥火大公的遗愿。
E: And besides... who said I betrayed them back then? I came here to fulfill Duke Inferno's last wishes.

C: 原来如此，「一节已被蛀朽的橡木」…那时你并非信口胡言。
E: I see now... "A piece of worm-eaten oak"... You weren't just making that up.

C: 这一刻还是到来了，因遭到欺骗而不满，因回忆的冲突而困惑…你此刻的表情，和我预想中的是多么相似啊。
E: The moment has finally come. Resentful from being deceived, confused by conflicting memories... Your expression right now is so similar to what I had imagined.

C: 通过米哈伊尔留下的梦泡，你们重返了稚子的梦，见证了他的{RUBY_B#开拓}遗产{RUBY_E#}。但流萤并非行于「开拓」，无法进入其中。
E: You returned to a child's dream through a dream bubble left by Mikhail and witnessed his {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}legacy{RUBY_E#}. However, Firefly was not a Trailblazer, so she couldn't enter it.

C: 米哈伊尔…是你杀死了他？
E: Mikhail... Was it you who killed him?

C: 你所知晓的梦主，是如此十恶不赦？
E: Is that what you think of the Dreammaster? Someone so unforgivably evil?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>众星残忍，只因他们从未将热力分予万众，只为自身熊熊燃烧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The stars are cruel, only because they have never shared their heat with the masses, burning fiercely only for themselves.</color>

C: 然而，奋战，挫折，胜利——这一切都是星期日编织的幻觉。「太一之梦」已然笼罩了整个阿斯德纳星系。
E: Yet that battle, the setbacks, the victory... was just an illusion woven by Sunday. Ena's Dream had already enveloped the entire Asdana System.

C: 前往最后的舞台。
E: Head to the final stage.

C: 这边，亲爱的。
E: This way, darling.

C: 姬子
E: Himeko

C: 雷电忘川守芽衣
E: Raiden Bosenmori Mei

C: 我可以这样做，但迟早有一天，我会重新还给{F#她}{M#他}——以我自己的方式。
E: I can do that, but I'll give the memories back to {M#him}{F#her} sooner or later... in my own way.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>总有人不希望「被拯救」，他们想要「自己拯救自己」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>There will always be those who don't want to "be saved," who want to "save themselves."</color>

C: 那么……
E: So...

C: 解离尚未结束。而眼下的这个瞬间，她的脑海中就只剩下「一个名字」，和「一个心愿」。
E: The dissolution is not yet over. And in this very instant, her mind holds only "one name" and "one wish."

C: 「如果你想，可以随时回这片洞穴找我，我就住在这。」老者收紧肩上的布包，「或许很快，你就会意识到离群索居的好处。」
E: "If you want, you can come back to find me in these caves anytime. This is where I live." The old man tightens the cloth bag on his shoulder. "Perhaps soon, you'll understand the benefits of living in solitude."

C: 「此山是我开，此路是我栽。不对……」紫色葡萄开口说道——看来它是个活物。
E: "This mountain's mine to claim, and this path's mine to... wait, that's not right..." says the purple grape. Apparently it is a living thing.

C: 你是说，向命运低下高贵的桶盖，屈辱地将自己的使命交由后继者完成？这和认输别无二致。
E: You mean, bowing our noble lid to destiny and handing over our mission to our successors in humiliation? That's no different from giving up.

C: 匹诺康尼命运的众多分岔路中，这一条在彼时走到尽头…再往前是一片望不到底的虚空。
E: Among the many branching paths of Penacony's destiny, this one has reached its end... with nothing but an endless void lying ahead.

C: 时钟的点缀，书籍排列构成的线条，乃至书脊上每一个烫金的字体，仿佛都冥冥中服膺于一个伟大且和谐的比例。
E: The ornate clocks, the lines formed by organized books, and even every gilded letter on their spines. It all seemed to mystically conform to some grand and harmonious proportion.

C: *我们*的苹果糖也很可爱！小灰已经见到过啦。
E: Our Candied Apple is super cute too! Little Gray has already seen them!

C: 积木迷钟
